C: 为什么三月七要拍照？ 「第一，自己这样的女孩子应该喜欢这么做。」 「第二，所有拍下来的东西，就不会忘啦。」 三月七对拍照有什么心得？ 「第一，对黑暗料理需要进行局部细节拍摄，因为『拍过等于吃过，要细细品味』。」 「第二，只要自己闭着眼睛拍照，就一定能拍到对方闭着眼的表情。」 为什么三月七要把相机挂在身上？ 「下次谁还想把我封在冰里，就必须把相机一起封进去！」 所以三月七为什么不用手机拍照呢？ 「对哦，为什么呢——等等，什么为什么，这是仪式感嘛！」
E: Why does March 7th take photos? "First of all, girls like me should like this kind of pastime." "Besides, I won't forget anything that I keep a photo of." What has March 7th come to learn about photography? "Number one, when taking pictures of terrible cuisines, all the details must be clearly visible on the pictures because 'Taking pictures of food is equal to eating them. Every detail matters.'" "Number two, as long as you take a picture with your eyes closed, you will be able to capture an expression of your subject with their eyes closed." Why is March 7th always wearing her camera? "Because if anyone ever seals me away in ice again, at least I'll have my camera with me!" So why doesn't March 7th just use the camera on her phone? "Oh yeah, why not — hang on, it's because of that sense of formality!"

C: 「星星尚且能遵循自己的轨迹穿行，那人类呢…人类真的无法掌握自己的命运吗？」 优渥的家庭背景给予了艾丝妲探索星空的力量，但也成为了她本人的束缚。 随着年岁增长，艾丝妲想当天文学家的誓言，逐渐被家族视为某种旁门左道——她甚至不记得已经有多少次在家族会议上和亲戚争论这个问题了。 直到某次会议结束后，一个人偶少女从门外走入。而刚刚还盛气凌人的其中一人，在她身旁却是一副唯唯诺诺的姿态。 「就这个小姑娘吧。」 「但是她…」 「什么但是，我大老远过来听你们那些狗屁不通的学术汇报，还不如听这小姑娘和你们吵架有趣。」 「……」 「三天之内，我要在空间站里看到她。」 人偶少女说完，头也不回地离去。
E: "The stars follow their own orbits, but what about humans... Can we humans ever hope to control our own destiny?" A wealthy family background grants Asta the power to explore the stars, but also become her personal shackles. As she grows older, Asta's vow to become an astronomer was viewed as increasingly radical by her family. She begins to lose count of how many times she'd argue during family meetings about this very thing. Until one day, after a family meeting, a puppet girl walks in, and one of the family members who were so domineering a moment ago suddenly changes into a yes-man. "That's the girl." "But she'd..." "No buts. I didn't come all this way to listen to your garbage academic reports. I'd rather listen to this girl debate with you." "..." "I want to see her on the space station within three days." And with that, the puppet girl walks straight out without looking back.

C: 「今天就练到这儿吧。来，小子，坐。」 「…这就完事了？我还想着今天加练几组呢！」 「你小子，别逞能了。赶紧过来！」 「哈哈哈，来了来了！」 「小子——我问你个问题，你老实回答。」 「哦？这是啥，师徒交心环节？你问呗，师父。」 「我问你，打拳这件事——你是打心底喜欢吗？」 「哈哈哈，怎么突然问这个？当然喜欢了！要不然，我能在你身边坚持这么久？」 「你小子，别抖机灵！认真回答，听见没有？」 「这么严肃啊…行吧。非要掏心窝子地说…也算不上那么喜欢吧。」 「…嗯，总算听到句实话。那我问你…如果有一天，下层区不再需要『地火』的保护了…你还会继续练拳吗？」 「唔，我想想啊…应该会吧？」 「为什么？你站上拳台从来不是为了赢什么金腰带，别以为我没看出来。如果下层真的能太平下来…你还有挥拳的理由吗？」 「师父，你以前说过吧？不管什么年代都有恶人。哪怕裂界的怪物都死绝了，人和人之间也会因为些鸡毛蒜皮的小事争个你死我活。」 「嗯…我好像是说过这话。」 「只要这世界上还有恶人，只要还有善良的人需要保护——」卢卡站起身来，「——我就会继续挥拳！」
E: "We'll call it a day here. Come, boy. Take a seat." "...This is all? I was planning to practice a few more sets today!" "Oh, c'mon, stop pushing yourself. Get over here!" "Hahaha. I'm coming. I'm coming!" "Boy, I'm gonna ask you a question, and you need to give me an honest answer." "Oh? What is this heart-to-heart we're having? Go on. Ask away." "Look, when it comes to fighting... Do you actually like fighting?" "Hahaha! Why are you asking this all of a sudden? Of course I do! Why else would I stick with you for so long?" "Don't be smart with me, boy! Answer the question!" "You're really serious about this... Okay. To be completely honest? I don't like it that much." "Mmm... finally got an honest answer out of you. So, if the Underworld no longer needs Wildfire's protection... would you still train yourself as a fighter?" "Mmm, lemme think... I probably will." "Why? You didn't get into fighting because you want the golden belt. Don't think you can hide that from me. If the Underworld really became peaceful one day... would you still have a reason to fight?" "Sir, I remember you saying that there are bad people in every era. Even if all the Fragmentum monsters die off, people would still fight to the death for every little thing." "Hmm... I did say that." "As long as there are still bad people in this world, and as long as there are still good people I need to protect—" Luka stands up, "then I will keep on fighting!"

C:
停云自幼便不同凡响。

要知道，狐人天生便是「眼疾手快」的代名词——他们那闪电般的神经反射和敏锐的感官造就了这点，而这也使得狐人幼时大多淘气顽皮，讨俏得很。可停云呢？这位耳朵尖尖的小女孩总一副绵绵软软的模样，逢人不仅不猛薅人毛发，哪怕是被人薅了毛发，她还能凭一挂天真无邪的笑示人，更要奶声奶气地劝人住手……

虽不难理解人性有别，但比起忙不迭拆家的同龄狐人幼童，如此不善争斗的小停云仍旧急坏了她那在天舶司双双就任武备士的双亲。见小停云继承家业不成，两位最终是断了念想，任由孩子自由发展——

于是，罗浮的贸易史上便多了一颗耀眼的新星。狐人少女凭借自身温润的性格与才华，先后连接起十六个世界的贸易使团，还与星际和平公司重订了互惠协定。仙舟人的贸易节庆「海市」，在她的力促下也成为声名远扬星海的盛典。
E:
Tingyun was always different from the others.

Foxians are synonymous with the quick and the agile. Their lightning-fast reflexes and keen senses have resulted in this, and it also makes for cheeky, playful juvenile foxians. But Tingyun? This pointy-eared girl always looks fluffy and soft. Not only does she not vigorously pull on others' fur when meeting someone, she herself remains calm even if someone pulls on her fur. With an innocent smile and her sweet voice, she would even urge the other person to stop...

It's not hard to understand differences in human nature. But compared to her foxian peers all busy tearing up their homes, Tingyun — who'd never been any good at combat — frustrated her parents who both served in the military at the Sky-Faring Commission. Seeing as Tingyun wouldn't inherit the family business, the two shook off their prejudices and let their daughter blossom freely...

As a result, a dazzling new star of trade dawned aboard the Xianzhou Luofu. With her warm personality and talented skills, this foxian girl successively completed trade missions to sixteen different planets, and re-signed another bilateral agreement with the IPC. The famous Xianzhou trade bonanza — the Grand Fair — also developed into a famous fiesta under her advocacy.

C:
可怜又弱小的狐人小姑娘，也是怕鬼捉鬼的罗浮十王司见习判官。
名为「尾巴」的岁阳被十王司的判官封印在她的颀尾上，使她成为了招邪的「贞凶之命」。
害怕妖魔邪物，却总是受命捉拿邪祟，完成艰巨的除魔任务；
自认能力不足，却无法鼓起勇气辞职，只好默默害怕地继续下去。
E:
While this foxian girl may seem fragile and weak, she is actually a judge-in-training of the Ten-Lords Commission, responsible for capturing evil.
The judges sealed a heliobus named "Tail" onto her tail, making her a "Cursed One" with a tendency to attract evil beings.
Despite trembling at the sight of evil spirits, she is always entrusted with the arduous task of eradicating their presence.
She is well aware of her incompetence but lacks the courage to resign, so she forces herself to press on despite her fear.

C: 「拾线月末，神殿丢失面包若干，干果一袋，蜡烛数根。 失物虽微，然而亵渎神圣，扰乱秩序，是为大罪。 经勘察，嫌疑人灰发猫耳，身形瘦小。其人行动灵活，诡计多端，需多加小心。 提供线索者，赏金五千，活捉者，赏金一万。」 ——张贴在多洛斯城中的通缉令 「抓住她，抓住她！」 遍布监牢，污水横流的广场，鞭打与哀嚎不绝于耳。 衣衫褴褛的女孩奔逐于人头攒动的街道，金色的鲜血一路滴落。 她跑过高台，大腹便便的祭司向着满城的信众发表演讲。 「刻法勒在上，让我们赞美感恩这个美好的世界……」 「正直，诚信，宽恕…… 「——我们用美德浇灌灵魂，用爱感化灾厄……」 女孩刚一回头，穷追不舍的猎犬向她扑来，脸庞又添上三道伤痕。 「金钱与财物对于泰坦而言一文不值，然而却能当作汝等虔诚的证明……」 欢呼声中，绫罗、美食、珠宝被抛向高台，堆积成山。 「不要听信那些黄金裔的狂言。相信刻法勒，只要我们真心祈祷，神明便会降下拯救……」 她挤过人群，手上的面包不知掉在了哪里。 她艰难四顾，只有居高临下的面孔像骚动的潮水一样向她涌来。 双腿渐渐发软，嘲笑的眼神、恐吓的微笑在眼中逐渐模糊。 但远方的声音已经咬到了她的耳朵，她不能停下。 「小偷！」 「罪犯！」 「混蛋！」 闭上双眼，她转身跳下足有百丈的城墙。 「好…好饿……」 冰凉的河水淹没了她的思绪。 在以生命为赌注的奔跑中，她赢得了第一次惨胜。
E: "At the end of the Month of Weaving, bread, a bag of dried fruit, and numerous candles were stolen from the temple. Though the value of the items may be trivial, sacrilege and disorder both merit severe punishment. The suspect is gray-haired, cat-eared, slight build. Considered agile and cunning. Exercise caution. A bounty is set: 5,000 for leads. 10,000 if captured alive." —A wanted poster in Dolos "Catch her, catch her!" The square was lined with cells, reeking of raw sewage and echoing with whips and wails. A girl in tattered rags sprinted through the crowded streets, trailing golden blood in her wake. She raced past the platform, where a potbellied priest was delivering a sermon to the city's gathered faithful. "By Kephale's grace, let us praise and give thanks for this beautiful world..." "Integrity, honesty, mercy..." "—Let us water our souls with virtue, and use love to temper tragedy..." Just as the girl glanced back, the snarling hounds pursuing her lunged, carving three fresh gashes on her face. "Treasure and wealth mean naught to Titans, yet they prove your devotion..." Amid cheers, silks, delicacies, and jewels rained onto the platform, forming a small mountain. "Shun the Chrysos Heirs' raving lies. Have faith in Kephale. So long as we pray earnestly, the god shall deliver salvation..." She pushed her way through the crowd, losing the bread in her hand somewhere along the way. Desperately, she looked around, only to find condescending faces staring down at her, surging toward her like a restless tide. Her knees went weak as mocking glances and threatening smiles blurred before her eyes. But the distant voices had already burrowed into her ears, and she couldn't stop. "Thief!" "Criminal!" "Wretch!" Closing her eyes, she plunged from that three-hundred-meter-high wall. "So... hungry..." Icy waters swallowed her consciousness. And so, she claimed her first pyrrhic victory in a race with her life on the line.

C: 北境帝国，失落的王朝，寒冷的疆土燃烧着征伐的野心。\n君主刻律德菈，执握「律法」火种的黄金裔，布局设子，与神相弈，审判异心的罪囚，为此世奠定逐火的基业\n——「这绝非终点，翁法罗斯的征途，当是银河群星！」
E: The Northern Empire, a lost dynasty, where its frozen lands burn with the fever of conquest.\nSovereign Cerydra, the Chrysos Heir who wields the Coreflame of "Law," weaves her schemes, contends with the gods, passes judgment upon the faithless, and lays the foundation of Flame-Chase into this world.\n..."This is far from the end. Amphoreus's journey is set to blaze across the stars!"

C:
看，在永恒之地，展开一卷无名的史诗——
听。风中的歌谣传唱再创世的哀歌，看见金血流过安眠的花丛，火种撑起疮痍的大地。
就像种子即将死去，诗篇无人问津。

因为虚假的结局将故事的扉页铐上枷锁。
数算荧荧的冷光，刺痛祈盼黎明的眼睛。
岁月未曾流淌，太阳将要毁伤——这是故事的高潮，抑或终局？
不，还差…最后一笔。

于是你在每一页留下「开拓」的字迹，向下坠落是向另一端升起。
你们奔行在记忆的泥浆，用亿万颗火种烧蚀冰冷的数列，接住破碎的胚芽。
当一页新生的空白出现，你落下一笔，它也向过去…荡开涟漪。

荧荧的光闪烁在记忆留白的夜空，尚未到来的流星，被寄予永恒的期待。
十三声心跳，在高歌逐火之旅，因为那是他们深爱的土地。
故事的扉页被再次翻开，那里写着有关生命的预言。

听！风中的歌谣如是传唱，记忆的种子在群星处生长，因为
——银河已知晓「翁法罗斯」的姓名。
E:
Look, in The Eternal Land, a nameless epic unfolds.
Listen. The wind's ballad sings the elegy of Era Nova, and witnesses the golden blood flowing through slumbering flowers, as the Coreflames sustain the scarred earth.
Like seeds about to perish, poems fade into obscurity.

For false endings shackle the story's beginning.
Count the cold fluorescent lights, sting the eyes that pray for dawn.
Time has yet to flow, the sun is set to die. Is this the story's climax, or the finale?
No, there's still... one final stroke.

And so you leave traces of "Trailblaze" on every page, where falls turn into ascents on another end.
You race through the mire of memories, using billions of Coreflames to scorch the frigid data sequences, and catching the shattered seed germs.
When a new blank page appears, you make your mark. It, too, will form ripples toward the past.

Glimmering lights twinkle in the night sky of blank memories, where a shooting star yet to come has been entrusted with the anticipation of eternity.
Thirteen heartbeats sing proudly for the Flame-Chase Journey, for that was the land they deeply cherished.
The first page of the story unfolds once more, inscribed with prophecies of life.

Listen! The wind sings a melody, the Seeds of Memory grow among the stars, for
the cosmos now knows the name, "Amphoreus."

C: 椒丘：山下有火
E: Jiaoqiu: A Warning Fire

C:
目光从陌生的天花板上移开后，你看着周围的各色「奇物」，脑袋中似乎残留着一个女人的声音，只是现在的情况不允许你确定自己是否能马上清晰地回忆起她。
「当你有机会做出选择的时候，不要让自己后悔。」
于是你选择先听这位「三月七」与刚刚那位已经离开的「丹恒」的话，至少，他们看着不像是坏人。
好了，现在路上有了伴，先离开这里吧。
E:
You move your gaze away from the unfamiliar ceiling and look at the variety of Curios around you. A woman's voice echoes in your head but you're in no position to confirm whether you can clearly remember it.
"When you have a chance to make a choice, make one that you know you won't regret..."
You decide to first listen to March 7th and Dan Heng, who had just left. At least they don't look like bad people.
Alright, now that there are companions, it's time to leave this place.

C: 看来，只有乘坐电梯才能前往空间站的主控舱段——看着还挺近的。
E: It would seem that the only way to the space station's master control zone is through the elevator — it doesn't seem to be too far.

C: 你睁开眼，发现自己仍在空间站，还好这次不需要再面对什么陌生的天花板。\n刚刚的经历仍在你的脑中盘旋，如果这一切是真的，你希望姬子就在附近。\n你的心中，还有一堆疑问需要她的解答。
E: You open your eyes and find yourself still in the space station, staring at a ceiling that doesn't look so strange.\nYou are living through what just happened. It seems your mind is not playing tricks on you. You wish Himeko was here.\nYou have so many questions to ask.

C: 黑塔原来不止一个……仔细想想，倒也合理。这位黑塔要求你前往她的办公室。\n原来，黑塔联合天才俱乐部的几位会员开发了一个「模拟宇宙」，用来探求宇宙的真理。\n体验一下试试吧。
E: So, there's more than one Herta... It makes sense now that you think about it. This Herta wants you to head to her office.\nLooks like Herta developed a Simulated Universe together with a few other members of the Genius Society to explore the truth of the universe.\nLet's give it a try.

C: 你在门外发现了同样夜不能寐的布洛妮娅。\n失眠症患者之间是会相互吸引的…现在你明白了，这恐怕不是一句玩笑话。\n和布洛妮娅聊聊，问问她为何这样忧心忡忡。
E: You discover Bronya outside. She seems to be having trouble sleeping as well.\nInsomniacs often attract one another... Now you understand that the saying might not be just a joke.\nTalk to Bronya and ask her why she looks so worried.

C:
你们来到集市广场，却发现本应装着医疗物资的箱子早已被人洗劫一空。
不过虽说是「洗劫」，肇事者的犯罪手法对于裂界生物来说未免也太过文明…
布洛妮娅和希儿勘察犯罪现场后，一致认定此事多半并非怪物所为。
此人恐怕尚未走远，配合希儿在广场上展开地毯式搜索吧！
E:
You come to the market square only to find the crates for medical supplies looted empty.
The looter, however, seems too gentle for creatures in the Fragmentum, judging by what happened at the scene...
Bronya and Seele have arrived at the scene and both of them think that this does not look like something that monsters would do.
The perpetrator is likely to still be in the vicinity. Join Seele in her search on the square and leave no stone unturned!

C:
你们来到集市广场，却发现本应装着医疗物资的箱子早已被人洗劫一空。
不过虽说是「洗劫」，肇事者的犯罪手法对于裂界生物来说未免也太过文明…
布洛妮娅和希儿勘察犯罪现场后，一致认定此事多半并非怪物所为。
此人恐怕尚未走远，配合希儿在广场上展开地毯式搜索吧！
E:
You come to the market square only to find the crates for medical supplies looted empty.
The looter, however, seems too gentle for creatures in the Fragmentum, judging by what happened at the scene...
Bronya and Seele have arrived at the scene and both of them think that this does not look like something that monsters would do.
The perpetrator is likely to still be in the vicinity. Join Seele in her search on the square and leave no stone unturned!

C:
能源中枢在希露瓦的操作下成功上线，连接栈桥控制终端的管线不出意外已经全部打通。
打倒了盘踞在终端附近的自动机兵后，启动终端只不过是时间问题。
然而对各位而言，眼下最宝贵的事物就是时间——在此处稍有拖沓便可能前功尽弃。
不要浪费时间，迅速操作终端，通过栈桥吧！
E:
The energy hub is now online thanks to Serval. The lines connecting to the gear bridge terminals should all be opened.
After defeating the automatons stationed near the terminal, it's only a matter of time before the terminal is activated.
However, time is the most crucial resource right now — the slightest delay may ruin all your efforts.
Time is of the essence. Quickly, use the terminal and cross the gear bridge!

C: 在雅利洛-Ⅵ上旅行至此，你已经充分学会如何以理服人了。大守护者最忠实的戍卫官此刻也终于同你站在一条战线上…只可惜他无法同你一道前进，共同见证贝洛伯格的结局。\n但杰帕德在此处把守着阻隔裂界的大门——只要你一声令下，他和他的亲信铁卫便会迅速结成战阵，为你们开辟前路。
E: Thanks to your time on Jarilo-VI, you have mastered the art of persuasion. The Supreme Guardian's most loyal Captain is now on your side... It's a pity that he cannot go with you and witness what awaits Belobog.\nGepard is guarding the gate to the Fragmentum. He and his best guards will form up and clear the way for you once you are ready.

C: 一切准备停当，你们即将出发前往「迴星港」——罗浮仙舟的造船重地。在那里，星核猎手邀请你们抵达仙舟的秘密即将揭晓。
E: All is ready for you to set out for Stargazer Navalia — a core hub for shipbuilding on the Xianzhou Luofu. There, the secret behind the Stellaron Hunter's invitation for you to come aboard the Xianzhou will be revealed.

C: 穷观阵全力运转，阐演卡芙卡所历旧事，以揭示她的来意。但符玄却得到了一个难以置信的结果：星核猎手与仙舟上的星核灾变并无关系。他们此来所为，是为拯救仙舟。\n错愕的太卜按照承诺，将卡芙卡交给了你。也许她可以破解你心中更多的疑团。
E: The Matrix of Prescience runs at full power to simulate Kafka's past and unveil her goal, but Fu Xuan receives an unbelievable answer — The Stellaron Hunters have nothing to do with the Stellaron disaster currently unfolding on the Xianzhou. In fact, the Stellaron Hunters came to save Xianzhou.\nShocked, the master diviner hands over Kafka to you as promised. Perhaps Kafka can answer some of your burning questions.

C: 另一边，联系上云骑的素裳将船停靠在了丹鼎司的行医市集，歧路多舛的三人终于靠岸。这儿曾是你熟悉故土的一角，旧日的回忆纷纷涌现，数不清的影子徘徊来去。不过，眼下朋友们音讯不明，你不打算继续在此停留。
E: On the other side of Luofu, Sushang parks the skiff at the Alchemy Commission's Healer's Market after making contact with the Cloud Knights. The three finally land after a tumultuous journey. This was once a part of your familiar home. Memories of the past swell up into your mind, and countless bygone shadows swivel before your eyes. However, your friends are currently missing. You have no plans to remain here.

C: 你们成功找到了出路——是时候继续向酒店大堂前进了。\n希望姬子和三月七已经安全抵达了那里。
E: You successfully found the exit — It is time to continue on toward the hotel lobby.\nLet's hope that Himeko and March 7th have already arrived there safely.

C: 你们在珍品室里找到了名为「格列佛拱门」的神奇道具。如果你看过那部以来自未来的蓝色猫咪担任主人公的有趣动画，一定能够联想到那个通过就能使人缩小的隧……\n呃，咳咳，出于版权方要求，后面的内容不予显示。好了，快把拱门放入沙盘中吧。
E: You two come across a wondrous item called Gulliver's Arch in the treasure room. If you've watched the fun animation with a blue cat from the future as the protagonist, then the item will surely remind you of the tunnel that can shrink the pers—\nAhem, the rest of the content will not be shown due to copyright issues. Now, please put the arch on the sandpit.

C: 你的█ ██ ██ █注意力彻底被那█ ███ █埃维金男孩夺去了。他到底是██ █ ██ █ 什么来头？还有时间，或许你可以追上█ ███ ██，问问他究竟是什么██ ███ ██ ██。
E: You are c█m█lete██ ██tranc█d by t█e █vgin boy.██ust who ███he? There█s sti█l tim███Mayb█ you ███ catch up ██ h██ and as█ █im exactly wha█ █████████.

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 震撼！御猿•邪忍竟是名震寰宇的暴虐恶徒，若令他的爪牙继续为祸梦土，想必美梦也必将迎来悲剧般的终结…不可，不可，在你手里的苜蓿币花完之前，必须舍命阻止末法时代的降临！\n去摄影教室会会下个蕉师吧——可以提前猜猜这次它接的是哪个美梦剧团的脑袋。
E: Shocking! Evil Ninja Osaru is, in reality, a notorious intergalactic criminal! If his minions continue wreaking havoc in the Dreamlands, even sweet dreams could turn into a nightmare... No, you can't let that happen! Before your Alfalfa credits run out, you must stop the arrival of the Mappou Age of the Dharma even at the cost of your life!\nHead to the photography classroom and confront the next BananAdvisor... and take a guess at which of the Sweet Dreams Troupe's heads they have tampered with.

C: 忍者与猴子的故事暂且告一段落。众所周知，不管出了多大事，学还是得继续上，但先前被打断的校庆也得继续办下去才行。\n去体会真正快乐的校庆——虽然无人知晓你们为这份快乐付出的一切，但忍者就是在阴影中行事的侠盗，不问功名，但求太平。
E: The story of ninjas and monkeys comes to a temporary close. As you all know, no matter what happens, academic life must continue, and the interrupted school festival must resume.\nJoin the truly joyous festival — Although your contributions may remain unrecognized to all, a ninja embodies the spirit of a mysterious hero who works in the shadows, seeking not fame but peace for all.

C: 然而，在这场美梦之中，去而复返的，却也并非仅有客人——人们安心地谈论着他，只因故乡于重履此地的男人而言，如今几近死地。\n物是人非，在了解这里的近况时，务必小心谨慎。
E: However, it's not just the guests who return to this beautiful dream... People discuss him without concern, for home is now no more than a deathtrap for this man returning to familiar lands.\nThough the place remains as it was, people have changed. Take great care as you investigate the situation.

C: 击败尼卡多利的一具分身后，黄金裔领袖阿格莱雅带我们来到云石天宫，用别样的方式为我们讲述了翁法罗斯的历史。
E: After defeating a manifestation of Nikador, Aglaea, the leader of the Chrysos Heirs, guided us to Marmoreal Palace. There, she revealed the history of Amphoreus to us in a new and enlightening way.

C: 遐蝶发觉尼卡多利的不死身源于它对「死亡」的背叛。为揭露深埋于岁月中的谜团，我们需要前往重渊借助欧洛尼斯的力量复现往日。
E: Castorice realizes that Nikador's immortality is rooted in a betrayal of Death itself. To unravel the mystery hidden in the past, we must journey to the Abyss and borrow the power of Oronyx to replicate the past.

C: 遐蝶发觉尼卡多利的不死身源于它对「死亡」的背叛。为揭露深埋于岁月中的谜团，我们需要前往重渊借助欧洛尼斯的力量复现往日。
E: Castorice realizes that Nikador's immortality is rooted in a betrayal of Death itself. To unravel the mystery hidden in the past, we must journey to the Abyss and borrow the power of Oronyx to replicate the past.

C: 尼卡多利一战，以黄金裔的胜利作结。我们返回奥赫玛，经过休整，将一同见证泰坦火种的归还与火种试炼的开启。
E: The battle with Nikador ends with the Chrysos Heirs' victory. We return to Okhema to rest and recover. Together, we will witness the return of the Titan's Coreflame and the start of the Coreflame's trial.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 为了复现记忆、完成对克拉特鲁斯的承诺，*我们*悄悄来到命运重渊，寻找历经当年岁月的事物。
E: To replicate memories and fulfill the promise to Krateros, we quietly visit the Abyss of Fate, searching for objects that have witnessed those years.

C: 缇安以耗尽神力为代价，将缇宝与缇宁送离战场。城中英雄会合，准备制定战术，救回缇安、围猎「盗火行者」。
E: Depleting her divine power, Trianne manages to send Tribbie and Trinnon away from the battle. The heroes gather in the city to plan tactics for rescuing Trianne and hunting down the Flame Reaver.

C: 重回故乡，缇宁不禁睹物生情，也回想起许多本已忘却的人、事、物。
E: As Trinnon returned to her homeland, familiar sights stirred forgotten memories within her — of people, moments, and treasures she thought time had washed away.

C: 斯缇科西亚，巨龙与海浪的城邦。如今，那冥河却把这凄惨的城池团团围拢。\n阿那克萨戈拉斯提供的「贤者之石」与炼金术能将冥河中的泰坦召唤出来，而那炼金所需的材料应当就在城中。
E: Styxia, the City-State of Dragons and Waves... At present, the River of Souls has encircled this pitiful city.\nThe Philosopher's Stone provided by Anaxagoras and the art of alchemy can summon the Titan lurking with the River of Souls, and the alchemical materials should be found in the city as well.

C: 感恩戴德吧，星穹列车。幸好黑塔大人对「翁法罗斯」很感兴趣，她打算亲自去到那里实地考察。\n黑塔大人您能多和第四面镜我说说话吗？
E: Be grateful, Astral Express. Fortunately, Madam Herta is quite interested in Amphoreus and plans to conduct an on-the-ground investigation there.\nMadam Herta, could you speak with me, the Fourth Mirror, a little more?

C: 此时，{NICKNAME}与白厄正在树庭继续着他们的意象训练。把力气用光后，友爱之馆的丰富馆藏将他们的视线吸引了过去…
E: Right now, {NICKNAME} and Phainon are deep in their imagery training at the Grove. After spending all their strength, their gaze drifts to the vast collection in the Library of Philia...

C: 晨昏之眼，被冠以泰坦神名的天空壁垒，既是遥远年代天空一族的故乡，也是如今艾格勒的栖地。在风堇的帮助下，我们踏上了这片域外之地，找寻那位制约天幕的泰坦。
E: The Eye of Twilight, a sky barrier named after a Titan, was both the homeland of the Sky people in ancient times and now serves as Aquila's dwelling. With Hyacine's help, we have set foot on this outworld land to find the Titan who binds the sky.

C: 艾格勒于激战之后坠入黄金池中，其火种也顺利被风堇所接收——当务之急，是从逐渐崩毁的天空堡垒中逃离。
E: After a fierce battle, Aquila plunged into the pool of gold, and their Coreflame was seamlessly claimed by Hyacine. Now, the urgent task is to flee the crumbling sky fortress before it collapses entirely.

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C:
让我来讲述一群追逐烈日的若虫吧，再创世的凯歌——
他们自门扉起，于王座终，走过安眠地的花丛，却在黎明升起时坠落。
他们投入金血的源头，要唤醒
负世之人，救世之人，咆哮之人，燃烧不息之人。
他将献祭他一切所爱，他的献祭永不停歇。
E:
Let me tell a tale of a swarm of nymphs that chase the scorching dawn. The Paean of Era Nova...
For their light slips through the gate while their shadow greets the throne, for they walked through the petals in the land of repose, yet fell finally at dawn's rise...
They cast themselves into the source of golden blood to awaken:
The Worldbearer, the Deliverer, the Roarer, the one with Ever-Burning Flame.
He will sacrifice all he loves, and his offering shall never end.

C:
你还记得他们吗，无缘黎明的卡厄斯兰那？
昔日，恩师尚能为你指点迷津；还有那捷足的羁客，多洛斯的偷儿，她的家乡尚未因你落入火场。
是了，过去的已经过去，但神样的战士，你是否也曾垂泪，为那美酒似的年光？
难道你们不曾血肉相连，金血不曾浓于水么？
不！就让眼泪尽情流淌吧，别教那怒火蒸干了——
然后，记得痛饮：因为之于诸神，人子的泪水胜过凡间万千般蜜酿。
E:
Do you still remember them, Khaslana, the one who won't reach the dawn?
Once, your teacher could still guide you through the dark. And that fleet-footed traveler, the thief of Dolos, her home was yet untouched by the fires you brought.
Yes, the past is gone. But you, godlike warrior, did you ever shed a tear for those years, sweet as wine?
Weren't you once bound by blood and flesh? Wasn't golden blood thicker than water?
No! Let your tears flow freely. Don't let rage burn them away —
Then, remember to drink deep: For, to the gods, the tears of mortals are sweeter than any honey brew on Earth.

C: 来吧，来吧，尽情享受这场，独属于你们的静默恐怖秀。
E: Come now, come and savor this chilling show, crafted just for you — a silent horror all your own.

C: 对，就是这样，我喜欢主动探索场景的演员。
E: Yes, that's cool, I like actors who actively explore the scene.

C: 接过逐火之旅同伴的成果，承担起「负世」的职责，在海瑟音的见证下，完成「再创世」……\n不出意外的话，这便是此世旅途的终点。
E: Taking up the mantle from your Flame-Chase Journey companions, embracing the burden of Worldbearing, and completing the Era Nova under Hysilens' witness...\nIf all goes as planned, this should be the end of this life's journey.

C: 《如我所书》与这座大墓密切相关，看似「讲故事」的行为，实则是「信息传送」的修饰…这里曾经发生的一切，如今化作往昔的涟漪，仍在回响。\n为了继续访问控制节点，先获取不同扇区的密钥。\n长夜月应该也在那深处的房间里，继续前进吧。
E: As I've Written is closely connected to this tomb. What seems like "storytelling" is, in truth, a veil for information transmission... Everything that once happened here still lingers, echoing as ripples of past reverie.\nTo continue accessing the control node, obtain the encryption keys from each sector.\nEvernight is probably in that room deep within. Keep moving.

C: 如果德谬歌无力改变实验结果，如果机器头计算的答案是自身毁灭……不，没有这些如果。\n与「智识」接轨的条件已经齐备，并非觐见，而是加冕。求解宇宙的未来，锚定名为黑塔的「时刻」。\n朝闻道，夕死可矣。
E: If Demiurge is powerless to alter the experiment's results... if Droidhead's calculations point to THEIR own Destruction... No, there are no "ifs."\nThe conditions for linking with Erudition are complete. It's not an audience, but a coronation. I will decipher the universe's future and anchor Herta's "Instant."\nIf one could know the Truth at dawn, one can die at dusk without regret.

C: 「军团」战役暂告息止，行进于茫茫星海中，来自「黑塔」的星声余音再度传来——在艾丝妲与全体科员的群策群力下，作为寰宇明珠的空间站，似乎正开展着名为「复兴计划」的行动，亟需有志之士加入。\n而阿兰认为，你是一等一的好选择。
E: The Legion's campaign has come to a temporary end. Traveling amongst the vast sea of stars, the star echo remnants from Herta Space Station are heard once again — with the combined strength of Asta and all the researchers, the peerless space station seems to be expanding and recruiting for an operation known as Project Revival.\nArlan believes that you are the most suitable candidate for this.

C: 如今怪物在舱室内巡回，亚伯拉罕恐有性命之虞。当务之急是保障他的生死安危，待脱离险境，再仔细盘问他的失踪原委。
E: The monsters are roaming in the cabin, and Abraham's life is at stake. His safety is the most urgent matter at the moment. Ask him about the details after the crisis has been averted.

C: 温天翁讲述了与「猎彗人」何塞的恩仇过往，并交给你一张宝藏显影图。前往图中所示地点，那里沉睡着何塞的昔日家当。
E: Wen Tianweng describes his past with the Comet Hunter Hosea and hands you a developed treasure map. Head to the marked location in the image to find Hosea's hidden possessions.

C: 你从空间站的医疗舱醒来，正巧撞见医疗科员乔安为另一名科员诊疗。这位患者自述有短期失忆现象，更重要的是，她的名字…叫做「希拉」。\n嗅到了古怪、秘密与阴谋的气息，你答应前往希拉指定的房间替她展开调查。
E: You wake up in the space station's Medical Department, just as a medical researcher, Joanne, is treating another researcher. The patient claims that she is suffering from short-term memory loss. More importantly, her name is... "Sheila."\nSensing oddity, secrecy, and conspiracy, you agree to go to the room Sheila tells you about and start an investigation.

C: 你从「军团」怪物手里夺回了那位科员的物品。\n虽然你不确定呜呜伯到底有没有手，但按照约定，你得将这些东西送回到呜呜伯的手里。
E: You manage to get all of that researcher's belongings back from the Legion monsters.\nDespite not knowing whether Wubbaboos even have hands, you return the items — as promised — back to the Wubbaboo.

C: 怪物清缴完毕，向艾丝妲远程复命
E: Monster elimination complete, report to Asta remotely

C: 击败被识别程序标记的怪物，收集信标数据。
E: Defeat enemies marked by the recognition system and collect beacon data.

C: 单凭先前的调查结果，你与艾丝妲都无法从中分辨出谁才是真正的感染者。无奈之下，艾丝妲为你开通了终端机的临时权限，在终端机上，你能查到空间站所有人的浏览数据……
E: Based on your findings, neither Asta nor you can tell who is infected. Asta has no choice but to grant you temporary permission to access the terminal, which stores the browsing data of everyone in the space station...

C: 在螺丝咕姆的帮助下，你得以进入模拟宇宙的回归序列。不出所料，银狼的入侵也已触及这里。\n冥冥之中你有一种预感，一场隐于水面之下的游戏，将在这段冒险的终点决出胜负。
E: With Screwllum's help, you entered the Return Sequences of the Simulated Universe. Unsurprisingly, Silver Wolf's infiltration had reached here.\nYou have a hunch about this game hidden beneath the surface, and it will be revealed and resolved at the end of this adventure.

C: 一艘飞船…与星穹列车发生了追尾？还有神秘来客找上门来了！\n看来，你们得共同解决本次的列车「危机」了……
E: A spaceship... has somehow rear-ended the Astral Express!? And there are mysterious visitors approaching the cabin!\nLooks like you'll have to figure out this latest Express "crisis" together...

C: 一艘飞船…与星穹列车发生了追尾？\n这位纯美骑士的一举一动，总是比想象中更加出乎意料……
E: A spaceship... has somehow rear-ended the Astral Express!?\nEach and every move this Knight of Beauty makes is more unpredictable than the last...

C: 一个以奇怪石膏头雕遮蔽面容的男子出现在你面前！他直接指出了阮•梅的谎言：她的野心远比表面上看上去更大！…\n她真正在培育的东西，究竟是…什么？！
E: A man masked by a strange plaster sculpture appears in front of you and pointed out Ruan Mei's lies. Her ambitions are far greater than they appear to be! ...\nThe thing she's cultivating... what is it, exactly?

C: 空间站竟然有隐藏的秘密舱段？！这恐怕是很多科员都不曾知晓的事情。你单独前去调查，里面似乎盛放着许多不可思议的东西……
E: The space station has a secret zone? This might just be something not even most the researchers know about. You investigate alone, and find the space filled with many incredible objects...

C: 矿车工老师傅为你准备了眼前的「矿车难题」——三下五除二地解决掉吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator prepared the Mine Cart Puzzle in front of you. Solve it promptly.

C: 你将有关「特效药」的事向娜塔莎和盘托出，她也坚定了对于「互助会」倒卖药物行为的反对态度。\n为了聆听有关「特效药」的不同意见，娜塔莎建议你去和她诊所内的患者交流一下。
E: You tell Natasha about the wonder medicine. She states that she's strongly against the mutual aid society selling drugs.\nNatasha suggests you talk to the patients in her clinic to hear different opinions on the wonder medicine.

C: 行走在「开拓」命途上的人们，总会在旅途中遭遇各类奇人奇事。这些琐碎的故事不仅填满了开拓者们的日志，同时也加深了他们与各个世界之间的联系。
E: Those on the Path of Trailblaze will encounter all kinds of strange people and odd anecdotes during the journey. Not only do these trivial stories fill up trailblazers' journals, but they also deepen their connections to all worlds.

C: 尽管没能找到地髓激活元件，但佩拉和玲可已经集齐了当晚需要的食材。现在，是时候让两人返回露营地了。
E: Although they didn't find the Geomarrow Activation Element, Pela and Lynx manages to collect enough food for tonight. Now is the time to return to the camping ground.

C: 按照陶德的需求，你前往鳞渊境拍下了他所需要的照片，赶紧将照片交给他吧。
E: Following Todd's request, you head to Scalegorge Waterscape to take the photos he needs. Hurry up and give the photos to him.

C: 温符瑞科员沉迷「美丽狐仙聊天」以至于想外派仙舟，你接受了艾丝妲的请求去调查其中猫腻，首先和温符瑞科员先聊聊吧。
E: Researcher Wen Furui is so addicted to the Foxian Beauty Chat that he wants to be posted to Xianzhou. You accept Asta's request to investigate this fishy situation. Best to have a chat with Researcher Wen Furui first.

C: 根据小聪的线索，格律诗人此时正处在长乐天三余书肆，去回收它的灵感玉兆吧。\n结果小聪也不是按照诗歌体裁来区分不同机器人的，只能说他这人想一出是一出。\n没关系，你会出手。
E: According to Cong's clues, the Metrical Poet is currently in the Exalting Sanctum's Spare Time Book Shop. Go and recover its Inspo Jade Abacus.\nAs it turns out, Cong doesn't distinguish the ingenia according to the styles of poetry. Rather, it's just whatever first comes to his mind.\nIt doesn't matter, you'll get the job done.

C: 缅怀既毕，你跟随她前往鳞渊境，不知为何她兴起了寻医问药的念头。而在丹鼎司中，也许没人比那位龙女更有资格为罗浮前代剑首把脉看诊了。
E: Respects paid, you follow her towards the Scalegorge Waterscape. For some reason, she now has the desire to seek medical counsel. No one is more qualified in the Alchemy Commission than that Dragon Lady to read the pulse and diagnose the Luofu's previous Sword Champion.

C: 在局外人的操弄之下，罗浮仙舟羁押许久的巨恶，步离人战首呼雷最终脱出牢笼大开杀戒。此刻幽囚狱中的局势危如累卵，你们唯一能做的，只有在他逃出此间前，关上幽囚狱的大门。
E: With the machinations of external parties, the borisin Warhead, Hoolay, a heinous criminal who had been imprisoned on the Xianzhou Luofu for ages, managed to break free and embark on a wanton massacre. The Shackling Prison was plunged into imminent peril — closing The Shackling Prison's gates just before he managed to flee was all that you all could do.

C: 联觉梦境的第一位作者名叫罗伯特。调查他在心绪空间中留下的影像，了解他的故事吧。
E: The first creator of the Synesthesia Dreamscape is named Robert. Investigate the images he has left in the Emoscape and uncover his stories.

C: 眼前的芙洛拉竟然是莱斯利•迪恩生前的演员助理。\n追随她留下的影子，见证她和莱斯利之间的故事吧。
E: It turns out that the lady named Flora was Lesley Dean's former assistant during his lifetime.\nFollow her shadow and witness the stories between her and Lesley.

C: 你已经尽己所能帮助了姬莲，但愿他能从这个梦境中醒来。\n离开这里，去找到下一个沉溺之人吧。
E: You have done what you can to aid Jillian. Perhaps he will awaken from his dream.\nLeave this place and find the next creator.

C: 你拿到了一张破旧的唱片带，现在可以带回去交给她了。
E: You have retrieved a worn record. You can now take it back to Cocona.

C: 猜猜看是谁回来了，原来是太卜司符玄大人啊。\n青雀要来接风？所以，青雀呢？
E: Guess who's back? Turns out it's Master Diviner Fu Xuan!\nQingque was going to welcome Lady Fu Xuan? Where is she then?

C: 这场记忆的主人在陌生的城邦中生活着，感受着新的事物与自己的变化。这里有许多她从未见过的东西，就比如这场云石天宫的宴会——对悬锋人来说，法吉娜没什么好歌颂的，只有在纵欲畅饮的时候值得唱上两句。\n看来纷争的舞步没法在海洋的宴会上展示风采，偏见与恐惧像汹涌的大浪，刀枪盾斧是无法抵挡的。你和帕里斯能帮上忙的，也只是让这浪别这么早把她的小船掀翻，仅此而已。
E: Living in this unfamiliar city, the master of this memory is experiencing new feelings and changes within themself. There are many things here that she has never seen before, just like this banquet at the Marmoreal Palace... To the Kremnoans, Phagousa is nothing worth singing about. They may simply throw them a passing mention when they indulge in heavy drinking.\nIt seems that the dance of Strife cannot fully express its grace at a banquet of the ocean. When prejudice and fear rage like giant waves, no blade or shield can hold them back. The only assistance that you and Paris can offer is to prevent her little boat from being overturned so soon.

C: 埃美丽想继续向你讨教聊天小技巧，还是去教教她吧。
E: Emily wants to keep learning the art of conversation from you. Teach her another thing or two.

C: 前往磐岩镇，调查奇怪的地方，也许你能找到马克西姆丢失的记忆……
E: Head to Boulder Town to investigate the strange place. Maybe you'll be able to find Maxime's lost memories...

C: 老吉尔伯特希望你能把他推迟退役的消息转达给女儿莉拉。\n你买好了花——现在，把老吉尔伯特的信和花束一起转交给莉拉吧。
E: Old Gilbert wants you to tell his daughter Lila that his retirement will be delayed.\nYou bought the flowers — Now, pass old Gilbert's letter and the bouquet to Lila.

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n她委托你去上层区的行政广场观察她的言谈举止。\n真是一位有事业心的小演员，尽你所能帮她的忙吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nShe asked you to observe Tamila's behavior at the Overworld's Administrative District Plaza.\nWhat an ambitious aspiring actress. Help her to the best of your abilities.

C: 配音演员塞琳对音乐剧明星塔米拉小姐的处世之道十分感兴趣。\n她委托你去上层区的歌德宾馆观察她的言谈举止。\n真是一位有事业心的小演员，尽你所能帮她的忙吧。
E: The voice actress, Celine, is very interested in the musical star Tamila's way of life.\nShe asked you to observe Tamila's behavior at the Overworld's Goethe Hotel.\nWhat an ambitious aspiring actress. Help her to the best of your abilities.

C: 巡逻的银鬃铁卫在裂界中目击到了幻象回响，它们因夙愿未遂而不得解脱。向它们提供帮助吧。\n悠闲的老人似乎想要修好手机……
E: Some Silvermane Guard patrols spotted illusory echoes in the Fragmentum who are stuck inside due to unfinished businesses. Help them.\nThe leisurely senior wants to fix his phone...

C: 巡逻的银鬃铁卫在裂界中目击到了幻象回响，它们因夙愿未遂而不得解脱。向它们提供帮助吧。\n兴奋的矿民似乎正在等待饭店开张……
E: Some Silvermane Guard patrols spotted illusory echoes in the Fragmentum who are stuck inside due to unfinished businesses. Help them.\nThe excited miner is waiting for the restaurant to open...

C: 在机缘巧合下，你成了卜筮用具「雅努斯迷津」的辅祭。好人做到底，协助命运三相殿的祭司，完成一批积压的寻物委托吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you're now an acolyte of the divination tool — Janus' Maze. Since you've started, might as well help the priests of the Temple of the Three Fates finish their backlog of "lost and found" assignments.

C: 第二重秘术锁成功解开。打开最后一重秘术锁，取出「余火」吧。
E: The second layer of the arcane seal has been successfully unlocked. Unlock the final layer and retrieve the Embers.

C: 帕姆似乎有些心事难平，快回去安慰下帕姆吧。
E: Pom-Pom seems to be troubled, head back and console them.

C: 操纵机巧鸟起飞吧。工作固然重要，但也请不要忽略了周围的美景。
E: Control the cycrane and take off. Your job is important, but you also shouldn't ignore life's beautiful moments around you.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, Adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 从景元将军口中，你们知晓了驭空的过去。也许她自始至终都很害怕，自己的女儿会重蹈挚友的覆辙。无论如何，将这个故事带给晴霓，让她自己做判断吧。
E: You learn about Yukong's past from General Jing Yuan. Perhaps she was terrified all along that her daughter would end up the same way her best friend did. In any case, bring this story to Qingni and let her make her decision.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你前往永冬岭为冰封的反物质军团虚卒拍摄照片，以便博物馆制作复制品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan needs your help to take a picture of a frozen Antimatter Legion Voidranger at the Everwinter Hill to help the museum make a replica.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即，导览工作却出现大量职缺。为了迅速填补缺口、提高观众游览体验，佩拉与艾丽斯向贝洛伯格全体公众发出了职位邀请。\n这一次，她们似乎看中了银鬃铁卫戍卫官杰帕德。代她们前往铁卫禁区，了解杰帕德是否有入职意愿吧。
E: The Belobog History and Culture Museum is about to open, but there is a great lack of guides. To rapidly fill up these positions and improve the visitor experience, Pela and Eris are inviting all Belobog citizens to apply for these positions.\nThis time they have their eye on Gepard, captain of the Silvermane Guards. Head to the Silvermane Guard Restricted Zone in their stead, and see whether Gepard is interested in the position.

C: 在西衍先生的故事中，你需要化身机巧鸟，破除禁制、收集丹药、获得初代司鼎的秘宝…你感觉怪怪的，但西衍先生说，这是象征着你如鸟儿一般自由。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, you need to become a cycrane to break the containment mechanism, collect pellets, and obtain the secret treasures of the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission — You feel odd about this, but Mr. Xiyan says this symbolizes you are as free as a bird.

C: 在西衍先生的故事中，鳞渊境的龙尊造像竟活了过来，还给你安排了各种试炼。抛开科学不谈，和一尊造像聊天，这事儿还挺酷的。\n龙尊造像请你帮它清除掉一个满怀恶意的蜃影。照理来说，「蜃影」这东西不会伤人、也无法伤人，但毕竟是西衍先生的评书，发生什么都不奇怪。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, the Statue of the High Elder in Scalegorge Waterscape comes to life, and even gives you all sort of trials to go through. Forget about the scientific realism of it all, it's pretty cool to talk with a statue.\nThe Statue of the High Elder asks you to help it get rid of a malicious Mirage Echo. Normally, Mirage Echoes can't and won't hurt people. But this is inside Mr. Xiyan's story. Anything is possible.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说卖小吃的高阿姨和商会建立合作关系。但高阿姨此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Tall Auntie, who sells snacks, to establish a partnership with the guild. However, Tall Auntie has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说杜氏茶庄和商会建立合作关系。但杜老板此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Du's Teahouse to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietor Boss Du has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 想要挑战每个决胜乐园的冠军候补，必须先完成乐园对应的试炼。\n大矿区的试炼居然是用机器人引爆「托帕后援团」——当然这只是特效，并不会有人真受到伤害。爆炸乃艺术，不是吗？
E: You must complete the corresponding trials first if you wish to challenge the championship contenders of the Victory Zone.\nThe trial at the Great Mine involves blowing up Topaz's Support Squad with robots, though as the explosions are rooted in special effects, no one actually risks getting hurt. Still, blowing things up is a form of art, right?

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 太卜用「寻径指津」喻示「命运之中」的人，纵使有着太多选择，但想要前进便只能沿着唯一的道路。\n她固执地将自己置于牛角尖之中，你能做的便是用她的规则和理念打破她的固执。\n规则就是用来打破的，去完成「寻径指津」挑战吧。
E: The master diviner uses "Pathfinder" to show omens to people whom destiny beckons. Despite the numerous choices they encounter, one must walk the only path in order to progress.\nShe has stubbornly holds on to her own believes, and the only thing you can do is to break her obsession by using her own rules and reasoning.\nRules are meant to be broken. It is time to overcome the Pathfinder challenges.

C: 漫天岁阳如今只剩漏网之鱼，是时候让它去到该去的地方了。
E: The heliobi in the sky have been reduced to a paltry few. It's time to send them where they belong.

C: 「罗浮杂俎」，原本只是个灵异爱好者们聚集的网站，却最终成了罗浮上平民茶余饭后交换流言蜚语的大型网络社区。\n努力拓展你的影响力吧，它不仅会将情报汇聚你手中，更能让你以「捉鬼小队」的名义正大光明地行动。
E: Ghostly Grove, once a modest gathering website for supernatural enthusiasts, has now become a thriving community where denizens of the Luofu Xianzhou exchange tales and rumors.\nTry to expand your sphere of influence, as this not only helps you get the information you need, but also allows you to operate openly in the name of the respected ghost-hunting squad.

C: 帮助辛格勒收集线索——它们应该就散落在神秘空间的战利品宝箱中。
E: Help Singler search for clues — they should be scattered in the mysterious space's treasure chest.

C: 这个空间中的「证据」已经被搜刮完了。离开这片错乱的梦境空间，和辛格勒聊聊你们的发现。
E: You have collected all the "evidence" in this place. Leave this chaotic and disturbed dreamscape and discuss your findings with Singler.

C: 小星星准备了用于模拟的思维空间，想要告诉你「美梦剧团」的生存状况。\n按照它的规划，你现在必须前往「那个房间」。
E: Starlet has prepared a Mindspace for simulations and wants to update you on the status of the Sweet Dreams Troupe.\nBased on its plan, you must now proceed to "that room."

C: 为了重新获取怪物们的信任，舒翁邀请你进入她的心绪空间。\n在梦境酒店找到了淑女，该带它回到酒吧了。
E: To regain the monsters' trust, Siobhan invites you into her Emoscape.\nYou found Lady in the hotel in the Dreamscape. Take it back to the lounge.

C: 无名客•玛姬收集银河中无名客们的「开拓经历」，为行于开拓命途之上的人们献上启程的祝福。\n\n你和银河中的无名客已经收集了很多，玛姬有些话想对你说。
E: The Nameless, Mag, is gathering trailblaze experiences of the Nameless from across the Cosmos, offering departure blessings to those walking the Path of Trailblaze.\n\nYou and the Nameless in the Cosmos have collected a lot. Mag has something to say to you.

C: 拍动画貌似也挺好玩的，要不试试看再说？
E: Shooting a cartoon seems pretty fun too. How about trying it out first?

C: 可恶的石头老板制造了刀枪不入的钢铁鳄鱼，想想办法打倒它吧！\n哈努飞弹不能伤到钢铁鳄鱼，但威力巨大的烟花说不定能扭转战局……
E: The despicable Boss Stone created a steel crocodile impervious to weapons. Find a way to defeat it!\nThe Hanu Rocket cannot hurt the steel crocodile, but a powerful firework might turn the tables...

C: 在千万的旅路中，唯有一条能够被我们涉足。
E: In thousands upon thousands of trajectories, there is but one upon which we can step.

C: 十五日约定的时间已经到了，无论剑法好坏，既然彦卿师父、云璃师父说了三月七可以一战，你也大可相信她有作为胜者的能耐。\n看起来，三月七还没能在战斗中使出全力，你可以再尝试一次。
E: The day of the duel has arrived. Putting aside March 7th's aptitude in swordplay, you believe she has the capability to emerge victorious, especially since both of her mentors — Yanqing and Yunli — agreed to let her go to battle.\nLooks like March 7th didn't manage to use all she has learned in the duel. You could... try again?

C: 协助见习医生伦道夫进行拍摄，以便让他去捕获这些离散忆质。
E: Help Trainee Healer Randolph with the filming so that he can capture these scattered memoria.

C: 那个红毛哥们竟然是…贝洛伯格的卢卡？\n贝洛伯格人突然出现在罗浮，这场景还真有点…魔幻。问问他具体情况吧。
E: That red-head boy is actually... Luka from Belobog?\nFor a Belobogian to appear on the Luofu is really a bit... unbelievable. Ask him about the details.

C: 叩关赛的规则非常简单——战胜对手，赢取积分。\n卢卡选手只需要做三件事，胜利、胜利、胜利！
E: The rules of the Knockout Matches are easy — Just defeat opponents and win points\nContestant Luka just needs to do three things: Win, win, and keep winning!

C: 叩关赛的规则非常简单——战胜对手，赢取积分。\n卢卡选手只需要做三件事，胜利、胜利、胜利！
E: The rules of the Knockout Matches are easy — Just defeat opponents and win points\nContestant Luka just needs to do three things: Win, win, and keep winning!

C: 叩关赛的规则非常简单——战胜对手，赢取积分。\n卢卡选手只需要做三件事，胜利、胜利、胜利！
E: The rules of the Knockout Matches are easy — Just defeat opponents and win points\nContestant Luka just needs to do three things: Win, win, and keep winning!

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n为拖延时间，契波和达凡绮被迫登上了舞台…去看看他们的情况吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nCzipo and Dafanchy are forced to take to the stage to buy some time... Go and see how they are doing.

C: 闭幕演出圆满结束，你的乐队经历也要接近尾声了……\n音乐派对的演出全部结束了，有些舍不得，但还有些事需要得到妥善解决。去校长室看看故事的结局吧。
E: The closing performance has come to a successful conclusion and your experience with the band is approaching its end...\nAll the performances for the music party have ended. Though you really don't want it to end, there is still some business that needs to be properly wrapped up. Head to the dean's office to witness the end of the story.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n在空间站的主控舱段到处逛逛，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nWander around the master control zone of the space station to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n得到佩佩的节奏记录，帮助乱破收集作曲用的灵感吧。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nObtain a record of Peppy's beats to help Rappa collect inspiration for composing.

C: 桑博即将在店里上架新的宝贝…不过在此之前，他还需要你的帮助。
E: Sampo is about to add some new treasures to the store... but before that, he still needs your help.

C:
亲爱的无名客：

感谢您乘坐星穹列车，与我们星海同行，遨游银河胜揽。这片银河本是广袤寂静，因为有您，我们才得以点亮群星，使那些美好的事情发生。

此刻，请您仰望星空，看那深邃黑暗中若隐若现的点点微芒。我们生于大地，却清楚知道，那高远无穷的璀璨星空才是我们真正的故乡。

愿此行，终抵群星。

<align="right">您忠诚的伙伴，「闭嘴」</align>
E:
Dear Nameless,

Thank you for boarding the Astral Express and setting off on this journey among the stars and across the cosmic ocean with us. The Cosmos used to be silent and stagnant until your presence helped us illuminate the stars and cause beautiful things to occur.

In this time and space, please look up at the starry sky and see those faint, flickering lights in the deep darkness. We are born on the ground, yet we know deep down that the vast and endless starry sky is our true home.

May this journey lead us starward.

<align="right">Yours Faithfully, Shush</align>

C: 今天的摄影课题有些古怪…还是先和三月七商量一下再行动为好。
E: Today's Photography Task is a little strange... Better discuss with March 7th before taking any action.

C: 古玩店门口有一名宝友正在闹事，过去看看吧。
E: An antique collector is causing a ruckus at the doorstep of an antique shop. Go check things out.

C: 今日待鉴定宝物已准备好，去找西塔罗斯吧。
E: The treasures up for appraisal today are ready. Time to talk to Theodoros.

C: 经过小组赛的激烈角逐，你成功晋级淘汰赛。现在，短暂的休赛期结束，淘汰赛即将开幕。
E: After the fierce matches in the group stage, you finally advance to the knockout stage. Now, the short recess is over, and the knockout matches are about to start.

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。
E: Lookie here! An invitation to play Origami Bird Clash on its official launch? This scene feels a bit familiar, but the sender this time is the IPC instead.

C: 在黑塔的协助下，你完美调制出了「人格」配方的两种不同功效！这份配方已尝试完毕，回到临时吧台，准备接待下一位客人吧。
E: With Herta's help, you've perfectly crafted the two different effects for the "Persona" recipe! Now that you've finished testing this recipe, head back to the makeshift bar and get ready to serve the next customer.

C: 机缘巧合之下，你成了这只小小的大地兽的监护人。而且，你还听说，它身上似乎有着能够成长为传奇生物的潜质…？总之，在这段时间里，就按照你的方式培养它，让它恢复健康，并茁壮成长吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you've become the guardian of this tiny dromas. And word has it that it might have the potential to evolve into a legendary creature...? For now, raise it in your own way, help it recover, and watch it grow strong.

C: 原以为驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大能够顺利成长下去，实现它的梦想，却没想到，在它身上出现了一种会变小的奇怪症状。据称，这代表它有欧洛尼斯相关的潜质…？那刻夏提出了一个出乎所有人意料的解决方案－让驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大修习欧洛尼斯祷言，进而稳定这一特性。好吧，神奇的第二次养成，开始啦！
E: You thought Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas would grow without a hitch and achieve its dreams, but unexpectedly, it developed a strange condition that made it shrink. Supposedly, this indicates it has potential related to Oronyx...? Anaxa proposed a solution that surprised everyone: Having Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas study Oronyx's Prayer to stabilize this trait. Well, time for a second round of magical nurturing!

C: 尽快到达月台
E: Reach the railway platform as quickly as possible

C: 坐到沙发上，等待跃迁开始
E: Sit on the sofa and wait for the warp jump

C: 使用「家用寻物仪」搜寻矿车部件
E: Search for mine cart parts with the help of the Home-Use Object Finder

C: 使用「家用寻物仪」搜寻矿车部件
E: Search for mine cart parts with the help of the Home-Use Object Finder

C: 操作栈桥控制终端
E: Operate the gear bridge terminal

C: 与瓦尔特、三月七一同出发
E: Head off with Welt and March 7th

C: 准备停当后，与停云交谈
E: When you're ready, go talk to Tingyun

C: 再次前往「梦境贩售店」
E: Return to the "Dreamscape Sales Store"

C: 与萨姆对峙
E: Confront Sam

C: 完成筑梦拼图
E: Complete the Dream Jigsaw

C: 直面星期日
E: Meet Sunday face-to-face

C: （可选）继续收集调饮用的材料
E: (Optional) Continue collecting ingredients for the drinks

C: 前往第三道关卡的入口
E: Go to the third stage entrance

C: 穿过巨星之路，前往匹诺康尼大剧院
E: Pass through the Path of the Superstars to reach the Penacony Grand Theater

C: 结束剧目的第二幕
E: Finish Act II

C: （可选）与波提欧交谈
E: (Optional) Speak with Boothill

C: 在折纸大学里逛逛
E: Walk around Paperfold University

C: （可选）和伙伴们聊聊
E: (Optional) Chat with your companions

C: 骑上大地兽，前往圣城
E: Ride the dromas and head to the holy city

C: 跟随遐蝶前进
E: Follow Castorice's lead

C: 继续前进，深入悬锋城
E: Continue onward deep into Castrum Kremnos

C: 尝试再次配平天秤
E: Try to balance the scales again

C: 继续深入悬锋城，寻找尼卡多利的线索

C: 玄英
E: Brumal Gloom

E: Flakes of Rime

E: Corporeal Maneuver

C: 属于年轻人的舞台，我们不应该插手…顶多来一点「场外援助」…吧。
E: This is a young person's adventure, we shouldn't interfere. At most, we could offer a little "off-site assistance."

C: 这个时候，也只好紧急刹车了吧？
E: The only sensible thing to do would be to brake hard, right?

C: 你和三月七两个人去好不好？
E: Can't you and March 7th go?

C: 谁能没有负累呢？哪怕小三月那样什么都不记得，肩上也有沉甸甸的东西呀。
E: Is there anyone who doesn't carry around a past burden? She may not remember it, but even a girl as carefree as March has hers.

C: 这不像你呀，{NICKNAME}。你不是很担心身体里的星核，想早点解除它吗？
E: That hardly sounds like you, {NICKNAME}. What about that Stellaron inside you? Don't you wanna get rid of it?

C: 别胡思乱想。
E: Let's not let our imaginations get the better of us.

C: 但对于潜伏在宇宙中的无数威胁而言，他们依旧脆弱、无助。作为见证者，我们只能在远处为他们祈福。
E: They will remain vulnerable and helpless to countless threats lurking in the recesses of the universe. We can only give them our best wishes from afar.

C: …哦，欢迎{NICKNAME}和三月乘客回到列车——「开拓任务」顺利完成，列车组感谢你们做出的贡献！
E: ...Oh, welcome back to the Express. You've accomplished your Trailblaze Mission, the Express appreciates your help!

C: 这么年轻吗？我记得上一个琥珀纪她就很有名了，至少一百多岁吧？
E: She looks so young. She was already famous in the last Amber Era, no? She has to be at least a hundred years old.

C: {NICKNAME}吗？你好，我是丹恒，这是三月七。
E: {NICKNAME}? Nice to meet you. My name's Dan Heng, and this is March 7th.

C: ——不是我干的！一定是反物质军团的错！
E: —But it wasn't me! The Antimatter Legion must've broken it!

C: 这就到电梯口了？一路上也没遇到多少敌人嘛～
E: Is that it? We've reached the elevator already? That wasn't too many monsters~

C: 灾难当头时，越发体会到科员才是空间站最珍贵的财富…唉，我们对突发事件的准备实在太少了，忽略了安保和战斗人员的建设。
E: In times of disaster, I realize more and more that the space station's researchers are its most valuable assets... Alas, we were ill-prepared for such emergencies... we should have built up our security and combat departments.

C: 我知道他是不想放弃任何一名科员…防卫科对他来说不仅仅是一份工作。
E: I know he didn't want to leave any researchers behind... The Security Department is more than just a job to him.

C: 你知道我是谁…吗？
E: Do you... know who I am?

C: 她对我有恩，所以她去空间站的时候，我也跟来了。
E: She was kind to me though. When she went to the space station, I followed her.

C: 我们的预调试有三个步骤，打开频谱仪，再是衰耗器，最后把信号输出到滤波器上。
E: Our pre-checks have three steps. Turning on the spectrometer, then the attenuator, and finally outputting the signal to the filter.

C: 快！
E: Quick!

C: 星穹列车的行车仪上即时记录我们的行迹。空间站的动静这么大，瓦尔特先生不可能注意不到。
E: The Astral Express tracks our coordinates in real time... And with such a huge change in the space station's movements, there's no way Mr. Yang wouldn't have noticed.

C: 我…姑且应付不了…
E: I... can't handle...

C: 想笑就笑吧，赞达尔那老鬼起的名字，你当我喜欢吗？
E: Alright, laugh it up. That old Zandar came up with the name. You think I like it?

C: 现在本天才愿意出手相助，你就谢恩吧！也就是现在我对你还有点兴趣，等我失去热情了，你求我我都不研究你咯。
E: You should be grateful that this genius is willing to help you out. I still have some interest now, but once that's gone, I'm not studying you even if you beg me.

C: 因为你和其他人不一样。
E: Because you're different.

C: 《崩坏：星穹铁道》
E: Honkai: Star Rail

C: 年轻人就是要有活力嘛！来来来，和我一起做一下放松运动。
E: Young people should be energetic! Here, let's do some relaxation exercises.

C: 看来你还挺有天赋，要悟到这一步可是很复杂的。
E: Seems like you're a natural. It's not easy to reach this level of enlightenment.

C: 星神是银河里最神秘的存在。我们只知道祂是从智慧生物升格而成，但条件是什么，原理是什么，就连俱乐部的天才们也一无所知。
E: Aeons are the most mysterious beings in the galaxy. All we know is that THEY ascended from the form of intelligent beings. As for the how and why, even the geniuses over at the Genius Society haven't the slightest clue.

C: 作为纳努克的信徒，它们执行着「毁灭」的意志，站在生命与文明的对立面，传播混乱与灾厄。
E: As Nanook's followers, they stand against all life and civilization and execute the will of Destruction, disseminating chaos and calamity.

C: 筑城者以「存护」的星神克里珀为这座堡垒命名。在他们的引领下，人类抵御了外敌的攻势，挡住了寒潮，如今也在对抗来自裂隙的侵蚀。
E: The Architects named this fortress after Qlipoth, Aeon of Preservation. Under their direction, humanity has withstood external enemy attacks and held off the Eternal Freeze. Even today, we resist the Fragmentum's corrosion.

C: 这座堡垒也是「大守护者」的住处。
E: This fortress is also the residence of the supreme guardian.

C: 就是由筑城者推举任命的贝洛伯格领袖，她们世代守望这座城市，为人民提供庇护。
E: The leader of Belobog, elected and appointed by the Architects. The supreme guardians have watched over this city for generations, sheltering the people from harm.

C: 我们有相应的手段。
E: We have the relevant means.

C: 大家好好休息吧！
E: Sleep well guys!

C: 从那种头盔怎么看出凝重的？
E: You guys are assuming a lot. All I can see is their helmets.

C: 你们！布洛妮娅统领在下面等着你们。快去见她，别想耍花招！
E: Hey! Commander Bronya is waiting for you all down below. Hurry up and go see her. And no tricks!

C: 佩～拉～姐～姐～
E: Yes~ Miss~ Pela~

C: 大家还有什么问题吗～
E: Any questions~?

C: 家？…哦，原来两位是为这件事来的啊。还好，我一个人住，没有牵连别人受伤。
E: Family? Oh, is this what you two are here for? Fortunately, I live alone, and no one else got hurt.

C: 嗯？他制服上的这枚勋章，我好像有印象——这应该是「『造物引擎』计划功勋奖章」。
E: Hmm? I seem to remember that medal on his uniform — it must be the medal of honor from the Engine of Creation Project.

C: 抱歉，我知道日程安排得过于紧密…但我不想让市民们等太久。无端的猜疑越多，局面就越容易失去控制。
E: Sorry, I know the invitation was very last minute... but I needed to get the news out as soon as possible. The longer people waited, the more rumors started to swirl. The situation risked spinning out of control.

C: 列车组会尽可能帮助你们。
E: The Astral Express will do everything within our power to help.

C: 啊，抱歉——刚才只顾着和姐姐说话，忘了向你解释事情的原委。
E: Ah, sorry, my head's still in the argument. It's like this.

C: 哦，对对对——雪人掌！瞧我这记性。
E: Ah! Yes, yes, — snowman's palm! Ugh, my memory is the worst.

C: …我明白。但正是因为这点…我才更受打击。
E: *sigh* I know... but that's what makes it harder.

C: 小杰杰…你平时也总被使唤吗？
E: Lil' Geppie... Did she order you around like this too?

C: …这东西的原理，和你第一次来机械屋时修的那玩意一样，看了就明白了！
E: ...The principle behind this machine and the one you fixed when you first came to the workshop is the same. You'll understand when you see it.

C: 真的吗？好强…
E: She must have been pretty strong...

C: 看来还是藏不住啊……
E: Turns out I'm no good at hiding it...

C: 那时你们同他爆发冲突是形势所迫，我能理解。
E: The conflict was a product of the situation, I understand.

C: 你看见《贝洛伯格周刊》，封面是一张颇为诱惑的画片。
E: You spot a Belobog Weekly with a rather seductive picture on the cover.

C: 你看见《贝洛伯格周刊》，刊登的美食图片令你食欲大增。
E: You spot a Belobog Weekly. The pictures of food whet your appetite.

C: 考虑到雅利洛-Ⅵ的居民数百年来都被困在一座城里，你可以理解这个星球仪为何如此受重视。
E: Considering that the inhabitants of Jarilo VI have been trapped in this city for centuries, you can understand why this armillary sphere is so highly regarded.

C: 你本想走近把它扶起，却终究没有这么做。因为垃圾桶也有身为垃圾桶的尊严。
E: You want to help it up, but think better of it. Even trashcans have their dignity.

C: 你看见一只青色的球体，厚厚的瓣叶遮住了它的花蕊，看上去平平无奇。
E: You see a cyan sphere. Thick petals and leaves cover its stamen. Nothing special about it.

C: 你打开信封，里面是一封写在报纸边缘的短信：姐姐，请速寄<unbreak>50</unbreak>元来！——你最爱的迪迪。
E: You open the letter. There's a short message on the edge of some newspaper: "Sister, please send me <unbreak>50</unbreak> shield ASAP! Love from your dear brother."

C: 悄悄收起。
E: Take it away quietly.

C: 垃圾桶。人生失意的时候，你曾经觉得自己和它很相配。
E: A trashcan. Once, when you were feeling down on your luck, you thought the two of you were a good match.

C: 你好…呵呵，你还挺有礼貌的。
E: Nice to meet you too... Hehe, you're very polite.

C: 如果你没什么事的话，我就先去照顾其他病人啦？
E: So if you don't mind, I'll go and take a look at the other patients?

C: 谢谢你，娜塔莎医生。
E: Thank you, Dr. Natasha.

C: 呃，那算了，品味太差。
E: *sigh* Forget it. I think our taste in nicknames is different.

C: 我是桑博的朋友。
E: I'm a friend of Sampo's.

C: 这是保守秘密的代价。
E: That's the price of guarding a secret.

C: 没兴趣，告辞。
E: Not interested, sorry.

C: 站在近处看这片矿脉，感觉更加壮观了。
E: Seeing it up close... this vein's even more spectacular.

C: 四十七…四十八…四十九…五十！
E: <unbreak>47</unbreak>... <unbreak>48</unbreak>... <unbreak>49</unbreak>... <unbreak>50</unbreak>!

C: 可、可恶啊！我作为鼹鼠党的老大，居然栽在你们这些坏蛋手里了！
E: N—Not fair! I'm the boss of The Moles — how can I lose to a bunch of villains!

C: 你问我呢，那就是一群笨蛋、直肠子、一根筋。不过谁在乎我怎么想呢……
E: Well if you want my opinion, they're a bunch of artless, stubborn fools. But who cares what I think, huh?

C: 不知道啊，我又不是「地火」成员，他们也不会把目的都告诉我。再说了，我这个人嘴很严的……
E: As a non-member, not a clue. They'd never tell me their ultimate aims. Shame, really, it's not like I'm a blabbermouth...

C: 于是她把所有银鬃铁卫调去前线，封锁上下层的往来，只保留供给和地髓交换的通道。这个决策，我曾经是认同的……
E: Nevertheless, that was her reason for deploying all the Silvermane Guards to the front line. The transport line for supplies and Geomarrow remained open, but the passage between the surface and the underground ceased. I approved of that decision...

C: 是这样的，之前矿区那件事很多人都受了伤，诊所人满为患了。你们帮忙平息了骚乱后，希儿和我一直忙着照顾伤员。
E: Here's the situation: The clinic is packed full of people injured in the mines incident. Since you helped us resolve things, Seele and I have been busy caring for them.

C: 任务进展顺利极了！
E: All in all, the mission is going super smoothly!

C: 有什么事吗？
E: What is it?

C: 总之这是非常有用的情报！要不是你加入的时间太短，我都想把你提拔成鼹鼠党的三把手啦！
E: Anyhow, this is super useful intel! If you'd been with The Moles a bit longer, I'd be promoting you to third-in-command right now!

C: 会动？
E: Are they moving?

C: 请把这样的意外叫作「生活的惊喜」。
E: There's no shortage of surprises in life.

C: 这不废话嘛，我可是「怪物盔甲」的粉丝！我觉得他出拳的风格大开大合，很有气势，最近战绩也很好，未来可期！
E: Heck yeah, I'm a Monster Armor fan! I think his style is very wild and imposing, and he's been on a roll lately. That boy's got a future!

C: 所以甭担心——赛程安排那都是小意思，我们拳馆的业务既全面又灵活，绝对没有疏漏。
E: So don't you worry, schedule arrangements are trivial matters. Our services are comprehensive and flexible. You will definitely be well taken care of.

C: 抱歉，啰嗦的毛病又犯了。这是个值得纪念的日子，应该准备好笑脸来面对。
E: I'm sorry, here I am talking your ear off again. This is a day to remember. We should welcome it with smiles.

C: 这玩意安全指数高吗…
E: Does this thing have a good safety record?

C: 大英雄旁边那人是谁？
E: Who's that beside the hero?

C: 我是…呃，前技术部的工程师希露瓦，也是杰帕德的亲姐姐。请多关照啦，首领！
E: The name's Serval. I'm, uh... an ex-engineer from the Technology Division and... Gepard's sister. Pleasure to meet you, chief!

C: 布洛妮娅大人致力于弥合裂口，重新树立铁卫的威信。但这并不意味着我们要用蛮横的方式「夺回」下层区。
E: Lady Bronya wants Belobog to heal, so the Silvermane Guards need to regain the people's trust. But we won't achieve that by kicking doors open and policing everyone around.

C: 对，铁卫哥哥！
E: Yes, Mr. Captain!

C: 遇到类似的问题，我第一时间想到的总是逃避。但这一点，从今天开始就要有所改进了！
E: The first thought I have when things don't work out is to run away. Starting from today, that's no longer the case.

C: 等等，你不会是假喜欢吧…我问你，书里的三个主人公都是谁？
E: Wait, you're not pretending to like it, are you... let me ask you, who are the three protagonists in the book?

C: 《冒险鼹鼠队》哪里有趣了？
E: What is so interesting about The Adventurous Moles?

C: 《冒险鼹鼠队》主人公叫什么？
E: Who's the lead in The Adventurous Moles?

C: 好吧，我就大方告诉你吧。
E: Fine, I'll be generous this time.

C: …你问我，我也不清楚，你自己去找找就知道了。
E: ...Don't even try to ask me more. I wouldn't know. You probably should go there to take a look for yourself, and you'll find out soon enough.

C: …咦？你这不是还有一页后记没收集到吗？
E: ... Hey? Isn't there a page of postscript you haven't found yet?

C: 真是不好伺候的读者。
E: Such fickle readers.

C: 你看见一柄看似崭新的十字镐，两端镐头几乎未有撞击开掘的痕迹。
E: You see a pickaxe in near-pristine condition, both of its points barely having any scratches on them.

C: 打开看看。
E: Open it.

C: 因此，失去了「语言」记忆的荷尔斯泰因居民忘记了如何说话，导致了该星系全域静默至今。
E: The residents of Holstein have since lost the ability to produce speech. To this day, the Holstein galaxy remains silent.

C: 那么，请允许小女子代表天舶司，欢迎各位恩公光临「星槎海」。
E: On behalf of the Sky-Faring Commission, allow me to welcome you to Starskiff Haven.

C: 小女子已经将各位的情况呈报了司舵大人，我就不进去啦～
E: I've brought Madam Helm Master up to speed. It's over to you now~

C: 为何表现得这么亲切随和？
E: Why is he being so kind to us?

C: 我觉得这个人比那个驭空好说话多了，要么说人家能当仙舟将军，她只能做个司舵呢？你看这待人接物，差距多大。
E: He's much easier to talk to than that Yukong — their attitudes are so different! Maybe that's why she's only a helm master and he's a general...

C: 恩公莫要被她的话引走了注意。
E: Don't let her words distract you.

C: 请各位稍事休息，养足精神。准备就绪便可出发擒贼，届时就看恩公们的手段啦～
E: Now, get some rest and prepare yourselves for the operation ahead. I look forward to seeing you in action~

C: 截获通信时，仙舟上在下雨吗？
E: Was it raining when Kafka's transmission was intercepted?

C: 由于云骑军的排查和警戒工作，此处挤满了人，你暂时无法通行。
E: Due to the Cloud Knights' security regulations, this place is overcrowded with people. For the time being, you can't squeeze past.

C: 啊哟，太卜息怒！穹仪失灵了，定位洞天的入口可不容易。小女子也想把事情办利索些，可眼下能停靠星槎的也就只有这儿啦。
E: ...No need to yell, Master Diviner! The Meridian Pin is malfunctioning and I couldn't find the entrance to the delve. I wanted to get us straight to our destination but this is the only place I could dock the starskiff.

C: 哼，你又和她共情上啦？我也是怕她出尔反尔，想着提醒一句嘛。
E: Hey, are you on her side? I just wanted to remind her not to break her promise, that's all.

C: 没错。
E: That's right.

C: 丹恒兄弟是罗浮人么？
E: Do you hail from the Luofu, young master Dan Heng?

C: 再等等。
E: Let me have a think first...

C: 太好啦，总算还有一艘星槎。
E: Phew, thank goodness, there's one starskiff left.

C: 真对不住，咱哥俩平日里在街角的茶馆「不夜侯」搭档讲相声。情况你也看到了。云骑军一戒严，这几天茶馆生意是做不成啦。咱就寻思找个露天的地儿开开嗓子，练练功。
E: Please accept our apologies! Me and my partner do double act comedy in the Sleepless Earl — the teahouse round the corner. As you can probably guess, with all these curfews and lockdowns, we've hardly had an audience the past few days. We figured we'd find a spot on the street and do some rehearsal — just to stop us getting rusty.

C: 抱歉啦亲，您赶得不巧，今天敝店得早早打烊了……
E: Apologies, you've come at a bad time. Our shop is closing earlier than usual today...

C: 等云骑军排查危险结束之后，欢迎客人再来赏光。
E: Do come back when the Cloud Knights finish their business.

C: 我们是将军请来的援助。请问其他人都到哪儿去了？
E: We're reinforcements sent by the general. Where's everyone else?

C: 恩公，你们要小心了。药王秘传信奉寿瘟祸祖「药师」，是仙舟的心腹大敌。
E: Be careful, benefactors. The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus worship Yaoshi the Plagues Author — the greatest enemy of the Xianzhou.

C: 战况如何？
E: How's the situation?

C: {NICKNAME}，你做好准备了吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you ready?

C: …不对，你还是不明白。魔阴身的病因不是记忆，而是情感的阈值被磨砺到…算了，你便当记忆听罢。
E: ...No, you still don't understand. The condition isn't caused by memories, but by the emotional threshold having been... Never mind. You can regard it as a memory issue.

C: 药王秘传有多少人马？
E: How large are the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus's forces?

C: 您依然一意孤行啊，您不肯听我们的…就像当年那样。
E: You didn't heed us then, and won't heed us now... as headstrong as you always were.

C: 稍早些时候…
E: A little while ago...

C: 但我会以持明后裔的身份，完成我对罗浮的责任。
E: ...but as a descendant of the Vidyadhara, I will fulfill my duty to the Luofu.

C: 龙尊？
E: High elder?

C: …我不会说什么「请亲自回来述职」之类的话。你吩咐的，我定不辱使命。
E: ...I trust you will be here to re-issue the order in person... but whatever the outcome, I will do as you command and honor the mission.

C: …月宴，你们会怪我吗？
E: ...Can you forgive me, Yueyan?

C: 幻胧短时间内无力兴风作浪，也不必担心它再染指「建木」。只是封印星核的工作还需要花上些时日……
E: Phantylia won't be stirring up trouble any time soon — don't worry about her infecting the Arbor again. It's just that sealing the Stellaron is going to take some time...

C: 也许这就是咱们的命途啊。
E: Maybe this was all fate.

C: 嘿…真让人措手不及，没想到停云最后送我的东西，这么正儿八经。
E: *sigh* ...I was completely unprepared for this. I never thought Tingyun would leave something behind for me that was so sincere and earnest.

C: 好弓。这，该不会是…要送给我的礼物吧？
E: It's a good bow. It couldn't be meant for me... could it?

C: 我错了，在将反物质军团的卒子一个接一个消灭殆尽以前，仙舟仍然需要我…需要我这样为血火奔走在天空中的人。
E: I was wrong. Only when the last minions of the Antimatter Legion are wiped out, will I become useless to the Xianzhou... The Xianzhou needs people like me — those willing to cruise the sky and fight the flames.

C: 这就要走了吗？我还以为你们打算再多待一段时间呢。
E: Is that it? I thought you were gonna stay for at least a little longer...

C: 小狗绕了个圈，坐下，期待地想看你打开箱子，收获喜悦。
E: Diting circles around and sits down, expectantly wanting to see you open the chest and get something nice.

C: 混账！我们叫「三少学习互助会」！还敢叫什么「罗浮三少」，我看你是真不怕药王秘传啊！
E: Shh! We're the Luofu Study Club now! Don't say anything about the Trio. You ought to be more afraid of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus!

C: 即便离开了星空，无名客的「开拓」也不会结束。列车长也是这么想的，对不对？
E: Even if they left the stars behind them, their Trailblaze would not be over. That's also what the conductor thinks, isn't it?

C: 这边。
E: This way.

C: 你先请。
E: After you.

C: 别紧张，是正常现象。
E: Don't panic, this is normal.

C: 如此一来，您不仅能省下许多宝贵的时间，还能结交一批新朋友。
E: As such, you won't just be sparing much of your invaluable time but also forging new friendships.

C: 没事，我不介意。
E: It's fine, I don't mind it.

C: 我为我的失礼道歉，拿去吧，<unbreak>10000</unbreak>信用点——一点见面礼，算是我的补偿。
E: My apologies for any perceived slight. To show my sincerity, I offer you <unbreak>10,000</unbreak> credits as a gesture of goodwill.

C: 也有种说法叫「否极泰来」。
E: There's also the saying: "From misfortune comes bliss."

C: 好长一段路啊…这座酒店是否大得有点夸张了？
E: This is a long hallway... Is it just me, or is this hotel too big for its own good?

C: …啊，不过这并不代表梦中的时间是停滞的——为了避免给各位旅客造成身心负担，梦境中的时间尺度被设定为与现实一致，请您不必担心！
E: ...Ah, but that doesn't mean that time has stopped in the dream. To avoid any physical or mental burden on guests, time in the dream has been synced with reality's, so don't worry!

C: （…复现完成！现在您可以更好地享用梦境了。）
E: (...The replication is complete! Now, you can enjoy an enhanced Dreamscape experience.)

C: 那会儿就有苏乐达了？
E: Did SoulGlad really exist in that era?

C: …不说这个了！我带你去游览城镇…我们走吧！
E: ...We can talk about that another time! Right now, I wanna give you a tour of the town... Here we go!

C: 救救！救救啾！
E: Help! Help me!

C: 我把他的眼睫毛拔下来了。
E: I pulled out his eyelashes.

C: 有没有觉得它的轮廓很独特？因为在现实中，它曾是阿斯德纳的中央监狱。是家族在梦境中将其修葺一新，改造成如今光芒万丈的匹诺康尼大剧院。
E: Has a pretty unique shape, doesn't he? In the real world, it was originally the central prison of Asdana. The Family renovated it in the Dreamscape and transformed it into the glorious Penacony Grand Theater.

C: 你怎么知道的？
E: How do you know that?

C: 没错，流萤小姐，好东西就在那边。
E: That's right, Miss Firefly. That's where the good stuff is.

C: 听我一句劝，有什么想问的，快找那姑娘对峙去吧。别让她夹着尾巴逃跑了，哈哈。
E: You'd better hurry up and confront her if you have any questions. Don't let her off scot-free, haha.

C: 滴答！我猜，只有直率、纯真、有童心的孩子才能看见我——比如这位灰色的朋友！
E: Tick-tock! I guess I'm only visible to those with the innocence, kindness, and honesty of a child, like this kid here clad in gray!

C: 我可以将医生的话抛在脑后，用我自己的身体，随心所欲地去听、去看、去触碰、去思考、去领会。尽管这个世界并不真实，但这感受却无比珍贵……
E: I can forget about all the doctor's advice. I can listen, and see, and touch, and think, and understand whatever I want with my body. So, although this world isn't real, this experience is priceless...

C: 我们认识加拉赫。
E: We know Gallagher.

C: 尝试再次洞察他的内心。
E: Try reading his inner thoughts again.

C: 或许…我们还有其他选择？
E: Perhaps, there's something else we can do?
One...

C: （这也太惨烈了吧……）
E: (Such a tragic scene...)

C: 这是一个普通的垃圾桶。多么神奇，在一座由垃圾桶构成的王国里，居然存在着普通的垃圾桶…机会难得，你打算对它做点什么？
E: This is a normal-looking trashcan. How magical! A kingdom of trashcans actually has an ordinary trashcan... This is a rare opportunity. Do you wish to do something to it?

C: 踢它一脚。
E: Give it a kick.

C: {NICKNAME}，你…没事吧？
E: {NICKNAME}, you... you all right?

C: 这里…难道没有工作人员吗？
E: Are there... no staff members here at all?

C: 按照约定，我把这孩子带到你面前了。交易完成。
E: As promised, I've delivered the child to you. Our transaction is complete.

C: 很遗憾，只字未提。
E: Unfortunately, not a thing came up.

C: 你和这位猎犬家系成员打过交道，知道他非常有原则。但你很清楚，人在<color=#dbc291ff>心情好</color>的时候原则是不太管用的。
E: You and this Bloodhound Family member have met before, and you know he's very upright. But you're also aware that principles sometimes don't matter when a person is in a <color=#dbc291ff>good mood</color>.

C: 现在回想起来，他当时的神情有些躲闪，对理应更早发生的另一起事件也闭口不提。
E: Looking back, he seemed a little evasive at the time. And he also failed to mention anything about the earlier murder, too.

C: 无论如何，不要完全信任砂金。我们绝不能被他牵着鼻子走。
E: Whatever happens, please don't place all your trust in Aventurine. We cannot afford to be manipulated by him.

C: 「松波尔全民庭的代表舍特康努格宣布，松波尔全体星区在庭会议上一致通过决议，将以观察员实体身份加入星际和平会议——」
E: "The representative of the Citizen Court of Sombor, Schattenkornug, announced that the entire Star District of Sombor had unanimously adopted a resolution at a meeting of the Court to join the Interstellar Congress as an observer entity..."

C: 姐姐，对不起…我以为你会开心的。因为这是妈妈留给你的项链……
E: I'm sorry, Sister... I thought you'd be happy. Because mom left you this necklace...

C: <size=36>啊！</size>
E: <size=36>Ah!</size>

C: 更可怕的是，她现在{RUBY_B#死}再也无法歌唱了{RUBY_E#}。谁做的？人们都觉得凶手在外来者中，但我知道…您心里另有答案。
E: Who could be responsible for this? Many suspect the culprit is among the outsiders, but I know... you hold a different opinion.

C: 是什么让你觉得自己可以拉拢我？
E: What makes you think you can convince me?

C: 除了酒店客房的入梦池，还有其他入梦方法么？
E: Is there any other way to enter a dream besides the hotel room's Dreampool?

C: 听说蓝调的时刻十分浪漫，黄泉小姐可曾见证了什么故事？
E: I hear the Blue Hour is very romantic. Do you have any tales to share?

C: 在我的故乡有一个男人，在世界面临难以愈合的伤痛之际，他做出了一个决定。
E: There was a man from my homeland who, at a time when the world was grappling with deep, unhealable pain, made a choice.

C: 他们沉眠于没有灾难和苦痛的梦里，在男人创造的理想乡中度过安然一生。而「精神的亚当」会因这些人不愿醒来的愿望…变得坚不可摧。
E: They slumbered in a dream devoid of disaster and pain, living out their days peacefully in the man's created utopia. And it is because of the wishes of those people, who wished not to awaken, that this Spiritual Adam became unbreakable.

C: 哈，你太抬举我了，我怎么会是王子呢。我只是希望这些宝石能打开话匣子，也许你的调查记者生涯恰好和「死亡」有过交集？
E: Haha, I'm flattered. I'm no prince, and I just thought these gems would help you speak. So, as an investigative reporter, maybe you have heard of something about "Death"?

C: 怎么回事…这人要一直占着吧台，咱们可没法聊案子了。
E: What's her deal...? We can't discuss the case with other people hanging around the bar.

C: 那就展开讲讲案子吧，当然…也会附赠那位<color=#dbc291ff>米哈伊尔</color>的故事。
E: Let's dig deeper into the case, and of course... I'll tell you a story about <color=#dbc291ff>Mikhail</color>.

C: 如果仅凭这点就想质疑家族，未免太天真了。美梦中也有意外死亡，那又怎样？这种极小概率事件…会影响的也就极少数人。
E: Confronting The Family based on that alone would be naive. Death may occur in sweet dreams — so what? Such events are highly unlikely and only affect a tiny number of people.

C: …因为「钟表匠」根本不是什么梦想之地的传奇，而是<color=#dbc291ff>匹诺康尼分家史上最不可告人的污点</color>，他就是一切梦境异变的始作俑者。
E: ...Because the Watchmaker is not the legend of the Land of the Dreams at all. He's <color=#dbc291ff>the most shameful stain in the history of Penacony</color>, and he's the root cause of all the anomalies in the Dreamscape.

C: 喏——「克劳克影视乐园」，匹诺康尼最受欢迎的影视娱乐中心。
E: Here we are, Clock Studios Theme Park, the most popular entertainment center in Penacony.

C: 虽然流萤小姐的去向依旧成谜，但他的分享解释了不少疑点：「钟表匠」的真实身份，与家族的关系，以及隐藏在美梦和死亡背后的势力斗争。
E: While Firefly's whereabouts remain a mystery, his stories shed light on our suspicions about the true identity of the Watchmaker, his connection to The Family, and the power struggles hidden behind sweet dreams and death.

C: {RUBY_B#气息隐匿}「白」{RUBY_E#}…我微微消除了自己周身的气息，这样更不容易被注意到。星穹列车有家族授意还能解释，但我出现在这…并不合理。
E: {RUBY_B#Bated Breath}"White"{RUBY_E#}... I've made myself less noticeable. The Crew can explain their presence as authorized by The Family, but I can't come up with any excuses for being here.

C: 如果运气好，公司能从艾吉哈佐的黄沙里淘出任何东西，甚至{RUBY_B#塔伊兹育罗斯}「沙王」{RUBY_E#}的残骸。可惜，你们运气不行。
E: If your luck holds out, the IPC will dig something up from the golden sands of Egyhazo, maybe even the {RUBY_B#Tayzzyronth}Sand King's{RUBY_E#} remains. Pity, your luck has run out.

C: 最后，这位家主通过你布下的{RUBY_B#托帕石}「诱饵」{RUBY_E#}，如愿以偿找到了另一块基石，如此一来——
E: Finally, Sunday took {RUBY_B#topaz}the bait{RUBY_E#}, found the other cornerstone, and before you know it...

C: 就连那位星期日也没能分辨出来，看来翡翠也并非不能替代砂金。
E: Even Sunday can't tell the difference. It looks like jade can be substituted for aventurine, too. Sauce for the goose...

C: 哈…我知道了。你一定记得姐姐当时说过的话：「你是受母神赐福的孩子，你能带领氏族走向幸福。所以永远记得保护好自己，也永远不要怨恨痛苦和贫穷。」
E: Ha... I know. You must remember what Big Sis told you: You're a child blessed by Gaiathra Triclops and can lead the clan to happiness. So, always remember to protect yourself and never resent the pain and poverty you're going through...

C: 准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 「一切献给…琥珀王。」
E: "All for the... Amber Lord."

C: 很遗憾，这里不是你期待的地方。
E: It's a pity this is not the place you were expecting.

C: 我叫波提欧，是个「巡海游侠」。
E: My name's Boothill, and I'm a Galaxy Ranger.

C: 重点不在于此。
E: That's not the point.

C: 但他们的目标并非普通宾客，而是公司的使节。家族也一定会将客人们的安危列为优先级首位。
E: However, their target is not the ordinary guests, but the ambassadors of the IPC. The Family will certainly ensure that the safety of the guests is of the highest importance.

C: 居然收到了知更鸟小姐的礼物…简直像是做梦一样！不对，我这不是已经在梦里了吗？
E: I can't believe I received a gift from Miss Robin... It feels like I'm dreaming! Wait — I AM in a dream!

C: 抱歉，我不得不这么做……
E: I'm sorry. I had no other choice...

C: 星穹列车应该需要一些内部讨论的空间。趁这段时间，我会先试着寻找加拉赫。
E: The Astral Express likely needs room for some internal deliberation. In the meantime, I'll try and locate Gallagher.

C: …嗯，那我们稍后联系。
E: ...Sure, let's reconnect later.

C: 为什么？
E: Why?

C: 她就在这地方，不用担心，你妹妹很安全，现在…估计还在街巷里走访吧。
E: Don't worry. Your sister is here, safe and sound. She's... probably walking around the streets now.

C: 有人在操纵星核？
E: Someone is manipulating the Stellaron?

C: 噫，你说这种台词，我反而有点慌了……
E: Ah... that line actually makes me a bit nervous...

C: 加拉赫先生，你应该还有话要对我们说吧？
E: Don't you have something else to tell us, Gallagher?

C: 每天都能穿漂亮衣服，随心所欲地体验各式各样的梦泡，怎么吃都不会胖，不会生病，不会变老…只要付得起房费，这里就是最棒的乐园！
E: Every day, you get to wear fancy clothes, explore all sorts of dream bubbles, indulge in delicious food without gaining weight, and you never get old or sick... As long as you can afford a room, this place is the ultimate paradise!

C: 也许刚才那位先生只是特例吧。在得出结论前，我想还是能在梦境里亲眼看看为好，就像流梦礁那时一样。
E: Perhaps that man is just an exception. Let's not jump to conclusions. We should experience the Dreamscape ourselves, just as I did at Dreamflux Reef.

C: 瞧你这急样，不懂了吧，这种大型活动开幕在即，谣言肯定少不了。别担心，真有什么事，家族肯定比我们急。
E: Relax, with a big event like this, there's bound to be lots of gossip and rumors. Don't worry. If anything does happen, The Family will be on top of it.

C: 其实关于「黄泉」，还有件令我在意的事。
E: Actually, there's something else I'm concerned about — regarding Acheron.

C: 这也正是「开拓」之旅的意义。那我们就出发吧，各位。
E: This is also the spirit of the Trailblaze. Now, everyone, let's prepare to move out.

C: 钟表小子？我也能看见…这一位是舞台布景吗？
E: Clockie? I can also see him... Is this character part of the show?

C: 这个击发手感简直和「飞蝗Ⅱ型」一模一样……
E: This thing feels just like the Soaring Locust II...

C: 原来那位红发选手是你？！
E: So the red-haired contestant was you all along!

C: 你们将有关「钟表匠」和匹诺康尼星核的一切真相告给了银枝……
E: You revealed to Argenti all the truths about the Watchmaker and the Penacony Stellaron...

C: 如果我有幸得胜，就请各位为我让出通向桂冠的阶梯，还要承认——
E: If I am fortunate enough to emerge victorious, kindly grant me passage to the crown of victory and recognize that...

C: 我要做的正是这样的事：将众生的幸福归于唯一的「秩序」之下。人们不必再做出苦涩的抉择，不必再直面人性的弱点，抛却野兽的痼习，才能建立属于人的乐园。
E: That is what I want to do: Unite people's happiness under the banner of Order. They won't need to make bitter choices any longer, nor face the weaknesses of humanity. They can cast aside their primal instincts, to build a haven for mankind.

C: 既然流萤小姐已经表明了自己的观点，星穹列车自然也会给出我们的回答。
E: Since Miss Firefly has said her piece, the Astral Express will also naturally give you our answer.

C: 不对，不对，我不是在流梦礁长大的吗？那这里又是……
E: Hold on, this doesn't make sense. Didn't I grow up in Dreamflux Reef? So, what is this place...?

C: 放心，不是所有旅途都要通向星辰大海。就算离开了列车，我们的「开拓」也不会结束。
E: Don't worry, not all journeys lead to the stars. Even if I leave the Express, our Path of Trailblaze will continue.

C: 记录下来…是要做什么？
E: Write it down... Why?

C: 在我看来，星期日对自己的理想深信不疑，也是真心实意想向我们证明「秩序」的正确。
E: Well, in my opinion, Sunday is deeply committed to his own philosophy and genuinely wants to prove that the Order is right.

C: 对，我应该还能找到当时的路。
E: Yeah, I think I can still find the way we took back then.

C: 它会写下「流萤」的名字，和她在生命尽头绽放的华彩。
E: It will bear the name "Firefly" and the brilliance she showed at the end of her life.

C: 没想到啊，老头，你那没头没脑的计划真成了。难道你们无名客全都是些只会意气用事的傻瓜么？
E: That's quite unexpected, old man. Who would've thought your crazy plan would actually work? Do all you Nameless fools just act on a whim?

C: 谐乐大典开幕在即，有一件事…我无论如何都需要求证。跃迁是最有效的手段。
E: The Charmony Festival will start soon. There's one thing that... I need to confirm no matter what. A warp jump is the best way to do so.

C: 「以有黑白键的大琴为乐器；以发音和计数的符号为音符；以有下行无上行的河流作旋律；以陈明法度的典章定曲式。」
E: "A grand lyre with black and white keys served as an instrument, while symbols of articulation and numerical notation took the form of musical notes. The downward-flowing river became a melody, and the canon of law dictated the form."

C: 那就是星期日在晃点我们？说好了在舞台上一决胜负，怎么人都没了？
E: So, Sunday is messing with us? He said we'd have a final showdown on the stage, but why is there no one here?

C: 「至此便是第二幕。虚幻的谐乐中，『流放之地』逐渐走向『盛会之星』。」
E: "Thus concludes the second act. Amidst an illusory harmony, Land of the Exiles charted its course toward becoming the Planet of Festivities."

C: 然后咱们就回到现实里来了。你看，这里是你的房间。
E: And then, we returned to reality. Look, this is your room.

C: 没什么，三月七小姐。我就是见{NICKNAME}醒了，想看看{M#他}{F#她}恢复得如何。
E: Nothing, Miss March. I noticed {NICKNAME} was awake and wanted to check to see how {M#he}{F#she} was doing.

C: 不敢当，不敢当。
