E: It was nothing, really.

C: 哈哈哈，不愧是「银河球棒侠」——侠之大者，虚怀若谷！
E: Hahaha, here's the Galactic Baseballer — the paragon of both heroism and humility!

C: 但家族立刻将包括他在内的「秩序」残党打为敌人，坚称这场骚动是内部叛乱。如此一来，公司于情于理都无法介入「家族内务」了。
E: The Family quickly labeled him and the remnants of the Order as enemies, declaring the turmoil an internal rebellion. This move effectively barred the IPC from intervening in "Family affairs" on both moral and rational grounds.

C: 不知怎么，突然和你有一种…「好久不见」的感觉。
E: For some reason, I'm suddenly stricken by the feeling that... we haven't crossed paths in quite some time.

C: 希望以后还能和你一起开拓！
E: I hope we can Trailblaze together again someday.

C: 别心急。我会揭晓答案的…只是现在不是时候。
E: Patience, my friend. I will reveal the answer to you... but that time is not now.

C: 既然大家都这么说，那我们就去探探虚实好了。我也投江户星。
E: If that's the general sentiment, then we should indeed investigate. I vote for Edo Star too.

C: 黄泉
E: Acheron

C: 都不来和我聊聊么…{NICKNAME}？
E: Not going to come chat with me... {NICKNAME}?

C: 阿斯德纳是忆质充盈的星系，存在着名为「联觉梦境」的奇妙现象：在初入此地时，许多人会出现在彼此的思绪中，分享同一场梦……
E: Asdana is a galaxy known for its abundant memoria and the remarkable phenomenon known as Synesthesia Dreamscape. When people first enter this place, they often find themselves and others sharing a collective dream...

C: 银河迎来了纯洁的黎明，猛烈的风暴亦初具雏形。「一切献给琥珀王」的呼声变得越来越响亮，但无论人们如何审视，时间都将推动克里珀的巨锤下落，周而复始，永无止境。
E: As the Cosmos bathed in the radiance of a pure dawn, a tempestuous storm brewed on the horizon. The chant of "All for the Amber Lord" grew ever louder. Yet, no matter how one contemplates it, time inexorably swings Qlipoth's colossal hammer in eternal cycles.

C: 嗯，你说得对。
E: Yeah, you're right.

C: …从「秩序」的梦中挣脱了么？
E: ...Have you broken free from the dream of Order?

C: 你睡着的这段时间，星核已经被封印了。匹诺康尼的普通民众完全不知道发生了什么，他们只觉得记忆有些模糊，像是被人抽空了一段。
E: The Stellaron was sealed while you were sleeping. The ordinary people in Penacony have no idea what happened. They just feel like something is missing from their memories.

C: 走咯走咯！离登船还有些时间，咱们先去惊梦酒吧和大家汇合吧。
E: Yeah, let's go! We've got some time before we board the ship, so let's catch up with everyone at Dreamjolt Hostelry.

C: 还会再停留些时间，但不会太久。
E: We'll stay a bit longer, but not too long.

C: 要是见不到呢？
E: But what if we never cross paths with him?

C: 托帕还有别的任务，一会儿你会见到她的。谈话还是可以继续，就你跟我。
E: Topaz has something else to take care of, you'll be seeing her later. Talks can still continue between the two of us.

C: 请问……
E: Can I ask you something...

C: 快点下来，别人都在看着呢！
E: Come down already. Everyone's staring at you!

C: 你睡着的这段时间，星核已经被封印了。匹诺康尼的普通民众完全不知道发生了什么，他们只觉得记忆有些模糊，像是被人抽空了一段。
E: The Stellaron was sealed while you were sleeping. The ordinary people in Penacony have no idea what happened. They just feel like something is missing from their memories.

C: 别擅自改词。
E: Don't change the words.

C: 累得够呛。
E: Dead tired.

C: 嗯…不错的名字，就是欠了些功德。
E: Hmm... Not a bad name, just lacking in virtue.

C: 不知道能不能顺利出发。
E: I'm not sure if we'll be able to depart smoothly.

C: 也有这部分原因吧，但更多是因为我在匹诺康尼也没能找到想要的东西…有点遗憾。
E: Yes, but it's mainly because I couldn't find what I wanted on Penacony... It's a pity.

C: 对我来说，「隐瞒」远比「坦诚」更简单…但我也想试试，自己能否像普通人一样表达心声……
E: To me, hiding is much easier than being honest... yet, I still want to try expressing my emotions as any ordinary person would...

C: 那当然！哎，怎么感觉有点不吉利呢……
E: Obviously! Wait! Why does that seem so ominous...

C: 知更鸟得知真相的过程去哪了？
E: What happened to Robin's journey of uncovering the truth?

C: 星海浩瀚，就旅途的目的而言，我们恐怕很难再有产生交集的机会了。
E: The ocean of stars is vast, and given our destinations, I'm afraid our paths may not cross again.

C: 在这宇宙中，有着无数相似却又相异的世界，和无数相似却又相异的人。
E: In this universe, there exist countless worlds that are similar yet different, and countless people who are alike yet distinct.

C: 明明是你自己扔的吧！
E: You clearly threw those yourself!

C: 辞别之时已至。请阁下多多保重，再会！
E: It is time for me to depart. Please do take care. Goodbye!

C: 办梦境通信卡吗？新生有优惠哦！
E: Looking for a Dreamscape Card? We have a promo for new students!

C: 呜！对、对不起……
E: Eek! I—I'm sorry...

C: 不、不是的，这里举办的是「梦境甜品师挑战」，同学们可以从甜品社提供的食材中挑选组合，设计出独属于你们的…香蕉派。
E: N—No, we're hosting a Dreamscape Patissier Challenge. Students can choose from the ingredients provided by the Dessert Club and design their own... banana pie.

C: 欢迎欢迎，欢迎来到模玩社！
E: Welcome, welcome! Welcome to the Toys and Models Club!

C: 那还是来一只吧。
E: Fine, I'll take one.

C: 忍者的超•听力连质子入灭的声响也可捕捉，各位在我面前高声议论，不算偷听。
E: A ninja's super hearing can capture even the death of a proton. You spoke loudly before me. I wasn't eavesdropping.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「银枪•修罗」</color>殿下。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Silvergun Shura</color>!

C: 不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 在下听得很清楚。
E: I can hear you.

C: 此乃忍法帖中记载的忍界•事记。
E: A historical account of the ninja realm logged in the Ninja Scrolls.

C: 还不放心？这样吧哥们，你去隔壁翠丝那家店，有份七杯的账单。付过以后，就当你买下了我在这的安分。
E: You still worried 'bout somethin'? Tell you what, buddy, go to Jessie's shop next door. There's a tab for seven drinks. Settle that, and consider my behavior here bought and paid for.

C: 果然，波提欧先生身上也存在着类似的杂音。
E: I knew it. There's a noise around Mr. Boothill too.

C: 来——看看你搞什么鬼。
E: Let's see just what you're up to then.

C: 既然如此，让所有声音一起响不就完了！听着，我现在有个绝妙的主意。
E: Bah, just have every sound and voice come together in a single song! Listen. I have a fudgin' brilliant idea!

C: 你试着用巧妙的手法撬开它…但这儿不是模拟宇宙，没有骰子。你还没有开锁工具，手也不怎么巧，鉴定以大失败告终。
E: You try using your dexterity to pry it open... but this isn't the Simulated Universe. There are no dice. You also don't have any lockpicking tools available, nor are your hands reliably nimble — the roll ends in Critical Failure.

C: 你仔细端详面前的宝箱，但却没有发现任何解密界面、隐藏文本内容或道具提交插槽——看来它确实没法打开。
E: You scrutinize the chest in front of you, but don't notice any encrypted interfaces, hidden text, or item submission slots — it looks like it definitely can't be opened.

C: 说谁不正经呢？
E: Who said I'm not a serious person?

C: 不知为何，你的质疑声被小猴的*蕉声*掩盖了。似乎是这罐颜料自己的意志，小猴的声音不断从耳边传来，你的脑海中开始浮现小猴的影像……
E: For some reason, your voice of doubt is drowned out by the Banagibberish of the little monkey. It seemed to be the will of the paint can itself. The sound of the monkey keeps echoing in your ears, and images of the little monkey begin to appear in your mind...

C: 我们会为小猴制作同人周边，组织睡蕉展会，还会定期开展「校外活动」——各位同学感兴趣吗？我可以内推哦！
E: We create fan art and merch based on Slumbernana, host Slumbernana Cons, and hold a few other off-campus events from time to time. Itching to join us? I can refer you!

C: 我就不用了。
E: I'll pass.

C: 能被芮克先生看中，真好啊……
E: How wonderful it is to have been scouted by Mr. Reca...

C: 哦，抱歉，剧本上的角色都分配完了…但旁白也需要有人扮演！乱破演员，非你莫属！
E: Oh, it seems like all the roles have been assigned... But, yes! We'll need someone to narrate! Rappa the narrator, this is your role!

C: 你们好？
E: Hello...?

C: 求求您了，出演芮克先生的电影是我的梦想，请不要在他面前这么说……
E: Please, I'm begging you! Being in one of Mr. Reca's films is my dream! Um, don't say that...

C: 博士是天才，他的理想足够崇高，也一定能实现。但平庸者只会沉沦于不切实际的幻想，成为文明进化的赘余。
E: Given the Doctor's brilliant mind, his ambitions are lofty and are sure to be realized. But the commoners? Hmph, all they do is lose themselves in unrealistic fantasies, becoming an impediment to a civilization's evolutionary progress.

C: 哦？知道我为什么会放任各位在校园里胡闹，甚至一步一步引导你们来这里吗？
E: Is that so? Ever considered why I allowed you to do as you please on campus? Even going as far as to guide you to me?

C: 这个方向…是财富学院？
E: Isn't this the way to the Fortune Academy?

C: 这位先生…虽然看着很陌生，但应该不是普通的社员吧？
E: You... look unfamiliar. But you don't seem like a regular member either.

C: 等等——
E: Wait—!

C: 初次见面，哥们，怎么称呼？
E: Nice to meet ya, pardner. What's your name?

C: 且慢，既然在下已是能与邪忍抗衡的忍侠…可否助你一臂之力？
E: Make no haste. Since I am now a Ninja Hero fit to contend with the Evil Ninja... Would you let me join you in your crusade?

C: 叆叇馆主，阁下是在…摧毁《银河忍法帖》？为何？
E: Umbra Headmistress, you're... destroying the Cosmic Ninjutsu Inscriptions? Why?

C: …不，乱破。
E: ...No, Rappa.

C: 让他交代御猿•邪忍的去向。/让他交代原始博士的去向。
E: Make him tell us where Evil Ninja Osaru is. / Make him tell us where Dr. Primitive is.

C: 很久以前，我也曾在折纸大学修习过一段时光，所以也算是大家的同学。
E: A long time ago, I also spent some time studying at Paperfold University. So, I can be considered an alumnus of the school.

C: 蕉蕉蕉（笑）…如此完美的实验成果，用来清除害虫还真是可惜……
E: Banahaha... Such perfect experimental results. It would be a waste to use it to eliminate you pests...

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉蕉——
E: Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana Banana BananaBananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas Bananas...

C: 银枪•修罗
E: Silvergun Shura

C: {RUBY_B#万敌}迈德漠斯{RUBY_E#}…王啊……
E: {RUBY_B#Mydei}Mydeimos{RUBY_E#}... My king...

C: 「这就是你弑父夺得王权，却任凭印戒沉入冥海，不愿延续悬锋荣光的理由……」
E: "This is why you killed your father for the throne, only to let your signet sink to the bottom of the Sea of Souls, refusing to let the glory of Kremnos live on..."

C: 这件工艺品的真伪并不重要。重要的是它对缇安大人有特别的意义，能让她回忆起故乡。
E: The authenticity of the piece isn't important. What matters is that it holds special meaning for Lady Trianne and reminds her of her hometown.

C: 是你睡太晚了。不过休息充足也是好事。
E: You would've been, too, if you hadn't stayed up so late. But what matters is that you got a good rest.

C: 恕我冒昧，但从刚才起我就想问：「微表情」、「语调」、「调查问卷」…{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的祭司竟需要掌握这些技能么？
E: Pardon the question, but I've been meaning to ask this for a while: micro-expressions, tone of voice, questionnaires... Are these all part of the usual skill set for {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila's{RUBY_E#} priests?

C: 又要回房间睡觉？好无聊哦…
E: Back to bed again? Boring!

C: 记得缇安大人的母亲，也是雅努萨波利斯的圣女吧？
E: Wasn't Lady Trianne's mother also the Holy Maiden of Janusopolis?

C: 果然不对劲……
E: ...As I expected, something's not right here.

C: 即便「纷争」之神权悬置，这道黑色巨浪未免也来得太过迅猛…我猜这场惨剧不只是天灾。
E: Even if the divine authority of Strife is as yet unclaimed, the black tide is advancing more rapidly than expected... I fear this tragedy is more than a mere natural disaster.

C: 这只怪物或许承载了有用的记忆……
E: Maybe this monster will show us some useful memories...

C: 小心，{NICKNAME}…虽然「莲食学派」的所有者从未以真面目示人，但此人断不能轻易信任。
E: Be careful, {NICKNAME}... Even if the head of the Lotophagists has never shown their true identity before, we shouldn't trust this person so easily.

C: 呀？！小卡，人家的心脏本来就小小一颗，你别突然冒出来吓人家好不好…这都第二次了！
E: Hey, Cal!? Don't suddenly appear out of nowhere and scare me like that! My tiny little heart cannot take it... This is already the second time!

C: 好，知道了……
E: Right, got it...

C: 嗯…那么，{NICKNAME}阁下，你先请吧。
E: Well... In that case, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, please go ahead.

C: {NICKNAME}阁下，我会根据你的提问观察她的反应，以便判断她回答是真是假。
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, I will observe her reaction based on your question to determine whether she is being truthful.

C: 呜哇，幽灵…缇安好想见识一下，连金丝都感应不到的幽灵！
E: Whoa! A spirit... Trianne wants to meet this spirit that even the gold thread can't sense!

C: 对泰坦说「我爱你」就可以吗？那迷迷很擅长哦！
E: Will telling the Titan "I love you" work? Mem is good at doing that!

C: 您…其实正是{RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>理性之泰坦</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>瑟希斯</color>{RUBY_E#}<color=#dbc291ff>本尊</color>吧？
E: You're... actually {RUBY_B#<color=#dbc291ff>Reason Titan</color>}<color=#dbc291ff>Cerces</color>{RUBY_E#}, right?

C: 毕竟…我是七贤人之一哪？
E: Well... I'm one of the Seven Sages after all.

C: 阁下，你的比喻…真不敢让人恭维。
E: Lady, your metaphors... are not worthy of praise at all.

C: 以尔魂息…祭火吧。
E: Offer your souls... to the fire.

C: 我们…是不是很快就能回家了？
E: Does that mean... we get to go back home soon?

C: 你们甚至没有亲眼见过那柄天上的锋刃…既然如此，何谈返乡？
E: You have never even witnessed that blade in the sky with your own eyes... How, then, is a city you have never seen your home?

C: 少主，记住：切勿将软肋示人，一头雄狮绝不应混迹于它的猎物之中……
E: My young lord, always bear this in mind: Never reveal your vulnerabilities to anyone. A lion should never dwell amidst its prey...

C: （振作，你还有更远的目标。）
E: (Keep your chin up. You have greater things to achieve.)

C: 它无路可退。
E: It was stuck in a corner.

C: 呵…逐火之旅，真是道阻且长啊。
E: Alas... The Flame-Chase Journey is destined to be a lengthy one, replete with obstacles.

C: ——被克拉特鲁斯掳走了！
E: ...She got abducted by Krateros!

C: 树庭的一些朋友为了和我一起捍卫火种，抗击黑潮，不幸牺牲，他们的家属…有权利得知这一切。
E: My fellows at the Grove gave their lives defending the Coreflame and fighting the black tide alongside me. Their families... deserve to know the truth.

C: 那么，树庭…他守住了么？
E: So... did he manage to defend the Grove?

C: 就像你当时做到的那样……
E: Just as you did back then...

C: （哦，看来过得不错。）
E: (Oh, he looks like he's been well.)

C: 当然了，好孩子。只是你要乖乖的，听大人的话，好好学习知识和礼仪，成长为合格的圣女……
E: Of course, my dear. You only need to behave well and listen to what the adults tell you, study all the knowledge and etiquette you need, then grow up and become a proper Holy Maiden...

C: 那…就得由圣女来为人们指点迷津了。毕竟我们就是门神在人间的化身，对不对？
E: If that happens... then the Holy Maiden will have to be the one to guide people on the right path. After all, we are the human avatars of the god of passages, yeah?

C: …就是缇安。
E: ...It's Trianne.

C: 房间里，好像有「翻红瑞」的气息，就在…那里！
E: There's a whiff of "safari" in this room. It's... right over there!

C: 至于能否夺得火种，就端看那刻夏的能耐了。
E: As for whether we can take back the Coreflame... that will be up to Anaxa's capabilities.

C: 不，恰恰相反。我来是为了告诉你……
E: No, just the opposite. I'm here to tell you...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>而是愿意高举盾牌，保护身后生灵的「人」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>But "humans" who stand ready to raise their shields high to protect the lives behind them.</color>

C: 感觉不错。你觉得呢，万敌？
E: Looks pretty good. What do you think, Mydei?

C: 哈…看来还是「纷争」更适合你。
E: Hah... I suppose "Strife" still fits you better.

C: 训练得如何？
E: How was your training?

C: …请节哀。
E: ...I'm sorry.

C: 涉及火种归还的次序，黄金裔原本制定了战略。对于那些不会主动为害人间的泰坦——譬如{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}和{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}——我们本计划最后接过它们的神职。
E: The Chrysos Heirs had initially crafted a plan regarding the order to return the Coreflames. For Titans like Oronyx and {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, who harbor no intentions of harming humanity, our strategy entailed assuming their divinity only at the very end.

C: 她的样子…为什么有些不同？
E: Why does she look somewhat different?

C: 咦，能听懂泰坦说话了？
E: Wait, I can understand the Titan language now?

C: 头一回见这么大的，还能充当门锁…不愧是迷津的发源地。我们要怎么破解它？
E: This is the largest puzzle I've ever laid eyes on, and it even acts as a door lock... Should've expected something like this in the homeland of puzzles, I suppose. So, how are we going to solve it?

C: 但是…我不明白，从刚才开始就摸不着头脑。
E: But... I don't get it. This has been puzzling me for a while now.

C: 什么……
E: ...What?

C: 另一队随我出发，追缉那黑衣剑士，夺回火种。
E: The other group will come with me to pursue the black-robed swordmaster and recover the Coreflame.

C: （想实现的愿望…似乎在进行「圣杯战争」的时候，也有人问过我类似的问题……）
E: (A wish, huh... Feels like someone asked me a similar question during the Holy Grail War...)

C: 我向匹诺康尼的股东和家主们发送「请柬」，欢迎他们加入到这场圣杯战争中来。有些人作出了回应，有些人却嗤之以鼻，把我精心布置的欢会当成一个商业噱头。
E: I sent invitations to Penacony's top shareholders and family heads, welcoming them to join this Holy Grail War. Some accepted. Others turned their noses up, dismissing my carefully orchestrated spectacle as just a marketing stunt.

C: 气氛都烘托到这里了，去召唤阵那里开始仪式吧。
E: The stage is set. Now, step into the summoning circle and begin the ritual.

C: 为什么？
E: Why?

C: 音符小姐，这位就是我刚才向你提过的「值得信任的朋友」。
E: Miss Note, this is the trustworthy friend I mentioned to you earlier.

C: 以矜持而优雅的姿态，两位从者将桌上的天环翅堡一扫而空。
E: With quiet poise and grace, the two Servants polished off the Halovian Winged Burgers on the table.

C: 对了，你不回到御主身边为他忠心奋战，而是单骑突入，这样好吗？那个牛仔现在正身陷囹圄，急需你的拯救啊……
E: Is it really wise for you to charge in here on your own instead of loyally staying at your Master's side? That cowboy's in quite a pinch right now and would appreciate a speedy rescue...

C: 音符小姐，哦不，███，是时候向匹诺康尼展现你真正的魅力了。
E: Miss Note... No, ████. It's time for you to show Penacony your true charm.

C: 我们不该在这里！
E: We shouldn't be here!

C: 虽然照样有个「挥宝石如土」的小姑娘，对绝大多数人也算是理想乡了。
E: We've still got a little girl who throws around gemstones like dirt, but it's pretty much a utopia for most people.

C: 你真的是这样想的吗？如果登上星穹列车没能让你的生活变得更好……你该怎么办？
E: Is that really how you feel? If joining the Astral Express doesn't change your life for the better... What then?

C: 从今往后，鸢尾花之母，您不再受任何人的摆布，只为自己起舞。
E: Mother of Iris, you will no longer be controlled by anyone from this moment on. You will now only dance for yourself.

C: 说来我也很好奇，作为「人类守护者」的我为什么会被召唤到这样一个没有抑止力的世界来——
E: That brings up a good point. Why would I, a "Guardian of Humanity," get summoned to a world without the Counter Force?

C: 总之，老奥帝先生兴师动众的第一届「圣杯战争」也成了最后一届。
E: Anyway, the first Holy Grail War orchestrated by Old Oti ended up being the last one.

C: *重重叹气* …葛瑞迪，抱歉，我说得太过了。但你为什么要替{RUBY_B#老奥帝}那个落井下石的矮胖子{RUBY_E#}卖命？
E: *heavy sigh* ...Sorry, Grady. That was a bit harsh. But why are you serving that {RUBY_B#Old Oti}opportunistic fat old fart{RUBY_E#}?

C: 那么，就让骑士们留在这里保护公主，我们去收割敌人的小命好了。
E: Alright, let the knight stay here with the princess, and we'll go reap some enemy lives.

C: 我的火箭筒呢？
E: Where's my rocket launcher?

C: 也别为难他了，我们的时间可经不起浪费。有句老话说得好，「每只扑满都值得第二口饼干。」
E: Let's not be too hard on him. We don't have time to waste. As the old saying goes, "Every Trotter deserves a second cookie."

C: *匹诺康尼监狱时代的粗口*，要不是你这废物抢戏，挡住了子弹，钟表老子现在已经把{NICKNAME}解决了，你居然还敢邀功？
E: *Penacony profanity*, if your worthless scene-stealing self hadn't blocked that bullet, Old Clockie would've eliminated {NICKNAME} already. Who are you to have the audacity to act proud?

C: 领衔主演
E: Lead Actors

C: 进度条正在飞速快进
E: Progress bar is progressing rapidly

C: 电影的精华都被跳过了！这可是我投入了毕生心血的——
E: You skipped all the best parts of the movie! This is the result of my entire life's work—

C: 我输了，输得心服口服。
E: You win... I concede.

C: 你听到一阵只会出现在动画里的嚎叫声，抑扬顿挫，又不失情感。你明白，要过上相当长一段时间，斯科特才能从病床上下来了。
E: You hear a cry straight out of a cartoon: over-the-top, full of flair, and surprisingly heartfelt. And you just know for a fact that Skott won't be getting out of that hospital bed anytime soon.

C: 承认吧，你一辈子都拍不出那样的电影。
E: Face it. You'll never be able to make a film like that.

C: 有功夫闲聊，不如先干活吧。
E: If you have the time for mindless gossip, you're probably better off spending it on getting actual work done.

C: 我倒要试试看。
E: Hmph. Try me.

C: 这正是故地重游的意义。在我眼中，一切都历历在目。
E: That's the whole point of revisiting a place. When I look at everything here, the memories are so fresh it's as if it all only happened yesterday.

C: 啊哈哈，我会考虑的…先祝你们一切顺利啦。
E: Ahaha, I guess I can consider it... I hope everything goes smoothly for your guild!

C: 哎呀——我眼光果然从不出错。您慢慢考虑，倒也不急。
E: Aha—! I knew it, I always have an eye for talented people. No problem, take your time.

C: 我反倒觉得她很安全——成年人心中的童真，往往都坚硬得很！
E: Nah, I think she's perfectly fine on her own. The childlike innocence that adults have is a lot more resilient than you can imagine!

C: 刚才那声音，你们听到了吗？
E: Did any of you hear a voice just now?

C: …无论如何，多谢您的救命之恩。
E: ...Regardless, I'm grateful to you for saving my life.

C: 事到如今，也不必向你隐瞒。
E: I suppose there's no point in hiding it from you anymore.

C: 这可卖给谁去？
E: Who can I sell this to?

C: 现在不是开这种玩笑的时候啦……
E: Now's not the time for those kinds of jokes...

C: 三月七说你好会差遣人。
E: March 7th said you were bossy.

C: 这些都是后话了。只愿从今以后，留在恩公们记忆里的是「停云」，而不再是「幻胧」啦。
E: Haha, we'll see. I just hope the Tingyun in your memories won't be tainted by Phantylia anymore.

C: 唯一的区别是，与你同行的狐人女子停云，从未遭遇绝灭大君，而是以自己的意志，协助你解决了那场危机。
E: The only difference is that the foxian lady, Tingyun, who was travelling with you, never encountered the Lord Ravager. Instead, she helped you solve that crisis of her own free will.

C: 把这种事交给运气，不像你的作为。
E: It's not like you to leave things to luck.

C: 那咱们上前去？
E: Shall we go then?

C: 第二块拼图。这是一双翅膀，还是用羽毛做成的装饰？
E: The second jigsaw piece. Is this a pair of wings, or a decoration made of feathers?

C: 正因如此，我庆幸于自身的折翼。
E: That's why I rejoice at my broken wings.

C: ——当然，我的答案也是翁法罗斯。
E: That includes me, too. I'm for Amphoreus.

C: 怎么突然问这个，你很紧张么？别担心，相信列车组。
E: Why do you ask that? Are you feeling nervous yourself? It'll be fine. Just trust the Crew.

C: 确切地说，这是我个人的请求。
E: Truth be told, it's more of a personal request.

C: 小三月，你在房间里吗？
E: March, are you in here?

C: 你生病了？
E: Did you come down with something?
Uh...

C: 换作是我，我会建议您联系斯蒂芬……
E: Um... I humbly suggest for you to contact Stephen instead...

C: 可不止这一个。看那边——#7631，#10136…都是一样的问题。
E: That's not the only one. Look at them. #7631 and #10136... are affected too.

C: 我已经说过了吧？就凭你这点本事…也想逃出我的掌心？
E: Didn't hear me, did you? With those petty tricks of yours... do you actually think you can slip away right under my nose?

C: 我…我……
…看来黑塔女士对银河间的新闻不太敏感。
E: ...Looks like Madam Herta doesn't pay much attention to cosmic news.

C: 这些家伙…是「记忆」的模因残渣吧？
E: These are... memetic remnants of the Remembrance?

C: 没什么。
E: Oh, it's nothing.

C: 请带路吧。
E: Please lead the way.

C: 枪断了固然可惜，却换来了有价值的信息：翁法罗斯的锻兵技术能和造出这柄击云的技艺一较高下。
E: Though losing the spear is unfortunate, we gained some important insight: Amphoreus' weapon-forging skills are on par with the craftsmanship that forged Cloud-Piercer.

C: 好小子，还好我闪得快。
E: Why you! It's a good thing I managed to dodge quickly.

C: 跃上大地兽。
E: Hop on the dromas.

C: 「——激起往昔的涟漪！」
E: "—and stir up ripples of past reverie!"

C: 你没事就好……
E: I'm glad that you're okay...

C: 怎么了，外邦人，畏惧{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}天谴之矛{RUBY_E#}的怒火，还是想跟我练练手？
E: What is it, outsider? Do you fear the {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Lance of Fury{RUBY_E#}'s raging flames? Or perhaps you'd care to spar with me?

C: 别和万敌较真，因为他真的不开玩笑。
E: Avoid getting too serious with Mydei, because he means every word he says.

C: 请放心，市民已经疏散了，附近的生灵…只有你们三位。
E: There is no need for worry. The citizens have already been evacuated and the only living things in the vicinity... are the three of you.

C: 没事，他都死过好几回了。
E: It's fine. He's already died a number of times before.

C: 她说话好文艺哦……
E: She sounds so cultured...

C: 嗯？这次…又发生什么了吗？
E: Hmm? Is... something else wrong?

C: 你感到脸颊一热，随即切换了手。
E: You feel your cheeks warm up and quickly switch hands.

C: 感觉到了吗？金线起了波痕。它告诉我，你对奥赫玛的真诚尚存一丝怀疑，我必须消除这份顾虑。
E: Did you feel that? The golden threads are rippling. They reveal the distrust you still have for Okhema, and I take it upon myself to dispel these concerns.

C: 咦，你是说刚到奥赫玛那会儿吗？这么一说，*我们*当时也觉得有点奇怪。
E: Eh? When we all arrived in Okhema? Come to think of it, we felt something a bit odd, too.

C: 不是勉强。留影算是我的兴趣。
E: That's not it. Photography is an interest of mine.

C: 遐蝶轻轻地把相机放在地上，你俯身将其捡起。
E: Castorice gently places the camera on the ground, and you bend down to pick it up.

C: 达米亚诺斯先生，请你冷静下来，不要冲动。
E: Mr. Damionis, please calm down. Don't act rashly.

C: 当然。希望你们喜欢这份礼物，嘿嘿。
E: Of course. Hope you like this gift, heheh.

C: <size=28>别追我，不许过来！</size>
E: <size=28>Stop chasing after me! Don't come any closer!</size>

C: 为了我们的旅程能够继续。
E: To allow our journey to continue.

C: 真诚的回答。此步不记。
E: A truthful response. A step will not be recorded.

C: 金色的丝线平静如初。
E: The golden thread remains calm and unchanged.

C: …白厄？
E: ...Phainon?

C: 没办法，爱说话的人不在，总得有人负责开口。
E: Well, since the talkative one isn't around, someone has to take her place.

C: 你睡着的时候，我思考了一些问题，眼下最麻烦的，果然还是翁法罗斯人对天外世界的态度。短期内，我们恐怕没办法联络上列车了。
E: While you were asleep, I did some thinking. I believe the most pressing concern is still how the people of Amphoreus view what's beyond the sky. Unfortunately, contacting the Express might not be feasible for a while.

C: 如果我们尝试飞出翁法罗斯…
E: If we try to fly out of Amphoreus...

C: 丹恒
E: Dan Heng

C: 阿格莱雅
E: Aglaea

C: 走吧，夺回「纷争」的火种，或是死在它的悬锋下——
E: Let's go. We'll take back the Coreflame of Strife or die in Kremnos.

C: 亦敌亦友，一直如此。和他一起行动总能激起我的好胜心。
E: He's both my friend and my foe. It's always been this way. Working with him always brings out my competitive side.

C: 该联觉信标起作用了？
E: It's time to use the Synesthesia Beacon.

C: 该翻的地方都翻过了，接着前进吧。
E: Well, we've turned over every nook and cranny. It's time to move on.

C: 我说什么来着？跟你在一起时运气总是不错。这种仪器能稳固祭司和命运三泰坦的联系，来试试吧。
E: What did I tell you? I get especially lucky when I'm with you. This instrument stabilizes the connection between priests and the Three Titans of Fate. Give it a try.

C: 当然，荣耀是我们的，而死亡——献给它们！
E: Of course, glory is ours, and death is theirs!

C: 「…还要面对场外的噪音干扰，真可怜啊。」
E: "...must also contend with the noise from outside the arena. How unfortunate!"

C: 但我会以自己的方式战斗，狩猎神明！
E: But I will do battle in my own way and bring down this god!

C: 嗯，我能感觉到。
E: Yeah, I can tell.

C: 是我们初次见面时的遗迹？看上去似乎有些…不一样。
E: Are these... the ruins we saw when we first arrived? They look... somewhat different.

C: 但或许泰坦也想不到…对于我和{NICKNAME}这两位外来者，我们尚未打心底里融入这个世界的生死存亡。
E: But perhaps even the Titan did not expect that... For outsiders like {NICKNAME} and I, we still have not yet become fully involved with the fate of this world.

C: 记忆，观察。幸福…带去！
E: Memory, observed. Happiness... take!

C: 你害怕阿格莱雅吗？
E: Are you scared of Lady Aglaea?

C: 总结下现有的信息，{NICKNAME}阁下。
E: Let's run through everything we know so far, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}.

C: 「勇气，荣耀，理智，坚韧，牺牲」——以{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的五大美德之名，穿过圣城的大门，去迎接你们的末路。
E: In the name of the five virtues of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#} — courage, honor, reason, tenacity, and sacrifice — stride through the holy city's gate and embrace your fate.

C: 或许…那正是我们急需的东西啊。
E: Perhaps... that's what we desperately need.

C: 如此昏暗破败，这就是悬锋城的未来吗？
E: This dark and derelict place... is this the future of Kremnos?

C: …这殊荣就交给你吧。这是你一直憧憬的画面，不是么？
E: ...This honor is yours. Isn't it something you've been longing for?

C: 一定来支持你，老白。
E: Aww, Phainon buddy, we've got your back.

C: 仪式开始前的这段时间尽可自由支配，好好休息吧…我也要花些时间整理思绪。回头见了，朋友们。
E: The night's all yours, but get some rest before tomorrow's ritual. I should also take this time to sort out my thoughts... I'll see you soon, my friends.

C: 至于现在，先回浴宫休息整顿吧。
E: For now though, let's just head back to the bath chamber to rest and gather ourselves.

C: 嘻嘻，那我就是主角身边最好的伙伴！要多给我点镜头哦？
E: Then I'll be the protagonist's bestest sidekick, heehee! So give me more screen time, alright?

C: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
E: "O majesty of the twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

C: 希望一切顺利吧。都经历过星神的瞥视了，本地神明的考验你应该也能应对。
E: Let's just hope that everything goes well. After all, as someone who has earned the gaze of an Aeon, you should be able to overcome the trial of a regional god just fine.

C: 「庄严的十二泰坦，支撑世界的支柱——」
E: "O majesty of the Twelve Titans, pillars of the world—"

C: 「我们于此索求神性，以填补世界的裂缝——」
E: "We seek your divinity, to mend the rifts of the world —"

C: 天父的凝视…稳固…你的形体……
E: The gaze from sky father... stabilized... your form...

C: 岁月…拘束着世上所有存在哪……
E: Time... restrains everything that exists in this world...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>便去找回…你被夺走的未来吧……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Go and find... your future that has been stolen...</color>

C: 你要挑战那…十指紧扣的{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}「灰黯之手」{RUBY_E#}……
E: You'll have to challenge that... {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Hand of Shadow{RUBY_E#} clasped with unyielding fingers...

C: 小蝶有什么发现吗？
E: Cas, did you find anything?

C: 母亲…它究竟在呼唤谁？
E: Mother... Who are they calling out for?

C: 依吾所见，至多能见过今起第十五个{RUBY_B#黎明}门扉时{RUBY_E#}吧？
E: In my estimation, at best, you'll see fifteen more {RUBY_B#dawn}Entry Hours{RUBY_E#}.

C: 我失去了一只眼睛，视野却比任何时候都更加明朗……
E: I may have lost an eye, but my view of the world has become clearer than ever...

C: （格奈乌斯？熟悉的名字……）
E: (Gnaeus? I know I've heard this name somewhere...)

C: 如果命运注定要我与您走向对立，我会试着抗争，尽一切可能捍卫我所希冀之物。
E: If fate dictates that my path must oppose yours, I will do all I can to resist it, and protect what I aspire to achieve.

C: 就像往常那样，迷迷以一种神乎其技的方式，回到了它不为人知的…小窝中。
E: As was their custom, Mem, with astonishing dexterity, slipped back into their secret... little hideaway.

C: 真是…热闹啊。
E: That was... quite a spectacle.

C: 这样…就可以了吗？
E: Is... this all?

C: 所以，只要你轻轻一触，一条罪恶的生命便将就此凋零。逃离对你而言，不是易如反掌？
E: Yet you can end any sinful life with just a touch of your fingers... Shouldn't it be easy for you escape from here?

C: 若用哀地里亚人的眼光看待「死亡」：它是一切生命的终点，是我们每个人的必由之路。人不应抗拒，而要学会如何迎接它。
E: In the eyes of an Aidonian, "Death" is the end of all life, a destination we will all eventually reach. Humans should not resist it, but learn how to face it.

C: 这…怎么会这样……
E: What's... going on...?

C: 你注意到遐蝶并不想浪费时间，便直接修复了左边的短矛。
E: You notice Castorice doesn't want to waste time, so you immediately repair the left spear.
Pfft...

C: 那你还过不过日子了？
E: Then how are you going to live the rest of your life?

C: 抱歉……
E: Sorry...

C: 这是「亡语蝶」，死难者众多的地方，总有它们翩飞的身影。
E: This is a Eulogistic Butterfly. They are found in places where many have met their demise.

C: 就像蝴蝶，落在「死亡」的枝头……
E: Like how a transient raven butterfly, a fleeting papilio castor, perches on the twig of "Death"...

C: 去吧，迷迷！
E: Go, Mem!

C: 话都说到这份上了，却还要留下遗憾…这种事情不要啊！
E: What? Are we seriously going to leave any room for regret?

C: 我…为重铸翁法罗斯生死秩序而来。
E: I'm... here to reforge the order of life and death in Amphoreus.

C: 我将她的灵魂捏塑成型，又以巨龙玻吕刻斯的模样，承载着姐姐在冥河里溯流而上，送她重返人间。
E: I reshaped my sister's soul and took the form of the great dragon Pollux to carry her up the River of Souls and back into the mortal realm.

C: 还真是被恰到好处地藏起来了…这是扎格列斯的恶作剧吗？
E: Look at how well-concealed this is... Is this one of Zagreus' pranks?

C: 让他们听见人民的呼声——！
E: Let them hear the voices of the people!

C: 那刻夏…老师？我还以为你不打算到场了。
E: Professor Anaxa...? I thought you'd pass on this.

C: 我的故乡哀丽秘榭，那是一处被时间遗忘的村落。那里的好风如薄荷般清新，麦浪宽广到能连上海洋…我曾坚信，自己会在那与邻里亲友永享安宁。
E: Aedes Elysiae, my beloved hometown, is a village forgotten by time. It is a place with the most invigorating breeze and wheat fields that spread all the way to the sea... I once thought that there, I would enjoy a lifetime of peace and quiet with my friends and family.

C: 我早有把握。
E: I have long since made a decision.

C: 我向你保证，老师。愿瑟希斯捍卫你的思想。
E: You have my word, sir. May Cerces safeguard your thoughts.

C: 不能？下一位。那个一脸蠢相的，对，就是你，你敢对着泰坦拍胸脯做担保吗？
E: No? Fine, next. You, the one with ignorance written all over your face... Yes, you. Do you dare swear by it in front of the Titan?

C: <color=#ff3a3e>不要回头，向前看。</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Don't turn around. Keep looking forward.</color>

C: 阿格莱雅！我们回来了——
E: Aglaea! We're back!

C: 「…冰冷的死荫，已由我照亮。」
E: "...I have illuminated the cold shadow of death."
Tsk...

C: 最坏的情况：「负世」的重量…或许已将他压垮。
E: The worst-case scenario is that he's... already been overwhelmed and crushed by the Worldbearing burden.

C: 在久远的神话里，{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}曾在神山上回答信众们的发问。
E: A bygone myth tells of an occasion where {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} once answered their followers' questions on the peak of the holy mountain.

C: 老师就这么舌战群儒，与挑战者一一辩论。直到最后，一位学者问他：「阿那克萨戈拉斯，你是否不敬神灵？」
E: One by one, Anaxa engaged in wars of words against those who would challenge him. Toward the end, a scholar asked him, "Anaxagoras, have you any respect for the gods?"

C: 不能这么定性，那刻夏。你要知道：只有孩子才会揭开魔术的幕布，并以此为傲。
E: You mustn't conclude that, Anaxa. You should know that only a child would expose a trick and be proud of it.

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 当然是要坚定「再创世」了！
E: No hesitation! I stand by "Era Nova"!

C: 邻人踩了主人的花圃，主人敢怒不敢言，哈哈，元老院早就脸面扫地。
E: Haha, someone trampled right over the master's flower bed, yet the master only fumes in silence. Oopsie, there goes the reputation of the Council of Elders.

C: 身为{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}神性化身，他将性命托付给我们…让人类亲手终结他的疯狂。
E: As the embodiment of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}'s divinity, he entrusted his life to us... and allowed humankind to end his madness.

C: 听说现世的悬锋城也刻着同样的话，居然是炼金的术式啊。
E: I've heard that these words are still engraved in Castrum Kremnos even today. It didn't occur to me that they were actually part of an alchemical formula.

C: 没错，那就是人生，而死亡是衡量旅途价值的刻度。征途之所以伟大，史诗之所以壮阔，皆因万物终有逝去之时。
E: That's exactly what life is, and death is but a scale to measure how valuable the journey was. Journeys and epics are only glorious and magnificent because all things eventually fade to dust.

C: 呵，这可真是…耐人寻味呀。
E: Heh, this is... quite interesting indeed.

C: 我相信，这就是神谕中「再创世」的真相。
E: I believe that this is the truth behind the "Era Nova" as mentioned in the prophecy.

C: 你那弱小的泰坦早已被强大的女武神征服，它现在的模样跟锻炉里经年累月沉积的废料无异。
E: The frail Titan was conquered long ago by the mighty warrior goddess. Now they're nothing more than rusted scrap, left in the forge to decay over countless years.

C: 您的神性确实将凡庸们映衬得无比丑陋…但人子于这世间踽踽而行千万载之久，尝尽了生命的困顿、看遍了可耻的缺陋……
E: Your divinity indeed casts our mediocrity in a harsh and unflattering light. Humanity has walked this earth for many ages, enduring life's struggles and witnessing its shameful imperfections...

C: 那我的后人终有一日会回到此处，向您证明：哪怕在您眼中低劣残缺的凡人，也能拥有扛起世界的力量！
E: Then my descendants will return here one day to prove to you that even the flawed and imperfect mortals you disdain can bear the weight of the world!

C: 将它握在掌中，就感觉这世间的风儿都会为我转向…召唤雷云或雨雪，也只在一念之间。
E: Holding it in my hand, it feels like the winds of this world might turn for me... Summoning thunder or snow is just a thought away.

C: 但眼下只能靠自己的双腿。继续前进吧……
E: We'll have to rely on our feet for now. Keep moving...

C: 火种已经被取走了，它却还在行动……
E: The Coreflame has been taken, yet they still move...

C: *哦…您不用如此客气，恩师。照顾病榻上的您，是我应尽的本分。*
E: Oh... no need to thank me, master. It's my duty to care for you while you recover.

C: 嗯…脸上倒是挺干净的。要是不戴面具，谁能想到这幅皮囊下面居然藏着那么险恶的杀心……
E: Hmm... your face looks innocent enough. Who would've guessed that such a pretty face would hide a heart full of darkness?

C: 就在刚才，风堇说话的时候…有成百上千股的忆流从我们脚下散逸了出来，升上了天空……
E: While Hyacine was speaking... countless streams of memories rose beneath our feet, spiraling into the sky...

C: 难道是泰坦的殒落导致的？但这根本不合逻辑……
E: Could this be because of the Titan's fall? But that doesn't make any sense...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>归还艾格勒的火种，接过它的神权……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Return the Coreflame of Aquila and inherit their divine authority...</color>

C: 丹宝，拜托了。
E: Dannie, I'm counting on you.

C: …那天在场的人里，我不知道他们当中有多少是无辜的，又有多少人罪有应得。
E: ...Of those present that day, I don't know how many were innocent, how many truly deserved their fate.

C: 因为，哪怕拥有泰坦的神力…你还是没有用天空的殒坠惩罚世人。我想，你或许也在等待救赎之人的出现。
E: Even with the Titan's power... you didn't punish the world by letting the Sky fall. I imagine you were waiting for someone to bring redemption.

C: 最后，我还是走上了先祖们的道路，回归了天空…我没能回到地上，和人们一同行走。
E: In the end, I followed the path of my ancestors, returning to the Sky... I didn't return to the earth, to walk with the people.

C: 遐蝶成功炼成死龙•玻吕刻斯，并利用它回到冥界见到「死亡」泰坦塞纳托斯，并将泰坦火种与夺走的未来悉数归还，翁法罗斯的生死流转重归有序。
E: Castorice successfully recreated the Netherwing, Pollux, via alchemy and used its power to return to the nether realm, where she faced Thanatos the Death Titan. She returned both the Titan's Coreflame and the stolen future, restoring the cycle of life and death in Amphoreus.

C: 你对我最严峻的指控便是人性将尽，你还指责我对人间悲欢的关切皆是假意。
E: Your gravest accusation is that my humanity is fading, and you claim my concern for mortal joys and sorrows is nothing but a facade.

C: 你那双靴子，根本就没有扎格列斯的神力！
E: Those boots definitely don't hold Zagreus's divine power!

C: 哈…没想到那玩意还真能派上用场。行吧，你来操作？
E: Ha... never thought that thing would actually come in handy. Alright, do you want to handle it?

C: 桀桀桀！效果拔群！
E: Hehe! Works like a charm!

C: 「我…很抱歉，赛法利娅。」
E: "I... I'm sorry, Cifera."

C: 封存于此，阿格莱雅神性的残留。
E: Stored here, the remnants of Aglaea's divinity are.

C: 哈…没关系，让你说出一句毫无遮掩的交心话到底有多难，这我早就知道了。
E: Ha... no worries. I've long understood how difficult it is for you to open up completely.

C: 我改变了很多。
E: I'm not the same person I used to be.

C: 但我不知道该怎么做…我没法像你那样织出金光闪闪的布匹，也没有海瑟音姐姐那么美妙的歌喉，更不可能像缇宝阿姐那样知识渊博……
E: But I don't know what I need to do to get there... I can't weave golden dresses like you, I can't sing as well as Miss Hysilens, and I definitely don't know as much as big sis Tribbie...

C: 你说吧…呜呜…*我们*一定会…帮你实现的。
E: Go ahead... *sob* We will... definitely fulfill it for you.

C: 不过，我告诫你们——假如未来你们做出了什么失格之举，千万别对外宣扬你们是七贤人之一，阿那克萨戈拉斯的学生……
E: However, heed this warning — If you ever do anything disgraceful out there, don't ever claim you were the student of Anaxagoras, one of the Seven Sages-

C: 先祖们只有悲伤的过去，但我有需要呵护的未来。我想做的，就是站在英雄们身后，在金色的浪潮将世界推向新生时，尽己所能疗愈每一个可能会溺亡的普通人。
E: All my ancestors had was a sad past, but I have a future I want to protect. Instead of becoming a hero and ushering in a golden deluge to baptize the world anew, I want to stay in the back line and save all the ordinary humans from drowning in the rising waves.

C: 是我，雅辛忒丝，天空一族的后裔。很抱歉打断了您的酣眠。
E: It's I, Hyacinthia, a descendant of the Sky people. I apologize for interrupting your slumber.

C: 用秘术临时创造的灵水之门远不如祭仪水盆那般稳定，<color=#dbc291ff>恐怕只能允许一人通过。</color>
E: The spirit water gate formed with this technique isn't as stable as a ritual basin. It'll <color=#dbc291ff>likely only let one person through.</color>

C: 但你还是救下了他的性命，尽管他夺走了你的至亲。
E: Yet you still saved his life, even though he took your family.

C: 历史从不会均匀地呼吸。它时而屏息千年，宛若时光停滞；时而急促地喘息，仿佛要在一瞬之间倾覆世界和文明。
E: History doesn't breathe evenly. At times, it suspends its breath for millennia as though time has frozen. At other times, it pants rapidly, as if poised to topple the world and our civilization in an instant.

C: …真是壮丽的景象啊。
E: ...What a breathtaking scene.

C: 那些无辜的大地之子，只是产生了窥探「天外」的好奇心，就被高高在上的神明施以亡族灭国的审判……
E: Those innocent children of the earth were sentenced to total annihilation by the god above, while they had nothing more than mere curiosity for things that lie beyond the sky...

C: 英雄塞涅俄丝，她对人子的博爱…也是深沉且无条件的么？
E: Was Seliose's love for humanity truly so... boundless and unconditional?

C: 我畏惧你…我难以想象，当你发现浅薄且脆弱的凡人无法承受你那沉重的博爱时，会变成多么扭曲的模样……
E: I fear you... I can't imagine how twisted you may become when you realize that shallow and fragile mortals can't bear the immense weight of your boundless love...

C: …再来上这最后一堂历史课吧！
E: ...embark on this final lesson in history!

C: …你很快就能得到答案了，风堇姑娘。
E: You will soon have your answer, Miss Hyacine.

C: 奥赫玛的黎明…落幕了……
E: Okhema's Dawn has come to an end...

C: {NICKNAME}，冷静！
E: {NICKNAME}, calm down!

C: 理智的缺失…是无法逾越的沟壑。
E: The lack of reason... can't be overcome.

C: 再见了，大工匠。
E: Farewell, Grand Craftsman.

C: 难不成，万敌……
E: Don't tell me that Mydei...

C: 我是一名「无名客」，而我要做的事……
E: I am a Nameless, and what I'm going to do...

C: 嗯。至于{NICKNAME}和丹恒——就交给你们亲自护送了。
E: All right. As for {NICKNAME} and Dan Heng, I'll also leave them to you.

C: …桀桀桀！总算不用装成个信封了，可憋死我了！
E: ...Heeheehee! I don't have to pretend to be an envelope anymore! That was suffocating!

C: （创世涡心…终于还是回来了。）
E: (The Vortex of Genesis... we made it back.)

C: 我也曾有疑惑，为何一位土生土长的安提基色拉人，竟然懂得维修天外的载具？
E: I've had my suspicions. How does a native Antikytheran know so much about repairing vehicles from beyond the sky?
Hehe...

C: 我要你告诉我：那刻夏老师对「新世界」的描绘确凿无疑。世界将依我的记忆再造，生者和死者都将重生为最初的人类，与他们前世无异……
E: Promise me this: Professor Anaxa's vision of the "New World" is absolute. The world will be reborn from my memories, all souls, living and dead, will return as the first humans, unchanged from their past lives...

C: …感谢你们为这个世界所付出的一切，伙伴。即便来世无人记念，我也一定会铭记在心。
E: ...Thank you, my friends, for everything you've done for this world. Though the next world may not remember, I shall never forget.

C: 呵呵。开个玩笑，我想说的是，无论时间、空间、物质…所有概念，都仰赖你我的认识而存在。这便是「智识」，若没有它，宇宙只是本混沌的书，在偶然中写成，却无读者品鉴。
E: Just kidding. What I mean to say is that time, space, matter... all concepts exist solely because we perceive them. This is called the "Erudition." Without it, the universe would merely be a chaotic book, written by chance, yet unread by anyone.

C: 多么奇妙的一致性啊，寥寥数笔就勾勒出了世界的真理。也只有他能解明「『我们』究竟为何物」这一课题。
E: How beautifully it aligns, revealing universal truth in such simple terms. Only he could solve the riddle of "what exactly are we"?

C: 白厄…他没事吧？
E: Phainon... is he going to be alright?

C: 你好，我是银河无敌球棒侠。
E: Greetings. I'm the Invincible Galactic Baseballer!

C: 正要和你说呢：不久前，我在秋千上睡甜甜的觉，做了个奇怪的梦……
E: I was just about to tell you. Earlier, while napping on the swing, I had the strangest dream...

C: 风景还没看够呢。
E: I was still taking in the scenery.

C: 「迷路迷境的最深处，揭晓未来答案的地方。」
E: "In Membrance Maze depths we seek to find, the answers future left behind."

C: 神谕牌在你这儿吗？
E: So, are the oracle cards with you?

C: 她是个冷酷淡漠的人。
E: She's as cold as winter frost.

C: 那也是他与生命中的一众旅伴，初次邂逅的时分。
E: And there, at last, he found the ones who would walk his path right beside him.

C: 我说过，这是男人最初的记忆。对于即将到来的「再创世」，它的意义尤为特殊。
E: These are, as I mentioned, his first memories. They are of particular importance for the imminent Era Nova.

C: 创世涡心，世界的起点与终点，作为谢幕的舞台再合适不过。阁下，我恳请您继续前进，端举着跃动的好奇心。
E: The Vortex of Genesis, where the world begins and ends. What stage could be more befitting of our final act? Come, come, come, I beseech you onward, buoyed by your surging curiosity.

C: 唤起最后的记忆。
E: Show me the final memory.

C: 神谕牌不在这里呢……
E: No sign of the oracle cards...

C: 哼，惟一人能见证「再创世」又何妨？
E: Hmph! So what if there's only one person left to witness the Era Nova?

C: 然后，我就会沉入甜甜的梦乡，消失在世界的小角落里……
E: Then, I'll fall into a sweet dream, disappearing in some small corner of the world...

C: …倘若我们终究无法冲破这座囚笼，我会坚守。直到有人前来打破这漫长的轮回，为翁法罗斯的命运添上结尾。
E: ...If we can never break free from this prison, I will stand my ground. Until the day someone shatters this endless cycle and writes the final chapter of Amphoreus's fate.

C: 这听起来倒像我另一位故人。
E: Sounds like an old friend of mine.

C: 我能证明，自己的力量足以超越命运。
E: I had to prove that my power could transcend fate.

C: 好啊，那就试试看——
E: Alright, then, we'll see—

C: 这样的太阳…恐怕无法温暖来世的冥界。
E: A sun like that... surely cannot bring warmth to the nether realm of the next life.

C: 可即便在神明设计的演算中，无条件的勇气和善意也会诞生。所以……
E: But even within the gods' cold calculations, unconditional courage and goodwill still emerge. So...

C: 唯独启程的信念，不要将它忘记。
E: Never forget what set you on this path.

C: 我要做的，就是推动新生的「白厄」走到世界尽头。然后……
E: All I have to do is push the next Phainon to the end of the world. And then...

C: 你来过启蒙王座吧？
E: You've been to the Luminary Throne before, haven't you?

C: 让太阳升起来吧。
E: Let the sun rise.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>█ █检测到█异██「毁█常██灭」█高██纳█能██努█反██克█应█ ██ █ ███</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>█ █anomaly █de██ "DES █tected██ TRUCTION" █energy██ NA █ ██ NOO █surging██ K ██ ██ █ ███</color>

C: 化作这个轮回，第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次逐火之旅的记忆，永远住进「岁月」半神的心里。
E: I'll turn into the memory of this cycle, the <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th Flame-Chase Journey, and forever reside in the heart of the "Time" demigod.

C: 我…没事…只是好久没运动，身体都没力气了……
E: I'll be... okay... just not used to... running around...

C: 哎呀，在做出决定前，能不能和我聊聊呢，三月？
E: Say, March? Got a moment to talk before you make your decision?

C: 真是听着就让人家怦怦心跳。三月，既然这是你的决定，那我一定站在你这边。
E: That's so heartwarming! March, if that's what you've decided, you have my full support.

C: 向星核许愿，消灭来古士…
E: Make a wish to the Stellaron to destroy Lygus...

C: 哀丽秘榭是被「岁月」包裹的小村庄。在这里，我们或许能和外界取得联系。
E: Aedes Elysiae is a little village enclosed by Time. We might be able to contact the outside world from here.

C: 见到你们，真令人安心…
E: It's such a relief to see you two...

C: 很遗憾，现在不是高兴的时候。两个天才站在这里，代表你遇上大麻烦了。
E: Pity. Now's not the time to celebrate. Having two geniuses standing here means you are in big, BIG trouble.

C: …真是的。明明是你说要复习一遍历史的，怎么自己睡着了呢？
E: ...Honestly. You were the one who insisted on reviewing history, yet here you are, dozing off?

C: 剑旗爵，动手吧。
E: Dux Gladiorum, if you please.

C: 此人是这个时代的「清洗者」首领。自黄金战争起，他们就以抹杀黄金裔为己任，即便如今我已扫合诸邦，这群虫豸也始终在阴影中蠢蠢欲动，妄图阻挠逐火征程……
E: This is the leader of the "Cleaners" in this era. Since the start of the Chrysos War, they've made it their mission to wipe out the Chrysos Heirs. Even now, even after I've united all the city-states, these vermin still lurk in the shadows, hindering the Flame-Chase Journey...

C: 哼，拙劣的谎言就不必再续了。但这城中确实有人对天外了如指掌……
E: Hmph, drop the charade. But yes, there is someone in this city who is all too familiar with the world beyond the sky...

C: 凯撒与城邦代表们即将入场，若准备妥帖，便随我一同游去议会吧。
E: The Imperator and the delegates are about to arrive. If you are ready, please follow me to the meeting.

C: *诸代表鸦雀无声*
E: *The representatives fell silent*

C: 至少，这证明我的判断没有错：<color=#dbc291ff>留你一命是正确的选择。</color>
E: At least, this proves that my judgment was right: <color=#dbc291ff>Sparing your life was the correct decision.</color>

C: 她蛮横的作风…让人难以接受。
E: Her bossy way of doing things... is hard to stomach.

C: 是啊。城邦代表们也颇有微词。还好她允许我们自由行动，这算是为数不多的幸运。只是……
E: Yeah. Even the city-state delegates have complaints. Thankfully, she allows us to move around freely, which is a small blessing. Still...

C: 你怎么在这？
E: Why are you here?

C: 她害羞未说出口的那些话，之后就由我代为敬你们一杯吧。现在，这座浴宫就分给你们歇脚……
E: For those words she was too shy to say herself, I'll raise a glass to you on her behalf. Now, I leave this bath chamber to you...

C: 这个轮回的元老们竟然…看来先前被处以极刑的祭司不是个例呀。
E: The Elders of this cycle were all... Looks like that priest who was sentenced to death wasn't an isolated case.

C: 不要再开战了……
E: No more war...

C: 身为凯撒大人的史官，我负责为逐火军的各位撰写诗篇。但对于自己，我却不知该如何落笔。
E: A—As the Great Imperator's historian, I'm responsible for composing poems and songs for everyone in the Flame-Chase Army. But... I have no idea how I should record myself in the annals.

C: 在她登场前，不如与我们共饮一杯吧——敬含而不露的理性。
E: Why don't we have a toast before she arrives? To reason, which is held but not revealed.

C: 什么情况？！
E: What's going on!?

C: 刻律德菈聆听着你的述说，一言不发。
E: Cerydra listens to your words silently.

C: 讲述「开拓」的决心。
E: Talk about the Trailblaze's resolve.

C: 神礼官，你还未离去么？
E: You're still here, Theoros?

C: {NICKNAME}，看！前面就是会场了。
E: Look, {NICKNAME}! The venue's right ahead.

C: 流速…慢于翁法罗斯？
E: Where time flows... slower than within Amphoreus?

C: 你…究竟是谁？
E: Who... are you?

C: 但我们有办法将你送回翁法罗斯。只要你愿意帮助我们……
E: But we can send you back to Amphoreus... As long as you are willing to help us...

C: 你要是想阻止「智识」的敌人，与我们合作是最好的办法哦？
E: Working with us is the best way to stop the enemy of Erudition.

C: 他的阴谋不会得逞，因为「浪漫」将要兑现诺言，为翁法罗斯编织一袭坚不可摧的战袍……
E: His conspiracy won't succeed, because Romance is ready to make good on their promise to weave an indestructible armor for Amphoreus...

C: 小蝶已经下定决心。*我们*也不能辜负她的觉悟。
E: Since Cas has made up her mind, we can't let her resolve be in vain.

C: 妄想用人类的炼成阵，囚禁堪比神明的存在？痴人说梦。
E: And you really think a human alchemical array can bind a godlike being? That's just nonsense.

C: 然后，愿它能安然启航…与「负世」的火种一同飘过时间的长河，飘到{NICKNAME}身边，成为你回到翁法罗斯的指引。
E: And then... may it set sail in peace... Drift down the river of time along with the Coreflame of Worldbearing, reach {NICKNAME}'s side, and lead you back to Amphoreus.

C: 按照约定，我回来了。
E: As promised, I'm back.

C: 小家伙，看得到吗？别急着说话，这是一段预录制影像。
E: Hey kiddo, can you see me? Don't bother responding, this is a pre-recorded video message.

C: 海列屈拉…？
E: Helektra...?

C: 哈哈——看，我已为你备好晚宴，带来了最好的蜜酿与贡品！
E: Haha! Look, I've prepared you a grand banquet! The finest honey brew and tributes await!

C: 记住…我从未向你…和命运屈服……
E: Remember this... I never bowed to you... or fate...

C: 断锋爵，冬霖爵，曳石爵…他们的前路在那一刻已被决断。在一场光荣的征程中领受牺牲，是我能赐予他们的最后赠礼。
E: Dux Fragoris, Dux Brumalis, Dux Helkolithist... their fate was sealed at that moment. Dying on a glorious campaign was the final gift I could give them.

C: 我不知道。恐怕也没人能为我解答。
E: I don't know. And I doubt anyone does.

C: 救世主也好，神礼官也罢，皆从天外而来，无权干涉我亲自征服的土地。翁法罗斯的「律法」，自当由她的主人裁定。
E: Both the Deliverer and the Theoros came from beyond the sky. They have no right to interfere with the lands I conquered with my own two hands. The "Law" of Amphoreus shall be determined by Amphoreus's master.

C: 是，各军团也将同时做好准备。赴死者向您致敬！
E: Understood! The legions will make their preparations. Those who are resolved to die, we salute you!

C: 在那之后，未来还会有背负神权的黄金裔，还有更多英雄降世……
E: More Chrysos Heirs bearing divine authority will be born, and many more heroes will arise...

C: 人们曾为我登峰欢呼…如今为陨落欢呼…也好，我钟爱欢呼……
E: People once cheered for my ascension... and now they cheer for my fall... No matter. I am fond of applause...

C: 「或许，如同凯撒的每一局对弈，真相只会在将军的那一刻揭示。」
E: "Perhaps the truth will only be revealed at the moment of checkmate, just like every chess game she ever played."

C: 没错，不复存在。
E: Yep. No more.

C: 你把话说清楚！
E: Explain yourself!

C: 和列车组不一样，这些人的「记忆」遭到了篡改。
E: But these people's "memories" were tampered with. That's not what happened with the Express Crew.

C: 「你说对了。是星期日的提议，起初黑塔拒绝得很干脆。」
E: "No, it was Sunday's suggestion. Herta initially refused."

C: 我不清楚你们有什么目的。
E: I don't know what your intentions are.

C: 我细细破译这些「同僚」的记忆，就单一个体而言，每个人的目的都微不足道。但当我将他们的思绪拼凑到一起……
E: I carefully dissected the memories of these "colleagues" of mine. Individually, their goals are not worth mentioning, but when you piece them all together...

C: 星神陨落的瞬间？站在记录者的角度，的确是空前绝后的奇观。
E: The moment an Aeon falls? That would indeed be a spectacular sight for someone dedicated to recording these things.

C: 小心，可能是陷阱。
E: Be careful. This could be a trap.

C: 所以，再多给我一些时间，好吗？我还想为「未来」留下更多「记忆」……
E: So... could you give me more time, please? I want to leave behind more "memories" for the "future"...

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> ...</color>

C: 又是一轮新的开始，一次熟悉的相逢。
E: It's another cycle of new beginnings, and another familiar reunion.

C: 第三枚密钥，也是最后一块拼图……
E: The third encryption key... and the final piece of the puzzle.

C: 这是……
E: What...?

C: 趁一切还来得及，我必须让你回心转意才行！
E: So, while there's still time, I've got to make you change your mind!

C: 这么说来，下一站就是传说中大名鼎鼎的「盛会之星」，匹诺康尼……
E: Anyways, the next stop is the legendary Planet of Festivities, Penacony...

C: 噔噔，噔噔噔噔噔噔……
E: Dun-dun... dun-dun-dun-dun-dun-dun...

C: 好像少了一个人。
E: Seems like we're one person short.

C: 什么游戏？
E: What game?

C: 真是的，走神秘可爱路线的忆灵，有一个就够啦。
E: Seriously! One mysterious and cute memosprite is more than enough!

C: 突破啦，突破啦。
E: It's a breakthrough! A breakthrough!

C: 黑化强十倍，真棘手啊…
E: Of course, ten times stronger after turning evil. Great.

C: 海瑟音…唔，「剑旗爵」就在前面不远，疏散工作快要完成了。快去吧，不然可能会赶不上。
E: Hysilens... I mean, "Dux Gladiorum" is not far ahead. The evacuation efforts are almost over, so go now, or it might be too late.

C: 且不论「长夜月」。在创世涡心，还有个人和{NICKNAME}一道失去了音讯。
E: Let's forget "Evernight" for now. In the Vortex of Genesis, there was someone else who went missing along with {NICKNAME}.

C: 一切。
E: Everything.

C: 「不朽」是龙的道途，「永恒」是生命至深的渴望。你若将大地的生灵托付予我，它们定会与我血脉中的本能共生。
E: The Permanence is the path that dragons trod, and "eternity" is life's deepest desire. If you entrust the earth's living beings to me, they will live in symbiosis with the instincts in my blood.

C: 寻找{NICKNAME}的过程，也许会漫长如永夜…务必小心，在「岁月」中彷徨，绝非易事。
E: The search for {NICKNAME} might stretch on like an evernight without end... Be careful. Wandering through "Time" is no easy feat.

C: 恰如蚌壳之于明珠…塞纳托斯的权能包裹着你，使你的灵魂免受侵蚀。
E: Just as a pearl is cradled within its shell... the power of Thanatos surrounds you, shielding your soul from corrosion.

C: 出发吧！踏上「开拓」，绝不落下一人。
E: Let's go! On the Trailblaze, no one gets left behind!

C: 「找到她们。杀死她们。回收她们。」
E: "Find them. Kill them. Reclaim them."

C: 这一点，我记下了。
E: I'll remember that.

C: 正因它如此珍贵，深埋心底，才需要更多时间……
E: And because it was so precious and hidden so deep in my heart, it needed more time...

C: 别让我等太久啊。丹恒…{NICKNAME}。
E: Don't make me wait too long, Dan Heng... {NICKNAME}.

C: 原来，是我陷入了思维误区啊。
E: Ah. So that's it... I was stuck in a flawed line of thinking.

C: 罗浮斩获金血，戴罪立功，此为一胜；你我恃此金血，因便斡旋，此为二胜；罗浮二胜，我三人皆大欢喜，此为三胜——
E: The Luofu will seize the golden blood and redeem itself. That'll be our first win. Then we'll leverage this golden blood in the negotiations, our second win. These two wins for the Luofu will make all three of us happy, and that'll be our third win.

C: 但，翡翠女士还是吩咐我们，尽可能多关照无名客朋友。所以从我个人角度，再给各位一点小小的建议吧。
E: However, Madam Jade instructed us to look after our Nameless friends as much as possible. So let me offer you all a small suggestion, just from my personal perspective.

C: 识刻锚无人响应。
E: No response from the Chronocognitive Anchor.

C: 仿佛只在一瞬间，所有人都消失了。
E: It's as if everyone vanished in an instant.

C: 务必小心，「毁灭」读数仍在上升。
E: It's advised to remain vigilant. The Destruction's levels are still rising.

C: 盗火行者？为什么会在这里。
E: Flame Reaver? Why is he here?

C: 我试过了，一个人搬不动。至于原因，想必各位都清楚。
E: I've tried, but I can't move them alone. And as for why, well, I'm sure you all know the answer.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「门径的圣子，缇里西庇俄丝——」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Tribios, Holy Child of Passage..."</color>

C: 「风堇小姐…说得没错。」
E: "Miss Hyacine... is right."

C: 但很快，它就会被「毁灭」的热浪吞没。
E: But it will soon be engulfed by the Destruction's heat.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「无名的英雄，卡厄斯兰那」！</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Nameless Hero, Khaslana!</color>

C: 凯旋的门径，由*我们*开启！
E: We will open the gate of triumph!

C: 又一次，我们回到了这里。
E: Here we are once more.

C: 它在解析一切生命行为…
E: It's parsing all life activities...

C: 你早就预见到这一刻了，对吗？
E: You saw this coming all along, didn't you?

C: 黑塔女士如何了？
E: How is Madam Herta?

C: 讨论价值没有意义。这是赞达尔•壹•桑原的命运——
E: There's no point in debating. This is Zandar One Kuwabara's fate...

C: 没有结论。他败给了良知。
E: There was no conclusion. His conscience got the better of him.

C: 他们一定在回家的路上了。到时候，大家可以一起办一场宴会——
E: They must be on their way home. When they arrive, we can throw a party together...

C: 二…二对一，这不公平！
E: T—Two against one? That's not fair!

C: …阿那克萨戈拉斯教授，我姑且确认一句，你该不会理解了那神礼观众的歪理吧？
E: ...Professor Anaxagoras, let me just check one thing... You haven't bought into those twisted theories of that Theoros, have you?

C: 现在，维系着我们意识和身形的力量——它来自别处。
E: Now, the force that maintains our consciousness and form... Comes from elsewhere.

C: 星穹列车…实话说，很有「家园」的感觉。
E: The Astral Express... honestly, it really feels like "home."

C: 那么，现在…到了和「读者们」道别的时候啦。
E: And now... it's time to say goodbye to our "readers."

C: 阿格莱雅女士，还是戒不掉她最大的爱好呢。
E: Lady Aglaea just can't give up her favorite hobby, can she?

C: 用你最爱的童话作比喻吧：宇宙起源于一枚种子，它长成大树，「现在」是它的枝叶。
E: Let me put it in your favorite fairy-tale terms. The universe began as a seed. It grew into a great tree, and the "present" is its branches and leaves.

C: 真是个…让人安心的答案。
E: That really is... a comforting answer.

C: 他们将为这世界，为同行的每一位伙伴，献出自己的心，接过他人的心，并将其传递下去。
E: They will offer their hearts to this world, to every companion they walked beside, and they will take in the hearts of others and pass them onward.

C: 又是「墓碑」又是「遗言」的，你是畏罪自尽了不成？
E: All this "tombstone" and "final words"... Did you end yourself to atone for your guilt or something?

C: 可「我」的故事，该从哪里说起呢？
E: But where should I start with the story about "me"?

C: 允许
E: Allow

C: >>>再见。桃子。
E: >>> Bye. Peach.

C: >>>注释：好吃。
E: >>> Comment: Pretty.

C: 只是一场梦？但我还没有学会「做梦」呀。
E: It's all a dream? But I haven't learned how to "dream."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>那真挚的颤抖，就是「生命的因」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>That genuine shiver... That's the "mover of life."</color>

C: 赞达尔•壹•桑原，证毕。
E: Zandar One Kuwabara thus completes the proof.

C: 我感到欣慰，黑塔。因为我们终究殊途同归——
E: I am glad, Herta. We ended up on the same page.

C: 俱乐部这关算是过了。现在，专注眼前吧。
E: Well, we passed the Society's trial. Let's focus on what we've got in front of us.

C: 真是摸不透你。
E: I really don't get you.

C: 呵，真被你猜中了。
E: Heh. Looks like you were right.

C: 前面是空间站的核心区域，反物质军团的虚卒会很多喔。
E: The central area of the space station is up ahead. There will be lots of Legion Voidrangers there.

C: 一个人都没有，疏散做得相当彻底呢。是黑塔亲自下的指示么？
E: Not a single soul here. Impressive evacuation work. Did Herta organize it herself?

C: 用「奇物」隐藏「奇物」，的确是那女人会干的事情…你翻了那么久目录，想必有头绪了吧？
E: Hiding something extraordinary with something extraordinary... this is pretty Herta. I assume you know what to do? I mean, you've read that catalog for quite a while.

C: 这场乌龙让你看了笑话，真是过意不去。一点薄礼，不成心意，还要请你收下。
E: Sorry to get you involved in this fuss. Here's a little something for your trouble. It's not much, but please accept it.

C: 星星直堪摘，银河直堪赏~
E: The cosmos is indeed a sight to behold.

C: 看完了吗？眼睛别乱瞟，跟你有关的就这几行。没什么问题的话，照片我就拿走了。
E: Are you done yet? Don't just nose around. There are only a few lines that concern you. And if there's nothing wrong, I'll take the photos.

C: 干嘛啦～你和姬子姐姐很熟的吧？你去求她，她肯定会愿意的啦～
E: What's the matter? You know Himeko well, right? If you ask her, I'm sure she'll say yes~

C: （好像和「瓜农」说的样子对不上号啊……）
E: (Doesn't fit Gossipmonger's descriptions...)

C: （是时候了，前往开启三重权限所守卫的「那扇门」。）
E: (It's time to go and open the door protected by triple authentication.)

C: 嘘实埋间。
E: Disposal Site.

C: 你也担心洛奇的情况吧…
E: You must be worried about Rocky...

C: 与「军团」一役，朝夕相处的科员惨遭怪物屠戮，他们冰冷不瞑的身首被抛入寂静的寰宇……
E: In the battle with the Legion, some of our colleagues were slaughtered by monsters, and their cold bodies were thrown into the silent space.

C: 录像带：黯淡蓝点
E: Videotape: Dim Blue Dot

C: 屏幕亮起，支援舱段已经大开，但宇宙航器的启停仍然受到管控。中微子爆发的隐约微光染黄了月台的夹角。在令人不安的寂静中，你听见了越来越急促的呼吸……
E: The screen lights up. The supply zone is wide open, but the spacecraft is still under control. The faint glimmers from neutrino explosions stain the platform a shade of yellow. In the disturbing silence, you hear increasingly rapid breathing...

C: 嗯，我最近好像总是在…忘记一些东西。
E: Well, I seem to keep... forgetting things lately.

C: 法政科登记了所有在编科员的名录，我很确信不会有人跟我持有同样的名字。
E: The Department of Galactic Geopolitics has registered the names of all its staff. I'm sure there's no one with the same name as me in the database.

C: 作为出借医疗舱的回报，他帮我们科室整理了医患隐私条例的细则，有了它，就算来访者有再大的本领，也要遵守科室的规定，无疑解决了我们平日的痛点，是对医患隐私的有效保障！
E: In return for letting him use the medical cabin, he helped our department compile a list of patient confidentiality clauses. With that, no matter how influential a visitor is, they must follow the department's rules. This will greatly improve the privacy of doctors and patients alike!

C: 不知道古恩是否会按照约定，销毁原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>呢？
E: I wonder if Gunn will really destroy Prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak> as agreed?

C: 太好啦，你愿意帮忙我就放心啦。不过也不能亏待你，等我想想……
E: That's great. I'm so relieved that you're willing to help. I will reward you fairly. Let me think...

C: 你就是克里斯？
E: Are you Chris?

C: 而且现在的身份校验程序，也只能由我每天手动开启，所以…还是麻烦您<color=#dbc291ff>明天再来</color>一趟吧，记得来找我开校验。
E: And the current identity verification program has to be activated manually by me every day, so... please <color=#dbc291ff>come back tomorrow</color>. Don't forget to ask me to turn on the verification.

C: 您弄好了？
E: Are you done?

C: 再说克里斯，相比起其他科员，他才来空间站没多久，此前听说是个学业优异的贫苦学子。在来到遥远太空后肯定会有不适应的情况出现。
E: Then there's Chris. He is said to be a good student from a poor family. And compared with the other researchers, he's still fairly new here on the space station. So it's normal that he would experience discomfort after a lengthy space flight.

C: 等等，通行密钥上的涂层是特殊的光敏材料，相机上的识别程序或许能够派上用场。
E: Wait, the coating on the encryption key is made of a special photosensitive material. The camera's scanning function might be of some use here.

C: 啊——我会支持波少一辈子！
E: Ah! Long live Master Capote!

C: 你还不懂，不懂我想要表达的含义！
E: You don't understand what I'm trying to say at all!

C: 呜呜呜，波少，波少真的太温柔了。
E: *sniff* Oh, Master Capote is so considerate...

C: 你听卡波特说了很久，逐渐忘记了过来问询的原本目的……
E: You've listened to Capote for a long time, thus gradually forgetting what you're going to ask...

C: 这是…录音转文字的稿件？
E: Is this... an audio transcript?

C: 所以他来找我，应该是想完成从镜的部分。
E: I believe he came to me to complete the trial of the mirror.

C: 怎么控制的我不知道，但是有一条规则是一定不会错的——
E: No clue, but I know one thing...

C: 小姐，我确实是…去找过卡波特教授。也确实向他请教了一些事情。
E: My lady, I did speak to Professor Capote, and I did ask him some things.

C: 谁被抓到？为谁开脱？
E: Who was caught? Who's them?

C: 想知道更多的信息，就去问问那边的两个小孩吧。
E: If you want to know more, you can go ask the two little kids over there.

C: 他们两个加起来，就算是你们中间最大的那只，恐怕也是很难抵挡。
E: With those two together, even the biggest one among you is no match for them.

C: 呜呜……
E: Woooo...

C: 还挺会谈条件。那么我们要如何才能证明自己的善意？
E: It can negotiate, too? So how do we prove our intentions are benevolent then?

C: 嗯… 清除空间站内的「军团」余孽，也是防卫科应尽的职责。
E: Um... Taking out the remnants of the Legion also falls within the Security Department's purview.

C: 辛苦…没想到，打从一开始，这些被错认为「诡影」的小家伙，也会如此温情的一面。
E: Thank you so much... I didn't expect these little things, which were often mistaken for specters, to have a soft side.

C: 你猜后来发生了什么？她反向骇入我的设备，给一堆人发了垃圾短信，整了个面向全空间站的游戏，告诉所有人有个叫伦纳德的呆瓜闯了大祸……
E: Can you guess what happened next? She reverse-hacked my device, sent out a bunch of spam, made a video game open to the space station, and told everyone that an idiot named Leonard made a big, silly mistake...

C: 还是专注眼前吧。
E: Let's focus on what's in front of us.

C: 我将你编入了同行者的视角，现在，她会对你的行为做出一些反应。
E: You are now taking the point of view of the companion. She will react to your behavior now.

C: 「我本打算给她脸上加个小胡子的，结果竟然喷不上去——太离谱了吧，整个空间站都跟纸糊的一样，只有她的照片密不透风？」
E: "I was planning on adding a mustache for her but the spray didn't work — the entire space station feels like it's made of paper but her portrait is near indestructible."

C: 果然…
E: Of course...

C: …退出了，真心急啊。
E: ...Aaaand she logged out. How hasty of her.

C: 知道就好。
E: Mhm, make sure you never forget about it.

C: 至此，事件终于告一段落了。来吧，让我们为最后一道后门画上句号。
E: This chapter has come to a conclusion. Come, let us close the final back door.

C: 这是纯美骑士团不成文的规定，在骑士较量前必须喊出的戒律，我十分抱歉……
E: It is an unspoken rule of the Knights of Beauty that the commandment is uttered before a battle between knights. I apologize.

C: …别说了，别说了！我心好痛……
E: Enough! This is a painful topic...

C: 啊？我是谁？我要干嘛？
E: Ah! What? What am I doing?

C: 我认为大家无需担心，我仅需要些时间与姬子检查引擎状况。大家缓和一下情绪即可。
E: Let's stay calm — I need some time to check the engine with Himeko. For now, just try and take your minds off the situation.

C: 你的理解比任何宝物都更珍贵。我曾与众多游历者交手，阿谀奉承、轻蔑挑衅，都遇见太多。罕见的是相同的赤子之心。
E: Your understanding is more precious than any treasure. I have faced many a traveler, encountered flattery and provocation aplenty. It is rare to find a spirit as pure as yours.

C: 他都看不到了……
E: ...He didn't see it...

C: 吃喝玩乐永远不上班！
E: All fun and no work!

C: 事件发生前，她受到了公司的邀请。
E: She received an invitation from the IPC before the attack occurred.

C: 感谢这一大段冗长而沉闷的叙述，你一定累了吧——反正我是听累了。
E: I commend your stamina for recounting that interminable tale — you must be exhausted. My ears certainly are.

C: 艾丝妲？
E: Asta?

C: （黑塔好像提到了艾丝妲…对，我好像去见了艾丝妲……）
E: (I think Herta mentioned Asta... That's right, I think I visited Asta...)

C: 我、我在遛狗……
E: W—We're walking the dog...

C: 艾丝妲不是刻意要隐瞒的，只是碍于立场…<color=#dbc291ff>有些事不适合放到台面上讲</color>。
E: Asta isn't trying to hide anything. It's because of her position... <color=#dbc291ff>some things shouldn't be said in the open</color>.

C: 一群可怜的疯子。我喜欢原始博士的评价：「纳努克从所谓『泯灭帮』身上看到的价值，或许还远不及一个故意将花瓶打碎的婴孩」。
E: A group of pitiful lunatics. I like Dr. Primitive's assessment of them: "The value Nanook sees in the Annihilation Gang is perhaps far less than what one might see in a child who deliberately broke a vase."

C: 我还没问呢……
E: I didn't even ask...

C: 你试图与「阮•梅」造物交流，并把它弄走……
E: You try to communicate with Ruan Mei's creation and get it away...

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了。
E: You're here, {NICKNAME}.

C: 看起来像是程序错误。
E: Seems like a programming error.

C: 生命的形式成千上万，也因此证明形式本身并无意义。
E: Life can exist in thousands of different forms, which means the form itself has no purpose.

C: 令使为何物，我不得甚解。
E: I cannot comprehend what an Emanator is.

C: 希望你回去看看造物们吧。
E: I hope you'll come back and visit your creations.

C: （阮•梅、阮•梅，为什么不回头看看我们？ ）
E: (Ruan Mei, Ruan Mei, why do you not turn back to look at us?)

C: 在它们身上，我看到一种类人反应，是与神性截然相反的概念——它们具有感情。
E: I see a human-like response in them. It is a concept completely opposite to that of divinity — they have emotions.

C: 原来{NICKNAME}是这样想的啊…但在我看来，旅途很长，可我们并不是每天都在忙着做什么惊天动地的大事。绝大部分时间，我们都在处理各种琐事。
E: I didn't realize you felt that way, {NICKNAME}... If you ask me, our journeys are long, and it's not like we're dealing with earth-shattering events every single day. We spend most of our time dealing with trivial matters like this.

C: 纠正下，不是朋友，是挚友。
E: I'll stop you there. We are not just friends, we are best friends.

C: 自从贝洛伯格与外界取得联系以后，人们的心态好像都受到了影响，加班的人变多了，走在路上的脚步变快了，连来我这喝下午茶的客人都少了。
E: Ever since Belobog made contact with the outside world, everyone's attitude seems to have been affected. More people are working overtime and everyone rushes from place to place. I've even got less people coming in for afternoon tea.

C: 喝茶喝出盲盒的感觉。
E: You've turned drinking tea into a kind of mystery box?

C: 啊？一句辛苦就完事了？
E: Huh? That's it? Just "Thank you for your hard work"?

C: 调去前线了？
E: The front line?

C: 建筑已经被积雪掩埋了。
E: These buildings have been buried in the snowfall.

C: 发现嫌疑人和他的同伙，立即逮捕！
E: It's the suspect and his accomplices! Arrest them!

C: 他在仙舟经历了太多。
E: He's been through a lot lately.

C: 算了算了，当我没说！咱们中间只要有一个注重仪表就够啦。
E: Ugh... let's just pretend I never said anything. As long as one of us is making an effort.

C: 哈~累了，没想到什么也不干，光是闲逛也能这么消耗体力……
E: Whew... who'd have thought just taking a stroll could be so tiring?

C: 哦，是智能回复告诉你们我在这儿的？这员工定位系统是「技术研发部」负责开发的，是不是挺厉害的？
E: Oh, did my Smart-Reply function tell you where I was? It's a system developed by the Technology Department. Pretty neat, right?

C: 换世俗点的话说，我看中的肯定不是它的绘制技法。假如我给这幅画估值二十万，这其中至少有十五六万是看中了它的「附加价值」才开出来的。
E: I suppose what I'm trying to say is, what I'm drawn to isn't the style in which a piece is painted, but its overall value. Its intrinsic value may only be <unbreak>50,000</unbreak> credits, but its "added value" might push the total up to <unbreak>200,000</unbreak>.

C: 我们去救场吧。
E: Let's go save the day.

C: 当然。不过，在你考虑的同时，我的同事需要在贝洛伯格展开一些必要的工作…还希望上下层区的诸位能够配合。
E: Naturally. However, while you're deliberating, my colleagues will need to carry out some operations in Belobog. I hope that your subjects in the Underworld are... cooperative.

C: 「源代码」——确切地说，是能取得贝洛伯格所有机械单元统一控制权的「源代码」。
E: Source code. Or to be more precise — source code that is able to take control of all mechanized units in Belobog.

C: 正因为你的家乡经历了和雅利洛-Ⅵ类似的劫难，所以我能理解你看问题的视角、还有你选择的立场。
E: Your hometown once experienced a similar catastrophe to Jarilo-VI, so I can understand your perspective on the issue and the position you have taken.

C: 想要存护这份自由，我们就必须行动起来，向那些怀疑的眼光证明，我们有意愿、也有能力掌控自己的命运。
E: If we want to preserve this freedom, we must act and show those who doubt us that we, Belobog, have the will and the ability to control our own destiny.

C: 话又说回来，我从小就憧憬星空，所以才会爱上科学，投身于对星核的研究。如果有人告诉我，我的愿望立刻就能实现，而且只需要付出一点点代价…那我大概不会犹豫。
E: You know, I've always longed for the stars since I was a child, which is why I devoted myself to science and the studying of the Stellaron. If someone told me that I could do whatever research I wanted, with only a small price to pay... I probably wouldn't hesitate.

C: 明白了，我们会把你的意见记下来的。
E: Thanks for your input. I'll make a note of your opinion.

C: 「愿意放弃自由寻求保障的人，最后两者皆空」。
E: "Those who are willing to give up freedom for security will end up with neither."

C: 布洛妮娅，「最后的大守护者」…
E: Bronya... "The Last Supreme Guardian..."

C: 重要的事…需要我的意见？
E: Important matter, huh...?

C: 现在的结果是平票——也就是说，我一时的想法可能会让杠杆倾斜，左右她的判断。
E: The vote is tied. If I were to give you my view, it would tip the scales and possibly impact her final choice.

C: 原来希儿是这么想的…的确，现在的结果恰好说明，人们对这件事没有统一的立场，每个人的看法都完全不同。
E: ...Understood, Seele. This is a difficult decision to make, and everyone feels differently about it.

C: 我怎么没这好运？
E: How come I never get this lucky?

C: 等等，前面那不是…是华劳斯！他终于交到朋友啦？过去听听他们在说什么吧。
E: Hang on a sec, isn't that Wallace up ahead? Looks like he's finally made some friends! I wonder what they're talking about...

C: …什么玩意，我在里面遭了这么多罪，现在出来了还要遭你们挤兑？你、你们算什么朋友！
E: Ugh, get off my back, will you? I had to deal with hardened criminals in jail — now that I'm free my supposed "friends" are ganging up on me!

C: 卧底计划这么快就失败了…
E: Well, there goes my cover...

C: 你以为我不想吗？我听人说…瓦赫医生不在人世了。
E: You think I don't want to? I heard that he... passed away.

C: 后来有一天，老东西说是要去矿区办事儿，结果就再也没出来……
E: Then one day, he said he needed to take care of some things at the mine. He never came back...

C: 娜塔莎医生在乎。
E: Dr. Natasha cares.

C: 买药？哦…明白了，你也是奔着瓦赫医生的特效药来的，是吧？
E: Medicine? Oh... you mean Dr. Vache's wonder medicine, right?

C: 在揭幕战之后，您现在也可以正式参加本赛季的天梯积分赛了！
E: After the opening matches, you can now join the leagues and accumulate points in the current season!

C: 直接人肉蹲它。
E: Ambush it in person.

C: 唉，兜兜转转…总之有价值的信息，应该就在「细问魈魅踪迹，偏看收容一隅。铁鞋踏破不世，待问三堂深处」这一段了，你来试着抓抓重点？
E: *sigh* Back to square one... Anyway, the useful information should be in the paragraph "An inquiry into spirit traces, a glance into the site of storage. Even with iron shoes worn out unearthly, one has to visit the three depths." Can you see anything useful?

C: 你是星核容器也就罢了，竟然还有这样的宝贝，怎么跟之前空间站里那些拿了剧本的人似的，真够威风的……
E: I get it, you're the stellaron vessel, fine, but you even have this bad boy? Hey, it's like those guys with the scripts in the space station before. It's pretty cool.

C: 没错！不愧是我们，{NICKNAME}！但是你只猜到了前半段。
E: That's right! Good one, {NICKNAME}! But you only guessed the first half of our plan.

C: 真的吗？谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。我会严加看管水魈，不再让他危害空间站。
E: Really? Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I will keep a closer eye on the Xenohydro and stop him from endangering the space station.

C: 成功了，开了开了！快走吧，我好像都听见追兵的脚步声了！
E: We did it! It's open! Quick, let's go, I think I heard footsteps!

C: {NICKNAME}，跟我走吧。
E: {NICKNAME}. come with me.

C: 我来帮你处理这些箱子吧。
E: I'll help you sort out these boxes.

C: 能告诉我「他」的名字吗？
E: Can you tell me "his" name?

C: 我去找帮手，你在这儿等着。
E: I'm going to find help. You wait here.

C: 哎哟，这回真让我撞上大运了！机械臂小子这回居然不参赛，嘿嘿，那操作空间可就大了……
E: Wow, I sure hit the jackpot this time around! That guy with the robot arm isn't competing — yes! That's so much more wiggle room...

C: {NICKNAME}，你可以不用陪着我一起演的。这样会显得我很蠢……
E: {NICKNAME}, you don't have to patronize me like that. It's making me feel stupid.

C: 哼，算你识相……
E: Humph, good...

C: 怎么个「争取」法呢？
E: Help from whom?

C: 我准备好战斗了，{NICKNAME}。安心把你的背后交给医生吧。
E: I'm ready, {NICKNAME}. The doctor's got your back.

C: 第二件事，我听说他们干活的风格非常粗犷，一点都不仔细，甚至有人看到他们搬着好几个大箱子临街交易，完全不把周围的矿工当外人。
E: Secondly, they're rash and careless in their work. They've been seen carrying large crates of illicit goods around the mines and selling them out in the open, without even trying to hide anything from the miners.

C: 滴——滴！警报，警报，发现多管闲事的家伙！多管闲事的家伙！
E: Beep! Beep! Alert! Alert! Nosy person spotted! Nosy person spotted!

C: （斯薇塔之前提到的三条线索都得到印证了。回去和佩拉聊聊吧）
E: (The three rumors Swetta talked about all check out. Time to meet back up with Pela.)

C: 嗯，关于这点，我们可以达成共识。
E: Well, on that point, we can agree.

C: …不，我没听说过文物失窃的事。我每天都忙于在此地赞颂「存护」的恩典，并无闲暇旁骛世俗之事！
E: ...I haven't heard of any stolen artifacts. These days I'm too busy praising the grace of the Preservation to be distracted by worldly matters!

C: 唔…感觉不太对劲。明明是已经废弃的商业街，但总感觉这里刚刚有很多人来过……
E: Uh... something doesn't feel right. It's obviously an abandoned shopping street, but it also feels like people were here not too long ago...

C: 这一路下来可太不容易了，{NICKNAME}！结果真是皆大欢喜，不仅找回了「微缩胶片」，还抓住了文物失窃案的始作俑者…这可是大功一件呀。
E: It was a difficult journey, {NICKNAME}, but it had a happy ending! Not only did we manage to recover the microfilm, but we also caught the culprit behind the museum thefts... That's something worth celebrating.

C: 那我可得赶紧跑路，反正这趟已经赚得盆满钵满了……
E: Well, it's time for me to get on out of here. After all, we already made a nice little fortune on this trip.

C: ——之前我教你把「齿轮与智慧」拆散以后再藏起来，记得吧？你最后把它拆成了多少个部件来着？
E: That Gears and Wisdom sculpture I told you to take apart and hide away... Can you remind me how many pieces it had?

C: 博物馆前台的艾丽斯小姐。
E: Give it to Miss Eris at the museum reception.

C: 野战治疗医院啊…我想，佩拉小姐应该比我更了解这个话题吧？
E: Field hospitals... I guess Miss Pela knows more about those than I do?

C: 申请表？那是什么？快拿给虎克看看！
E: Application form? What's that? Show it to me!

C: 怎么是你？佩拉呢？
E: Why are you here? Where's Pela?

C: 总感觉事情会变复杂…
E: I have a bad feeling about this...

C: 不过，克里珀堡毕竟就好这口，这么写至少应该不会出问题。还是说…你也觉得可以放飞自我一点？
E: But then again, this is the preferred style in the Qlipoth Fort, so it should be fine. Or... do you think I should let loose a little?

C: 可以！那就这么定啦！
E: Great! Let's do it!

C: 负重已经过高了……
E: My inventory is already maxed out...

C: 少废话，这儿肯定不是你们的地盘，你们一起上吧，我赶时间！
E: Shut it, this isn't your territory. I'm in a hurry — I'll take you all in one go!

C: 咋了，没话说了？你承认自己把秘密出卖给矿队了？
E: Well, nothing to say for yourself, huh? So you admit that you sold the intel to the mining team?

C: 仪器重要还是命重要？
E: What's more important? The detector or your life?

C: 可不能惯着孩子…
E: We shouldn't indulge kids...

C: 我不知道，与我无关。
E: I don't know. It has nothing to do with me.

C: 也可能是你在栽赃。
E: You might be framing him.

C: 行吧，我买你的情报。
E: Alright, I'll pay for your intel.

C: 肥水不流外人田，睁眼闭眼大家都是邻居，他这么胳膊肘往外拐…不合适，真不合适！
E: We're all neighbors. We've known each other for a long time. But he sold out to the other side and left his own people out to dry... I really can't agree with that!

C: 你看到探测器了吗？
E: Did you see the detector?

C: 行啊，那你们快去找吧！
E: Fine, go ahead and look!

C: 喂，你这家伙，翻脸怎么比翻书还快？！说好的长期生意——
E: Hey! How can you sell me out like that! We had a deal...

C: 洞洞机，要准备上咯！
E: Diggertron... get ready!

C: {NICKNAME}，我们这就回镇上找他吧！
E: {NICKNAME}, let's go into town to find him!

C: 嘿，这里稀罕宝贝可真不少啊！老弟你不会是嘴上说做义工，其实偷偷在这里寻宝吧？
E: Hah, there's plenty of precious stuff in here! You aren't looking for treasure in the museum while pretending to volunteer, right?

C: …「桑」什么什么「基」。中间看不清楚，但好像是个名字。
E: "SAM" something, "KOS" something... I can't read the rest, but it seems like a name.

C: …咦？那个小家伙好像掉了什么东西？
E: ...Huh? Our little buddy seems to have dropped something.

C: 啊…是可爱的拟态雪蛞蝓。
E: Ah... Cute mimic snow slug.

C: 我们真的要吃掉它吗……
E: Are we really going to eat that...?

C: 这…这是？
E: What... is this?

C: 我们一起等等佩拉吧——她就在整理间里面。
E: Let's wait for Pela together. She's in the storage room.

C: 不幸的是，那天发生了严重的意外…再加上探险队遇上了暴风雪，营地的人和外界断了联系…大家当时都束手无策。
E: Tragically, there were complications... Other serious incidents occurred that day — the exploration team ran into a blizzard and the camp lost contact with the outside world... No one knew what to do.

C: 这里的设备好像维护得不错，不像被遗弃很久的样子。
E: The facilities here seem to be in pretty good shape, not like those of a place that has been abandoned for years.

C: 你把物资都藏到这儿了？挺能干呀。
E: You took the materials and hid them all here? Not bad, kid.

C: 最多能卖半个冬城盾。
E: They're worth half a shield at most.

C: 不错，还差两步，走走走。
E: Great, only two more steps to go. Let's move.

C: 认证结果：成功。剩余所需认证数：2。
E: Certification result: Success. Requisite certifications remaining: Two.

C: 来，把右手伸出来……
E: Okay, please extend your right hand...

C: ——我们正打算去见他。
E: ...We were planning on paying him a visit.

C: 我们没办法轻言放弃。
E: We couldn't give up that easily.

C: 原型机3号——「监督机器」史瓦罗，剿灭协议申请状态：已通过。
E: Prototype number 3, monitoring automaton Svarog, extermination protocol launch: Successful.

C: <unbreak>24830</unbreak>号资料播放完毕。接下来播放：资料编号<unbreak>57614</unbreak>。
E: Cache number <unbreak>24830</unbreak>, transmission complete. Next transmission: Cache number <unbreak>57614</unbreak>.

C: 在你们面前可能没表现出来吧？私下里，她已经向我展现了强烈的愿望。
E: Didn't she tell you? In private, she insisted on accompanying you.

C: 你、你在说啥呢？我才不会把你的零件拿去卖呢。
E: Hey! What are you talking about? I'm not interested in selling your components.

C: 史瓦罗先生，我还想帮你检查下其它模组…请转过去一点。
E: Mr. Svarog, I still want to help you check a few other modules... Turn around a little.

C: 你仔细看看它的眼睛…
E: Take a closer look at the eyes...

C: 好，就抢{F#她们}{M#他们}！上啊！
E: Agreed. Get them!

C: 五百冬城盾一次，还有要加价的买家吗？
E: <unbreak>500</unbreak> going once, any buyers going higher?

C: 首先当然是老爹啦！说起来，老爹以前从来不过生日，是直到他领养了虎克以后才开始有这个传统的。
E: Well, I had to invite daddy first! Speaking of birthdays, daddy never used to celebrate them. He only started doing it when he adopted Hook.

C: 老、老爹，别说这个啦！虎克已经长大了，不用抱着「菌菌」也能睡着。
E: D—Daddy! Don't bring that up! Hook's grown up now — I can sleep without hugging Junjun...

C: 你不早提醒我们还有那种兵器…
E: Any other secret weapons you'd like to tell us about...?

C: 但是现在…史瓦罗先生，可以吗？
E: But now... Mr. Svarog, what do you say?

C: 请、请不要用蛮力解决问题，其实还有其它办法……
E: Please don't use violent methods to solve this issue. There are other options...

C: 终结…！协议…！彻底清除！
E: Terminate...! Protocol...! Eliminate!

C: 但是克拉拉相信，大家总有一天都会被修好…所以，还不能松懈，必须加倍努力才行！
E: But I'm sure I can fix them all one day... We can't relax yet. We must work harder!

C: 让我再考虑一下。
E: I'd like to give it some more thought.

C: 拜托你了，史瓦罗先生……
E: Please, Mr. Svarog...

C: 哟，这不是弗朗兹嘛！好久不见，你怎么还在看大门啊？
E: Well, if it isn't Franz, long time no see! You're still watching the entrance?

C: 明白，长官！
E: Yes, sir!

C: 对面有什么？
E: So what exactly is on the other side?

C: 它的学名叫「机关能源中枢」，连着那么多管线，恐怕整个铁卫禁区的能源都是这一台设备供能的。
E: Its formal name is the "mechanism energy hub." It's connected to all the energy lines — I would've thought it covers the entire restricted zone.

C: 希露瓦，不是我不想帮你…但是你要时刻记住，我可是贝洛伯格的银鬃铁卫！
E: Serval, it's not that I don't want to help you... but you should remember that I'm a Belobog Silvermane Guard!

C: 还早着呢，别放弃得这么快啊！
E: You're not dead yet. How can you give up that easily!?

C: 杰帕德…老弟，到了这份上，你也该懂得变通一下了吧？
E: Gepard... brother. Surely now you can see the need for pragmatism?

C: 前方是军事重地，临时工不许进入！
E: This is a military base. Temporary workers aren't allowed in.

C: 听你姐姐的话吧，铁卫！一看就知道，你的状态还没完全恢复呢。
E: Hey, Mr. Silvermane, listen to your sister! I can tell just by looking at you that you haven't fully recovered.

C: …请个别大人不要——
E: Please don't call my name like that...

C: 抱歉，我…我现在的状态不太好。很多事记不起来，很多事想不明白……
E: Sorry, I'm... my head is not in a good place. I can't remember much of anything at all, and I'm not able to think a lot...

C: 你在寻找什么？
E: What is it that you're looking for?

C: 铁卫！朗道女士累了，带她下去吧。
E: Guards! Miss Serval is tired, take her to rest.

C: 我想见证你的选择。
E: I want to witness your choice.

C: …那必须你买单。
E: So... you're getting the tab?

C: 陌生人…你认识我？
E: Do you know me... stranger?

C: 捡起希莉儿的遗物。
E: Pick up Cyrille's relic.

C: （这里似乎没有类似信号源的装置……）
E: (Seems like there isn't any device here that looks like a signal source...)

C: <color=#dbc291ff>客运型的星槎</color>根据虽然各不相同，基本<color=#dbc291ff>只有蓝、绿、白三种颜色。</color>
E: Although <color=#dbc291ff>passenger starskiffs</color> do vary, they generally come in <color=#dbc291ff>blue, green, or white.</color>

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}…求求你咧…俺的笔记很重要。
E: Come on, {F#young lass}{M#young fella}... Help me out... My notes are really important.

C: 是吗，看起来是我的运气不太好。
E: Really? I guess I ran out of luck.

C: 我听见那个<color=#dbc291ff>肇事星槎的引擎声音非常大，跟一般星槎不太一样。</color>
E: I heard the <color=#dbc291ff>engine sound of the offending starskiff. It was loud and different from ordinary starskiffs.</color>

C: 东南口的机巧鸟。
E: Cycrane at the southeast entrance.

C: 我联系到了认识的律师，她能够帮忙梅姐处置赔偿的事情。这都是多亏了{NICKNAME}，麻烦您忙东忙西的，这是我的一点心意。
E: I've contacted a lawyer I know to help Mei with the compensation matter. It's all thanks to your help, {NICKNAME}. Please accept this little token of my gratitude.

C: 俺可没有这么说…俺就是担心，芦慧姑娘会不会嫌弃我手脚不灵活了。俺还能干，姑娘别担心。
E: I'm not saying that... I'm just worried that Ms. Luhui would hate me for being clumsy. I can still work.

C: 真是个奇怪的角度啊，她不会老去，我也不会老去。我没有察觉到她的辛酸，连她自己也没有察觉。
E: What an odd but reasonable point of view. Mei won't age, and neither will I. I was not aware of Mei's hardship, nor was she aware of it.

C: 化外民能翻阅的医典里绝不会写上这等禁忌之物的名称。
E: The medical texts that outworlders have access to would never contain the name of such a forbidden entity.

C: 啧，死记硬背，最是无用…
E: Tsk, rote-learning is the absolute worst...

C: 你就不怕我检举你？
E: You're not afraid of me reporting you?

C: 你喊我回来有什么事？
E: What did you call me back for?

C: 听说你这边需要帮忙？
E: I heard you need help here.

C: 太好了，我一直在等着像你这样的好帮手！
E: That's great! I've always wanted a good helper just like you!

C: 怎么，你不知道什么是蘑菇吗？
E: Huh, don't you know what mushrooms are?

C: 你不必理解我，你无法理解我。就像花儿不能理解雨云为何垂泪，这世上没有真正的「感同身受」。
E: You don't have to understand me. You can't really understand me. Just as a flower cannot understand why the rain clouds cry. There is no such thing as true empathy in this world.

C: 好个「边塞诗人」！
E: How very Borderland Poet of you!

C: 嚯哈哈哈哈！看来老夫我已经诗名在外了。
E: Hahaha! Seems my fame has already preceded me.

C: 比如<color=#dbc291ff>「告别家人的远行者」、「依依不舍的恋人」、「各奔东西的友人」之类的情景。</color>如果你找到了，<color=#dbc291ff>请帮我拍成照片。</color>
E: You know the tropes, <color=#dbc291ff>"the voyager saying farewell to his family," "the star-crossed lovers bidding goodbye," "parting friends"</color>... that kind of thing. If you see anything, <color=#dbc291ff>please help me snap a photo.</color>

C: 何须话泪别
E: should not bid farewell in tears.

C: …我持怀疑的态度。
E: ...I have reservations about this.

C: 你看我像是会消沉的人吗？
E: Do I look like someone who wallows in self-pity?

C: 在地衡司忙活的每一天都是麻烦。
E: When you're working in the Realm-Keeping Commission, every day is trouble.

C: 万一没有什么猫腻呢？
E: What if they're legitimate?

C: 我懂你的感觉。
E: I know how you feel.

C: 谁稀罕你那破链接啊！
E: Who cares about that ridiculous link!?

C: 没想到在这里还能遇见你，等等，你也是来问那个的？
E: I didn't think I would be able to meet you here. Wait, are you here to ask about that?

C: 青雀小囡啊，不要说得我像是沾染上什么恶习一样。黛青小姐姐是个好姑娘，我的灵魂得到了救赎，她是做慈善呀。
E: Qingque, you're painting me like an addict. Ms. Daiqing is a good girl who liberated my soul. This is like a charity for her.

C: 我真的只是来送礼物的。
