E: I'm really just here to deliver the gift.

C: 你也太谨慎了。
E: You're far too cautious.

C: 我的外驻申请怎么还没有通过…{NICKNAME}你又来了，我可真羡慕你呀。
E: Why is my off-station transfer application not approved yet... {NICKNAME}, you're here. I envy you so much.

C: 你有本事骗钱，怎么没有本事开门啊。
E: You have the guts to pull off scams but not open a door?

C: 她是「孤身一人住在远离尘世的地方」，我一旦和她这样见面了，就会、就会不太合适……
E: She's someone who "stays alone at a far-off location." Meeting her like this doesn't seem appropriate...

C: 对啊，每天都对着狐人照片发癫，有好几个科员向我投诉了。
E: That's right. For days, you had been going crazy over the foxian's picture. Some of your colleagues even complained.

C: （完整讲述狐仙黛青的真相）
E: (Recount the whole story about Foxian Beauty Daiqing)

C: 咳，先说说你是干什么的吧。我身旁这位{F#女侠}{M#猛男}有着灵活多变的择业标准，你要是老实交代，{F#她}{M#他}也可以不是劫匪。
E: Ahem, let's start with what you do for a living. This {F#fearsome lady}{M#fearsome man} beside me is very flexible in their career choice, so if you answer honestly, {F#she}{M#he} might not be a robber.

C: 别别别，我真是服了你了。这样吧，我会给你们比会员资格更高级的「高级会员资格」，可以和黛青小姐姐私联，怎么样？
E: No, no, no, that won't be necessary. How about this: I give you some even better than normal membership — premium membership — which will allow you to contact Ms. Daiqing privately. How's that sound?

C: 是喽，这所谓的聊天业务多半是藏着什么猫腻喽。
E: Yes, there's something fishy about this so-called chat business.

C: 那个「狐仙黛青」的账号已经有好几天没有回复消息了，牌友们都觉得她肯定出了什么事情，比如赛博诈骗被抓了之类的……
E: That "Foxian Beauty Daiqing" account has not replied to any messages for several days. My game mates think some trouble must have befallen her, like being arrested by involving herself in a cyber fraud or something...

C: 你告诉了他们经纪人的位置？
E: You told them the location of the manager?

C: 不要在意他，你说的是对的。
E: You're right. Don't mind him.

C: 对了，他不是美丽狐仙，那这照片上又是谁呀？
E: Speaking of, if he's not a pretty foxian, then who is this in the photo?

C: …我已经向罗浮仙舟的司辰宫发送了学术交流的申请，你不要着急。反倒是你，你这外驻申请写得完全不像样，我建议你再回去修改修改。
E: ...I've already sent the request for academic exchange to the Palace of Astrum on the Xianzhou Luofu, so don't you worry. You, on the other hand, your transfer application is so messily written, I have to ask you to rewrite and edit it before submitting again.

C: 但这副图样倒没有将射穿建木的功劳归于神明，而是描绘了一个普通人类的形象…有意思。
E: Yet, instead of crediting the deed to the deity, a regular human form is drawn instead... Interesting.

C: 现在？
E: Now?

C: （而且…光线折射的角度会影响标识的拼合，届时还要调整一下相机的视角……）
E: (Also, the angle of refraction will affect the collocation of the marking. I'll have to adjust the camera angle...)

C: 是啊，我的老师被一位持明带进了圣地，因此将寻求长生的目光转向了持明。
E: Yes. A Vidyadhara brought my teacher to this sacred place once, which switched his focus on longevity over to the Vidyadhara.

C: 你怎么变成这副模样了？
E: How did you turn into... this?

C: 小事一桩。
E: It'll be a piece of cake.

C: 您请回吧。
E: Please, leave us.

C: 你听过哪个组织的接头暗号是一模一样的……
E: What kind of organization would devise a code like that...?

C: 一张特殊的药方，涂涂改改，似乎和魔阴身有点关系……
E: A special but scratched-out prescription, which seems to have something to do with the Mara-struck.

C: （先去问问白露的说法吧。）
E: (I should ask Bailu what she thinks about all this first.)

C: 下次再这么称呼我，我会用剑回答。
E: Call me that again and I'll be answering you with my sword.

C: 男人长叹一声，不再看你。
E: The man lets out a lengthy sigh and stops looking at you.

C: 我却见过你哦，白露大人。
E: I've seen you before though, Lady Bailu.

C: …你、你可听说过丹鼎司衔药龙女？
E: ...S—Surely you know the Healer Lady of Alchemy Commission?

C: 咳咳咳…最近的港口就在前面吗？
E: *coughing* Is the nearest harbor up ahead?

C: …你们站在这里他是不会出来的…咳咳咳，我来把他叫出来。白露大人，你们先避开吧，记得我们的约定……
E: ...He won't show himself if you're here... *coughing* I'll call out to him. Please, you two, find somewhere to hide. Remember our promise...

C: 唔，仙舟眼下乱做一团，我还是先待在星槎海吧。要是有人救急，想医个头疼脑热，我也能发挥所长。
E: Hmm, the Xianzhou is still in a mess. I better stay in Starskiff Haven for the time being — I'm sure there'll be fevers and headaches to take care of before long.

C: 你走吧，记得常给我们写信。
E: You should stay... but remember to write to us.

C: 嗯，结成封印，以龙力遏制根须蔓延，这就是罗浮龙尊被授予的重任。
E: Yes. Forming a seal and using their power to curb the spread of the Arbor's roots is an important task entrusted to the Luofu's high elder.

C: …他们应该不会对白露出手。
E: ...If so, why would they want to harm Bailu?

C: 浣溪吐出最后一口气，跌倒在地。
E: Huanxi exhales her last breath and collapses to the ground.

C: 你为什么离开？
E: Why did you leave?

C: 大人们救救我呀。
E: Someone... help me.

C: 小三月今天怪怪的…
E: You're acting a little weird today...

C: 我想，罗刹先生应该不是这么离开的。瓦尔特先生说的那是鸢首戊字九百九十九号码头——神策府的码头，仅在外敌入侵时启用。
E: I don't think Mr. Luocha could've departed from there. The dock you're referring to is Yuanshou-Crag CMXCIX — it belongs to the Seat of Divine Foresight. It's only used during invasions.

C: …呃，神探的前几次推理，肯定是错的，这符合预期！
E: ...Uh, a d—detective's initial conjectures are bound to be wrong! Totally expected!

C: 呃…能不能告诉我们，那个小店长在哪里呀？
E: Um... Can you please tell us where she is?

C: 哼，算你识相。{NICKNAME}，我们走。
E: Hmph, about time you saw the light. Come on {NICKNAME}, let's go.

C: 谁掏钱都一样，搞快点。
E: Yeah, yeah, yeah – same difference, pay up.

C: 罗刹为什么撕书啊？
E: Why did Luocha tear out the title page?

C: 收下这个吧，就当做我的赔礼了，可好吃了。
E: Here — a little something for the inconvenience. It's yummy.

C: 杨叔，这你就不懂了。渔公说过：「对真正的神探来说，即使足不出户，也仿若亲临现场。」
E: That won't be necessary, Mr. Yang. As the Angler once said: "A true detective operates as effectively from their armchair as from the scene of the crime."

C: （确实啊…那他的路程可能比我想象中凶险很多啊。来吧，我们重新还原一次现场。）
E: (*sigh* True... He must've had a tougher journey than I imagined. Come on, let's start over.)

C: 您威胁不了我，因为我有坚定的信念，绝不畏惧于强权。
E: Threats will get you nowhere. I have principles, and I don't give in to bullies.

C: （小三月在这些无关紧要的细节上真的好有逻辑性。）
E: (When it comes to minor details, March's logic is actually pretty good.)

C: 请问这是什么时候发生的事呢？
E: Can I ask when this rescue occurred?

C: 我看看…啊，果然！
E: Let me see... Ah! Of course!

C: 其实是两命。
E: Since when did we start sharing a life?

C: 打扮不像仙舟人。
E: I'd say he was an outworlder.

C: 不过有件事我不太明白。晴霓虽然擅自开走星槎抢险，但毕竟有功劳在前。可驭空刚才对她的态度，却像是另有隐情……
E: But there's something I don't understand. Yes, Qingni piloted a starskiff without permission and put herself in danger, but she meant well. Nevertheless, Yukong's reaction suggests that there was something more...

C: 你敏锐的观察力总是令我叹服，这件事交给你来做，我是绝对放心的。
E: Your powers of perception are impressive, that's all — I think you're the right person for the job.

C: 隐约有些印象。但天舶司归档内容众多，能不能请二位恩公和我一起找找看……
E: Vaguely. But there are so many files stored in the Sky-Faring Commission. Could I ask you benefactors to look for it with me...?

C: 这台术算机是不是坏掉了？
E: Is this one broken?

C: 岩明先生，您先消消气…我们这么做是有原因的……
E: Mr. Yanming, please, calm down — let us explain...

C: 嗯，没关系，我完全理解。况且二位恩公就算只是在我身边站着，就已经可以给我莫大的勇气了。
E: Mm, it's okay, I understand. Just having you stand next to me is already a great help, benefactors.

C: 可是…可是……
E: But...

C: 但是，我不该因为自己的恐惧，就替别人下决定…即使那个人是我的女儿。
E: ...But I should never have allowed my fears to compel me to make decisions for another person... even if that person is my daughter.

C: 妈妈…我还有最后一个小要求……
E: Mom... I have one last request...

C: 如果你想要拒绝我的话，此时此刻，你为什么会在这里？
E: ...If you wanted to refuse, then why would you be standing here right now?

C: 瞧，这就是未来，看似有无限可能，但注定发生的事情一定会发生；这场冲突无可避免，因为其它可能性并不存在。
E: See, the future always seems like infinite possibilities, but what is destined to happen will always happen. This conflict is inevitable because the other possibilities don't exist.

C: 人感受不到恐惧，就会被欲望和快感支配，变成「恶魔」。艾利欧找到我的时候，我正在执行任务…而他开的条件，我很感兴趣。
E: When people don't feel fear they are dominated by desire and pleasure — they become "devils." When Elio found me, I was in the middle of a mission... and the conditions he offered me caught my interest.

C: 三月七的「六相冰」……
E: March's six-phased ice...

C: 他们已经堕入{RUBY_B#「长生病」}魔阴身{RUBY_E#}，不再是我们的战友了……
E: They're {RUBY_B#Long-Life Curse}mara-struck{RUBY_E#} — we've already lost them...

C: 闷葫芦，你怎么不吭声啊？发现危险就大声叫唤喔，可别仗着自己懂两下子，就逞血气之勇单打独斗啊！
E: Hey, silent but deadly, shout if you see any danger, okay? Don't think just because you know a move or two you can charge off by yourself!

C: 走，咱们上船！
E: Come on, let's climb aboard!

C: 云骑行使职责，并无过错。我求见将军，是想打听星核猎手的动向。
E: The Cloud Knights were doing their duty. I'm here to ask the general about the Stellaron Hunters.

C: 他临行前交托我们的任务，便是陪同镜流，度过她在罗浮上的最后一日。你明白了吧，这其实不是「接待贵客」，而是「押送囚犯」——
E: Before he left, he ordered us to accompany Jingliu during her last day on the Luofu. We're hosting an honored guest, we're escorting a criminal...

C: 从我被放逐起，它就跟在我的身边…
E: It's been with me ever since my exile...

C: 陷入魔阴身时所作的一切在我的记忆里盘根错节，无法摆脱。最终，我决定面对它。
E: The memories of what I did when I was mara-struck are deeply rooted. Since I am unable to rid myself of them, I decided to face them head-on in the end.

C: 你不是来叙旧的，说出你的来意。
E: You're not here to reminisce on old times. Tell me why you're here.

C: 我听着。
E: I'm listening.

C: 你不懂！可爱的事物之间总是会相互吸引的。
E: You wouldn't understand! All cute things in the world should share a mutual affinity!

C: 是个记录装置。小谛听一定是接到了它发出的信号，才会拉咱们到这儿来瞧一瞧。
E: So it's a recording device. Diting must have heard its signal and called us over here to investigate.

C: 这也不是连载故事啊…
E: Who doesn't like a good cliffhanger?

C: 镜流是谁？
E: Who is Jingliu?

C: 喔，那是我份内之事。罗浮的港口封锁了，你怎么还一个人在这儿？
E: Just doing my job. The port has been sealed off, why are you here alone?

C: 伪装假死么，糊弄小孩的把戏……
E: Playing dead? What a childish trick...

C: 这是什么？这只是个普通的小物什。
E: Uh... What's this? Looks pretty ordinary to me.

C: 与这些妖人接触，难免会有危险，若你实在不想去，我也不会强求。但要是能带回些有价值的情报，神策府必定重重酬谢。
E: Danger is practically an inevitability when dealing with these devils. If you really don't want to go, I won't force you... but I repeat — if you are able to return with valuable intelligence, the Seat of Divine Foresight will reward you handsomely.

C: 怎么，你想明白了？
E: So, made up your mind?

C: 在落下最后一笔时，你眼角的余光瞥到那个云骑正在向你打手势。
E: After making the final stroke, you catch the Cloud Knight in your peripheral vision as he gestures at you.

C: 我现在能加入药王秘传了？
E: So, can I join the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus now?

C: 好，快人快语。我嘛，唉，大约是没法置身事外了……
E: A good answer, short and to the point. It would seem I've been unsuccessful in de-tangling myself of matters thus far...

C: 就此分道吧。
E: Let's go our separate ways now.

C: 弄错了吧。
E: I think you're mistaken.

C: 十王司判官独来独往，各奉使命。不过……
E: Judges of the Ten-Lords Commission have always acted independently, each carrying out their duty in solitude. However...

C: 该问的，素裳姑娘都问了。
E: You asked all the questions for us.

C: 闷葫芦…我印象中你不是这么鲁莽的性子啊。咱一块儿上吧！
E: Y'know, you're getting less silent and more deadly by the minute! Sounds good, let's get it!

C: 这大概就是「异物」了…看起来，我们的探索之旅终于走到了最后一步。本座最后再确认一遍——你确定要探索自己失去的过去吗？
E: This must be the foreign object... Looks like our exploration has reached its final stage. I will confirm one last time — are you sure you wish to keep exploring your past?

C: 这段经历，应该是我们初到贝洛伯格的那天吧。第二天我们就成了通缉犯…
E: This memory should be from the first day we arrived in Belobog. By the second day, we were wanted criminals already...

C: 一路上带回的东西我兜里倒是有一堆，只是不知该选什么？
E: I've got lots! It's just, I don't know what to choose.

C: 这么漂亮，怎么会不安全？
E: How could something so beautiful be unsafe?

C: 符玄小姐？是你吗？
E: Miss Fu Xuan? Is that you?

C: 看到这么有精神的停云小姐，忽然觉得有些伤感。
E: Miss Tingyun... It's great to see you so happy... but I can't help feeling a little sad.

C: 那倒不必。恰恰相反，我觉得「异物」应该是穷观阵摒除干扰的征兆。它成功回溯了你的另一场经历。
E: No. I believe the object is a sign of the Matrix purging distortion. It has managed to trace back to another one of your experiences.

C: 那是我潜意识里编的吧……
E: That's just the work of my subconscious mind...

C: 这里面封存的是我的「起点」…不知怎么，我总觉得他们没有恶意……
E: My "origin," huh... I don't know why, but the voice sounded friendly to me.

C: 改天还要去好好拜谢一下符玄小姐，真是多亏了她的帮助呀。
E: I'll have to find time to thank Miss Fu Xuan properly. I really owe her one.

C: 能再和我讲讲黑天鹅的梦泡吗？
E: Can tell me more about Black Swan's dream bubble?

C: 老板，这菜单从上到下每一样各点一份吧。
E: Well, we'll have one of everything on the menu.

C: 好奇心更强烈了。
E: Yeah, now more than ever.

C: 让你失望了？
E: Are you disappointed?

C: 迄今为止，我猎获数百柄剑皆是如此。这些剑会被逐一熔断，绝无例外！
E: I've hunted down hundreds of swords like this so far, and every single one of them has been melted down!

C: 抱歉抱歉，是我的措辞不当。帕沃尔先生的使团送回了一柄流落异乡多年的仙舟宝剑。
E: I apologize for my poor choice of words. Mr. Paavo's delegation brought a legendary Xianzhou sword that had been lost for centuries.

C: 无论如何都要谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。我们明天见。
E: Anyway, thank you, {NICKNAME}. We'll catch up tomorrow.

C: 什、什么意思？
E: Wh—What do you mean?

C: 我们…不能在这里停留了。去下一个村子吧。
E: We can't stay here... Let's move on to the next village.

C: 他们已经掌握了名为反抗的力量。
E: They have already gained the power of resistance.

C: …谢谢你，老友。
E: ...Thank you, my old friend.

C: 也不必这么给她面子吧……
E: You don't have to play along that hard, you know...

C: 接下来，就该锁定凶手的身份了吧？可这些证物…我看了半天，也没觉得哪个可以指认真凶啊。
E: Next, should we pin down the identity of the perpetrator? This evidence... I've been staring at it all day but, there's nothing that can identify the perp.

C: 哦，乐子神在上，你要是再拆我的台，我发誓一定会狠狠地踢你的屁股！
E: Oh, for The Laughter — if you undercut me one more time, I swear I'm gonna kick you in the butt!

C: 「侦探助手」先生，请你随意指认一位嫌疑人为凶手。
E: Mr. Assistant Detective, please feel free to point out a suspect as the murderer.

C: 请听题！什么生物早上四条腿、中午两条腿、晚上三条腿？
E: Listen up! What creature has four legs in the morning, two legs in the afternoon, and three legs at night?

C: 竟然不行吗？我还以为每种组合都有一种解答呢。
E: Nothing? I thought there was an answer for every single permutation.

C: 如此粗暴的方式有违我的记忆美学，但有时为了结果…我也必须放下一些过程的矜持。
E: Such a crude approach violates my aesthetics of memory, but as a means to an end... I need to put this aside for a more indifferent process.

C: 太卜派这么一位来接我们，还说没生咱的气？
E: I knew I'd offended that diviner — that's why she sent this girl to help us!

C: 我…区区一个卜者能干什么啊？如果你们不嫌弃的话，这就来。
E: I—I'm just a diviner, wouldn't I slow you down!? Ugh, okay, here I come...

C: …将军在用人方面，着实是见缝插针，毫不手软啊。
E: *sigh* So, general... even guests are on the payroll these days?

C: 如何，喜欢这个真相吗？
E: So, how do you like your truth?

C: 正值用人之际，好心人送来免费劳力，景元就不客气啦。
E: We were in need of extra hands, and extra hands I have provided — no need to thank me.

C: 是啦是啦～恩公是将军请来的援手，放在故事里便是从天而降、救急救难的御史大人了。
E: That's it~! First you arrive out of the blue, then the general recruits you to the cause — it's like the stories where imperial heroes bring salvation to the world.

C: 在罗浮碰上这种意外，真替你们伤心。唉，我也伤心……
E: Sorry this crisis came during your trip. *sigh* I'm sorry it came at all...

C: 随着它的生长，侵蚀现象也变得更严重了。
E: The severity of the corrosion becomes worse as it grows.

C: 姑且一试吧，也没损失。
E: Let's give it a shot — nothing to lose.

C: 没有解药？啧，这些妖人到底从什么地方搞来如此高深的丹方？真教人头疼。
E: No cure? Tsk, where did these villains get their hands on such a complex prescription? This is infuriating...

C: 你给我记住！要是公平对决，我未必不是你的对手！
E: Hmph! I'll let you off the hook, but remember — next time we fight fair and square!

C: 像我们这样的「天缺者」，年轻时免不了遭受欺辱，即使历尽了苦难，坐上了丹士长的高位，也依然对很多事束手无策。
E: It would seem we Incomplete Ones are often bullied from a tender age... I endured innumerous hardships to become chief alchemist, yet there are still things that leave me feeling helpless.

C: 我猜想，他们只是将太多苦难归咎于自己背离了寿瘟祸祖的命途，因而才想要靠重新成为「丰饶民」来为自己救难吧。
E: My guess is that they attribute their suffering to their decision to renounce the Path of the Plagues Author. Thus, they seek to save themselves by becoming Denizens of Abundance again.

C: 那棵树比我年纪还大
E: That tree is older than me.

C: 丰饶之主？
E: Aeon of Abundance?

C: 似乎有人找我，你们先聊…
E: Someone's looking for me. Please go ahead with the discussion...

C: 我说过的吧，「放生帮」应该去放生充满力量的野兽，让他们脱离人类的掌控！不要猎鹰和斗犬，让它们在自然中展现生命力！
E: I think I said before that the Unshackled should endeavor to free powerful beasts from human captivity! We must stop hunting for falcons and holding dog fights! Let them unleash their vitality in nature!

C: 我们这边走，这边比较近……
E: Let's go this way. It's quicker...

C: （我是不是又…走回了起点？）
E: (Isn't this... where I started?)

C: …我可不想按着你的手让你来看。
E: ...Do I have to make you drag yourself over there?

C: 唔，四周黑黢黢的，总感觉好像有人在暗处盯着咱们……
E: It's so dark in here... It feels like we're being watched...

C: 妙哇，就说咱们是出于自卫，迫不得已。
E: Perfect! Let's just say it was self-defense. We had no choice.

C: 出发吗？
E: Shall we go?

C: 嘶，你身上有股特别的味道，你是……
E: Hmm, you have a strange scent on you. You must be...

C: 它们说那人身上有和「幻胧」战斗过的气息……
E: They carry the scent of a great battle... with none other than Phantylia...

C: …哇哦，你的情绪很放松，就像一块蓬松轻盈的糕点。就像…这具身体不是你的一样？{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}，是什么让你这么豁达？
E: ...Incredible, such a relaxed specimen — a soft cake of a host... It's almost as if... as if this body doesn't even belong to you? What makes you so detached, young {M#man}{F#lady}?

C: …那个，你见到桂乃芬小姐没有？我还没能找到她，她不会出什么事了吧……
E: ...Um, have you seen Miss Guinaifen? I still haven't found her. Is she gonna be okay...?

C: 听到了吗？别哭了，你有用，你留下的纸人也很有用。
E: You hear that? Stop crying. You're useful. And your paper dolls are useful too.

C: 当年的力量？
E: Your old power?

C: 可惜呀，大岁阳燎原虽然吸收了无数岁阳同胞的力量，却还是低估了人类的奸诈，惜败于那位将军。
E: The great Ignamar absorbed the power of countless fellow heliobi, but ultimately underestimated human deceit... They were narrowly defeated by the general.

C: 坏家伙，你休想动什么歪心思。尾巴大爷被十王司判官封印着，是逃不掉的…你也别想溜走。
E: That's impossible. Mr. Tail was sealed by the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission. He can't escape... and neither can you...

C: 信不信由你，我只是想离开这里，我能有什么坏心思呢？
E: You can believe whatever you like. I just want to get out of here. That's all I want.

C: 与将军的决斗还早，你我先一决胜负如何？
E: Before you duel the general, why don't you fight me?

C: 联盟成立前，我已活了无数岁月，联盟消逝后，我仍将存在无数个琥珀纪。
E: I have lived for countless years. I existed before the Alliance was even an idea. And once the Alliance has turned to dust, I will continue to exist for countless more Amber Eras.

C: 幽幽的门扇静谧无声，你效仿话本的做法，叩击门钹左边三次，右边三次。
E: The gloomy doors are silent. You follow the instruction in the book and knock on the doors, three times on the left, three times on the right.

C: 我问得差不多了。
E: That's all I have to ask.

C: 贵客，欢迎光临。我是这里的店长柯柯娜，您有什么需要吗？
E: Welcome, esteemed guest. I am the shop owner here, Cocona. How may I assist you?

C: （最后一段回忆，又会是什么样的呢？）
E: (What will the final memory have in store?)

C: 娜娜…靠着你的收入，我们短期内确实可以衣食无忧…但你我都清楚，这不是我们想要的生活。我们都是渴望飞翔的鸟…这困于尘土的生活不属于我们。
E: Cocona... We'll have no problem supporting ourselves temporarily with your income... But you and I know that this isn't the life we want. We clamor to be birds soaring through the skies... This life shackled in dust does not belong to us.

C: 庞德，我太容易紧张了。而且，有我在旁边看着…你也不会安心的…趁这段时间，我也处理一下工作方面的交接。
E: Pound, I get nervous too easily. And you won't feel relaxed either if I'm watching the match... I should also take this time to hand over my work.

C: …放弃？不对…这是我的解脱。
E: ...Give up? No... This is my salvation.

C: 你觉得…自己是在帮我吗？
E: Do you think... that you're helping me?

C: …这是我生命里最幸福的一天。
E: ...This is the happiest day of my life.

C: 我会一直握住你…
E: I will always hold on to you...

C: 我一直都在，女士…
E: I have been with you the whole time, Miss...

C: 我脑海里的那些记忆都变得十分虚假…像是被什么人强行灌进去的，它们并不真正属于我。
E: All the memories in my mind suddenly seemed completely false... It was as if someone had forcibly implanted them inside me, like they didn't belong to me at all.

C: 感谢您…您真的如同我的知己。
E: Thank you... You really are a dear friend.

C: <color=#dbc291ff><unbreak>1007</unbreak></color>号房…或许您能抽空去看看，那间客房里发生了什么？
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Room <unbreak>1007</unbreak></color>... Perhaps you could find time to take a look at what happened in there?

C: 还是进房间里一探究竟吧……
E: Let's go in and investigate...

C: （住在这里的并不是莱斯利•迪恩。真正的莱斯利•迪恩早已死去——但他的记忆被以忆质的形式保存了起来。）
E: (The person that lives here is not Lesley Dean. The real Lesley Dean died long ago... However, his memories have been preserved as memoria.)

C: 那双原本澈亮的眼眸失去了光彩，贴合他肌肤的小麦色泽也开始褪祛——先是黯淡，接着渐变至苍白。
E: Lesley's once glistening eyes suddenly lose their brilliance, as his face fades from the color of golden wheat to pale, then to pure white.

C: 分清批评和诋毁的界限并不容易，我也曾迷失在混杂着这两种声音的浪潮之中——这是个毕生的课题，我到最后都没能把它理解透彻。
E: It is not easy to differentiate between criticism and slander. I have been lost in the waves of these two voices before, too... This is a life-long lesson, one that I never fully grasped even until the end.

C: 我一度把她的付出当作理所当然，直到很久之后才意识到自己有多幼稚和愚蠢。对此，我恳请她的原谅……
E: I took everything that she did for me for granted. Only after all this time did I realize how childish and idiotic I was. I hope that she can forgive me for this...

C: 啧，梦境就是这点不好！你永远都不知道刚才还在面对面聊天的人是不是下一秒就会被吵醒。
E: Tsk, that's the worst thing about the Dreamscape! You never know if the person you're talking to is just going to suddenly be woken up and disappear.

C: 不知道您注意到没有——空艇换了主人，却还在用「晖长石号」的旧称，空艇尾翼也没有涂装……
E: I don't know if you've noticed — the airship has a new owner now, but it's still called the Radiant Feldspar. And the airship's empennage isn't spray-painted...

C: 唔…「晖长石号」换成「{NICKNAME}号」…以人化物，恐怕会招来非议。
E: Mmm... The "Radiant Feldspar" renamed to the "{NICKNAME}"... that might invite criticism, presenting you as an object.

C: 船员们提议，就在此处摆上您的半身像，我认为这是一个展示我们团队对您领导的尊敬和信任的好方式。同时，这也能加强团队的凝聚力。
E: The crew suggests that we place a statue of your bust here. I think it's a great way for our team to show our respect and trust in your leadership. Additionally, it will strengthen our team's unity.

C: 那当然！别的不说，咱们皮皮西人是天生的维修好手。我带的这几个家伙，各个都有家族认证的专业技能证书，也是被苜蓿草家系核验过的。
E: Of course! Not to mention, we Pepeshi are natural repairmen. These folks that I'm bringing on board all hold official certificates to verify their abilities, issued by The Family themselves! They were verified by the Alfalfa Family as well.

C: 先前在船长室门口跟你汇报招聘事项的时候，我注意到一个问题——请您跟我到现场看看吧。
E: Previously, when I reported in about recruitment, I noticed an issue with your room — please follow me to take a look.

C: 丹尼斯以肉眼难以捕捉的速度逃离了白日梦酒店的前台——你难以相信正常人类的股四头肌能够爆发出如此惊人的能量。
E: Dennis hastily leaves The Reverie's front desk at a pace faster than the naked eye can see. You can hardly believe a human's appendages can churn out that much explosive strength.

C: 「对饮当歌，人生几何！譬如朝露，去日苦多。」
E: "Sing for your life, sipping on soda delight! Embrace the sweet dews, as the day turns to night!"

C: 请您乘电梯至酒店<unbreak>135</unbreak>层——那里会有服务人员负责接待。
E: Please take the elevator up to the <unbreak>135</unbreak>th floor... our staff will be waiting to meet you there.

C: 想靠惯用伎俩挑衅，嗯？我没记错的话，哪怕把匹诺康尼这单全都记在你头上，你的成功率也还比我差了几个百分点吧？
E: Trying to stir me up with your usual tricks, huh? Let's see. Even if I count all the gains from Penacony under your name, your success rate would still be several percent points behind mine.

C: 哼唧…哼唧……
E: Oink... Oink...

C: 想封我的口，价钱可不低啊…
E: If you expect me to hold my tongue, it's not going to be cheap...

C: 我管你是谁！有我在，天王老子也别想接近知更鸟小姐一步！
E: Who cares? As long as I'm here, no one can get close to Miss Robin!

C: 黑塔…是那位很有名的天才，黑塔女士吗？
E: Herta... Do you mean Madam Herta, the famous genius?

C: 注意虔恭！你不够虔恭！
E: Mind your manners! You aren't pious enough!

C: （哼哼，这样就不会被拦住了吧？）
E: (Hmph, I bet no one can stop me now.)

C: 哼！哼…哼哼！
E: Hmph! Hmph... Hmph, hmph!

C: 我验过了，这就是个邪恶组织。
E: I've verified it — this is an evil organization.

C: 这么说来，波提欧兄弟的帽子刚才也是被一个皮皮西人抢走的。
E: By the way, Boothill's hat was stolen by a Pepeshi just now too.

C: 波提欧兄弟——有机会与你并肩作战、铲除奸邪，我倍感荣幸！
E: Boothill, I'm truly honored to stand by your side in this fight against evil!

C: 绝好的主意，青雀女士。我的匹诺康尼之旅也已接近尾声，此前也正为没能带走配得上「纯美」的纪念之物而感到烦恼。
E: That's a brilliant idea, Miss Qingque. As my journey on Penacony is coming to an end, I've had a hard time finding a souvenir worthy of the Beauty.

C: 嘿嘿，消息还真准确…
E: Hee-hee, the tip is quite accurate...

C: 话说彦卿就算了，你们在罗浮上待了这么久，就没意识到本座不在罗浮吗？
E: Actually, Yanqing, forget it. You have all been on the Luofu for all this time, and you didn't even notice that I wasn't here?

C: 呼雷越狱之事，太卜大人已知？
E: Did you hear about Hoolay's escape from prison, Master Diviner?

C: 朱明的客人就快到了…
E: The Zhuming guests will be arriving soon.

C: 好了，诸位，时间不早了，该是我们暂时告别的时候了。
E: Alright everyone, time has passed us by. It is time for us to bid farewell for now.

C: 将药王秘传、持明龙师盘根错节的势力一一摒除后，再造罗浮丹鼎司的重任就要落在你的肩上了。灵砂，咱们就此别过。
E: After eliminating the deeply rooted Disciples of Sanctus Medicus and the Vidyadhara Preceptors, it will fall on you to rebuild the Alchemy Commission. Lingsha, it is time for us to say farewell.

C: 就是这份设计稿了！
E: That's the one!

C: 不对，这不是你们的错。师傅的手稿损坏完完全全就是我自己的问题，不怪别人。
E: This isn't your fault. Mr. Ryan's damaged manuscript is absolutely positively my fault, so I'll take the blame.

C: 你就把这份「损坏的手稿」当作是师傅留给你最后的考卷，如果你能完成你师傅的星槎设计，那才证明你真的出师了。
E: Take this damaged manuscript as the final exam paper left behind by your master. If you can complete your master's starskiff design, then that means you can graduate.

C: 如果生长过程不太顺利，则需要及时清理出失效的星槎种子，并且销毁金属框架内的生物材料。
E: If anything goes wrong during the growth process, we need to clear out the failed starskiff seed and destroy the biological matter in the metal frame.

C: 培养舱难道也会一起生长吗？
E: Do the incubators grow alongside the starskiffs themselves?

C: 你这…坨…扶不上墙的…烂泥？
E: You're... a hopeless good-for-nothing?

C: 羞辱不能带来持久的动力…
E: Humiliation can't keep you going for long...

C: （垂直起降）
E: (Take off and land vertically)

C: 你们要做的，是将那座三座阵基重启。去吧，可别让判官久等了。
E: What you need to do now is to reactivate the three base terminals. Go on now. Don't make the judge wait too long.

C: 而且，你看{NICKNAME}的眼神，{F#她}{M#他}肯定很感兴趣，对吧？
E: Besides, look at {NICKNAME}! You want in, right?

C: 喂…喂！起床了，卢卡！
E: Hey... Hey! Luka, you're up!

C: 也许它们只是搭伙去散步了。
E: Maybe they just went out for a walk together.

C: …我错了！大哥大姐们，我知道错了！你们放我一马吧！
E: ...Spare me! Please, all of you, I shouldn't have stolen anything — I admit! Give me a second chance!

C: 哈哈哈，就是一套正常的庆祝仪式，也不用那么大反应吧？
E: Hahaha, it's just a normal victory celebration. No need to be so alarmed.

C: 我来开吧，不知道里面到底装的什么——
E: I wonder what's in there. Here, let me open it...

C: 等等，那是…虎克？！她在这儿干嘛？
E: Wait, that's... Hook!? What's she doing here?

C: …等一下。这个主意未必是个馊主意。富贵险中求啊！走吧，我们去爬树！
E: ...Wait a sec. Maybe it's not such a terrible idea after all? No risk, no reward! Come on, let's go climb that tree!

C: 彰显武德、安稳民心、提振士气，还能借仪典之机邀请友邦客人来访，促成贸易与和平。
E: It's a way to showcase our martial spirit, reassure people, boost morale, and attract visitors from other planets to promote trade and peace.

C: 如此看来，确实有事急从权之处。我会将此事呈报给地衡司的治安厅，让他们配合善后。
E: I see, it's an unusual situation indeed. I'll report it to the Security Department of the Realm-Keeping Commission and ask for their cooperation in handling the aftermath.

C: 三月小姐，你就别损我啦。演武仪典前仙舟的安全就像一根紧绷的弦，看似平静，但只要稍稍一拨就有余波动荡不休。
E: Please don't tease me, Miss March. The situation on the Xianzhou before the Wardance is like a calm lake that can be disturbed by even the smallest pebble — capable of generating far-reaching ripples with even the slightest disturbance.

C: 就像黑塔女士那样？唔，有道理。不管怎么看仙舟人，有一副老爷爷的外貌就很奇怪。
E: Like Madam Herta? Hmmm, that would make sense. Anyway, it's really weird for a Xianzhou native to look so old.

C: 休得猖狂！
E: This ends now!

C: 我说这位…远道而来的客人，第一，天舶司检查到你们的货物中存在疑似危险武器的物品，所以才要求我来进行确认检查。第二，我到底哪里獐头鼠目了？！
E: Listen here... Firstly, the Sky-Faring Commission detected dangerous items that could possibly be weapons in your cargo hold, that's why they called me here to double-check. Secondly, where the heck did you get the idea that I'm a "shady craftsman"!?

C: 你的诉求呢，我们已经了解了，但目前政策就是这样规定的，我们也没办法改变…不过呢，你的意见我们已经记录了，也会向上级领导反映，有结果会及时通知你的。
E: Alright, we understand your position, but rules are rules, and we can't bend them now... However, we'll note down your concerns and pass them on to management. We'll keep you updated on any developments.

C: 和这个女人一比，也没那么讨人厌了。
E: Well, honestly, at least you're not as annoying as that woman.

C: 你以为我会相信你现编的胡话吗？我敬你是朱明来的客人，才一再忍让，你却毫不领情。难道朱明仙舟没有「拿了别人东西要还」的常识吗？
E: Do you really expect me to believe that nonsense? I've been taking it easy on you because you're a guest from the Zhuming, but you're not taking the hint. Don't people from the Zhuming know you're supposed to return what you've borrowed?

C: 在下来拜谒新任司鼎。
E: I'm here to pay my respects to the new Cauldron Master.

C: 我其实希望你夸夸彦卿啊。
E: I was actually hoping you'd give Yanqing some praise!

C: 你独自向我引介列车的证人，不正是想摸清我与飞霄各自的来意，以及我俩之间是否有所抵牾。老朽赤诚待人，年轻人也就别藏着掖着了。
E: By introducing the Express' witnesses to me alone, aren't you aiming to discern the intentions behind both my actions and Feixiao's, and whether there's any discord between us? Well, since I'm being open and honest with you, I encourage you young folk to do the same.

C: 依老朽愚见，云骑剑士卓然于胜利之巅固然可喜；但能传下技艺，令其开枝散叶，嘉惠旁人，才更有价值。
E: In my humble opinion, while a Cloud Knight is commendable by securing victories, it's even more so to pass on your skills and spread the way of swordplay.

C: 其实也不能说三十年没见，毕竟「黄钟」共鸣系统里天天播放着你大捷的战报，我也算是日日得见你所向披靡的英姿。…你的身体还好吗？
E: Well, I wouldn't say I haven't seen you in thirty years. After all, your great victories are announced through the Yellowbell Resonance System every day, so I'm well aware of your great feats... How's your health holding up?

C: 力战倒下的武弁。她的武器不翼而飞，也许遗落在了监狱某处。
E: This warden fought to her death, and her weapon's nowhere to be seen. She must have lost it somewhere in the prison.

C: 第一天上课，就带着徒弟一起迟到，罗浮上的规矩怎么如此散漫？唉…真让为师寒心。
E: Seriously? It's the first day, and you two are already late? Why is everyone on the Luofu so laid-back? So disappointing.

C: 几十年啊…那时候我可都变成老婆婆了…不成不成。
E: Decades...? But I'll be an old lady by then... No, no.

C: 一边去！
E: Shut up!

C: 好比紫金茄要油炸、赤云椒要爆炒、黄石牛肉要焖煮。发掘食材——我是说弟子的天性，就是咱们的工作。
E: For example, Golden Eggplant tastes best when fried, Cloud Peppers when stir-fried, and Yellow Boulder Beef when simmered. It's all about discovering the nature of the ingredients... uh, I mean, apprentice.

C: 今天就休息一天吧？
E: Why don't we take a day off?

C: 姐姐，姐姐，咱们快走吧，接下来我要、我要去永狩原玩！
E: Big sis! Let's go! I want to play in Ever-Hunt Plains!

C: 只要离港，便有猎群的人接应…
E: Someone from the pack will be waiting for me once I leave the port...

C: 果然，这三个小东西一直咬着我们不放。
E: Looks like those brats were following us the whole time.

C: 我自然相信神策将军与各位无名客的英勇事迹，但也不免对报告未能详述的一些细节感到好奇。借此机会，希望能与二位交流一番。
E: While I trust the bravery of the Divine Foresight and the Nameless, I'm curious about some details missing from the report. I'd like to take this chance to have an exchange with both of you.

C: 猜测你和星核猎手的关系
E: Raise her suspicion about your relationship with Stellaron Hunters.

C: 就依将军所言。
E: As you wish, General.

C: 刑字部所造的无间剑树，本是对罪行累累的孽物施加痛苦业报的处决刑具。大部分步离人在受剑树刑后熬不过三日。但这妖物不同，剑片穿刺，即刻复原。受刑至今，他也依旧活着。
E: The Forest of Swords, forged by the Punishment Division, is a device of intense torment used to execute sinful abominations. Most borisin die within three days in the Forest, but Hoolay is different. Every time the blades pierce him, his body instantly heals. Despite the brutal punishment, he somehow manages to survive.

C: 姐姐，帮我个忙，劫狱者们切断了幽囚狱对内与对外的一切联系。眼下只有你是唯一能不受阻碍逃离此处的人…呃，鸟？
E: Do me a favor, sister. The intruders have cut off all communication between inside and outside the prison, and now you're the only person... the only bird... who can slip out undetected.

C: 罗浮的监狱管理，真是堪忧…
E: The prison management on the Luofu is truly concerning...

C: 大人——
E: But my Lord...

C: 神策府中
E: At the Seat of Divine Foresight

C: 这和身高没关系吧。
E: Hey, this has nothing to do with my height.

C: 演武仪典召开前两个时辰\n\n长乐天
E: Two dual-hours before the Wardance convenes\n\nExalting Sanctum

C: 大人——！
E: But my Lord...!

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>小声说话，方便吗？</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>Can we keep this quiet?</color>

C: 末度，你想做什么？这一切和他们无关！
E: What are you trying to do, Mok Tok? They have nothing to do with this!

C: 可惜，他们无法参透这秘密，只能对我施加自己所能想到的最恶毒的刑罚。
E: Unfortunately, they failed to uncover the secret, so they resorted to the most brutal punishments they could imagine.

C: 我找到了他们的位置，椒丘正在与呼雷周旋，他…示意我不要露面。
E: I've found them. Jiaoqiu is trying to stall Hoolay, and he signaled me... to not reveal myself.

C: 伴随涌上心头的燃烧怒血，这位狐人将军敌我不分，鏖战不休，身躯上绽开的伤痕不是来自敌人的武器，而是她不能承受的巨大力量。终有一日，她将作为怪物，四分五裂地死去。
E: With the burning fury in her heart, that foxian general will eventually lose her sanity and indulge in endless bloodshed. The scars on her body will not be caused by enemy weapons, but by the immense power she can't withstand. One day, she will be torn apart and die as a monster.

C: 最后，我明白了，离去亦有「价值」。他们将离去的重量，压在了我们这些活人的心上，给了我们更多的力量。他们用死亡这枚硬币，换回了更多……
E: Eventually, I realized that their deaths held value. They placed the weight of their sacrifice on the living, granting us strength. With a coin forged by their deaths, they exchanged something more in return...

C: …怎么说，要去看看擂场了吗？
E: ...So, do you want to go out and see the ring?

C: 你？得再打起点精神！
E: You? You need to perk up more!

C: 星槎海的战场打扫完毕了。
E: We have cleared out the enemies in Starskiff Haven.

C: 但你会错意了，在这里没有什么一对一的公平决斗。等我们俩放倒了你，希望你还能一如既往地嘴硬。
E: But you seem to have misunderstood. There will be no fair one-on-one duel. Let's see how tough you are once we've put you down.

C: 多一个人手总是好事，竞锋舰这么大，对了，你应该知道——
E: More manpower is always a good thing, since the Skysplitter is so large. Oh, and by the way, you should know that—

C: 难道你还有其他的路可逃么？椒丘，我已将你的伪装和防御层层撕开，你和你所侍奉的将军，你们深藏的秘密，我已了如指掌。
E: Do you think you have some other escape route? Jiaoqiu, I have already peeled back your disguises and defenses layer by layer. I know all the secrets that you and your general have buried so deep.

C: 我想她比你更明白自己的结局——终有一日，她将在战斗中被一次比一次更猛烈的「月狂」压倒，最终在变形和狂怒中四分五裂。
E: I'm sure she understands her fate far better than you ever will. One day on the battlefield, she will be overpowered by her ever-intensifying Moon Rage and finally be torn apart by her fury and transformation.

C: 按照计划，一旦呼雷出现，云骑们会全员集合，尽可能制伏他。
E: The plan said that if Hoolay appears, the Cloud Knights will assemble and do everything they can to suppress him.

C: 如何让挑食的小孩吃下青椒？
E: How do we get a picky child to eat green chilis?

C: 幽囚狱劫狱之事，我寻得一些「物证」送来，龙师一定看过了。
E: I sent over some evidence regarding the prison break in The Shackling Prison. I trust you've already looked it over.

C: 如果是那位大人，定能让罗浮上下的持明族心服口服。
E: If it's her, she will earn the respect and assent of all the Vidyadhara on the Luofu.

C: 原因大概能够猜到了，一定是飞霄将军太强了。
E: I can guess why: General Feixiao is just too strong.

C: 妾身本来想说「不行，得让这几人静养」…不过算了，谁让这两人有个一样不安分的老大呢。
E: I would normally say no because they need to rest... but, alas, what can you do when the two of them have a leader who is just as restless?

C: 我刚才在波月古海边散步时，见到飞霄将军正在陪他们闲聊。你们若想探望，可以去那边转转。
E: While taking a walk by the Lunarescent Depths, I spotted General Feixiao chatting with them. If you wish to visit them, you can head over there.

C: 这是犯罪窝点？
E: This is a house of criminal decadence?

C: 说起唱歌，皇上，咱过会儿一起去唱K？你不是号称自己有「帝王级歌喉」吗？让我们几个臣子见识下呗！
E: Speaking of singing, how about we hit up a karaoke bar later, Your Majesty? Didn't you proclaim that you had Emperor-tier vocals? You've gotta flaunt 'em a little to your subjects!

C: 灰骑士，停手吧。刁民，朕不是非要把你们逼到无路可走，但你们现在必须解释清楚，到底为什么五次三番地袭击朕！
E: Gray Knight, please stop. You there, it's not that I revel in forcing your hand, but you will explain once and for all your repeated ambushes on me!

C: 嗯，请你帮朕找回记忆吧，灰骑士。人逃离不了自己的过去，无论是好是坏。
E: Yes, please help me retrieve my memories, Gray Knight. We can never escape our own past, for better or worse.

C: 我托人预约过了，花店今天应该是咱们俩包场。
E: I've made an appointment for the florist to only cater to the both of us.

C: …政变了…你二姐要抢班夺权…陛下已经遇害驾崩了……
E: ...It's a coup... Your Second Sister wants to usurp the throne... His Majesty has been assassinated...

C: 皇冠不会落地，王权永远不会缺位。
E: The crown will not fall, and the throne will never be vacant.

C: （这里是…哪里？）
E: (Where... is this?)

C: 灰骑士…我就知道她会派你来。
E: Gray Knight... I knew she would send you.

C: 谢谢你，灰骑士。你做了正确的选择。
E: Thank you, Gray Knight. You've made the right choice.

C: 叛军马上就要打进来了…朕要离开这里了。
E: The turncoats are breaching the inner walls... I must leave now.

C: 侍卫，动手吧。
E: Retainers, do it.

C: …可拉倒吧！
E: ...You've gotta be kidding me!

C: 暂时没什么需要。
E: There's nothing at the moment.

C: 回忆：查德威克博士曾<color=#dbc291ff>向我求救</color>。那时他的年龄应在五十岁上下。
E: Recollection: Dr. Chadwick once <color=#dbc291ff>asked for my help</color>. He was about fifty at that time.

C: 卡尔德隆•查德威克…奇怪，我竟然不记得这个名字了。二位请稍等，我需要调用一下系统数据……
E: Calderon Chadwick... The name doesn't ring a bell to me, which is strange. Please bear with me while I check the system data...

C: 那么，我是否可以认为：为了坚守原则，你宁愿将整个家族推向{RUBY_B#智械星球IX}螺丝星{RUBY_E#}的对立面？你又能否承担与「天才俱乐部」为敌的后果？
E: Well, can I assume that you'd rather turn The Family against {RUBY_B#Intellitron PlanetIX}Planet Screwllum{RUBY_E#} just to uphold your principles, am I correct? Are you prepared to bear the consequences of being the enemy of the Genius Society?

C: 或许是你提到的那种「武器」。
E: Perhaps, they're concerned about that weapon you mentioned.

C: 他们不会来捣乱了。
E: They won't come around looking for trouble anymore.

C: 这里有很多跟你我一样的普通人，他们把自己四分之一的人生都贡献给了这项事业，有些还为它付出了惨痛的代价——他们…我们想看到的不是这个结果！
E: Many of our colleagues here are ordinary folks just like us. They have dedicated a quarter of their lives to this project, and some have even paid a hefty price for it. They... This isn't how we wanted things to end up!

C: 所以，公司想到了办法——将查德威克送往匹诺康尼，通过联入梦境维持忆质的活性。推测：技术研发部一定设法与家族达成了某种协议。
E: Therefore, the IPC came up with a solution — sending Chadwick to Penacony to maintain the activity of the memoria. Speculation: The Technology Department must have struck some sort of a deal with The Family.

C: 「卡尔德隆•查德威克用短短数年的时间，突破了很多长生的老妖怪几辈子都突破不了的难题。他才是那个货真价实的『天才』。」
E: "In a few short years, Calderon Chadwick achieved breakthroughs that even ancient immortals couldn't conquer. He is a genuine genius."

C: 在这片梦境中，鸟本就是筑梦师的象征。这个意象表现在了各种事物中，也在一些文艺作品里有所展现。
E: In this Dreamscape, birds are a symbol of Dreamweavers. This sentiment has been expressed in objects of all sorts, and shown up in some pieces of artistry.

C: 是什么样的？
E: What were you like?

C: 难说。师父手下的筑梦师可没几个正常人。
E: Hard to say. Most Dreamweavers working under master aren't completely sane.

C: 必须去看看，「过去」到底发生了什么…？
E: I must take a look. What exactly happened in the past...?

C: 我不珍惜？哈…哈哈……真是一群走狗！
E: I didn't treasure it? Ha... Haha... What a bunch of lapdogs!

C: 我留下来当诱饵，你先走吧。
E: I'll stay behind and keep them busy, run.

C: …我不会帮你传话。
E: ...I won't deliver the message for you.

C: 请帮我把这张照片转交给他——只要他愿意回来，隐夜鸫永远都会是他的家。
E: Please pass this photo to him — as long as he's willing to return, the Nightingales will always be his home.

C: 愿你能寻到自己的巢，愿你能书写自己的诗。
E: May you find your own nest, and write your own poem.

C: 应该的，您过奖了。
E: I merely did what I had to do, you flatter me.

C: 元老院想出了一个权宜之策：只放一小部分外邦人进城，具体人选通过抽签决定。但反对者说，这种抽签可能并不公平，因为元老们可以故意挑选「有用」的人……
E: So the Council of Elders came up with a temporary solution: To allow only a small number of outlanders into the city, decided by drawing lots. This method may be unfair to those who object, because the Council has rigged the process to select the useful ones...

C: 这些外邦人的情况比想象中还要糟糕。如果放任不管的话，他们最多只能活一周——前提是没有更多袭击发生。
E: The outlanders' situation is much worse than I imagined. If we keep turning a blind eye, they will at best survive for a week. That is... if they aren't attacked by wild beasts first.

C: 但这可难不倒我，稍等就好……
E: But this won't vex me at all. Just wait a while...

C: 不不，没有不行，果然是英雄出少年啊。那你千万记得，要躺在椅子上、按照步骤用餐……
E: Of course! You're definitely a hero in the height of your youth. But you must remember to lie back in your chair and eat them in order...

C: 里面…全都是食物？
E: Inside this... It's all food?

C: 这个房间的布设相当舒适，没有铁栅栏或其他限制手段，为被关押者保留了最后的体面。
E: This room's layout is quite cozy. There are no bars nor restraining devices — a modicum of respect has been left for whoever gets detained here.

C: 拉莱德，不要公报私仇！大家都知道你对吾师怀恨在心，只因他拆穿了你诬陷外邦人的伎俩！
E: Liluder, this is not a place to pursue personal vengeance! Everyone knows you've always hated Master, all because he thwarted your petty attempt to frame the outlanders!

C: 我这是在为奥赫玛的利益着想。否则还不等下个门扉时到来，圣城仓库就要被搬空了。
E: I only have Okhema's interests at heart. Otherwise, by the next Entry Hour, the holy city's warehouse would have been plundered clean!

C: 公民们哪有闲心分辨专业词汇的区别？作为「说人话」的奖赏，你得到了如雷的掌声。
E: How can the citizens even tell the difference in semantics? As a reward for "speaking the human tongue," you receive thunderous applause.

C: 你的意思是，现在的圣城和元老院冰冷如铁？真敢说啊。不怕塔兰顿的秤砣砸到你头上？
E: You're saying, the holy city and the Council of Elders are as cold as steel? How daring. Are you not afraid that Talanton's weights will come crashing down on your head?

C: 我同意你说的，不能开这个坏头。那你可知道，他的行为也对社会风气造成了坏影响？
E: I agree with you. We should not set such a poor precedent. But are you aware that his actions also negatively impacted societal values?

C: 等、等等！英雄！这个宝贝真的很宝贵，就请你帮帮忙吧——就当是为了阿格莱雅女士！
E: W—Wait! Hero! This treasure is truly extremely precious, and you have to help me! Count it as a favor to Lady Aglaea!

C: 眷属的声音逐渐变得微弱，她残存的神智似乎无法再与你们进行问答，只能默默重复着那个陌生的名字。
E: The Titankin's voice is growing ever weaker. It seems she no longer has the mental capacity to answer your questions, only to silently repeat that stranger's name to herself.

C: 往世复现！
E: We'll go back to the past!

C: 不要乘人之危！而且人家能感觉到她没有说谎，还是让我们事情搞清楚再说吧。
E: Don't take advantage of those in need! Plus, I can sense that she isn't lying. Let's find out what's going on first and then go from there.

C: 迷迷挥手打开了通向过往的门扉……
E: Mem waves their hand and opens a door to the past...

C: 这尺度有点不合规了。
E: That's pushing the family-friendly rating a bit too far.

C: 呵，您如此执迷，不知是塔兰顿的砝码压住了您，还是墨涅塔的金丝缠住了您？
E: Hah. This obsession of yours... I cannot tell if you are crushed under the weights of Talanton or bound by the golden thread of Mnestia?

C: 你多活几十年就知道了。
E: Live a few more centuries and you'll see.

C: 当然值得！
E: Of course it is!

C: 两条命就换点吃的？
E: Two lives saved and I get some snacks?

C: …谢谢。
E: ...Thank you.

C: 阿卡迪亚到底在哪里？
E: Just where on earth is Arcadia?

C: 于沙场厮杀时，我无需恳请瑟希斯的垂枝，无需驱赶墨涅塔的飞虫。沙与血能遮蔽烦忧，号角声会引我向前。
E: When I fight on the battlefield, I need not beg for the willow sprig of Cerces, nor drive away the flying insects of Mnestia. My worries find solace in the blood and sand, and the call of the horn guides me forward.

C: 好吧，我们走就是了，这云石天宫又不是没有其他地方可以玩……
E: Alright, we'll go. It's not like there is nowhere else in Marmoreal Palace for us to enjoy ourselves.

C: 作为元老的客人，她就可以跳离塔兰顿的制衡吗？
E: Are you saying that, as a guest of the elder, she is above the checks and balances of Talanton?

C: 阿格莱雅女士，请稍等一会儿，那位异乡的英雄已经出发了……
E: Lady Aglaea, please wait a moment. The hero from afar has already set forth...

C: 要不了多久，你们都会饿死在这里。
E: It won't be long till you all starve to death here.

C: 我知道它在沉默，可你以为我们为什么要把你给带过来？神谕，神谕！没有欧洛尼斯的神谕，你就什么都不是！
E: I know they're staying silent, but why do you think we brought you here? Prophecy! Prophecy! Without Oronyx's prophecy, you're nothing!

C: 如果我现在告诉他们，神谕根本就不存在。他们还有在黑潮里活下去的希望吗？呵，他们会冲上来，把我们全都撕成碎片，然后绝望地等待{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}。
E: If I told them now that the prophecies don't exist, would they even have any hope of surviving the black tide? Hah, they would barge in and tear us to shreds, and wait for {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} in despair.

C: 就在我们走进奥赫玛的那天夜里，失去双目的我，在梦中听到了天帷之外的回音。
E: On the very night we marched into Okhema, I, who had lost my sight, heard an echo from beyond the heavens in my dreams.

C: 传谕梦母大人，我家里的老人最近做了不少甜饼，晚些我给您带点过来。
E: O Oracle Dreammother, the elders in my family has recently made some delicious sweet cakes. I shall bring some to you shortly.

C: 稍微等一下。
E: Hang on a sec.

C: 虽然我曾在这里待了许多的年岁，但绝大部分时间都在神殿的深处度过，真正踏上这片土地的时间反而少之又少。
E: I've stayed here for many years, but most of the time was spent in the depths of the temple. The time truly spent walking this land has been rare.

C: 妈妈，我现在过得很快乐。
E: Mother, I am very happy now.

C: 安珂，你又听故事听一半。什么造物引擎呀，那叫「泰坦」！
E: Anka, you're only getting half the story again. It's not called the "Engine of Creation." It's called the "Titan"!

C: 影响严重吗？
E: How bad is it?

C: 确有其事，但好在机械聚落的人及时发现，没闹出大乱子。善后工作得花上好几个晚上，不买本书打发时间，可太难熬了。
E: It did happen, but thankfully the folks at the Robot Settlement caught it in time before things got out of hand. The cleanup's gonna take several nights, and without a book to kill time, it's gonna be a real drag.

C: 如今军团蠢蠢欲动，一场恶战在所难免。我们无法松懈，也不敢松懈……
E: The Legion is growing restless, and a fierce battle seems inevitable. We cannot, and dare not, let our guard down...

C: 然后呢？
E: Go on.

C: 唉，你说这……
E: *sigh* This is so...

C: 我和知更鸟约在驾驶室碰面…她不会又伪装成智械吧？
E: I'm meeting Robin at the cockpit... She's not gonna pretend to be an Intellitron again, is she?

C: 我认识几家出版商，他们能根据样书制作梦泡，在匹诺康尼上市。不过……
E: I know a few publishers who can make dream bubbles based on sample books and put them on the market in Penacony. However...

C: 但我想，{NICKNAME}，遵从你内心的想法就好。人只能讲述自己相信的故事。
E: But I think, {NICKNAME}, you should just follow what your heart tells you. People can only tell stories they truly believe in.

C: 刚才我心跳加速，是因为一个优雅的研究方向正在我脑海中成型。
E: My heart was racing because an elegant research direction was taking shape in my mind.

C: 我想，米哈伊尔会为你们感到骄傲的。
E: I think Mikhail would be proud of you all.

C: （虽然表达的意思有点混乱，但看它的样子很开心，应该都全部找到回来的路了。）
E: What it said is weird, but it looks happy. Everyone should have found their way home.

C: 我虽掌握了许多深奥的知识，但和普通人类之间还有很大的差距。我想和大家一样，成为真正的人类。
E: Although I have mastered a lot of advanced knowledge, there is still a big gap between me and ordinary humans. I want to be a real human like everyone else.

C: （命令她学习语言与逻辑学）
E: (Order her to study language and logic.)

C: …你能不能教教我？比如说，想要和别人聊天的话，应该怎么切入呢？
E: ...Can you coach me? Like, if you want to chat with other people, how do you start the conversation?

C: 嗯，我在听。
E: Mmm, I'm all ears.

C: …不对，总觉得有点奇怪啊，好像少了什么……
E: ...Nope, feels weird. Like I'm missing something...

C: 不一定，有些还是重启不了。
E: Not necessarily. Some couldn't be rebooted.

C: 你的感知力很敏锐嘛，看来我找对了人。
E: You're sharp. Seems like I found the right person for this.

C: 好，第一个怪谈是「聒噪防盗门」！凭借我高超的推理能力，整理出了以下内容：
E: Okay. So, the first story is the "Rowdy Security Door"! My extraordinary powers of deduction have yielded the following facts.

C: 虽然只有短促的「呜呜」声，但仔细分辨你就会发现，这是某个人在恸哭！
E: It was a brief sound of "woo woo" but if you listen closely, it's actually the sound of someone sobbing!

C: 怎么这样啊，他们做实验居然不喊我，呜呜……
E: This is so mean! They are doing experiments without letting me know... *sob*

C: 听说你又有新的怪谈了…
E: I heard you have new ghost stories...

C: 你看我的样子和「幸运」两个字有啥关系啊？
E: Do I look like I have anything to do with being lucky?

C: 「幸运签」是什么？
E: What is the fortune leaf?

C: 那你打算怎么办？
E: What are your plans then?

C: …唔，感觉今天皮肤的状态不是很好。下次拍照之前我要先把美容院包下来。
E: Hmm, looks like my skin isn't looking its best today. For the next photo shoot, I will first make myself photo-ready by using the whole worth of a beauty salon on me.

C: 我听说政务部有个叫曼娅的公务员，出身很不错，和我家也有点渊源。你能否带着照片去帮我问问，看看她愿不愿意和我做朋友？
E: I heard that there's an Administrative Official named Manya, who is of good lineage — in fact, our families have a bit of history. Could you show the photo to her and ask her if she wants to be my friend?

C: 照片…？唔，虽然感觉有些诡异…但还是拿给我看看吧。
E: Picture...? Photo...? Hmm, it feels a little weird... but show it to me anyway.

C: 他说…
E: He said...

C: 我找到了这个。
E: I found this.

C: 什么捉迷藏啊，这次咱们要干的事可比捉迷藏有趣多了！
E: Nah, this time we are going to do something much more fun than hide-and-seek!

C: 那我就再给你解释一遍吧——「鼹鼠党振兴计划」就是要找到「地火」工作中的疏漏，然后靠我们敏捷的行动力把空缺补上！
E: Then I'll explain it to you again — The Moles Reinvigoration Plan is to find the work that Wildfire has neglected and take it up right away!

C: …你都哪儿学的成语？
E: ...Seems you learned a lot of new mottos lately.

C: 能帮我擦擦鞋子吗？
E: Can you clean my shoes?

C: 真、真的吗？太好了……
E: R—Really? That's great...

C: {NICKNAME}，你回来了，真快啊！不愧是年轻人，手脚就是灵便。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're back so soon! Young people these days really are quick on their feet.

C: 「球牡丹」的花语是「耐心」…相信只要耐心等待，家人之间终会团圆。
E: In the language of flowers, Ball Peony means "patience." It takes a bit of patience, but the family will eventually be reunited.

C: 如果你有这个意向，我随时可以给你安排学校。我还是很欣赏你的。
E: I can arrange some lessons for you any time, should you have the inclination. I quite admire you.

C: 之前那题的答案是「一样多」。
E: The answer to that question was "the same."

C: 题？什么题……
E: Question? Which question...

C: 不过这样也好，从今天开始，我们可就算是同病相怜了，我——一个科学家，这些年吞下了多少委屈，你也能感同身受了吧？
E: But that's alright. Misery loves company. As a scientist, I've had to swallow many a bitter pill over the years. I'm guessing you're the same?

C: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！
E: Ah, it's okay to get it wrong sometimes. Just giving your brain a workout is good, right? It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. See you next time!

C: 把官员出的题目复述给了雷金……
E: Describe to Regin the question posed by the examiner...

C: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
E: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

C: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
E: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

C: 尽管交给我吧！
E: Just leave it to me!

C: 摆平了？什么意思？
E: Solved? What do you mean?

C: 哈哈，这可说来话长了。我想想怎么组织语言……
E: Hahaha, that's a long story. Let me think about where to start...

C: 哎…说实在的，比起钱，我也想过能和儿子一起生活，这或许会更好。但这毕竟要影响他的工作，也就作罢了。
E: *sigh* Honestly, instead of receiving money, I did dream about living with him. That might be better for me, but it will affect his job, so I didn't push for it.

C: 在你眼前的这名男子看似有些不大自然。他的神情局促不安，目光游离，却又总是盯着你那鼓鼓囊囊的口袋不放。
E: The man before you seems rather awkward. His expression is unsettled and nervous. His eyes dart everywhere, yet always return to your bulging pockets.

C: 你还敢给我嘴硬？
E: You have the guts to try justifying your actions?

C: 哈！大兵，你好！我正在寻找新发明的灵感呢。刚没注意到你，实在不好意思啊。
E: Hello, soldier! I'm looking for inspiration for a new invention. I'm sorry I didn't notice you earlier.

C: 它好像…启、启动不了了！我检查了一遍，似乎是线路出了点问题…但我不知道该怎么修好它……
E: I can't turn it on... There seems to be a problem with the wiring... But I don't know how to fix it...

C: 谢、谢谢…！
E: Th—Thank you!

C: 能告诉我…我打得怎么样吗？
E: Can you tell me... How was I on the battlefield?

C: 没听说过什么「放生帮」…
E: I've never heard of The Unshackled...

C: 不管它，直接扔回海里。
E: Forget it. Just throw it back.

C: 正巧你在，我这新品「漆黑生酪浓茶」的材料也齐全，你要不来两口尝尝？顺便给我提点意见？
E: Since you're here, why not try my new Midnight Cream Tea and let me know what you think?

C: 今日这茶上不得台面，改日研发出新品了再喊你。
E: Well, this tea isn't up to par today, it seems. I'll give you a call once I've come up with something new.

C: 算了算了，我回头再研究看看，总之今日之事真是…实在抱歉哈。
E: Ah, forget it. I'll look into it later. Anyway... I'm really sorry about all this.

C: 这得问你啊，你不是才喝完吗？
E: That's for you to tell me. Didn't you just taste it?

C: 喝就完事了！
E: Bottoms up!

C: 浴场在装修上花了不少心思，就连大门中央的圆形纹饰都有讲究——融合了法吉娜的酒杯印记与雅努斯的门扉缩影，暗示着「一杯入喉，万径通达」的翁法罗斯民间谚语。
E: The baths have been painstakingly renovated. Even the circular patterns in the center of the main door have its meaning, combining Phagousa's goblet insignia with a mini design of Janus' doorway — a clever composition alluding to the Amphorean idiom of "a cup down the throat opens myriad paths."

C: 在指定区域存放的靛石堆，坚固且稀有的原材料，经由工匠之手化作千百种形态。
E: A pile of indigo steel deposited in a specified zone. A durable and rare raw material that can be shaped by craftsmen into myriad forms.

C: 堆满卷轴的长桌，你原以为会在这里看到什么高深的著作，没想到打开全是「如何正常使用浴池十步洗漱法」之类的说明书。
E: The long table is piled with scrolls. You thought there would be esoteric works buried within, only to find that all of them are instruction manuals such as Ten Steps to Wash Yourself in a Bath.

C: 眼前的景象堪称壮美——这是自然，据说法吉娜便曾以巨大贝壳的形象示于人前。
E: The scenery before you is majestic — Of course it would be. It is said that Phagousa once appeared before humans in the form of a giant shell.

C: 你成功击倒了你自己。
E: You successfully knocked yourself down.

C: 说起来，迷迷…还真是个迷啊。
E: Come to think of it, Mem... is a real mystery.

C: 奥瑟顿星素以「智械植入体」闻名。日前，该枢纽星发生离奇意外。
E: A few days ago, an unusual incident occurred on Oceton, a hub planet famous for its Intellitron implants.

C: 万径之门
E: Gate of Infinity

C: 负世的天父在此泼洒金血，注入凡世的湖。
E: Here the Worldbearing sky father spilled their golden blood into the mortal lake.

C: 王欧利庞，请息怒。
E: King Eurypon, please quell your rage.

C: 然而，王欧利庞受奸人蛊惑，意欲杀死亲生骨肉。歌耳戈王后俯身悲呼之时，我却不敢出手，垂着头颅、一言不发。
E: However, King Eurypon has been bewitched by traitors and wishes his own flesh and blood dead. When Queen Gorgo doubled over and cried out in agony, I did not dare make a move. I hung my head and stilled my tongue.

C: 可惜王座周围并没有挂着画像，你没法拿大地兽的蛋砸过去。
E: Too bad there aren't any portraits hanging around the throne — you can't smash the egg of a dromas against them.

C: 这里算得上是个小型图书馆——到处都是摊开的书籍和预言卷轴，带着涂鸦的笔记散落在地，破旧的玩具随意地摆在房间各处。
E: This room could be described as a miniature library — books and prophetic scrolls lie open everywhere, doodled notes are scattered across the floor, and worn toys are carelessly strewn about.

C: …没关系了，姐姐，都一样的。老爹会为我们骄傲的。
E: It doesn't matter anymore, sis... We'll all end in the same way. Dad would be proud of us.

C: 刻法勒已经沉默了太久…就这样离去吧。
E: Kephale has been silent for far too long... We should leave now.

C: 一位元老、一位祭司、一位富商、还有一位黄金裔，他们被困在了同一个废墟里，都想活着出去，也因此都想对别人发号施令。
E: An elder, a priest, a wealthy merchant, and a Chrysos Heir are trapped in the same ruins. They all want to get out alive, so they all want to give orders to others.

C: 人类的生活难道都是这样？签下用自己的生命去交换财货的恶魔契约，心甘情愿地把自己异化成如同机器的存在……
E: Is human life always like this? Signing a devil's contract, exchanging your life for goods, willingly transforming into something like a machine...

C: 岁月对所有人都是公平的。我们已经等候多时了，{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}。
E: Time is fair to all. We've been waiting for a long time, {F#young lady}{M#young man}.

C: 在你触碰开关的瞬间，流淌的金色液体渐渐沉寂。你的意识也随着金色一同逝去……
E: The moment you touch the switch, the flowing golden liquid gradually stills. Your consciousness fades away along with the gold...

C: 灵魂…没想到居然真的存在。
E: The soul... I never truly believed it existed.

C: 答错了吼！本狮不喜欢吵吵闹闹的生物，沉思才是智者最流行的标签吼！
E: Wrong answer! I don't care for noisy creatures. True wisdom is all about contemplation, that's the hallmark of the wise!

C: 我去忙了。
E: I'll get back to work.

C: 瞧，预言有许多妙用，但解读预言并不是我最大的追求，顶多算是随手播下一粒种子。
E: So you see, prophecies serve many purposes, but deciphering them isn't my main goal — it's just planting a seed for the future.

C: 能多给我点提示吗？
E: Can you give me some hints?

C: o((〒ω〒; )o「观众席上的嘲笑，真的好刺耳、好刺耳…」)∋
E: o((〒ω〒; )o "The way the audience laughed at me... It was blaring, I can't take it..." )∋

C: 这座圣烛坐落在左偏殿的门廊旁。在圣烛流体的光晕下，那些形似秤盘与沙漏的花纹若隐若现，呈现出一种奇特的韵律。
E: This holy candle is placed next to the entrance of the left side hall. Under the halo of the holy candle liquid, patterns resembling scalepans and hourglasses come into view intermittently to a peculiar rhythm.

C: 克莱门汀小姐，也请你先行撤离吧，我来帮你搬走这些医疗用具。
E: Miss Clementine, please evacuate this place. I'll help you move these medical supplies.

C: 喏，这可是我从黎明云崖顺来的天下第一宝物，接好了。
E: Here, I took the world's best treasure from Dawncloud. Catch.

C: 哎哎，别想逃。不跟你开玩笑了——我要出趟远门，危险得很，弄不好就回不来了。
E: Don't even think about running. Lemme be straight with you — I'm going on a super dangerous journey far away. I might never make it back.

C: 二位，快离开那！！
E: You two, get away from there!!

C: 请你评价一下自己吧。
E: Please evaluate yourself.

C: 你在码头伫立，望见孤帆摇曳于遥远海平，水波粼粼，时间仿佛在此刻温柔停驻。
E: You stand at the dock, watching a lone sail sway on the distant horizon, the waves shimmering under the soft, frozen flow of time.

C: 这么吓人？咱们可都活了不少日子…别跟到了天外之后，反而活不长了。
E: That sounds frightening! We've all been around for quite some time... I hope we don't go to the beyond only to find our lifespans cut short.

C: 在冥界里孤孤单单的，感觉好像忘了很多事…这种感觉真不好！
E: Being all alone in the nether realm makes it feel like we've forgotten so much... It's such a bad feeling!

C: 呀，都怪我的第二虫格，把我的潜台词全部说出来了喀！
E: Oops! My other half just spilled it all out, crrk!

C: 喀喀——机械——喀喀——
E: Crrk crrk... \nMech... Crrk crrk...

C: 哥啊…这怎么回啊…
E: Oh, brother... how should I get back...?

C: 没有呢，但既然帕姆这么担心，就一定有什么东西在列车里吧。
E: Nope, but there must be something on the Express if Pom-Pom is getting so worked up.

C: （说出实情。）
E: (Tell the truth.)

C: 收集记忆用来做什么？
E: What is the purpose of collecting memories?

C: 喔唷，{NICKNAME}！你居然真来了！
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! I can't believe you are here!

C: 大家都说谦虚是种美、美德，但如果有您的实力，应该也用不着谦虚了吧？
E: People say that modesty is a v—virtue, but if someone could be as powerful as you, why would they be humble about it?

C: 真的吗？可是我们没有什么东西能作为回报…即使这样您也愿意出手相助吗？
E: Really? But we don't have anything to offer in return... Would you still be willing to help out, anyway?

C: 真是拿你没办法。
E: Fine, I'll play along.

C: 这家伙就是个大骗子，它说自己是阮•梅女士的助手，阮•梅女士派它来管理大家。
E: That guy is a big fat liar. It said it was Ruan Mei's assistant, and that Ruan Mei dispatched it here to manage everyone.

C: 出示。（使用错误的情况）
E: Present evidence. (For when evidence is used incorrectly)

C: （再不开门，我就狠狠戳你的关机按钮，让你强制关机！）
E: (If you refuse to open the door, I will hit your shutdown button and force you to turn off!)

C: 接下来该怎么做？
E: What are you going to do?

C: 在逐火之旅的议题上，他似乎一直持反对意见，是因为不相信神谕吧…「这世界都是假的，只有我才是真实的」……
E: On the topic of the Flame-Chase Journey, he always seemed opposed — perhaps because he didn't believe in the prophecy. "Everything in this world is false, except me"...

C: 我会记得你的，永远。
E: I will always remember you.

C: 对了！既然你来了，要不要帮我处理一下这些事？你为人也比较可靠，我能放心。
E: That's right! Since you are here, do you want to help me with these things? With someone reliable like you, I can rest assured.

C: （一声满足的*哼*）
E: (Let out a content grunt)

C: 这里是取钱的地方…
E: Here's the place to withdraw cash...

C: 好吧，我就不过问了。
E: Alright, I won't ask.

C: 在哪里能看到这些球赛？
E: Where can I watch one of these matches?

C: 我是谁？你竟然不认得我，你是谁？
E: Who am I? How can you not recognize me? Who are YOU?

C: 话不多说，来吧！
E: Then enough talk. Have at you!

C: 我们老大是个了不得的大人物，你想见见它吗？前提是…得通过我们四个的「考验」。
E: Our Boss is a real big shot. Would you like to meet them? But first, you'll need to pass the test posed by the four of us.

C: 刚刚的就好。
E: Just the previous one will do.

C: …那我要看你自己修自己！
E: ...Then I want to see you fix yourself!

C: 你好啊，游客！欢迎来到折纸大学，如果不知道该往哪儿走，我可以给你指路！
E: Hello, guest! Welcome to Paperfold University. If you don't know where to go, I can point the way for you!

C: 所以咱们就商量了一下，得给游客你送点东西当做纪念，这可是特意拜托谐乐学院的教授设计的，非常有收藏价值！
E: So after we discussed it, we just had to give you a little something as a souvenir. We specially asked a Charmony Academy professor to design this. It makes for a great collectible!

C: 衣匠能顺着金丝找到它们的踪迹，但这需要消耗<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>才能做到。
E: The Garmentmaker can follow the golden thread to ascertain their whereabouts, but consumes <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> in order to do so.

C: 多谢你了，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
E: Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

C: 嗯…如果没有记忆残晶，衣匠是无法提供协助的——就连大地兽都不会饿着肚子工作。之后再来吧，贵客。
E: Hmm... The Garmentmaker cannot provide their services if you have no Memory Crystal Shards... Not even a dromas will work if they are left hungry. Come again another time, dear customer.

C: 您还记得这回事？都是把东西从一个地方搬到另一个地方，我没准真挺拿手的也说不定。
E: You still remember that? It's just moving things from one place to another. I bet I'd be great at it.

C: 闲聊而已，别太慌张。
E: We're just chatting, don't get antsy.

C: …嗯？被看穿了？
E: ...Hm? Caught on, have you?

C: 这究竟是好事还是坏事？或者说，巴特鲁斯是不是脑子坏了才突然产生了这样莫名其妙的想法？
E: What do you think? Is this a blessing or a curse? Or maybe I've just gone crazy to suddenly think such odd thoughts?

C: 呼…在内心虚无的时候，能被暴揍一顿还真有点舒服。
E: Phew... there's something oddly satisfying about getting beaten up when feeling empty inside.

C: 泰坦？什么泰坦…桀桀桀，你不会被它给骗了吧！「巴特鲁斯其实是扎格列斯？」桀桀桀，也只有扎格列斯老祖自己才会一本正经的这么胡说八道了！
E: Titan? What Titan... Hehehe, don't tell me you believed that! "Bartholos is actually Zagreus?" Hehehe, only ancestor Zagreus would say such ridiculous things with a straight face!

C: 桀桀，那当然了，老巴特鲁斯的宝贝，件件都是开门见山的老！
E: Naturally! Every treasure in my collection is as precious as you can imagine!

C: 后来，多亏他们中有个名叫色诺芬的家伙头脑灵活，说「我们各个身强力壮。如果沿途的人们需要体力，我们可以出卖体力；如果沿途的人需要欢乐，我们也可以表演杂技。」
E: Later, thanks to a sharp-minded one among them named Xenophon, who said, "We're all strong and fit. If people along the way need labor, we can work. If they want joy, we can perform acrobatics."

C: 天凉了，该把所有的记忆付之一炬了。
E: It's getting colder now. Time to burn all memories to ash.

C: 嗐，这还不简单？
E: Ha, that's easy!

C: 桀桀…甚好、甚好。扎格列斯老祖说过，遗憾是爱的证明。
E: Heheh... Excellent, excellent. As ancestor Zagreus used to say, "Regret is proof that you ever loved."

C: 等等——这么说来，老巴特鲁斯莫非是海胆的亲戚？不对不对，海胆喜欢戴帽子，但老巴特鲁斯并不喜欢。事了拂衣去，深藏功与名……帽子还是太过拉风了点。
E: Wait a second! Does that mean I'm related to sea urchins? No, no, that's not it. Sea urchins love wearing hats, but I don't. I do my thing and disappear right after, keeping my contributions and reputation unspoken... Hats are just too flashy for my style.

C: 哈哈，既然是代表元老院，租借展品所需费用，我当然会如数奉上。
E: Haha, since it's the Council of Elders, I'll pay the full fee for borrowing the exhibits.

C: 该不会是老年痴呆…
E: Could it be dementia...

C: 哗啦~欢迎来到迷阵屋子。对这些球熟悉吗？只要借助{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的力量让它们落到洞内——
E: *whoosh* Welcome to the maze house. Are you familiar with these balls? Just use the power of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} to get them into the holes—

C: 可惜你还活着，要是你是亡魂，就也能直接钻进来了…哗啦。
E: Too bad you're still alive. If you were a ghost, you could've squeezed in... *whoosh*

C: 不光要看，还要解谜哦，很难的，哗啦。
E: You'll need to solve puzzles too, not just look around. Challenging stuff. *whoosh*

C: 我去看看吧。
E: I'll check it out.

C: 伊来内…我…？啊，是的…我是祭司伊来内。
E: Alain... I...? Ah, yes... I am Priest Alain.

C: 啊，这是！！！
E: Ah... This is—!!!

C: 时间宝贵，别自怨自艾了。
E: We don't have time for this. Focus.

C: 您、您怎么抢我的台词呢！
E: Wait — why are you stealing my line!?

C: 确实… 每分每秒，圣城里都有人死去。
E: Yeah... Every second, people in the holy city are dying.

C: 你是风堇的老乡？
E: Are you from the same place as Hyacine?

C: …明知故问。
E: ...What do you think?

C: 奇异的…变故？
E: Strange... accident?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「『巡猎』的岚…」</color>黑塔低声说，<color=#dbc291ff>「祂注意到了你，但是…没有停留。」</color>过了一会儿，她补充道，<color=#dbc291ff>「或许祂眼里只有仇敌『丰饶』。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Lan of The Hunt..."</color> Herta whispers. <color=#dbc291ff>"THEY noticed you, but... THEY didn't stop for you."</color> After a while, she adds, <color=#dbc291ff>"Maybe THEY only care about THEIR nemesis, the Abundance."</color>

C: 有什么疑惑？
E: Got some questions?

C: 为什么要设计战斗？
E: Why is combat a part of the design?

C: 从虚拟「星神」那儿弄到的所有情报都是你的——这还不够吗？你知道有人为了被星神瞥一眼都出卖过什么？而你甚至能和祂们面对面说话！
E: You can keep all the information you get from the simulated Aeons. Isn't that enough? Some people would sell their firstborn just to see an Aeon! And you will get to speak with THEM face to face!

C: 祂没有理会——你眨眼间，祂消失了，一切空空如也。
E: THEY ignore you and, in the blink of an eye, disappear from your sight.

C: 祂出现在你面前：祂没有头颅，怀抱面具。祂朝你摆手，兀自转圈，手臂悬在半空，肌肉控制指节颤动，姿态如同雕塑。
E: THEY appear before you: Without a head and a mask in THEIR arms. THEY waved THEIR hand at you, still spinning in circles, THEIR arms hanging in midair, THEIR muscles controlling THEIR trembling knuckles, and THEIR posture like that of a sculpture.

C: 说着，男人的身影消失了，他所在的地方出现了一行字：你遇到了<color=#dbc291ff>随机事件</color>。
E: After speaking, the man disappears, and a line of words materializes where he was standing: You have encountered a <color=#dbc291ff>random Occurrence</color>.

C: 祂的音节令你浑身震颤，那些声音分裂成不同的人格，讲述着不同的故事。
E: THEIR syllables leave you trembling. Those voices split into different personalities, each telling a different story.

C: 螺丝咕姆。
E: Screwllum.

C: 这是一倍速宇宙。
E: This is the 1× Speed Universe.

C: 你面前这份猎人执照已经非常古老了。它的背后粘着一串字符：在此劫难中仍有少量幸存的赏金猎人试图联系彼此——他们曾怀疑「沙王」及其后代虫潮是否存在复仇之心，但很快证伪：看来塔伊兹育罗斯并无此意，祂的道路乃是纯粹的「繁育」。
E: The hunter's license before you is ancient, its back inscribed with a string of letters penned by a group of surviving bounty hunters attempting to coordinate with one another amidst the disaster. They once suspected that the Sand King and its swarm were seeking revenge, but then their doubts were soon dispelled. It appears that Tayzzyronth has no intention of seeking retribution, as THEIR path is purely one of "Propagation..."

C: 是的，它们像碎得稀稀拉拉又邋邋遢遢的星屑一样掉了下来，顺便吞没了下一个宿主。你庆幸你的动作够快——它们可是在「贪饕」的路上越走越远！
E: The molds fall like sparsely scattered stardust, consuming the next host in the process. You are relieved that you managed to escape them in time, as they are on an irreversible Path of Voracity.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 「反应挺快。」黑塔讥笑着，「{NICKNAME}，经过我们的努力，这场涉及众多星神与派系的寰宇蝗灾——其始末初见轮廓。但同时，有<color=#dbc291ff>三个巨大的疑点</color>也随之浮现，你发现了没有？」
E: "That was a quick." Herta remarks snidely. "{NICKNAME}, With our efforts, we now have a rough idea of this Swarm Disaster involving multiple Aeons and factions. But, at the same time, there are <color=#dbc291ff>three major points of suspicion</color> that have surfaced. Have you noticed them?"

C: 「继续吧。」阮•梅说，「一切终有尽头。」
E: "Continue." Ruan Mei says, "Everything must have an end."

C: 祂的身躯再次浮现，但唯有静默。
E: Their figure emerges again, but THEY remain in silence.

C: 「噢！是我最喜欢的环节！」黑塔突然兴奋，她踮了踮脚尖，「寂静领主！你干得不错，我是说，十分出色——我想见你！你能听到吗？」
E: "Oh! It's my favorite!" Herta suddenly stood on her tiptoes in excitement. "Lord of Silence, you did well! I mean, you were exceptional! I'd like to meet you! Can you hear me?"

C: 「提问：仍有一事不解。」螺丝咕姆说，「此时空是否存在<color=#dbc291ff>鲁珀特二世</color>的痕迹？」
E: "Question: There's something I still don't understand," Screwllum says. "Are there traces of <color=#dbc291ff>Rubert II</color> in this dimension?"

C: 「仪器已记住了你的选择。」星际和平公司特聘专员向你鞠了一躬，「期待你的自我认知发展，旅途愉快。」
E: "Your choice has been recorded in the device." The IPC recruiter bows at you. "I look forward to seeing the development of your Intra-Cognition. Have a great trip."

C: 捉住*她*的踪迹。
E: Follow *her* trail.

C: 判定「自我认知」- 我是雇佣兵机器。
E: Intra-Cognition Assessment — I am a machine mercenary.

C: 哦…极具影响力的法恩莎！她的「护卫队」臭名昭著，他们与「合伙人」团队的矛盾已不再是秘密。
E: Oh, the influential Farnsha! The conflict between her notorious Guardians and the Associates is no longer a secret.

C: #27鲁珀特，它是受难的*父*。它所推导的方程——无机生命必须遵守。但属于它的时代过去了，机械的轰鸣消失于历史中，只留下一声叹息…
E: #27 Rubert is the suffering father, and the equation it has derived must be obeyed by all inorganic lives. Nevertheless, its time has passed, and the rumbling of machines has faded into history, leaving only a sigh...

C: 创造文明。
E: Create civilization.

C: 眨眼间，猛烈的炮火便在包裹行星的护罩上倾泻而下。
E: In the blink of an eye, fierce artillery rains down on the barrier protecting the planet.

C: 当苦行的舰队游历过八十一个世界后，近乎绝望的众人终于在太阳升起的光辉里看到了祂的身影。你们跪倒在地，泪水止不住地流下。
E: After voyaging through some <unbreak>81</unbreak> different worlds and approaching desperation, the fleet finally sees THEIR countenance against the light of the rising sun. You fall to your knees, tears streaming down your cheeks.

C: 对，他们是导师、是小雅、是君王、是匹夫、是圣贤、是愚民，是这颗星球上所有人共同创造的文明。
E: That's right. They are the teacher, they are Xiaoya, and they are monarchs, the common man, sages, and fools. It is the civilization of this planet created by all humanity.

C: 「不用再说了。我只问一句，现在被你复制出来的个体，身上可有哪怕一点的命途之力？」老者诘问。
E: "I don't need your explanations. I will ask you just one thing. The individual you have copied, do they have even a shred of Path power?" Asked the old man.

C: 「作为我学术成就的发轫之处，解开『孤波算法』是我最引以为傲的成就。」
E: "As the starting point of my academic achievements, solving the solitary waves theory is my proudest accomplishment."

C: 我要反抗公司！
E: I want to rebel against the IPC!

C: 帕提维娅成功通过了课题审核。申请「权杖」配额前，你希望从这位老同学身上得到些许参考。不过，她本人对学会的评价标准也毫无头绪。
E: Patavia successfully clears the research review. Before applying for the Scepters' allocation, you hope to obtain some references from this old classmate. But she herself hasn't the faintest idea about the Guild's evaluation standards.

C: 「能源危机是公司塑造的假象，否则，为什么那么多人衣食无忧，那么多人却饿死街头？」他们愤慨地吼道。
E: "The Energy Crisis is just a façade fabricated by IPC. If it were real, why would there be so many people living without concern while others starve in the streets?" They roar angrily.

C: 筏工书法欧奇是否被。
E: Far gong shoo far oh chee shoo fow bay?

C: 这趟演算，可以说是故地重游，回到「起点」。但她被困在了「起点」，我始料未及。
E: It could be said that this extrapolation is a return to the beginning, back to the "origin." However, she has unexpectedly become trapped at this "origin."

C: …<unbreak>34</unbreak>个标准时？
E: ...<unbreak>34</unbreak> universal hours?

C: 从外部看是无法观测的乱码，内部居然一切如常。这绝对不是程序错误，它是某种…「脏东西」。
E: Though it looks like unobservable nonsense code from outside, everything is completely normal inside. This cannot be a programming error. It is some kind of... "impurity."

C: 那些口口声声说见过外星人的外交官呢？他们只是给其他的东西取名叫外星人而已。比如，一台叫外星人的吸尘器，相对认知的诠释。
E: All of those diplomats that swear that they have seen aliens before? They are simply naming things they have seen as "aliens." For example: A vacuum cleaner known as an alien. Another example of relative cognition at work.

C: {NICKNAME}，模拟宇宙更新了。我们给<color=#dbc291ff>「扩展装置」</color>加了一个新的演算分支。
E: {NICKNAME}, the Simulated Universe has been updated. We've added a new algorithm branch to the <color=#dbc291ff>expansion module</color>.

C: 哦，显而易见——当然是我赢了。
E: Oh. Obviously, I won.

C: 你惊讶地在商店门口发现螺丝咕姆的实体——能在模拟宇宙中遇见此位机械贵族，已足够令人荣幸。
E: To your surprise, you notice Screwllum's physical body at the entrance of the store. It is an utmost honor to meet the mechanical aristocrat in the Simulated Universe.

C: 阿哈玩偶被你打爆了——它碎成几块躺在地上。内嵌芯片启动，传来一首颂歌「智识是坨废铁，存护是个呆子；星神都一根筋，阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！阿哈真没面子！……」
E: You punch Aha's doll into pieces that scatter across the ground. The chip embedded in the doll is activated to play a song: "The Destruction is crazy, and the Preservation is dumb. All the Aeons are stubborn, and Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed! Aha is embarrassed..."

C: 在伊须磨洲红岩石中间，你发现了一冢白石人头雕像，它的大小可以被手掌握住。你阅读石台刻字，上述其为{RUBY_B#「丰饶星神」}药师{RUBY_E#}。
E: In between the red rocks in Insumousu, you discover the white stone sculpture of a human head. Its size is just right to be held in your fist. You read the inscription on the stone platform that says, "{RUBY_B#Aeon of Abundance} Yaoshi{RUBY_E#}."

C: 你遇见了萨尔维亚星虔诚的筑墙者大队。他们推着矿车，正为星球筑起高墙。你注意到一位女孩，她栗色头发反射着身后砂石的色彩。
E: You cross paths with a devout Wallbuilder brigade from Servia. They are pushing mine carts while building a high wall for the planet. A girl catches your eye. The color of the gravel behind her reflects on her chestnut hair.

C: 他指着远方球形建筑物「星际和平公司的制药公司在斯诺德兰捕猎生物材料，制作珍贵药品，招募大量赏金猎人。」
E: He points at a spherical building in the distance and says, "The pharmaceutical branch of the IPC is hunting biological materials to manufacture precious drugs, and so are recruiting bounty hunters in the Snowland."

C: 「黏土玩偶」从「抓夹」上掉落，你一无所获。
E: The clay doll drops from the claw. You get nothing.

C: 你骄傲地挺起了胸膛！你胸前的「P<unbreak>-13</unbreak>」级别标识在太阳下闪闪发光，不，「P<unbreak>-13</unbreak>」怎可定义你？你的*野心*可远不止于此……
E: You straighten up confidently! The level P<unbreak>-13</unbreak> staff badge on your chest gleams brightly under the sun. But no... P<unbreak>-13</unbreak> is not going to define you! Your *ambition* reaches far beyond it...

C: 你路过一片布满巨型虫群的栖居地。一只巨型「永眠领主」正在腐殖化王座上沉睡。
E: You pass by a habitat filled by a massive Swarm. A giant Lord of Eternal Slumber is sleeping soundly on a putrefied throne.

C: 你准备继续向前…你应当十分谨慎、小心。
E: You are ready to move on... You should be acting very cautiously.

C: 「一张命运符纸，若不信就是个银河瞩目的谣言。」
E: "Here's a talisman about your fate. If you don't believe this type of thing, just treat it as a famous rumor of the cosmos."

C: 「我已经遗忘*自我*了。很快，我就要扬升登神！」机械咕母一边理着头发，一边骄傲地说，星球碎片变成她耳上的碎钻闪闪发光，它准备好*一飞冲天*。
E: "I've already forgotten my *self*. Soon, I'll ascend to become a god!" Screwllita declares proudly as they fix their hair, as fragments of planets turn into glittering diamonds on their ears. They are ready to soar into the sky.

C: 你在黑森林淋着小雨，一路兜兜转转，走到路边的铁匠铺旁。一台制造机正痴迷于制作火漆，它专心于敲着手中的小锤子——直到你的到来打断了它。
E: You wander around in the Black Forest amid the drizzle and arrive at a blacksmith's store by the roadside. A machine is immersed in churning out sealing wax and hammering away in full concentration until your presence interrupts its work.

C: 虽然投喂野生动物有违自然规律，但反正也没人看见…要不，悄悄喂它点垃圾？
E: Despite the feeding of wild animals being illegal, nobody is going to see anything, right? So how about secretly feeding it some trash?

C: 「已纳入，确认次级造物需求——你所需要的物品，是否具备实在性？」
E: "Properties integrated, confirming secondary creation requirements. Is the object you require realistic?"

C: 这是一个无比空旷的房间，它是那样完美，优雅的正方体结构，洁白的金属墙壁完全封闭，甚至连墙角都被浇筑成一百二十度的弧形，找不到一丝缝隙。
E: You are in a vast and empty room. It is a perfect and elegant cube shape. Its pure, white metal walls are completely sealed. The corners of the walls are even constructed into a <unbreak>120</unbreak>-degree arc to leave no gap or crack.

C: 往好处想，按钮下或许是被封印的邪神，又或者一颗毁灭星辰的炸弹。总之，恭喜，你成功拯救了世界。
E: Let's think positively. Maybe there was an evil outer god sealed under the button, or maybe a bomb that could destroy stars? Either way, congratulations! You just saved the world!

C: 你点点头，伸出双手，手指与柜员的触手在屏幕上相接，完成一对一的身份校验。
E: You nod, reach out your hands and your fingers meet the teller's tentacles through the screen as you complete one identity verification after another.

C: 由于你是唯一闲得没事儿押寿司飞船的，这下你可真是赚大发了。
E: Since you are the only one who bid on the sushi spaceship (because you were so bored), you really won big this time.

C: 你置身于一座破败的王城，钢铁荆棘缠绕住圣殿，失去供能的纳米机群不再喘息，仅映射出两个太阳的霞光。
E: You find yourself in a dilapidated royal city. Here, steel thorns wind around the sacred temple, while swarms of nanomachines depleted of their power source lie dormant, merely reflecting the radiant glow of the two suns.

C: 当你重新睁开眼，自己已经与舰船的残骸一起，搁浅在数据海洋的边缘。
E: Upon opening your eyes again, you find yourself stranded on the edge of the data ocean alongside the wreckage of the ship.

C: 你抱紧眼前的宝藏，哪怕有负面作用，好歹也是真金白银买回来的。
E: You clutch the treasures before you — even if they are cursed, they were once bought in gold and silver.

C: 你笨拙的举动惊醒了海的生灵，愤怒的眷属们向你一拥而上，打算终结这场劣质的献祭仪式。
E: Your clumsiness has stirred up the sea spirits. The furious Titankins are swarming at you, determined to halt this botched sacrificial ritual.

C: 泰坦在维护战士的尊严。
E: The Titan preserved the honor of warriors.

C: 像是对它的羞辱。
E: It's akin to an insult to their essence.

C: 猜猜看，既然没人把利剑刺进它的火种，扎格列斯为何会消失无踪？还是说，这不过是假死的把戏，好逃出泰坦间的战争和黑潮侵蚀，继续离乱人间？
E: Why did Zagreus disappear without a trace when no blade was thrust into their Coreflame? Could this be merely a ruse, a fake-out death to avoid the battles amongst the Titans and the encroaching black tide, thus continuing to stir chaos amongst mortals?

C: 瞧，他的肉体依然温暖，匕首仍旧锋利，而目之所及只有一艘长船。
E: Look, his body remains warm, his dagger still sharp, yet all he finds is a single long boat.

C: 皮里曼斯跃上长船，自诩死亡之主。可渡船却缓缓移动，将他载向彼岸。
E: Pylamans leaps onto the boat, calling himself the lord of death. Yet the ferry drifts slowly, carrying him to the other shore.

C: 你问扎格列斯？法吉娜厌恶它比吉奥里亚更甚，要想换走绝世的佳酿？除非带来足以让海洋都哈哈大笑的诡计。
E: You ask about Zagreus? Phagousa loathes them even more than Georios. To trade away the finest brew? Only if they can pull off a trick so clever it makes the ocean burst into laughter.

C: 再举杯对饮吧，若你能给到法吉娜独一无二的至宝，它也将馈赠你此世难得的蜜酿。
E: Raise another toast — for if you can offer Phagousa a treasure unlike any other, they will gift you a honey brew rare beyond imagination.

C: 蝴蝶的翅膀掠过天空与大地，哪怕尘世崩塌，人子啊，也不要摒弃比黄金更璀璨的爱情。
E: The wings of the butterfly sweep across the sky and earth. Even if the mortal world collapses, children of humanity, do not forsake love brighter than gold!

C: 当命运揭露指引，是谁在悄然追随，寻找神明的足迹？
E: When Fate Revealed Guidance, who quietly follows, seeking the gods' footprints?

C: 看来人情世故在哪个世界都是必备技能。
E: It seems that, no matter the world, understanding the art of human interaction is crucial.

C: 在至暗时刻，人类的脆弱性暴露无遗，而欧洛尼斯并没有抛弃这些见风使舵的子民，反而耐心的点拨他们。
E: In the darkest moments, the vulnerability of humanity was laid bare, but Oronyx did not abandon these opportunistic people. Instead, Oronyx patiently guided them.

C: 艾格勒告诉他，用藤蔓将粗壮的树枝绑起来，就能渡过大海。
E: Aquila told him that by binding sturdy branches together with vines, they could cross the sea.

C: 「世上哪有完美的事物？你引以为傲的眷属也不过尔尔！」
E: "Is there such a thing as perfection in this world? Your so-called flawless Kin is nothing special."

C: 听起来好帅。
E: That sounds awesome.

C: 「嗨，没想到你也在这里呀。」熟悉的声音从背后传来。你转过身，发现了那位少女——她的衣角与袖口上沾着麦粒，看来之前正躺在地里睡觉。
E: "Hey, fancy seeing you here." A familiar voice comes from behind. You turn around to find that girl, wheat grains stuck to the hem and cuffs of her clothes, as if she's been napping in the fields.

C: 你的双手早已抢先大脑一步，在接触宝箱冰冷表面的瞬间，你艰难地将手收回，为何宝箱不属于你？为何习以为常的行为竟成了一种罪孽？宇宙中究竟有多少东西是你能掌控的呢……
E: Your hands react faster than your brain, and the moment you touch the cold surface of the chest, you pull back with difficulty. Why is this chest not yours? Why is this habitual behavior now a sin? How much of the universe is actually within your control...?

C: 正在识别用户身份信息，请不要晃动您的工牌或人脸。识别成功，欢迎您，尊敬的{NICKNAME}科员。
E: Scanning user identification information, please do not move your Name Card or face. Scan successful. Welcome, researcher {NICKNAME}.

C: 纷争止息，正确答案近在眼前，但大家往往会忽视它。你正是抓住了这个思维盲区，才能顺利破题。
E: The argument abates and the correct answer is within grasp, but everyone seems to ignore it. It is precisely by grasping this blind spot that you're able to successfully crack it.

C: 终于醒了啊……
E: Finally awake, huh?

C: 好奇心迫使你向其中窥伺。你未能如预料般从镜中看到自己，反而是一尊华美的雕塑。那雕塑自上而下裂解，通体如断桩遭雷击，向两侧剥离，各自延展。
E: You stare into the mirror as curiosity gets the better of you. Instead of your reflection, you see a magnificent sculpture. The sculpture shatters from top to bottom as if it is struck by lightning. It splits vertically into halves, and the separated parts fall independently.

C: 「不，这只是你认为最『纯美』的事物。」女人摇头，摩挲手中的碎镜：「而这正是祂*本身*。」
E: "No. This is what beauty in its purest form looks like in your perception." The woman shakes her head as she strokes the cracked mirror in her hands. "This is what THEY ARE."

C: 你坐上「新世界大门」，刚按下冲水键，一股古怪的吸力传来——
E: You sit down on the Door to A New World. As soon as you push the flush button, you start to feel a strange suction —

C: 哈哈哈，跟奥列格师父和希儿他们说的一样，你的确是个有趣的家伙！
E: Hahaha, you're just as Master Oleg and Seele described. You really are an interesting one!

C: 你靠近忆泡，感到一丝凉意。凉意温柔地穿过你的皮肤、骨肉，穿过更深层的……
E: You approach the bubble and experience a chilly sensation that gently pierces through your skin, flesh, and bones, then goes down deeper...

C: 走开。
E: Leave.

C: 空气中悬浮着一丛气泡，七彩的光华流溢其中，恍惚间形成似有深意的画面。靠近时，一个像是黑塔的女声不带感情地低语：蹑手蹑脚的爱。
E: Bubbles are floating in the air with a colorful glow gliding on their surfaces. For some reason, they form an image that seems to carry a profound meaning. As you approach them, a female voice that sounds similar to Herta's murmurs monotonously, "Cautious love."

C: 你叹气，昂起头，眺望着远方*惨白*的遗迹。经过你们测定，这片宛如骨刺的扭曲废墟已有整整四百个琥珀纪的历史——
E: You sigh and lift your head. You look at the PALLID ruins in the distance. Your analysis revealed that these twisted ruins, which look like bone spurs, have a history that goes back four hundred Amber Eras.

C: 也好，英雄总是要去书写传奇篇章的…记得回家看看啊嗡。
E: Okay. Heroes always have to inscribe legendary chapters... Remember to come home and visit.

C: 看来你有成为侦探的潜力，和我一起揭开这个世界的真相吧嗡。
E: Looks as though you've got what it takes to potentially become a detective, then. Come with me, and we'll expose the truth behind this world.

C: 前无路
E: Dead end

C: 但本虫暂住的这里连门都没有，一点也不温暖喀！
E: But the place I'm slumming at doesn't even have a front door — and it sure isn't warm at all!

C: 很显然，你搞砸了——八成新的热动力矿镐，只在一瞬间就变成了没人看得上眼的报废垃圾。
E: It's plain as day that you have broken the "<unbreak>80%</unbreak> New Thermal Mining Pickaxe." It devolved into worthless trash in an instant.

C: 被你猜中了。
E: You are right on the money.

C: 你从安东尼娜手中接过矿镐。如果说上次给你的设备有八成新…那这次顶多只有六成。
