E: You take the pickax from Antonia's hands. If the last piece of equipment was eighty-percent new... This one was just about sixty-percent new.

C: 看来你是真的缺钱…行吧，你再考虑考虑，我就在这儿等你。
E: Looks like you're really hard up for cash. Give it some thought. I'll be here waiting for you.

C: 那我们就收下了，朋友——这是你的钱，拿好。
E: We'll take it, friend. Here's your money.

C: ——是无比巨大的敌意散发出的恶臭。
E: It is the stench of an incomparable hostility.

C: 一股恶臭扑面而来。不是木头，不是锈蚀，也不是腐烂许久的食物——
E: A putrid smell rushes towards your face. It's not the smell of wood, rust, or food that has long gone bad.

C: 如果从宝箱里突然跳出龇牙咧嘴的裂界怪物还不能被称之为「不幸」…那你的价值观真的会被彻底颠覆。
E: If the ferocious Fragmentum monster that suddenly jumped out of the chest doesn't qualify as bad luck... then your values would be overturned.

C: 对茶水服务的评价：<color=#dbc291ff>不满意 / 一般 / 很满意</color>
E: Your rating for the tea: <color=#dbc291ff>Unsatisfied / Neutral / Very satisfied.</color>

C: 哦，哦哦！我懂，我懂！
E: Oh! Oh! I see. I see!

C: 房间里不时传来闷响。那是某种胶质硬物——很可能是某种球——砸在空心砖墙时特有的*砰*声。然后，那物体*咚*地落在木地板上，又骨碌骨碌地滚向房间深处。
E: You occasionally hear a muffled sound. It sounds like something hard and made of rubber — most likely some kind of ball. You hear a thunk that a ball would make hitting a hollow brick wall. Then there's a thud as it falls to the wood floor. The ball rolls quickly into the recesses of the room.

C: 喀喀——这就是虫的一生，一遍遍重复那些徒劳的事，一次次把石头推上陡坡……
E: Crrk crrk — That's the life of a bug: Repeating fruitless labors over and over again, rolling that stone up the hill over and over again...

C: 这便是「雅努斯秘径」的伟大之处。那些分散的终将连结为一，无论自愿与否……
E: That's the beauty of the "Janus's Hidden Passage." The separated will all eventually be connected into one, whether they like it or not...

C: 我怎么在这里…
E: How did I get here...?

C: 右边这棵。
E: The one on the right.

C: 在那位{RUBY_B#欧洛尼斯}岁月编织者{RUBY_E#}的帮助下，周围的空间会呈现相反的时空嘤。
E: With the help of the {RUBY_B#Oronyx}Weaver of Time{RUBY_E#}, the surrounding space will reflect an inverted timeline, eep.

C: 「之后是丈量大地的双腿」……
E: "Then, his legs that measured the earth"...

C: 啊——是啊！我也肩负着我家太太交付给我的使命呢。必须得启程了嗡！
E: Ah, right! I have a mission from my dear wife too. Time to get moving!

C: Zzz…唔，不小心打了个盹…我睡了多久？
E: Zzz... Huh? Dozed off for a sec... How long was I out?

C: 在这末世里，他们会共渡患难，还是大难临头各自飞呢？真想一探究竟嗡！
E: Now at doomsday, will they stick together through thick and thin... or flee in different directions when disaster strikes? I'd love to find out!

C: 我这样的鸟就不应该和生活硬碰硬，应该和生活达成和解。
E: A bird such as myself shouldn't confront life head-on. I should come to terms with life.

C: 几番考虑之后我决定裸辞，离开原本的生活轨迹。为了防止鹤运物流找上我，我还把追踪信号屏蔽了，以为这样做就已经自由了。
E: After giving it some thought, I decided to leave my job. I stepped off of my life path. To prevent Heron Express from finding me, I jammed my tracking beacon. I assumed that in doing so I would be free.

C: 人工智能崛起？你该不会说的是「金人谋反」吧，那是我出生以前的事了。你放心，云骑军绝不应许这样的事情发生。
E: An AI uprising? You aren't talking about the "Aurumaton Rebellion," are you? That happened before I was born. Take it easy. The Cloud Knights would never let something like that happen.

C: 也许这只是一个误会，但你不禁先入为主。随后你意识到你应该抛下这样无来由的成见，与它光明磊落地进行一次谈话。
E: Maybe it's just a misunderstanding, but first impression is the strongest. You then realize you should drop this kind of baseless prejudice and talk with the cycrane candidly.

C: 不摸了，再仔细看看就行。
E: Don't touch it, but take a good careful look.

C: 梓桥让我找你回去。
E: Ziqiao sent me to get you back.

C: 很简单，你来向我提问，<color=#dbc291ff>我可能只说真话、只说假话，或者说一句真话就会说一句假话。</color>
E: It's very simple. Just ask me questions. <color=#dbc291ff>I either can only tell the truth, can only tell lies, or must say a lie after a truth.</color>

C: 托蝶幻境的千年十佳，每一部我都把原始版、修复版、珍藏版、以及重制版全部都存着…其他的作品，只要是评分比较高的，我也都有备份。
E: I kept the original, backup, collectors' edition, and remastered versions for each Butterfly Immersia on the Millennium Top Ten list... And pretty much anything else that gets rated highly.

C: 我已经体会到你的痛苦了。
E: I've already gotten a taste of your pain.

C: 让我稍微考虑一下……
E: Let me think about it...

C: 仙舟大胃王挑战赛！
E: It's the Xianzhou Competitive Eater Championship!

C: 我参加！
E: I'm in!

C: 以及……
E: And...

C: 尽情提问吧，{NICKNAME}选手！老板我会知无不言，一一为你解答！
E: Ask away, {NICKNAME}! I'll tell you everything I know and answer your questions one-by-one!

C: 咦惹！你不会刚好很喜欢玩这种游戏吧？
E: Hmph! Don't tell me you absolutely love this kind of game?

C: 我来告诉你，你输定了！
E: Sorry to say, but you're gonna lose!

C: 不过，大家也觉得不能就这样好像什么也没有发生过…归根结底，就是想问问那个人，为什么要给物流机巧鸟加上智能。
E: But everyone still felt that they couldn't just act as if nothing had happened... In the final analysis, we just wanted to ask their designer why courier cycranes had been imbued with the gift of intelligence.

C: 我好像有份礼物在你那里。
E: I think you've got one of my gifts over there.

C: 没想到，还有这样的事情。
E: Well, that's something I didn't expect.

C: 我选的毕业课题打算让金人恢复灵智。当然并不是解除对他们的禁令，而是试着把人的神识与金人接上。越是心有灵犀，金人的动作就越精确，就像情侣一样，哈哈。
E: My thesis topic is to restore the intelligence of the aurumatons. Not to lift the ban on them, of course, but to try and connect human consciousness with aurumatons. The more in sync their minds are, the more precise the aurumatons' movements will be, just like a couple of sweethearts, haha.

C: 啊，这…看来你也不知道啊。
E: Hm... Looks like you don't know either.

C: 你说的笑话是什么？
E: What's the punchline?

C: 井盖下的热气无声无息，它的庇佑使所有寒气都从你身边逃离。
E: The hot steam from under the manhole cover is silent and unstirring. Its protection banishes all cold from around you.

C: 你想起了安眠于楼宇之上的三位无名客，方便的话，多回去和他们分享你的开拓之旅吧。
E: You suddenly remember the three Nameless resting atop the building. If you get time, you should go back and share stories of your trailblazing expedition with them more often.

C: 然后我就到了这里。
E: Then I found myself here.

C: 谁不是呢？我们鸢尾花，看起来多光鲜啊，大明星名歌手。
E: Tell me about it. Look at us in the Iris family. We all look like glamorous stars and famous singers...

C: 这可是真正的酒…
E: Now this is a real drink...

C: 我只是…厌倦了高处。
E: I'm just... tired of heights.

C: 该走了。
E: It's time to go.

C: 跳下去！
E: Jump down!

C: 愿祂的光芒永远照耀我们！
E: May THEIR light shine upon us forever!

C: 我要试试热水那边！
E: I want to try the hot water there!

C: 嗯，最近有所耳闻。
E: Yes, I've heard the news.

C: 感觉像在被艾格勒注视…
E: Feels like I'm being watched by Aquila...

C: 你的演技真的好浮夸…
E: Your acting is over the top...

C: 干吗一直复读…
E: Why are you repeating this?

C: 其他人怎么说？
E: What do other people think?

C: 嗯…有道理有道理，毕竟也是一株生命，就这样轻易放弃还是太草率了！
E: Mmm... makes sense. After all, it's a living thing, so chucking it out would be pretty rash!

C: 现在不行，等会儿可以。现在是帕姆的听歌放松时间。
E: Maybe later. Now is the time for me to listen to songs and unwind.

C: 帕姆不累，帕姆还要继续整理列车上的事务呢。
E: I'm fine. There are things on the Express that I need to handle.

C: 咱们这里什么都有，而且，这可不是随便什么人都能上来的！这是很宝贵的邀请！
E: We have everything here, and not everyone gets the opportunity to board the Express! That would be a precious invitation!

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，我已经做好准备了，接下来就辛苦你听一下规则吧！
E: Passenger {NICKNAME}, I'm ready. Now, please bear with me as I explain the rules to you!

C: 下次可以把那个叫佩佩的家伙叫过来，咱们比一比就知道了！诶不对…总感觉佩佩这个名字我听过。
E: You should invite Peppy over next time to see who's better! Wait a minute... The name rings a bell.

C: 诶，{NICKNAME}乘客就已经搞定了吗？呜…帕姆才刚刚开始做美梦呢！
E: Eh, {NICKNAME}, have you finished sprinkling already? Ugh... I've just started a nice dream!

C: 摇滚？那你可问对人了，我们乐队…啊不对，说到专辑的话，唔…恐怕不行。
E: Rock music? You've come to the right person. Our band... ah no. I'm afraid I can't help you.

C: 娜塔莎。
E: Natasha.

C: 史瓦罗和克拉拉。
E: Svarog and Clara.

C: …总之这件事你可不要告诉姬子帕，姬子身为列车的领航员，没有功劳也有苦劳，总要给她留几分薄面的……
E: ...Anyway, please don't mention any of this to Himeko. As the Express' navigator, she puts in a lot of work that goes unnoticed, so Pom-Pom tries to not be too hard on her.

C: 关于帕姆：帕姆的故事
E: About Pom-Pom: Pom-Pom's story

C: 待机中的物流机巧鸟已被激活，正在前往取货地点。
E: The express cycrane has been taken off standby, and is now heading toward the pick-up spot.

C: 禁区的铁卫已经布好了阵势，准备迎接你的挑战。
E: The Silvermane Guards have set up position in the restricted zone and are prepared to meet your challenge.

C: 只要击败了「少校」，演习就宣告结束。
E: Defeat the Major to finish the drill.

C: 和「少校」聊聊吧，它应该已经把奖励准备好了。
E: Chat with the Major, and it should have something ready for you.

C: （小心跟上去，要确保扑满进到行医市集里。）
E: (Follow it carefully and make sure it runs towards the Healer's Market.)

C: 相信这次行动结束之后，「模拟云吟术」引起的骚动会暂时平息吧。
E: I believe our operations will settle the commotion caused by the imitated cloudhymn magic for a while.

C: 正确的决定。没人能拒绝如此沉默、优雅、遗世独立，甚至还带点黑暗的邀请函。
E: That's the right move. No one could resist such a silent, elegant, independent, and slightly "dark" envelope of invitation.

C: 还有组委会？这么正式？
E: There's a committee? So formal.

C: 我就知道，你之前的歉意都是装出来的！
E: I knew all that apologizing was an act!

C: …你听不懂我说话是吧。
E: Do you even understand the words coming out of my mouth?

C: 你抵御住了诱惑。现在，最好离这个衣柜远点…化学的气味或许香甜，但对你的健康恐怕没什么益处。
E: You manage to resist the temptation. And now, you'd better stay away from the closet... As ambrosial as its chemical scent might be, it probably won't do you any good.

C: 是杰帕德长官画的。
E: Captain Gepard did.

C: …对不起！
E: ...Sorry!

C: 你看向北方。那是一大片耸立的山脉，一直蔓延向世界的尽头。
E: You look to the north and see stunningly high mountain ranges that extend all the way to the world's end.

C: 别挂！
E: No, don't!
One.

C: 干得不错——假如你刚才不是纯凭运气的话。现在，继续！该输入第二个数字了。
E: Good job... Assuming it wasn't sheer luck. Now, on to the second number.

C: 错误。你听到一阵沉闷的滋滋声，四个凹槽内的数字恢复到了初始的、无序的状态。糟糕——看来你得从头再试一次了。
E: Wrong. You hear a low buzzing sound as the numbers in all four slots return to their original random state. Shoot, looks like you gotta start all over again.

C: 是吗？真遗憾。
E: Really? That's a pity.

C: （呼，准备清理怪物了。）
E: (Phew, it's time to get rid of the monsters.)

C: 瞧您这话说的！要是每个栖木都坏掉了，那我们鹤运物流也太没用了。肯定还是有这样安全的地方啊！
E: What are you talking about? If every roost has broken down, then the Heron Express would have been good for nothing. Safe places like this would still exist, of course!

C: 请问这里有铁盒吗？
E: Excuse me, is there an iron box here?

C: 我刚想怒斥这孩子，就看到他狞笑着锁上了集装箱的门…要不是你来得及时啊，我现在真的就被寄到法珊泽尔了！和那些蘑菇干一起！
E: Just as I was about to scold this child, I saw him grinning as he locked the gate to the container... If you hadn't arrived when you did, I'd be halfway to Farschanzel by now! Just like all those dried mushrooms!

C: 我寻思你也没穿衣服啊？
E: I'm guessing you're naked again?

C: 你那边有动静吗？
E: Any signs of activity over there?

C: 无论如何，我都该好好感谢您才行…不单单是因为您救了我，更因为您对我…对我们的包容和理解。
E: In any case, I should be thanking you... Not just for saving me, but also... because of your understanding and putting up with me.

C: 对啊，毕竟梦境酒店已经被封锁了嘛…你应该拿到梦境护照了吧？宾客须知上应该有写才对。
E: Yeah, after all, the hotel in the Dreamscape is under lockdown now... You've got a Dreamscape Pass, right? It should be in the Guest Notice.

C: 听起来势在必得啊。
E: Sounds like a must!

C: 但真到了那时候，并不是人人都有断尾逃生的魄力。而且我觉得，最刺激的部分在于逃出来之后……
E: But when the time comes, not everyone has the guts to sever their own tail to escape. And I think the most thrilling part of all is in the escaping...

C: 在赏金交到手里之前，我们可不会轻易让出这个位置。
E: Before the bounty is in our hands, we won't just give up this position.

C: 每人五百信用点。
E: <unbreak>500</unbreak> credits each.

C: 每人一千信用点。
E: <unbreak>1000</unbreak> credits each.

C: 星际和平公司在官网为我准备了一笔不多的悬赏，估计那俩二货就是为了这个来的…亏我最开始还以为是被什么大人物发现了。
E: The IPC put out a small bounty for me on its official site. I'm guessing those two fools came here just for that... I thought some big shot had discovered me right at the start.

C: 一切结束之后，我们在冒险的尽头再会吧。
E: When everything is done and dusted, let's meet up again at the end of the adventure.

C: 的确，这个计划实行之初，不少人都提出了反对意见……
E: Sure is. When this plan was first raised, it was met with many an objection...

C: 就在这时，天空突然播放起公司的广告投影来。画面上的家伙身穿西装，用那种非常符合刻板印象的语气开口说道……
E: Just then, a projection of the company's advertisement appeared in the sky. In it was a man dressed in a suit, and he spoke in a tone that fit his appearance...

C: 言归正传。我获取了商船护卫的信任，就像把刀贴在了甲兽的柔软肚皮上。接下来的事情就简单多了……
E: Now, back to the story. Gaining the trust of the guards was akin to having control over the Achilles' heel of the ship. It made the rest of the plan so much simpler...

C: 那个…呃…认识你很高兴，朋友。要是没什么别的事的话，咱们还是各就各位，回去干活吧，行吗？
E: Anyway, um... it's nice to meet you, my friend. If there's nothing else, I suggest we all get back to work.

C: 调研？
E: Research?

C: 好好干，加油。
E: Bring your A-game.

C: 让我一个人待会儿，伙计…我现在没心情开玩笑了，真的。
E: Please let me be with myself for a while, buddy. I'm not in the mood to joke around.

C: 小孩子才喝汽水……
E: Soda is for kids...

C: 哎，您先别急着拒绝，我也不求您为我打抱不平、惩奸除恶。我就是想请您找我这个领导聊聊天。
E: Hey, don't turn me down so soon. I don't expect you to bring the bad guy to justice for me. All you need to do is chat with Feinman.

C: 不行，我一定得想办法把人救出来！
E: I must think of a way to get my partner out!

C: 我还真把企划带来了……
E: I've actually brought the plan...

C: 咻咻…分析完成！本次分析对象：「匹诺康尼观景望远镜」。
E: *Beep*... Analysis complete! Object identified: A viewing telescope in Penacony.

C: 好，很好！你做得太好了，傻大…高个子{F#小姐}{M#先生}！
E: Great! Well done, gulli... I mean, tall {F#lady}{M#gentleman}!

C: 我就知道，「长效专利捍卫一纸通」绝对是划时代的发明！有了它…只要有了它，我就能剑指黄金的时刻——不对，是剑指整个匹诺康尼的首富了！
E: I knew it! The Indefinite Patent Operative Omnifier is a game-changer! With it, I'll be qualified for Golden Hour... No, I'll become the richest guy in person in Penacony!

C: 艾默里奇陷入失落之中。虽然有些于心不忍，但你觉得让他保持这种状态对整个匹诺康尼而言是件好事。
E: Emmrich falls into a state of despair. While this is somewhat disheartening, keeping him in this state may be advantageous for the welfare of Penacony.

C: …谢谢，谢谢你能这么说！
E: ...Thank you. Thank you for your kind words!

C: 我把工资的二十分之一都投入到了那款游戏上，为的只是在社区比赛上能和她同台竞技。
E: I even spent one-twentieth of my paycheck on the game just to be on par with her in community tournaments.

C: 算了算了，不跟你念叨这种丢自家脸面的事情了，他走了正好能把位子空出来给别人！鸢尾花需要更可靠、更懂得感恩的新鲜血液！
E: Ah, forget about that drama. We'll just let him leave and find someone else! The Iris Family needs fresh blood, people who are reliable and grateful!

C: 她给你制定了新的发展方案。
E: She made a new career plan for you.

C: 当初她就是这么骗我签约的，说什么让我先演那些装可爱的青春片，以后再等机会。
E: That's how she lured me into signing for her company back then. She told me to take the roles in those cheesy teen movies first while waiting for better opportunities to come along.

C: 我很敬重她，但匹诺康尼的音乐不应该一直活在她的阴影下，梦境应该拥抱更多样的音乐风格。
E: I have great respect for her, but the music in Penacony should not be overshadowed by her all the time. Dreamscape should embrace a more diverse range of musical styles.

C: 「Mendaxia~Mendaxia~tuven arztis liberan sanam~nururisha Idrila bfularun……」
E: "Mendasia~ Mendasia~ Tuven arztis liberan sanam~ Nururisha Idrila bfularun..."

C: 好、好评如潮！
E: M—Most of the reviews... are positive!

C: 我在营地练歌时，这些原住民居然用残存的人智为我欢呼鼓舞，我在一群猴子的掌声中找到了继续歌唱的理由——他人的认可。
E: As I practiced my songs in the camp, these natives cheered me on with their remaining intelligence, and I found a reason to continue singing through their applause — validation from others.

C: 乘风的鸟儿随心扇动翅膀就能轻松高飞，而我想要去往同一片天空，就必须违心逆风而行……
E: While an eagle effortlessly soars high by riding the wind, I must defy the wind and my own desires to reach the sky...

C: 有时不得不承认，这帮家伙对舆论的嗅觉还是挺敏锐的。
E: Sometimes, you just have to admit that these guys have a sharp sense when it comes to public opinion.

C: 总有一天，我会好好治治这些反社会分子！
E: One of these days, I'll knock some sense into these sociopaths!

C: 在「黄金的时刻」待久了才发现，这里还真是满地奇葩啊——贬义的那种。
E: After spending some time in the Golden Hour, I realize this place is full of freaks.

C: 一定又是他们在针对我——嫉妒我年纪轻轻就名利双收！明明是自己不肯与时俱进、回应市场需求，凭什么要对我架起矛头！
E: They must have sabotaged me! They were jealous of my fame and success at such a young age! Why didn't they blame themselves for being outdated and oblivious to the market demands? Why did they come at me?

C: …我没受伤，真的！顶多就是衣服乱了点。
E: ...I'm not hurt, really! My clothes are ruffled, is all.

C: 可以的话，请你拿上这张照片——然后去这公馆的别处找到我的<color=#dbc291ff>兄弟姐妹</color>。他们应该…很显眼。
E: If it's okay, please could you hold onto this photo — and then go and find my <color=#dbc291ff>brother and sister</color> elsewhere in this pavilion. They should... be quite conspicuous.

C: 或许吧…或许吧。
E: Perhaps... perhaps.

C: 你这人总是这么严肃吗？
E: Have you always been this serious?

C: 看！这就是善意带来的好报。
E: Just look! That's my reward for being kind.

C: 你是不是忘了什么？
E: You forgetting something else?

C: 唉，就这样吧，一个个都不让人省心…我的话他们已经听不进去了。但凡事总得试试，说不定你能让他们迷途知返呢？
E: *sigh* That should do it for now. I'm always worried about these students... yet they don't seem to heed my advice anymore. Nevertheless, you might be able to make them see the error of their ways. It's worth a shot, right?

C: 既然这样，还不如早点转型，另谋出路。至少派对行业在匹诺康尼算是个蓝海，不比跟那群逐梦客内卷强多了？
E: In that case, I might as well pivot early and look for greener pastures elsewhere. At least the party sector in Penacony still has tons of employment opportunities. Wouldn't pursuing this be more promising than joining the rat race alongside the other Dreamchasers?

C: 你转达了阿图罗先生给尚恩的嘱托——不要背井离乡。
E: You relay Mr. Arturo's advice to Shawn: Don't turn your back on your home planet.

C: 你不打算买的话，就别看了啾！我这里可是游客梦寐以求的宝贝！不能轻易示人的！
E: If you're not looking to buy, then don't bother looking, tweet! I only sell the most coveted treasures here. Not just anybody gets to see them!

C: 你正准备答应，但在开口前的一瞬，你忽然意识到了什么。
E: Just as you're about to open your mouth to respond, you come to a sudden realization.

C: 当然没有！
E: Of course there isn't!

C: 再想想。
E: Let's keep thinking.

C: 假如造物引擎可以承担机兵的装配工作，我们就能把它当作一个移动基地，随时为矿场和其他生产设施提供支持。
E: If the Engines of Creation were able to take on the work of automaton assembly, we could use them as mobile bases that could provide support to mines or other production facilities at any time.

C: 再想想。
E: Let's keep thinking.

C: 我小的时候家里穷，父母没钱给我买玩具。长大以后，我就梦想着当个玩具商，给孩子们提供物美价廉的玩具。
E: When I was young, my family was poor and my parents had no money to buy me toys. Since I've grown up, I've always wanted to own a toy store and supply high-quality, cheap toys to children.

C: 安全起见，还是请你把这批废料交给我们吧。
E: To be on the safe side, please hand over this scrap material to us for now.

C: 本杰明带着货物满意地离开了。
E: Benjamin leaves happily with his goods.

C: 这些废料是你的了。
E: This scrap is yours.

C: 啾？客人想跟我聊天吗？
E: Tweet? Would you like to talk with me, dear guest?

C: 真的假的，这你都能找到我啾…真了不起啾……
E: Are you for real? You really found me... That's quite something, tweet...

C: 真的啾？不会把我抓走卖掉吗啾？
E: Really, tweet? You won't try to sell me off, will you, tweet?

C: 谢邀，已经睡过一晚了。
E: Thanks for the invite. I've just stayed the night there.

C: 只坚持了二十秒，这次挑战也失败了啾……
E: I only lasted twenty seconds. I failed the challenge this time as well, tweet...

C: 啾？终于有人发现我了啾！因为这块广告牌太「日常」了，大家路过时都完全不看这边的啾……
E: Tweet? Someone finally found me, tweet! Since this billboard is too generic, no one even looks at it when they pass by, tweet...

C: 啾…？怎、怎么失效了啾？难道是这朵四叶草的叶片形状还不够完美吗啾？
E: Tweet...? Wh—Why didn't work, tweet? Could it be that the shape of the clover leaves is not perfect enough on this four-leafed clover, tweet?

C: 啾啾~您是钟表小子的朋友，那他一定向您介绍过美梦小镇了啾~
E: Tweet tweet! Since you're Clockie's friend, I'm sure he has introduced Dreamville to you, tweet!

C: 我需要一些提示。
E: I need a few hints.

C: 我帮你找宝石。
E: I'll help you find the gems.

C: 如果有能唤醒记忆的「魔法硬币」就好了啾！可惜本公子的库存已经用完了啾……
E: If only I had a Magic Coin that awakens memories, tweet! Alas, I've used up all of mine in stock, tweet...

C: 哼哼…没错，有个不务正业的助手总被<color=#dbc291ff>小镇的车流</color>吸引目光，喊着要和飞车比赛啾——傻小子，翅膀哪能赢得过引擎呀！
E: Hehe... That's right. There's a helper who is a slacker, and is always distracted by <color=#dbc291ff>the town's traffic</color>, yelling that it wants to race the flying cars, tweet. Foolish kid, how could wings beat engines?

C: 得去给它准备一份新的惊喜才行……
E: I have to go and prepare them a new gift...

C: 用四分音符！
E: Use quarter notes!

C: 终于，小鸟向你点了点头，转头飞走了。
E: Finally, the bird nods at you, turns and flies away.

C: 太麻烦了啾，这是在下的一点点心意——请务必收下啾！
E: Thank you for everything you've done. Here's a little token of gratitude. Please accept it, tweet!

C: 当然，在下偶尔也会来照顾一些还没长大的孩子…啾啾，它们可是未来的折纸栋梁呢~
E: Of course, sometimes I come here to look after some of the children, too... Tweet tweet, they are the future of the origami birds, after all~

C: 哼哼…没错，有个很积极的小助手自愿要去<color=#dbc291ff>「公园广场前」</color>接待来宾呢啾~现在像这样热情的孩子可不多了啾~
E: Hmm... That's right, there is one very positive and energetic assistant that agreed to go to the <color=#dbc291ff>front of the park square</color> to greet guests, tweet~ Passionate kids like them are few and far between these days, tweet~

C: 啾啾，是谁叫醒的我？本鸟已经归隐，早就不做比赛预测了啾。
E: Tweet tweet, who woke me? I've long retired, and don't do match predictions anymore, tweet.

C: 你是一只折纸鸟。
E: You're just an origami bird.

C: 折纸鸟啾？那这里又是什么地方啾？黄色，红色，好多东西在脑子里打转，肚子里的苏乐达都要涌上来了啾。
E: Origami bird, tweet? And what's this place, tweet? Yellow, red, so many things spinning around in my head, the SoulGlad in my tummy is going to spill out, tweet.

C: 如此彪悍的高度，如此霸道的体形，想把它拽下来，可得花一番工夫。
E: It'll take a mean feat to bring it down a peg, with its overwhelming size and at such a daunting height.

C: 再见啾，我要去鸟生的下一个舞台了，在那里，我可是主角啾。
E: Goodbye, tweet. I'm heading off to the next stage of life's soaring success. I'm going to play a lead role there, tweet.

C: 呼呼，贵宾区的沙发就是好，比自己搭的窝舒服多了啾。
E: Ho-ho, the couch in the VIP area is the best, it's so much more comfy than my own nest, tweet.

C: 再见，本鸟要把这绝世的美貌带给更多人，让他们都饱饱眼福啾。
E: Goodbye. I have to share my gorgeous self with more people and treat them to a feast for the eyes, tweet.

C: 哎呀，差点忘了！折纸的爪子太小，没法握爪啾！
E: Doh, I almost forgot! Origami claws are too small to be shaken, tweet!

C: 哈努兄弟的炸弹秀，可惜这里没有啾。
E: It's a pity there's none of Brother Hanu's bomb show here, tweet.

C: 啾啾啾！
E: Tweet! Tweet!

C: 等到熄灯后，我的人偶会带着我环游校园啾！
E: After the lights go out, my puppets will bring me on a tour around the school, tweet!

C: 猫头鹰老师是小鸟吗？
E: Is Professor Owl a bird too?

C: 他没有可以拽的羽毛啾！
E: But he doesn't have feathers to yank, tweet!

C: 这就是庆典的冠军...
E: So this is the Festival Champion...

C: 怎么看你有点可疑...
E: You seem a little suspicious to me...

C: 要不要...加个好友？
E: Do you want... to add each other as friends in-game?

C: 我是谁？我在哪儿？等等……
E: Who am I? Where am I? Hang on...

C: 在你的指引下，小家伙回到了它温暖的新家。
E: With your guidance, the little creation made it back to its cozy new home.

C: 在你的指引下，小家伙回到了它温暖的新家。
E: With your guidance, the little creation made it back to its cozy new home.

C: 默默旁观。
E: Observe in silence.

C: 实验田里一如既往地安静，你努力寻找着杂草的踪迹，但很可惜，在你的连日劳作下，它们已不复存在。
E: The experimental plant nurseries remains as quiet as ever. You try hard to find traces of the weeds but, alas, after days of hard work they no longer exist.

C: 「证」是什么证？
E: What do you mean by "certificate"?

C: 我的？我的什么东西？
E: Mine? What do you mean?

C: 什么机密？我完全不知情啊！
E: Highly confidential? But I don't know anything!

C: 咱们动身吧！
E: Let's go!

C: 变聪明了，那查案岂不是如虎添翼？行了，别在这儿耗着了，那些赃物不是还没处理完吗？赶紧回去继续干活吧。
E: Isn't it awesome to have a smart helper for solving cases? Anyway, let's not waste any more time here. We should return and deal with the stolen property.

C: 是啊，我们一开始也是这么想的，觉得肯定是哪个古人在乱编故事吓唬人。
E: Well, that's what we thought at first, too. We believed it was nothing more than some wild stories.

C: （安全起见，放进背包）
E: (Put it in your inventory just to be safe.)

C: 这是一段不属于你的记忆，就像是你读取忆泡时一样，你感受到的疯狂是外来的，而非本源性的…逐渐的，你对周围世界的感受也开始重合……
E: It is as if you are experiencing someone else's memory, much like reading a Memory Bubble. A hint of delirium seeps in from outside, rather than from within yourself. Gradually, your perception of the world around you begins to blur...

C: 若月小姐…这…这是怎么一回事啊？
E: Wh—What's going on here... Ruoyue...?

C: 唉…哈哈哈哈哈哈哈，原来「无论如何都不会抽到凶签」是这么个意思啊？若月小姐，你的卜算确实是灵验的。
E: H—Haha... Hahahahahaha! So that's what you meant by "you'll definitely not get a Woe!" You're indeed an excellent fortune-teller, Ruoyue!

C: 老板您倒是也真不客气…行吧，都给您吧。反正我也确实受之有愧。
E: Greed is good, huh?... Fine, you can have it all. I didn't intend to accept it anyway.

C: 你自诩见识过不少世面，区区五万信用点对你来说，实在不算什么。
E: You brag about having first-hand knowledge of the wider world. A mere fifty thousands credits is really nothing to you.

C: 你踩到我的东西了，劳烦抬抬脚。
E: You're stepping on something of mine. Could you please kindly remove your foot?

C: 曾有一位化外民游客在这「绥园」里徜徉，却因为一阙琴曲停下脚步，他听出了曲中所描述的景色——峰峦、林海、飞瀑与浪花。
E: Once, an outworlder tourist visiting Fyxestroll Garden stopped his pacing due to a piece of guqin music. He heard the scenery described by the music: Lofty peaks, vast forests, soaring waterfalls, and ocean spray.

C: 此夜且与君成双……
E: At night, we'll embrace as one, so tight...

C: 当然，这群人最后都被女主角干掉了。某种意义上说，倒也算是个大快人心的故事。
E: Of course, these people are all overpowered by the female lead in the end. In one sense, it's a highly satisfying story.

C: 我怎么就和朋友走散了呢……
E: How did I get separated from my friends...?

C: 还挺有意思的。虽然玩法简单，但一玩就停不下来——每次二缺一的时候，我身上就好像有真蛰虫在爬！
E: It's pretty interesting! It's a simple game, but once you start, you just can't stop! Every time I get two out of three, I feel like I'm actually covered in True Stings!

C: 玩过了，还挺刺激的。看着指针跟大奖擦肩而过的时候，那落差别提有多大了！心里就像坐过山车一样！
E: I have. It's so exciting! The way my heart races and drops as the pointer goes past the grand prize, it's like a real roller-coaster ride!

C: 奇怪的物品变回了皮皮西。
E: The strange object transformed back into a Pepeshi.

C: 对…不过他还说，「白日梦酒店」现在正在整修，一般人可能没法进入。
E: That's right... But he also said that "The Reverie Hotel" is under maintenance at the moment. It's unlikely that regular guests will be able to enter.

C: 已经过去多久了？我甚至记不清具体的年数。夏…看看我，我已经变成一个满头白发的老头子了。你看上去…倒是变化不大。
E: How long has it been? I no longer remember how many years have passed. Char... Look at me, I am a white-haired old man now. Yet you... You've barely changed at all.

C: 我得去照看爸爸了。再见，妈妈。
E: I have to go and look after father. Goodbye, mom.

C: 传说中赢遍所有星系。
E: They say he's won across every system...

C: 抱歉，我还有事。
E: Sorry, I have other things to do.

C: 铁皮罐子里发出空荡荡的回响。片刻后，几张{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}不情不愿地从出钞口落下来。
E: A hollow sound comes from within the metal casing. After a moment, several {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#} reluctantly drop from the dispenser.

C: （尝试维修）
E: (Try fixing it)

C: 干脆三种混着喝。
E: Why not just drink them all?

C: 给我讲讲你自己。
E: Tell me about yourself.

C: 这展览可真烦人，我就只能呆在这儿不动…下次联谊是什么时候？希望能再遇到一只和它一样漂亮——不对，最好是比它还漂亮的杯子。
E: This exhibition is so annoying, I have to be still as a statue the entire time... When is the next group dating session? Hopefully, I'll meet another glass that is as beautiful — or even better, twice as beautiful — as the crystal glass.

C: 年轻的朋友，很遗憾，你我的初次见面是在这种场景。
E: My young friend, I am sorry that our first meeting is under such dire circumstances.

C: 我来啦！哟，正好四个孔啊…来一盘帝垣琼玉吗？
E: I'm here! Ah, there are exactly four slots... Fancy a game of Celestial Jade?

C: 呵呵，原来是想要合影…没问题。怎么样，我对准了吗？
E: Hehe, you want to take a picture together... No problem! Well, am I in the right spot?

C: 三月七…
E: March 7th...

C: 我是来加入这个家的！
E: I came to join this family!

C: 感谢惠顾！我现在就把货交给各位，街道上人多，请随我来这边。
E: Thanks for the business! Let me dish out the wares to everyone then. It's crowded around here, so please follow me.

C: …到这里就行，各位可以准备付款了，我把货拿出来给你们验验。
E: ...This is enough, please. Get your payments ready, everyone. I'll get the wares for you to inspect.

C: …这不是在钓鱼嘛。
E: ...Are you trying to bait us?

C: 喔！
E: Whoa!

C: 三月七、姬子与瓦尔特朝你笑了笑，姬子示意你开始放映。
E: March 7th, Himeko, and Welt smile at you, and Himeko gestures for you to begin.

C: {NICKNAME}，你还好吗？抱歉，那时没能陪在你身旁，还好…现在也不迟。
E: {NICKNAME}, are you all right? I'm sorry that I couldn't be with you then, but at least I'm here now.

C: 快看，是丹恒耶！还有景元将军！好帅气的亮相！{NICKNAME}，咱在你脑海里怎么就没这种待遇啊！
E: Look, it's Dan Heng! And General Jing Yuan! They're so dashing! {NICKNAME}, why don't I look like that in your memories?

C: …我分辨不出来，你跟我走一趟吧。
E: ...I can't tell. You have to come with me.

C: 在谛听到来之前，我允许你们向对方发起提问。我对{NICKNAME}也不太熟悉，只会从旁观察，不过判断依据我是不会告诉你们了。
E: Before Diting's arrival, you two are free to pose any questions to each other. I'm not acquainted with {NICKNAME}, so I won't intervene. Nevertheless, I won't disclose my ultimate decision.

C: 若是将这两件事结合起来，不免让人产生了一种「此前大家都找不到这本书，原来是因为它被抓起来了」的感受。
E: If I were to take into account these two incidents, it seems to suggest that no one was able to find the book due to its confinement within the prison.

C: 你好你好。
E: Hey hey.

C: 你、你过来啊！
E: H—How about you get over here!

C: 我是十王司幽囚狱分区的司狱赤衣，负责将你们收监…你们记得我么？
E: I am Chiyi, Jailer of the Ten-Lords Commission's Shackling Prison zone. I have been tasked with taking you all in... Do you remember me?

C: 咱们现在这个处境都要怪{F#她}{M#他}？
E: So, our current predicament is all thanks to {F#her}{M#him}?

C: 以后再也不想爬建木的事了。
E: I'll never think about climbing the Ambrosial Arbor ever again.

C: 呵呵，我们皮皮西人向来拥有生存的智慧，我们不会进去的。
E: Heh, survival instinct is something common among all Pepeshi, so we will not enter the area.

C: 等等！别急嘛，你有点太「守法公民」了！你听我解释。我是阿合马铁窗集团的首席物流官，我的本体还在坐牢，别担心！
E: Hold on! Calm down. You don't have to be such a "law-abiding citizen"! Let me explain. I'm the Chief Logistics Officer of the Arma Correctional Group and my actual body is currently locked up in jail. You don't have to worry!

C: 嗯？嗯？嗯？
E: Hm? Hmmm?

C: 我知道怎么走了！
E: I've figured out the way!

C: （白鸟要的纸条应该就在这附近……）
E: (The memo that Shiratori is looking for should be somewhere around here...)

C: 他说「我爱你」。
E: He wants me to tell you: "I love you."

C: 才二十一响，真没玩够。
E: Twenty-one explosions just weren't enough.

C: 挺胸！抬头！再抬高一点，埋着头怎么能看清天上的飞行编队呢？
E: Chest out! Head up! Higher! How are you going to see my display team in the skies if your head is buried like that?

C: 嗯…稍等一下！那位云骑士兵会不会是在耍你？先听听门后的情况吧。
E: Hmm... Wait a second! How do you know that this Cloud Knight isn't just messing you around? Maybe try listening in and seeing what's going on.

C: 你不带个兄弟吗？
E: Will you not take a brother with you?

C: 你的表演非常还原，{NICKNAME}同学。但请小点声，不要影响大家听课哦~
E: Your performance is impeccable, {NICKNAME}. But please keep it down and not disrupt the class for others.

C: 不是，但我也要举报你。
E: No, but I do want to report you as well.

C: 都到偷工减料的程度了。
E: You're cutting a few too many corners...

C: ——全剧终。
E: ...The end.

C: 这是你所拍摄的电影的剧照——红色酒瓶倒立在舞台的正中央，那光彩照人的模样让你莫名感到有些心酸。
E: This is a stage photo of the film you shot — the red bottle doing a handstand at the center of the stage, its radiance leaving you inexplicably saddened.

C: 小姑娘朝你做了个鬼脸。
E: The little girl makes a funny face at you.

C: 远处传来急促的脚步声，不断朝你所在的位置靠近…该不会是这机关触发了什么东西吧，会被追责吗？你下意识地后怕。
E: You hear hurried footsteps rushing from afar, rapidly closing in on your location... Could you have triggered something with this mechanism? Something to hold you accountable? A fright begins to rise beneath your consciousness.

C: 还是别乱碰了。
E: Don't touch it.

C: 这是供奉哪位泰坦的圣烛？你对此感到好奇，试图从底座上寻找相关的线索，却意外发现了某个开关。
E: Which Titan is this holy candle dedicated to? You're rather curious about that, and try to figure that out via clues gleaned from the candle's base. Yet, unexpectedly, you found a switch.

C: 你下意识地想要触碰它，但一道声音喊住了你。
E: You subconsciously want to touch it, but a voice calls out to halt you.

C: 诶？你不知道吗？我明明看着你重新点燃了瑟希斯的圣烛啊？
E: Huh? Don't you know? I watched you light the holy candle of Cerces.

C: 占星术中遥不可及的星座早已与我们比邻而居，「答题测试」却仍不减其魅力。恭喜！您选择了一种非常传统，但也十分经典的测试方式。
E: The unreachable constellations of astrology have long been in close vicinity to us, but the attraction of questions and quizzes never fades. Congratulations! You've selected a very traditional yet classic assessment.

C: 哦吼？竟然联想到了阿格莱雅女士的身上，可惜可惜，还不是正确答案！
E: Oh-ho? You associated it with Lady Aglaea? Alas, that's still not the right answer!

C: 对、对不起！万敌大人，别把我砸碎！
E: I—I apologize! Lord Mydei, please do not break me!

C: 但现在，还是趁它不注意，赶紧远远地逃开吧。
E: But now, while it's distracted, hurry up and flee far.

C: 当然，我相信你。
E: Of course, I believe in you.

C: 谜底就是——
E: The answer is...

C: 求己不如求人，要选择奥赫玛的哪位朋友来替你回答这个刁钻的问题呢？
E: There's no shame in seeking help from others. Which friend from Okhema would you like to seek help from for answering this tricky question?

C: 罪恶之人就藏在他们当中。勇士，请指出唯一的那位罪人吼！
E: The guilty is lurking among them. Warrior, find out who the murderer is!

C: 唉，今天真是玩累了。我年纪也大了，从今以后金盆洗手，就在你电脑里养老吧。
E: I'm tired of playing today. I'm also getting old, so I'll be out of the game and retire in your computer from now on.

C: 还是算了…
E: Forget it...

C: （帮她转移到冷冻室）
E: (Move it into the freezer for her)

C: 在起初，世界上没有天与地，空荡荡的一片，是{RUBY_B#大地之泰坦}吉奥里亚{RUBY_E#}从虚空中升起，为万物创造了凭依之所。
E: In the very beginning, there was no sky and land in the empty world. {RUBY_B#Earth Titan}Georios{RUBY_E#} rose from the void and created a place where life can sustain.

C: 呼呼。你拿出的这点诚意，就算丢进火里都烧不了多久！
E: *crackle* Your so-called sincerity can't even strike a spark in the flame!

C: 不错，本王就是垃圾桶王国的新任主宰，汤姆•杰克•苏大帝二世。整个垃圾桶王国都以服务我为荣。
E: Yep, I am the one and only King of the Trashcan Kingdom, Tom Jack Soo the Great II. The entire Kingdom takes great pride in serving me.

C: 那是之后要做的事情。在此之前，哈努兄弟必须完成一个至关重要的动作……
E: Not so soon. Before that, there's a crucial move that Hanu must make...

C: 不错，四指并拢、掌心向上，这才是引导客人的正确姿势。看来你还算上过几堂礼仪课。
E: Not bad. Keeping the fingers together with your palm facing upward is the proper gesture when giving directions. Looks like you've had a few lessons in etiquette.

C: 风声？不，无知的受害者，深层梦境的危险远比你想象中恐怖…现在你就要见识到了！
E: Wind? Nay, naive victim, the dangers of the Deep Dreamscape are horrifying beyond your imagination... and you're about to witness them now!

C: {F#她}{M#他}臂力极为强劲，平日里手提一根重达千斤的烧火棍到处闲逛，跟没事人似的…仅凭一人一棍便在家族手里夺下了「晖长石号 / 开拓之尾号 / 塔塔洛夫号 / 飞翔时针号」的所有权。
E: {F#Her}{M#His} arms are incredibly strong, as {F#she}{M#he} wanders around every day, carrying a flaming bat in one hand like it's nothing. With just a single bat, {F#she}{M#he} managed to wrest control of The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand over from The Family's grasp.

C: 我不，我既然失礼了，当然要表达我的诚意，你作为我的师傅，怎么可以这么不负责？你得对我的桶格负责！
E: I shall not, master. Since I was disrespectful, it is expected that I express my sincerity to you. As my master, how can you be so irresponsible? You must take responsibility for my improper conduct!

C: 哲学家？这个称呼听起来很高端，但每个生命体不都是在用自己的方式思考世界吗？在这个意义上，每个人都是哲学家。
E: Philosopher? While that title sounds very highbrow, isn't every living organism trying to comprehend the world via their own methods? From this perspective, everyone could be considered as a philosopher.

C: 你是在做垃圾分类？
E: You're doing garbage sorting?

C: 回见。我要去巡视一圈，看看有没有其他需要帮助的桶。
E: See you later. I'm gonna go patrol around and see if there are any other cans that need my help.

C: 想到什么写什么！
E: Write whatever comes to mind!

C: （奥赫玛、悬锋城、神悟树庭、命运重渊…这些年里，我踏足了很多地方……）
E: (Okhema, Castrum Kremnos, the Grove of Epiphany, Abyss of Fate... I've walked through so many places over the years...)

C: 回忆第一封回信。
E: Recall the first reply sent.

C: o((╬◣'ω´◢ )o「快去给哥找个对手来，不然哥就一尾巴跟你豹了！」)∋
E: o((╬◣'ω´◢ )o "Now find me a worthy opponent, or I'll tail-slap you in the face!" )∋

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「我们已在脑海中分过胜负了，倘若真的对撞，恐怕这方天地便会崩毁……」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ "We've already battled in our minds. A real clash would shatter this world." )∋

C: 这是一只「自由」的奇美拉。无需完成任何事务，只是在这广阔而寂寥的大地之上休憩，日落而息，日不落也息……
E: This is a chimera of freedom. No duties to fulfill, no burdens to bear — just resting under the vast, lonely sky... sleeping at sunset, or sleeping even when the sun doesn't set.

C: 反正也无事可做。
E: Not like we've got anything better to do.

C: 别让我等太久。
E: Don't keep me waiting too long.

C: 如果能坐得更高就好了。
E: If only we could be even higher up.

C: 虽然我很想说…与你共度的这段时光，都会像这哀丽秘榭一样，<color=#dbc291ff>永远留在无人叨扰的记忆之境。</color>
E: Though I have to say... The times we spent together will be like Aedes Elysiae, <color=#dbc291ff>preserved in a tranquil memory space forever.</color>

C: 嘻，好新奇的搭讪技巧呀。
E: Hehe, what an interesting new way to chat someone up.

C: 我知道，{NICKNAME}一定有许多疑惑，对吗？虽然很想为你解答，但我也对现状感到手足无措……
E: Yes, you must be really perplexed, {NICKNAME}. I wish I could give you answers, but I feel helpless about the current situation too...

C: 而我，将以此身投入天秤——
E: As for me, I shall give my body to tip the balance...

C: 无妨。神驹的数量很多，你若有事，就在这等着，找任意祭司都可以。
E: Fear not. There are many divine foals here — should you require aid, simply remain here and seek counsel from any of our priests.

C: （钻进木马的肚子里）
E: (Enter the horse's stomach)

C: 「某种对混乱的比喻」
E: A metaphor for chaos

C: 真是一个值得深思的问题。
E: That's truly a question worth pondering.

C: （训练 佩佩）
E: (Train Peppy)

C: 古时候的人们不知晓有太阳，但却也知道崇拜太阳神。对他们而言，亲身体会太阳的灼热，是太过热烈的体验。
E: In ancient times, people were not aware of the exact nature of the sun but they still worshiped the Sun God. For them, the idea of approaching the scorching sun is too much for them to handle.

C: 得小心，不能靠近那边……嗯……那里也不能去。
E: Better be careful, shouldn't go over there... well... not there either.

C: 这就是如今空间站的现状，也是非人生物权益不得保障的重要体现！
E: This is the space station's current situation. It's also a representation that the non-human creatures' rights are not protected!

C: 我还有一些问题想要问…
E: I still got some questions for you...

C: 倘若要问空间站谁是最绚烂的星，那除黑塔大人之下，必然有卡波特大人的身影。
E: If you asked who is the most dazzling star on the space station other than Madam Herta, it would definitely be Master Capote.

C: 我看你也不是很忙的样子。
E: You don't look very busy.

C: 哎哟，不说了不说了，都是过去的事儿咯！
E: Well, I think I'm done talking. These stories are all water under the bridge.

C: 哎！男女之情，风花雪月，简直就是科研求知道路上的阻挠啊！
E: Sigh! The fleeting romance between men and women is an obstruction to the way of scientific research!

C: 嗯，随便你。
E: Yep, yep, whatever.

C: 还是不打扰你了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 我还有事，先不聊了。
E: I've got to go. Talk to you later.

C: 我知道你很急，但你先别急。
E: I know you're in a hurry, but please loosen up.

C: 哼，你又不是她。
E: Hmph, you're no Ruan Mei.

C: 远程信号正常，检测到视野内有生命迹象。
E: Remote signals normal. Signs of life detected within the field of vision.

C: 待办事项<unbreak>503</unbreak>个，正在执行序号<unbreak>113</unbreak>，请勿打扰。
E: <unbreak>503</unbreak> tasks pending. Now handling Task #113. Please do not disturb.

C: 噢，我懂你的意思了…正在提取录像片段，请稍后……
E: Oh, I see what you mean... Extracting video clip. Please wait...

C: 再见。
E: Bye.

C: 你知道那根球棒的威力，击中盾牌的手感也告诉你——它能抵御住长矛的攻击。
E: You know that baseball bat's power, and the feel of the shield's impact also told you — it can withstand a hit from that lance.

C: 所有盾牌都被打完了…
E: All the shields have been shattered...

C: 最好吊销你们的营业执照。
E: I hope your licenses get suspended.

C: …种子…瑟希斯之种…终将汲取一切养分，直至开花结果……
E: ...Seeds... Seeds of Cerces... Those will absorb all nutrients until they blossom and bear fruit...

C: 秉着简洁的原则，我认为——<color=#dbc291ff>「阿卡索斯」并不存在</color>，能确定的只是*有个城邦*，仅此而已。
E: Based on the principle of simplicity, I think that... "Icatus" does not in fact exist, and all we can be certain of is that there is a city.

C: 数学是最为简洁优美的学科，数学的公理无论何时都不会改变。即便有哪天，现实中找不到任何圆形的东西，「圆」也仍旧存在。
E: Mathematics is the most simple and beautiful of studies. Its innate truths will never change. Even if there comes a day when there is no such thing as a circular object in existence, the concept of a "circle" will still exist.

C: 银河球棒侠出马，一个顶俩。
E: Then step aside for the Galactic Baseballer. I'm as good as two where it counts.

C: 背负家族恩怨的我们，明明是这世上最不该相爱的人，却被牵起了金丝线。这一定是墨涅塔的奇迹！赞美墨涅塔！
E: Burdened by these familial tragedies, we are clearly the most star-crossed of lovers — and yet we are tied together by the golden thread. This must be Mnestia's marvelous miracle! Praise be to Mnestia!

C: 现在正值开业大减价，一条新闻只要5利衡币，听吗听吗？
E: We're having a sale to mark the grand opening: One line of news for just 5 Balance Coins. Want to hear one?

C: 哈…我、我跑不动了……
E: Ha... I—I can't move...

C: 我不是很擅长这个，经常会戳到手指。好在阿芙罗姐姐总是耐心教导我，她真是人美心善！
E: I'm not very good at this at all, and I'm always stabbing myself in the finger. Luckily, Miss Aphrea is a really patient teacher. She's such a beautiful, kind-hearted person!

C: 尼卡多利卷土重来！
E: Nikador is staging a comeback!

C: 那些来路不正的财物已被尽数归还——她攒了很久，但若要奔向新的人生，这是必要步骤。
E: Her ill-gotten funds have all been returned... She saved for a long time, but if she wants to be able to start a new life, this is a step that she must take.

C: ——不过，在被黑潮摧毁的区域进行这种思考，似乎过于冷血。牺牲者曾经经历了怎样的惴惴不安与绝望…不堪细想。
E: — But thinking about such things in an area destroyed by the black tide seems too cold-blooded. What kind of unease and despair did the deceased go through... it's hard to imagine.

C: …我受那位「金织」女士所托，带队来处理一些事务。
E: ...I was entrusted by that Lady "Goldweaver" to lead the team here to handle some matters.

C: 那就好…我知道你实力强悍，但眼下树庭黑潮未消，依旧万分凶险。
E: That's good... I know you're strong, but right now the black tide hasn't dissipated, and it's still extremely dangerous.

C: 他简直——走了一条最短路线？
E: He somehow... took the fastest way through?

C: 是你啊，年轻人。谢谢你们帮我把消息带回来，找我有什么事吗？
E: Ah, young one. Thank you for bringing word of them. What brings you here?

C: 现在唯一可惜的，就是我这把年纪，怕是没办法亲自去树庭走一趟喽。
E: All I regret is that these old bones won't let me travel to the Grove anymore.

C: 你知道吗，就他那腿脚——上次我不小心给他那破烟斗弄坏了，老东西撵我撵了整整半个树庭！
E: And those legs he complains about? Last time I accidentally broke his favorite pipe, he chased me through half the Grove!

C: 你都来空间站了，也算是实现了小时候的梦想。
E: Hey. You're on the Herta Space Station. That's basically realizing your childhood dream.

C: 至少我听完之后，绝对不敢乱动。
E: Hearing it makes me not want to make any move at all.

C: 哎，别提了……
E: *Sigh* Don't mention it, please...

C: 你忘了你上次放错试剂，毁了多少培养皿了？
E: Did you forget how many petri dishes you ruined last time by messing up the reagents?

C: 师傅，这要怎么办啊！
E: Master, what are we gonna do!?

C: 再深情点！
E: More emotion!

C: 哎，看来这个办法也没用啊。
E: Well, looks it doesn't work at all, either.

C: 不用克服，悬锋人会找到自己的道路。走吧，科可波阁下，我们回家。
E: There's no need to heal. We Kremnoans will find our path. Come on, Kokopo, let's go home.

C: …就只有这些人？
E: ...Is that all?

C: 希望所有悬锋人，都能顺利找到自己的新生活。尽管很困难，但若是从最开始就想着逃走，逃回熟悉的地方，必然不会有改变。
E: May every Kremnoan find a new life. Though it's difficult, fleeing back to familiarity from the start ensures no change will ever come.

C: （虽然过程莫名其妙的…至少「一日塔兰顿」的奖励还不赖。）
E: (At least the reward for this odd role isn't half bad.)

C: 所以，我想去拜访一下伟大的刻法勒。据说正是因为它的庇佑，圣城才能挺立至今…也许只要和它说说话，我就不害怕了。
E: That's why I want to visit the great Kephale. They say the holy city stands to this day thanks to their protection... maybe if I talk to them, I won't be afraid.

C: 骗不到他，得想想别的办法……
E: We can't fool him. We need another approach...

C: 哇，好壮观的壁画…比刻法勒广场的那幅还要大！
E: Wow, what a spectacular mural... it's even bigger than the one at Kephale Plaza!

C: 呃，你可能有点过度解读…
E: Uh, you might be reading too much into it...

C: 如果我陪他一起呢？
E: What if I go with him?

C: 神殿中的怪物都被扫荡干净，克利克搀扶着刻牢刻走下了楼梯。
E: The monsters in the temple were all wiped out, and Kilik helped Kelok down the stairs.

C: 到底在燃些什么啊！
E: What on earth are they sacrificing themselves for!?

C: 坏了，真成小赛飞儿了。
E: Oh no... We have a mini-Cipher here.

C: 是个好孩子。
E: She's a good kid.

C: 你将阿波罗尼的回应告诉维吉妮娅，她看上去有些失落，但在你的安慰下很快振作了。
E: You tell Verginia about Apollonius's response. She looks a little let down, but quickly cheers up after your consolation.

C: 抱歉，我脑子还有些涨，兴许是蜜酿喝得昏过去，不知道在哪儿睡着了吧。让各位操心了。
E: Sorry, my head's still a bit woozy. Must've passed out from too much honey brew and dozed off somewhere. Thanks for worrying about me.

C: 那个，客人…不知您能否……
E: So... I was hoping that maybe YOU could...

C: 您是说欧洛尼斯祷言吗？不不，您也知道那两尊泰坦曾经水火不容，要是动用欧洛尼斯的神力……恐怕会起到反效果。
E: Oronyx's Prayer? No, no. Those two Titans couldn't stand each other. Using Oronyx's power... would probably backfire.

C: 这个说法可能过于抽象，但这就是我刚刚见到你时的直观印象。休息时间能和好朋友偶遇，怎么说都是件开心的事。
E: ...And this might sound a little strange, but that's how I felt when I first met you, hehe. Anyway, whichever way you slice it, it's always nice to bump into a friend.

C: 差点以为自己被卷入了什么童话故事里了……
E: I almost thought I'd slipped into a fairy tale...

C: 这就是开拓吧。
E: I think that's what's known as trailblazing.

C: 可是下层区还需要你。
E: But the Underworld still needs you.

C: 事情是这样的：诊所里的孩子们听说了你和星穹列车的故事，便吵着闹着要为贝洛伯格的大英雄准备礼物……
E: So, the children in the clinic heard the story of you and the Express, and immediately insisted on sending a gift to the hero of Belobog.

C: 我们出发吧！{NICKNAME}！
E: Full speed ahead, {NICKNAME}!

C: 答应我，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}，我不在的时候……
E: Promise me, honorary member {NICKNAME}: When Hook isn't here on the train...

C: 老巫婆更漂亮！
E: The old witch looks nicer than either of them!

C: ——虎克决定啦，等虎克和鼹鼠党的大家找到了宝藏，也帮老巫婆翻新一下诊所好了，就当是报答一饭…一饭……
E: I've made up my mind. When The Moles find treasure under my leadership, we'll help the old witch make her clinic shiny and sparkly...

C: 在这里转了这么久，好像还是没个能用的灵感…到底是怎么回事？
E: Hmm, I've been on the Express for a while but I still don't have any new songwriting inspiration. How strange...

C: 运输物资…吗？听起来确实很方便……
E: Transfer supplies... huh. That's not a bad idea.

C: 只是…姬子小姐手制的那个…黑色的饮料，味道实在……
E: But that brown drink that Himeko makes... it's very...

C: 你的身体不大健康。
E: You're not in the best health.

C: 喂——喂喂——
E: Hello? Hello...?

C: 好的，谢谢你的邀请。
E: I will. Thank you for your invitation.

C: 那就好，帕姆能，我也能呀～
E: Great! If Pom-Pom can, then so can I!

C: 日有所思夜有所梦。
E: Dreams are a window to your inner thoughts.

C: 这要看你如何定义「好」与「不好」了。
E: It depends on how you define "well."

C: 《银河神话举隅：神话中的星神内涵叙略》也不错，你有空的话可以看看。
E: Examples of Cosmic Legends: A Collection of Aeon References in Myths is also quite good. You can try that book when you have time.

C: 总之，谢谢你，愿意对我说这样的话。
E: Anyways, thank you for saying these things to me.

C: 我当年可是修了它足足三次，三次都是从濒死边缘把它救回来……
E: I fixed this thing three times. Three times I managed to bring it back from the brink of death ...

C: 列车智库随时欢迎你。
E: The Express' data bank welcomes you at all times.

C: 是啊，我也觉得有值得一试的价值。
E: I agree. They're at least worth a try.

C: 我说的是咖啡——应该是叫这个名字吧？
E: I'm talking about coffee — is that what it's called?

C: 不过，能像这样偶尔来到你们的列车上做客，我就已经很满足了。
E: But I'm already very happy that I get to visit your Express like this once in a while.

C: 脑子…转不动……
E: Makes my brain a little... slow.

C: 「镰叶紫菀草」，就是……
E: Asters, you know, Asters...

C: 我盯着你呢，账账！可不许乱吃东西哦。
E: I have my eyes on you, Numby! Make sure you don't eat anything you're not supposed to.

C: 这点困难都克服不了的话，还当什么大守护者——呃啊，好苦……
E: How can you call yourself a supreme guardian if you can't overcome a cup of coffee? Ugh, it's so bitter...

C: 想不明白，估计这辈子都想不明白了。不过也无所谓——对我来说，过好每一天，活出自己想要的样子，这才是最重要的事。
E: I can't understand it, and maybe I never will. It doesn't matter though — making the best of every single day and living life the way I want to is what's important.

C: 咳…不好意思，我不太擅长这个。就当是为了报答你们准备的一点小心意吧…不是什么特别贵重的东西，你可别嫌弃。
E: Ahem... I'm sorry, I'm not very good at this. This is just a little something to say thank you. Nothing expensive — I hope you don't mind.

C: 未来在列车前行的路上若是遇到了难处，别忘了罗浮永远是诸位的避风港。
E: If the Express ever runs into trouble in its future endeavors, please remember that the Luofu will always be a sanctuary for you all.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来得正好。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're just in time.

C: 得亏你们列车长准备了相位灵火的烧灰作为茶点，大爷我今天心情好，就不计较了。
E: Luckily for you, your conductor had the foresight to prepare some Phase Flame ash as a snack. I'm in a good mood today, so I'll let it slide.

C: （递出伤药）
E: (Give ointment)

C: 一个锦绣之乡，那里的水很清澈。父亲是雕刻家，我与母亲一脉相承，热衷科研。母亲离世后，我应她的要求，保留了她的脑叶切片。
E: With its pristine waters, my homeland is like a tapestry of wonders. My father was a sculptor, but it was my mother's passion for research that I shared. Upon her passing, I held onto a piece of her brain tissue, as per her wishes.

C: 你和丹恒去说吧
E: You should tell Dan Heng.

C: 你觉得这几盒子弹…
E: About these boxes of bullets...

C: 如果可以…能借用几张列车上的唱片吗？三天…两天就行，或者一天也可以。
E: If it's possible... may I borrow a few of the records on the Express? Just for two or three days... or even just one day will do.

C: 喜欢我！
E: They like me!

C: 但明明试验了这么多次，不应该呀…第一次登上列车，这按钮就掉链子。还好我还带了几根烟花棒！
E: I tested it so many times just to make sure... And now that I finally boarded the Express, it doesn't even work. Oh well, luckily, I brought along some sparklers too!

C: 与此同时，「记忆」的祝福也会在那一刻降临，加之给诸位，敬请期待这份惊喜吧。
E: At the same time, the blessing of Remembrance will fall upon everyone. Please look forward to this surprise.

C: 虽然不知道你正面临着怎样的选择，但请相信，知识和经验一定能够有助于你的判断。它们能够让你游刃有余地应对选择结果。
E: I don't know what choices you will face, but please have faith that knowledge and experience will surely aid you in your judgment. They will help you adeptly arrive at your decision.

C: 这样吗…我记得那位老板说这颗同样绚丽的五彩晶石正是五彩种子的产物。
E: Is that so... I recall that shopkeeper said that this equally splendid Rainbowite is the product of rainbow seeds.

C: 嘁，它的本名土得很……
E: Tsk, its real name is considerably more insipid...

C: 我觉得自己是零……
E: I feel like a zero...

C: 空间站用于进行各种生物实验的密封舱，曾被用来隔离危险物质，你很好奇它究竟装过什么东西。
E: The sealed pod is used to conduct various biological research at the space station and was once used to isolate dangerous substances. You wonder what kind of stuff it has contained.

C: 他是个没朋友的可怜人。
E: He's a pitiful guy with no friends.

C: 因为他是我的客户，跟客户只能谈生意，不能谈友情。
E: He's my client. I talk business with clients, not friendship.

C: 你、你可别误会了，甜甜圈这种东西，帕姆一天只吃三个……
E: Do—don't get the wrong idea! Pom-Pom only eats three donuts a day...

C: 我是华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀，莱姆士汀家族第二十五任家主。幸会！
E: I am Wallace Cambridge Limestein. I am the <unbreak>25</unbreak>th head of the Limestein family. Pleasure to make your acquaintance!

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 抱歉，我很忙。有事请预约，好吗？如果你预约了——呃，现在是我的休息时间，你可以先去窗口取号排队，预计在一个小时后就会轮到你……
E: Sorry, I'm busy. Please make an appointment. If you already have an appointment... well, I'm on break, so you can get a number and wait until you are called. It's expected to be your turn in an hour...

C: 都说了，现在是休息时间…好吧，既然你执意要问，那就问吧。
E: I just said I'm on break... Fine, if you insist.

C: 我负责行政区的街道和社区事务，倾听来自基层民众的请求，解决日常的民生难题。
E: I'm responsible for grassroots affairs in the Administrative District, listening to basic requests from people, and solving day-to-day issues.

C: 抱歉，我刚刚在脑海里构思稿子的细节，没注意到你。
E: Sorry, I was thinking about the details of something I'm writing. I didn't notice you.

C: 你这算哪门子科研？
E: First time seeing anyone doing research like this.

C: 啊～喔～啊～啦啦啦啦～
E: Ah, ah, ah, ah! La, la, la, la!

C: 「今夜我看见你眼里泪光晶莹～你是否还会爱我～在黎明之后～」像《回到黑夜》里的这一段低音，小女子就唱不来呢。
E: For example, the contralto in Back to the Night is something that's beyond me. "I saw the tears in your eyes tonight, will you still love me after dawn~"

C: 我从小的兴趣爱好就是折腾机械，所以工作起来也不会感到累。或者说，我潜意识里压根没把这些活计当工作……
E: I've loved tinkering with machines since I was a kid, so my work doesn't tire me out. Or maybe subconsciously I don't view this as work...

C: …所以你又去买了透镜？
E: ...So you bought an aether lens?

C: 我会小心的。
E: I'll be careful.

C: 这是怎么回事呢？我也没什么头绪…你说，会不会是因为最近温度变低了？
E: Why? I have no idea... Do you think it's because the temperature has got colder lately?

C: 你也听到了吧？我可是在一开始就介绍得很清楚了……
E: You heard my sales pitch, right? I made everything very clear...

C: 你先玩吧，不打扰你咯。
E: Have fun. See you.

C: 奥列格？
E: Oleg?

C: 正好我眼下也没什么事要做，你要不介意，可以跟我寒暄几句。
E: I happen to have some free time. If you don't mind, you can chat with me.

C: 先简单说说我们歌德家族吧！毕竟这两家饭店都是我们家族产业。据说我们家族从寒潮之前就存在了，还和大守护者阿丽萨•兰德关系不错哩。
E: I'll start with the Goethe family! After all, both hotels are our family business. It is said that our family was already here before the Eternal Freeze. We had a good relationship with Alisa Rand, the Supreme Guardian.

C: 嗐，这不是要顺应时代潮流嘛。你也听说了吧？上下层区估计最近就要重新开放往来了——
E: Hey, I'm just following the trend, right? Haven't you heard the same? They're opening up the Overworld and the Underworld again...

C: 嗯…因为洞螈很好吃？
E: Hmm... because they are delicious?

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: …呵，算了，反正我要做的事都是一样。在下层区荒废的这些年，我要靠加倍…不，三倍的努力给追回来，至少不能被那群铁卫正规军给看扁了！
E: ...Hah, forget it. What I have to do remains the same. I have to double... no, triple my efforts to get back all those years I wasted in the Underworld. I can't allow myself to be underestimated by those official Silvermane Guards!

C: 那不是坏事了？
E: He got him there.

C: 听说最近前线的怪物明显变少了…不过这都是听说啊。毕竟我只是个后勤，根本没上过战场。
E: Well, I heard the monsters on the front line have dwindled recently... But that's just some people talking. I'm just a logistics guy, I've never set foot on the battleground before.

C: ——而我今天将解开诸位的疑虑，让你们切身感受到「存护」恩典的实在，让你们叹服筑城意志的伟大……
E: ...And yet comes this very day, I shall resolve your doubts and let you feel the true grace of Preservation, let you marvel at the almighty will of the Architects...

C: 听起来很轻松。
E: It sounds easy.

C: 所以…克拉拉和史瓦罗先生是「家人」。这样…应该没错吧？
E: So... Mr. Svarog and I are family. I think... that's the right word?

C: 实话实说，{NICKNAME}——「地火」迟早会解散，自从我和娜塔莎建立起它的那天，我们就料想到这个结果了。
E: Realistically speaking, {NICKNAME}, Wildfire will be disbanded eventually. Natasha and I have been aware of this since the day we established it.

C: 我想听…
E: I want to hear...

C: 伊妮丝的表演结束了。
E: Eunice's performance ends.

C: 挥着洁白的剑，刺穿了恶毒的星核
E: Smashing Stellaron like a brutal isotope

C: 佩拉是我的好朋友。我们在贝洛伯格士官学校读书的时候就认识了。
E: She's a good friend of mine. We go way back to our days at the Belobog Cadet School.

C: 为自己热爱的游戏贡献一份属于自己的力量，这恐怕是每个游戏玩家都梦寐以求的工作了——您说对吧？
E: Contributing to a game you love is the greatest dream for any gamer. Don't you agree?

C: 什么样的球落地后不会反弹？
E: What kind of ball doesn't bounce?

C: 还是干点别的吧。
E: Let's do something else.

C: 也好——还是把你曼妙的歌喉留给真正渴望它的人吧。
E: That's fine. You should save your wonderful singing voice for someone who really wants to hear it anyway!

C: 大守护者好像要颁布新政策了。
E: I think the Supreme Guardian is going to issue a new policy.

C: 那敢情好啊！新任守护者年纪虽然小，但确实有点能力嘛。
E: That's good news! The new Supreme Guardian may be young, but she's capable.

C: 哎呦喂，腻死我了……
E: Ack, I'm sick of that...

C: 听说这次的说唱比赛……
E: I heard about the latest rap battle...

C: 别急，再让我回忆回忆……
E: Don't worry. Let me reminisce about it for a while...

C: 克里珀堡特供莳萝草！
E: Qlipoth Fort's special dill stash!

C: 呆够了就下来呗……
E: Come down if you've had enough...

C: 灰宝…打个滚！
E: Gray... Do a roll!

C: ~点燃篝火照亮四方~
E: Bonfires ablaze, lighting the sky~

C: 工作台上也没有人。
E: And there's no one at the workbench.

C: 虽然贝洛伯格历史只有七百年左右，谈不上悠久；况且许多文物已经被风雪彻底掩埋，这博物馆实在没有多少可以展出的内容……
E: Though, Belobog's history is only seven hundred years old, it's not really that long. Furthermore, many historical relics have already been buried under the snow, so the museum doesn't really have that many things to put up...

C: …但我们还是绞尽脑汁，试图用所剩无几的史料和艺术品把整个贝洛伯格历史串联起来。就目前的状况而言…我们的目标大约算是达成了吧。
E: ...But we still squeezed all we can in an attempt to string our story together with the little historical sources and art pieces we have. As for our current situation... I guess our goal is somewhat fulfilled.

C: 咳咳…我记得你，{NICKNAME}。虎克和我提起过你，你就是那个拯救了贝洛伯格的{F#小姑娘}{M#小伙子}……
E: *cough* I remember you, {NICKNAME}. Hook told me about you. You're the {F#girl}{M#boy} who saved Belobog...

C: 今日开门迎客，您恰好是第<unbreak>100</unbreak>位，我送老板您一个「避凶驱邪」套餐，权当交朋友了，这是您今天的「转运饰品」，请拿好。
E: You are our lucky <unbreak>100</unbreak>th customer for the day, so I'll give you an "Evil Begone" bundle as a favor. This is your "lucky trinket" for today. Don't lose it now.

C: 星际蝗虫听说过吗？
E: Have you heard of interstellar locusts?

C: 陈机铺是什么？
E: What's the Oldies Depot about?

C: 抛开技术日新月异的新产品不谈，即使是些锅碗瓢盆的寻常物件，它们很少有能够长存的，修修补补也都是徒劳。
E: Forget about all the hot new tech that comes out every week. Even mundane stuff like pots and pans rarely last forever. Fixing things takes effort.

C: 看到了，之前我还到鳞渊境附近凑热闹来着，被云骑给赶回来了，哈哈。
E: I saw, and even tried going to nearby Scalegorge Waterscape to rubberneck, but the Cloud Knights sent me back, haha.

C: 你在别的世界也见过说书人吗？客人这么问…我想你多半是见过的。
E: Have you seen storytellers on other planets? When you put it like that... I can tell you've probably already seen it before.

C: 说明咱俩品味比较接近。我给我们领导看，他建议我「把这张纸撕碎了咽下去，永远都不要给别人看」。
E: That means we have similar taste. I showed it to my boss, but he just told me to shred it up, swallow it, and never show it to anyone ever again.

C: 呵，那你就和你的艺术梦想一起去桥洞子底下喝西北风去吧。你当我是为了害你才和你说这些的吗？大家一起赚钱不好吗，你为什么这么犟呢……
E: Ha, then you can take your artistic dreams and your bridge — and jump off it into a lake! Do you think I said this to cause you pain? Why can't we all make a little money together? Why have you gotta be so pig-headed...

C: 注意到了啊…刚才还和南洁讨论来着。建木重新长出来以前，想拍摄相关内容就必须花钱做特效……
E: I sure did... I was just chatting with Nanjie about it. Before it started growing, we had to spend budget on visual effects if we wanted to shoot that...

C: 闹出了些不大不小的笑话，最后发现建木的事本身是一场乌龙。整一个合家欢，大家都爱看。
E: Some funny incidents take place along the way. In the end, everyone realizes the Ambrosial Arbor crisis is nothing but a misunderstanding. It will be a comedy and a crowd-pleaser.

C: 这位客人，要买点什么吗…嗯？看您的穿着打扮，既不像囚犯也不像狱卒…稀客啊！
E: Would you like to buy something, dear customer...? From the way you dress, you don't seem to be a prisoner or a guard... A rare sight, indeed!

C: 嘿嘿，明面上当然是不允许我们搞这些活动的，但私底下，赤衣大人和我们约法三章，只要听话、守规矩，就默许我们搞一点「小买卖」。
E: Heh heh! Of course they can't openly allow us to conduct business, but Madam Chiyi made a private deal with us. As long as we follow the rules and obey instructions, she'll turn a blind eye to our "little venture."

C: 再说了，别人不需要锻炼身体就能长命百岁，那就不是咱们的目标客户。您到仙舟罗浮上来，可不能空手而归呀。
E: In other words, Xianzhou people who can live for centuries without training are not our target market. When you come to the Xianzhou Luofu, you can't leave empty-handed.

C: 难道…被调到其他辖区去了？
E: Unless... he's been transferred to another jurisdiction?

C: 呸呸呸，这都什么乱七八糟的！我和那地衡司勤务可没有什么奇奇怪怪的关系啊，别误会。
E: Bah, what an absolute mess! There's nothing strange going on between that orderly and me, so don't get the wrong idea.

C: 那行，您先忙。如有需要，我这边随时可以帮您订货。
E: Alright, you get back to your business then. I'll be here should you ever need me to help you place an order.

C: 我们仙舟人的健康意识还是太欠缺了些，建木的现状正好是个反面教材，提醒大家要时刻补水。
E: The Xianzhou residents' health awareness is still lacking. The Ambrosial Arbor now is a good reminder for all of us to drink enough water.

C: 这不就是混吃混喝…
E: Is this not the definition of scrounging...?

C: 灾难终于结束了…
E: The disaster is finally over...

C: 大人您问。
E: Please ask away, {M#sir}{F#ma'am}.

C: 其实我没有被诈骗。
E: Actually, I wasn't scammed at all.

C: 嗯。现在还是上班时间，请不要给执事的正常工作造成麻烦。
E: Hmm. It's still currently during business hours, so please do not cause any trouble for our busy officers.

C: 好的。
E: Sure.

C: 我可真是太喜欢你了，{F#好妹妹}{M#好兄弟}，我们随便聊点儿什么吧。
E: Thanks for doing that for me, {F#lady}{M#man}. Let's talk about literally anything.

C: 能讲讲「埃伊加文明」吗？
E: What's this "Aigaian" you speak of?

C: 我老家的贸易不发达，自从星际和平公司入驻以后，继续做本地生意也到头了，所以我和家乡的几个小伙伴一合计，凑了钱，搭了伙找找天外的机会。
E: Ours isn't a hyper-developed star system. Once the IPC settled in, that was the end of our local business economy. So, I teamed up with a few hometown friends, pooling our money to make opportunities for ourselves beyond the sky.

C: 后来，我以为里面装着什么金银财宝，棺材只是一种掩人耳目的方式，你可能听说过银河里有一些不能被自然光直射的宝贝……
E: Later, I thought there must be a treasure or fortune inside, and the coffin was just a red herring. You may have heard that some cosmic treasures don't fare well under natural light...

C: 平时工作强度大吗？
E: Is work usually stressful?

C: 暂时没什么事。
E: That's all for now.

C: 您请问吧。
E: Ask away.

C: 我不打扰了，请继续演奏。
E: I won't bother you any further. Keep on playing.

C: 嘁，你不肯说，那我也不知道。
E: Tsk, if you're not talking, I'm not telling you anything.

C: …太卜司这地儿莫不是有点问题，天天都有人问我有什么「最新消息」「内幕消息」的。这究竟是有什么风声了？你们倒是仔细说说，别光问我啊！
E: ...Could it be that there's something wrong with the Divination Commission? People keep asking me day in day out whether I have the "latest news" or "inside scoop." What kind of talk is this? Just be straight up with me, and stop asking all these questions!

C: 怎么可能，一定是你看错了！
E: No way. You must be mistaken!

C: 在下知道这答案不能让您满意，但阁下还是别追问了。这个话题就到此为止吧。
E: I know that this answer doesn't satisfy your curiosity, but you really must cease this line of questioning. This topic is closed for discussion.

C: 你好像很享受越狱？
E: You seem to enjoy breaking out of prison?

C: 人嘛总得有点兴趣爱好，有人贪财有人好吃，我这人喜欢的东西有点奇特——越狱上瘾。
E: Well, everyone needs hobbies and interests. Some go in search of money, others like fine food, but I'm a little unique... I am addicted to breaking out of prisons.

C: 我只是路过的，你别凶我呀。
E: I'm just passing by. You don't have to be so mean to me.

C: 但我这人吧，进了局子就不老实。刚开始他们把我关进地衡司的治安所，那里实在是太无聊了，我没忍住就跑了出来。
E: But I just can't sit still. It was when they locked me up that I started misbehaving. At first, they had me locked up in the Realm-Keeping Commission penitentiary, but I was bored to tears, so I had to escape.

C: 哦，你是刚来的，可能不知道阿合马铁窗集团。没关系，后面你就慢慢知道了，在幽囚狱总有需要集团的时候。
E: Oh. You're new here, so you probably don't know about the Arma Correctional Group. It's fine. You'll come to understand that, in The Shackling Prison, there will always be times when you need the Group.

C: 想跟您打听一些事儿…
E: I'd like to ask you a few things...

C: 我来这里给金人巷的老街坊们找些新的活计，让他们不必再守着这些破店。
E: I'm here to help those good locals in Aurum Alley find better jobs, so they don't have to be stuck watching those dusty stores all day.

C: 太好了，这正是我需要的。
E: Wonderful! This is exactly what I need.

C: …其实烈焰浓茶在某些世界里会被称为酒。
E: ...Flaming Potent Tea is called alcohol in some worlds.

C: 没别的事了，你忙吧。
E: That's all. I can see you're busy.

C: 瞧您是个生面孔，难得来一趟金人巷吧。
E: You're a new face here. Never been to Aurum Alley before, I guess?

C: 现在就开始规划吧。
E: Let's get the planning started.

C: 处理金人巷事务
E: Take care of the affairs in Aurum Alley

C: 你看，现在我也受到了大家的照顾，这也许就是「待人真诚」奏效了。
E: As you see, everyone has been nice to me. Perhaps this is the result of my sincerity.

C: 好的，请您保重。
E: Alright, take care.

C: 在下算不上「在十王司工作」啦…只是被借调到幽囚狱，听从十王司指挥的云骑军而已。您大概也知道，协助十王司的工作，也是云骑军的义务之一。
E: I don't really work for them... I'm actually a Cloud Knight on secondment to The Shackling Prison, so I'm reporting to the Ten-Lords Commission until further notice. As you're probably aware, assisting the Ten-Lords Commission is very much also part of the Cloud Knights' duties.

C: 你看见的是仙舟「圆峤」，舟中居民面有愤恨之情，昔日亲友倒戈为战，混乱中「圆峤」失控，于红巨星的光芒笼罩中渐渐消失……
E: You are seeing the Xianzhou Yuanqiao, whose residents are consumed by rage, and friends turn against each other. In the midst of chaos, the Xianzhou Yuanqiao loses control and is engulfed in the flames of a red giant star...

C: 感觉先生也没有说错。
E: I think your abecedaries might just be right about you.

C: 那你去忙吧，下次有空的时候，咱们捉鬼小队再好好聚一聚。
E: Alright, go take care of your stuff. Next time you're free, let's get the ghost-hunting squad together for a proper catch-up.

C: 想了解一些事…
E: There are things I want to find out more about...

C: 我要寻得卜者最想要的解答，来告慰那人的在天之灵。
E: I want to find this answer, this most sought-after of all answers for us diviners, to appease that person's spirit.

C: 行吧，我也该忙我手上的事了。
E: Sure. I should get back to work too.

C: …不过还是等他们有人手来追我的时候，我再偷偷溜出去吧。
E: ...I should probably wait until they have someone free to come after me before sneaking out.

C: 嗯。如果有时间，可以随时来陪吾聊聊天。
E: Okay. Feel free to come and chat with me anytime.

C: 雪衣大人没事儿吧？
E: Is Madam Xueyi okay?

C: 反正闲着也是闲着，我来告诉{NICKNAME}大人一个秘密吧。其实藏月瓠不仅能够吸收岁阳，还能吸收人类……
E: Well, as I have time on my hands, let me tell you a secret, {NICKNAME}. The Lunaumbra Gourd can absorb more than just heliobi. It can absorb humans, too...

C: 试试就知道了。
E: Give it a try and you'll see.

C: 我好像见过好几个冥差了？
E: I feel like I've seen a lot of spiritfarers?

C: 不过{NICKNAME}大人这种说法也有一定道理，毕竟十王司里怪人很多嘛。俗话说「近朱者赤近墨者黑」，说不定是我被影响了。
E: You may have a point, {NICKNAME}. After all, there are a lot of strange people in the Ten-Lords Commission. As the saying goes: "You are the company you keep." Maybe I got influenced by them as well.

C: 有没有人说过你性格很坏？
E: Has anyone told you that you've got a nasty personality?

C: 这样说来，可能以前的绥园也没有我记忆中那么好…只是过去的好时光给它蒙上了一层滤镜罢了。
E: Come to think of it, Fyxestroll Garden might not be as good as I remembered... Perhaps it was my own rose-tinted glasses that filtered away its eeriness.

C: 推测你想询问的是「不赦十恶」。
E: I assume you are asking about the Ten Unpardonable Sins.

C: 停停停，我从业几十年了，我所说的一切都是从顾客的角度提出的专业建议。
E: Hold it, hold it. I've been in this business for decades. Everything I say has always been in the customer's best interests.

C: 成衣比高定便宜很多，这是最庸俗的玩意，压根称不上什么时尚。设计师只会把过时的花样与款式丢过去，还美其名曰「经典款」。
E: Ready-made clothes cost much less than haute couture clothes. Plebeians, if you will, and can't be considered trendy. Tailors will slap on out-of-style patterns on these and hail them as "classics" of the heyday.

C: 小鬼，又来嘲笑我了么？
E: Come to laugh at me again, have you, little brat?

C: 哎，身边很少有人能跟上我的时尚嗅觉，尽是一些抱陈守旧的家伙。我常常感叹这星槎海人来人往，只有我知道「瑞兆」的新算法有多厉害…
E: Ah, there aren't many people these days who can keep up with my sense of fashion. People around me are all out-of-touch. I often think that out of the masses of people who passes Starskiff Haven, only I understand how powerful the new Auspicious' algorithm is...

C: 我早就看出你的小心思了。
E: I already knew what you were trying to pull.

C: 所以我想通啦，这爿小店能周转有趣之物，收支平衡就行。
E: So, I've made up my mind: I'm satisfied as long as this little shop can peddle in fascinating things and make ends meet.

C: 想听听仙舟的传奇故事。
E: I want to hear about the legends of Xianzhou.

C: 怎么仙舟上还有说书人呀？
E: There are storytellers aboard Xianzhou?

C: 无所谓？
E: Either way?

C: 您说这风能把石狮子刮到这里吗？
E: You say the wind carried the stone lion all the way here?

C: 咱俩以后还得登上更大的舞台呢这不是。
E: We are gonna head to some bigger stages for our skits in the future. Right, my bro?

C: 我下次再来吧。
E: I'll come back next time.

C: 诶？这可不行啊，{F#小妹妹}{M#小兄弟}！
E: Not so fast, {F#lass}{M#lad}!

C: 如何走上筋肉命途呢？
E: How can I embark on the Path of Brawn?

C: 哪怕是现在，我的胸大肌和肱二头肌，也在一刻不停地拉扯我的身体，驱使我寻找其他的筋肉引力场。
E: Even as we speak, my pecs and biceps are relentlessly compelling me to move, urging me to seek out other muscle gravitational fields.

C: 神仙姐姐？咱从小就听着神仙姐姐的故事入眠的。说来话长……
E: The celestial lady? I grew up with her stories as bedtime tales! It's a long story...

C: 怎么，你还有什么事要咨询吗，如果是了解交通安全知识，随时都可以。
E: Huh? Is there anything else you need assistance with? If it's anything about traffic safety, feel free to ask me any time.

C: 进出港报告管理办法确认，安全检查指南也…确认，新一轮化外民生活满意程度的调查问卷确认。文件备齐，再确认一下会议预约时间。
E: Management Strategy for Reporting Starskiff Traffic, check. Safety Inspection Guide, check. The life satisfaction survey for the new Outworlder batch, check. Documents are in order... now to confirm the schedule for the meeting.

C: 哦，这不是两情相悦了吗？
E: Oh, doesn't that mean we are lovers?

C: 关于商会…
E: About the guild...

C: 我在寻找强者。我原以为你是，但很可惜，那只是我的错觉，你的纯度还不够。
E: I'm looking for a formidable opponent. I thought you were the one, but alas, that was just wishful thinking on my part. You're not strong enough.

C: 随便聊聊，可以吗？
E: Just a chat, right?

C: 多听多看多思考，很快你就能像我一样了。
E: Watch and learn and you'll be like me in no time.

C: 妈以前在这工作过哦。
E: My mom used to work here.

C: 新烤的琼实鸟串！
E: Freshly grilled berrypheasant skewers.

C: 想吃水果吗？
E: Wanna have some?

C: 先去宣夜大道逛逛？
E: Why not take a stroll along Starwatcher Avenue?

C: 游云绿绿…
E: Cloudy Hotel for Tattlers Neary Far...

C: 我们还得擦亮眼睛…
E: We should keep our eyes peeled...

C: 诶！你这不是抬杠吗？
E: Huh! Are you pulling my leg?

C: …所以就起名叫做「诗云」吧。
E: ...So then let's call it Ode of Clouds then.

C: 罗浮仙舟衣食无忧，还有乞丐？
E: The Xianzhou Luofu is a proverbial utopia, how are there still beggars?

C: 我爱说实话——要饭这技术活，在乞丐业界，我说是第二，没人敢称第一。
E: Honesty's my middle name — when it comes to skills in begging, in this domain, I'm pretty much the de facto leader.

C: 我对仙舟功夫兴趣寥寥…
E: I have little interest in the martial arts of Xianzhou...

C: 当然，能举报绝不打架，能群殴绝不单挑，能持械绝不空手。稳，才是无限制格斗的核心。
E: Of course, if reporting is an option, avoid fighting, if ganging up is possible, don't go solo, and if you can wield weapons, never go empty-handed. Stability is the core of Lawless Brawl Style.

C: 小孩子能看？
E: Is this child-friendly?

C: 「我没自由，我失自由，我伤心痛苦眼泪流。」哎，真是闻着伤心听者流泪啊！
E: "I have no freedom/I lost my freedom/These tears I shed for pain and sorrow." Ah, that's warranted to send the audience reaching for a handkerchief!

C: 唉？不继续打我了吗？你可千万不要因为我是娇花而怜惜我！
E: Eh? You've stopped hitting me? Don't stop on account of me being a delicate little flower!

C: 用点力！人家吃的住～
E: Use more force! I can take it!

C: 你看我像是参加比赛的吗？
E: You think I'm here to participate in the tournament?

C: 不会打，我就教你嘛。
E: I'll teach you how if you don't know how to.

C: 我就是客气客气而已。
E: I'm just being polite.

C: 可是，我还没有准备好。
E: But I'm not quite ready.

C: 绘星大人去找太卜大人…
E: Huixing went to the master diviner...

C: 强身健体，不容错过！
E: Don't miss the opportunity to be fit!

C: 你听听你都说了什么！
E: Listen to just how ridiculous you sound!

C: 几句话罢了，别往心里去。
E: Don't take the comments to heart.
*sigh*

C: …我觉得没什么区别啊。
E: ... It looks the same to me.

C: 你的朋友一定会感受到的。
E: Your friend will surely feel it.

C: 所以你吃醋了？
E: Are you jealous?

C: 等我展露出仙道神通，你，还有你，一个都逃不了！
E: Once I reveal my celestial powers, neither you — nor you — will be able to escape!

C: 我也去听卡吕普索说了啥。
E: I'll go see what Calypso has to say too.

C: 黄金大饭店要开业了吗？
E: Is The Grand Restaurant about to open?

C: 阿格莱雅大人曾经帮我梳理过几次，但我也不希望自己那微渺的愿望，将她置于险境。
E: Lady Aglaea has helped groom me up a few times before, but I wouldn't want my trivial wishes to put her in harm's way.

C: 怎么还有人受伤？
E: Why are there still people getting hurt?

C: 再用缇安的火箭，给怪手提供火力！这样，火箭一定能飞得又快又准！
E: Then use Trianne's rockets to give the Hand some firepower! That way, the rockets will fly faster and more accurately!

C: 它呀，好言相劝几句，再拿点宝贝出来闻闻，总会理解我的苦衷的！
E: With a bit of sweet talk and some goodies to sniff, they'll understand my reasoning!

C: 咦，灰子，你、你怎么说出这么肉麻的话！
E: Huh? Gray Mystery, h—how could you say something so mushy!

C: 诶？
E: Huh?

C: 这是对我迄今以来全部工作的最好奖赏！
E: This is the best reward for all my work so far!

C: 汝计划以悬锋为饵，可自城邦陷落后，那些厮杀反而成为滋养疯狂的养料。
E: You planned to use Kremnos as bait, but after the city fell, those massacres only became sustenance for madness.

C: 你说得对，罗浮杂俎账号名为「云璃一生应援」的先生。
E: Whatever you say, He-Whose-Ghostly Grove-Account-Is-Named-"YunliFanForLife."

C: 请将所有随身物品放入安检托盘。
E: Please place all your personal belongings onto the security tray.

C: 练内功得有经脉。
E: You need meridian circuits for that.

C: 这在曜青只能算微微辣。
E: This is considered only slightly spicy on the Yaoqing.

C: 你们对「速成」两字有误解！
E: You people don't understand what "crash" means at all!

C: 慧骃执辔，造作兵祸，践踏生灵，以铁蹄缚锁，长夜障目。
E: Rider of the Houyhnhnm who incited riots and trampled upon living creatures. To be restrained by horseshoes and permanently blindfolded.

C: 《持续跳舞的人和悬浮的物体》
E: The Ever-Dancing Man and Floating Objects

C: 材质：苍猿
E: Materials: Gray Ape

C: 一朵蘑菇。
E: A mushroom.

C: 你听到快递箱里传来窸窸窣窣的异响。你猜不到是什么生物——也可能不是——在箱子里乱动。
E: You hear a rustling noise coming from the courier package. You wonder what kind of creature — or thing — is squirming in the package.

C: 下次就没有这么简单了。
E: It won't be so easy next time.

C: 家长们避之不及的东西，你们送到小朋友的眼皮底下？挣钱，咱得有个底线。
E: Putting something that parents avoid right under the noses of children? This is a new low to making money.

C: 弓步压腿！预备，起！
E: Leg lunges! Get ready, go!

C: 道理都懂，就是有点吵。
E: I understand the principle, but it's just a tad noisy.

C: 现在下单有六折优惠！
E: Buy now for a <unbreak>60%</unbreak> discount!

C: 咱们要不要去安慰他？
E: Should we go and comfort him?

C: 一定能行的。
E: It'll work out.

C: 一会儿我请客！
E: I'll treat you later!

C: 太激动了，我三天没睡觉了！
E: I'm so excited that I haven't slept in three days!

C: 在仙舟，「工造司监制」就是高质量产品的代名词。这意味着你可以放心购买——如果你真的需要一只炫酷的船锚。
E: On the Xianzhou, "produced by the Artisanship Commission" is a guarantee of high quality, which means it is safe to buy the cool-looking ship anchor, if you really need one.

C: 容器中装有星槎培养液。如果把它给帕姆照料的植物用会如何？
E: The vessel contains starskiff culture medium. What will happen if you use it on Pom-Pom's plants?

C: 「其义举包括——借残余虫群制造的混乱，刺杀绝灭大君诛罗（由星啸取代）……」
E: "Their noble deeds include the assassination of Zulo the Lord Ravager (replaced by Celenova) during the chaos created by the remaining Swarms..."

C: 我对这所学校失望至极。
E: I'm utterly disappointed in this school.

C: 你、你们听我解释——
E: Guys, guys, please hear me out —

C: 违规倒卖，我要举报你！
E: I'm going to report your scalping!

C: …随后在其中看到了一只物流机巧鸟，似乎已经因能源耗尽陷入了沉睡。在这只可怜机巧鸟的身边还有一张纸条：
E: ...Only to find an express cycrane, seemingly in Sleep mode due to over-exertion. A note has been placed beside this poor cycrane's body:

C: 「因此，我希望能看到剧情向如下方向发展——」
E: "I hope the story will progress in this way..."

C: 合上书籍。
E: Close book.

C: 你伸手，那是一颗沙砾般细小的珠子。与持明卵相较，它如此渺小，像是伤心人梦中眼角垂下的泪。
E: You reach out your hand and see a tiny pearl, so small and minuscule compared to the shimmering egg. The pearl reminds one of a tear shed from the eye of a heartbroken dreamer.

C: 但你的职责到此为止了，浑身枝叶的怪物闯入鳞渊境时，你挥舞长矛笨拙地与之交战。你为破碎的卵壳而哭泣，你的血一如你的泪，涌流不止。
E: Yet, your job comes to an end when a monster covered in leaves barges into Scalegorge Waterscape. Clumsily, you wield a spear to fight the monster. You cry over the broken eggshells, and your blood pours out non-stop like your tears.

C: 喂，这段不准拍！
E: Hey, no filming this part!

C: 是夜，金人巷里又多了一个伤心的骗子。
E: That night, the streets of Aurum Alley saw yet another heartbroken conman.

C: 嗐，古人不都说了吗，「观众是演员的衣食父母」啊！衣食父母请我吃一顿饭，合情合理。
E: Well, "the audience is the hand that feeds" as they say — and I'm feeling pretty hungry right about now. It's only fitting that "the hand that feeds" treats me to dinner, don't you think?

C: 发射皮搋子的吸尘器…
E: A vacuum cleaner that launches plungers...

C: 这也太搞怪了吧？
E: That's just... comical, right?

C: 看你状态不太好，怎么了？
E: You don't look too good, is something the matter?

C: 哎，我这次在罗浮上逛了一圈，真是不堪入目啊。
E: Ah, I went to tour around the Luofu this time, and it was really disappointing.

C: 浮灯微光，并不是只为你而闪耀，有传闻说它身负接引游魂的重责。
E: The shimmering light of the floating lanterns does not only shine for you; it is said that it carries the hefty responsibility of guiding wandering souls.

C: 可是，组长，现在是放假期间……
E: But, team leader, it's the holidays...

C: 「衣装是邂逅浪漫的武器，而你值得最好的。」
E: "Clothing is the best weapon for encountering romance, and you're worth the best clothes."

C: 一家专供人类的苏乐达俱乐部。里面的顾客身高正常，没有尾巴或长耳，身体也不是铁皮构成的。
E: A SoulGlad club that primarily serves humans. Its customers are of usual height, have no tails nor long ears, and are not constructed from steel.

C: 得体的客人们围坐在玻璃窗后的圆桌前。当需要谈论秘密时，他们便会拉起窗帘——看来今天的秘密有点多。
E: Respectable guests sit before the round table behind the glass. When they must discuss secrets, they will pull down the curtain. It appears there are many secrets today.

C: 为筑梦边境提供能源的小屋，总有人对它的原理感到好奇——最后他们要么打不开门，要么只能发现里面空无一物。
E: A little house that provides power for the Dream's Edge. There'll always be some who are curious about the principles behind its operation. Eventually, either they can't get the door open, or they'll find that there's nothing behind it.

C: 你曾在此醒来。如今你感到好奇，倘若于这破碎梦中就此睡去，再次睁开眼时自己将出现在哪里？
E: You once woke up here. Now you are curious: If you sleep here in this fragmented dream, where would you appear when you once again open your eyes?

C: 长沙发最适合睡觉了，尤其是你还可以拿那些梦泡当枕头。
E: The sofa is most appropriate for sleeping, especially when you can use these dream bubbles as pillows.

C: 「…到…最后…他也没有…离开…我们不会离开……」
E: "... Till... the last moment... he didn't... leave... We won't leave..."

C: 扭曲的钟表，它所指的时刻和梦境本身一样混乱。
E: Twisted clocks, the moments they point to are as confusing as the Dreamscape.

C: 所以…等于什么都不干？
E: So... you're basically doing nothing, right?

C: 我从不过滤他人的评论。你在那里可以看到盛赞我的、攻讦我的、攻讦盛赞我的人的、攻讦攻讦我的人的、到处拱火的以及路过看热闹的……
E: I never filter the comments. You'll be able to see compliments, criticisms, criticisms for those who compliment me, criticisms for those who criticize me, trolls who instigate drama for fun, and bystanders...

C: 果然我还是太过年轻，竟把鱼目错当珍珠。我为了她不远万里来到匹诺康尼，可她呢……
E: Indeed, I'm too young and naive, and I put my trust in the wrong person. I traveled thousands of miles to Penacony for her, but she...

C: 送给你！我现在看到这个就恶心！
E: Here, take it! The mere sight of this makes me want to throw up!

C: 还有！来看看这是什么——仓鼠球骑士毛发护理师证！我才考到的。厉害吧！
E: There's more! Feast your eyes on this: A Hamster Ball Knight hairstylist cert! I just got it too. How about that!

C: 假的。没有意义。只是骗自己。有什么用。
E: Fake. Meaningless. Delusional. Pointless.

C: 相信我，那不是个美好的故事…大概不符合您的审美，所以我就省下这个口舌了。
E: Believe me, it's not a pretty story... and probably not a great fit for your aesthetics. I'll leave it at that.

C: 您请回吧，我需要些时间整理下思绪……
E: Please leave. I need some time to organize my thoughts...

C: 我就随便看看。
E: I'm just looking around.

C: …还想看看吗？我的藏品还有许多。
E: ...Want to see more? I've got plenty of goodies.

C: 在少女的盛情之下，你简单讲了些关于星穹列车的故事。
E: Spurred by the girl's enthusiasm, you briefly recount a few anecdotes about the Astral Express.

C: 明明、明明其它题材就没问题…明明就连以哥哥们为原型写的那些——唔，小说——都能大卖……
E: I—I obviously don't have problems with other themes... Even those novels written based *hic* on my older brothers' drafts were major hits...

C: 人为制造的东西当然不符合要求。这点刚才说得很清楚了。
E: Of course artificial entities won't meet the requirements. I already made that very clear.

C: 是你啊…咱们的谈话可不能公开哦。
E: Oh, it's you... Our conversation is off the record.

C: 就先说到这儿吧。
E: That's all for now.

C: 既然能赚到这么多钱…我是说，既然有这么多客人喜欢，何必费劲去想别的节目呢？
E: Since she brings me so much wealth... I mean, since she's everyone's favorite, why is there a need for me to think of other actions?

C: 你再次看向路灯小姐。它的脖颈是那样修长，挂在上面或许会很舒服……
E: You look at Miss Street Lamp again. It must be comfortable to hang on its long and slender neck...

C: 也许我会以《家人》为题，再画一幅画吧…我是不是不该和外人说这么多？
E: Maybe I will do another painting under the title, Kinship... Have I shared too much with an outsider?

C: 也许我会以《家人》为题，再画一幅画吧……
E: Maybe I will do another painting under the title, Kinship...

C: 如果您以后在某处遇见她，请务必替我递上一句话：「有只广告牌在中央车站前等你，它会一直等下去的！」
E: If you happen to meet her somewhere, please tell her one thing for me: "There is a billboard in front of the Golden Central Station waiting for you. It will always be waiting for you!"

C: 当然，它还算不上稳定，我还在思考改善方案。
E: Of course, it is still not entirely stable. I am still thinking of a plan to improve it.

C: 真的亲密无间？
E: Are they really?

C: 想听西衍先生说书了。
E: I want to listen to Mr. Xiyan's storytelling now.

C: 烦不烦、烦不烦、烦不烦！简直没完没了——
E: Annoying, annoying, so annoying! Will it never cease!

C: …但她为什么一直盯着你？这让你有点犯怵。她好像在等着你开口，但你完全不知道现在还能说些什么。
E: ...But why does she keep staring at you? You're a little apprehensive — she appears to be waiting for you to continue talking, but you don't know what else to say.

C: 如果家族再不重视这个问题，匹诺康尼的演奏家迟早都会出走…梦中属于活物的音乐将会走向末日！
E: If The Family does not take this problem seriously, all of Penacony's musicians will leave sooner or later. The music that belongs to living beings in dreams will soon come to an end!

C: 那些东西好像确实和我以前看过的智能乐器不同——它们似乎有自己的思想，有自己的性格，就像是「生命」一样……
E: Those things are certainly different from the smart musical instruments that I've encountered before. They appear to be sentient, and have their own personalities, as if they had life in them...

C: 是你啊，我的朋友。让我们…嗨起来？
E: It's you, my friend! Shall we... party?

C: 现实酒店里的那些年轻服务员，每次一见我就怕得要死，却在背地里联合起来说我苛刻。
E: Those waiters in the hotel in reality, every time they see me, they're scared half to death. Then, when they're behind my back, they gang up and say that I'm cruel.

C: 这就是苏萨先生的《糖浆主义宣言》，你们都该明白这个道理！
E: That is precisely Mr. Sousa's Syrupism Manifesto. Make sure you understand this lesson!

C: 事发之后，很多人为我辩护。他们说这些不是我的错，他们说这是施工方的问题，他们说这是选材的失误…可我很清楚，这就是我的错。
E: After the incident, many people came to my defense. They said that it was not my fault; they said that it was the construction company's fault, and they'd made a mistake when selecting materials... But I knew very well, that this was my mistake.

C: 你又大幅度掸了掸衣摆、跺了跺脚——演奏者依旧忘我；
E: You flick your sleeves and stomp your foot dramatically, yet the pianist remains unaware of your presence.

C: 先走了，回见。
E: See you next time.

C: 所以我是谁？
E: So, what's my name?

C: 嗯，有困难就来找我。
E: Please feel free to contact me if you encounter any trouble.

C: 只是开个玩笑，没有挖苦您的意思。对于这些信息，我向来开诚布公！
E: Just kidding. Well, I'm always open and honest about this aspect!

C: 你开始给爱德华医生讲述你的神奇梦境。
E: You start describing your wondrous dream to Dr. Edward.

C: 只要您投入一点点{RUBY_B#信用点}苜蓿币{RUBY_E#}，窥梦电话就能自动检索你的通讯录，找到您正在熟睡的某位朋友——
E: Just insert a small amount of {RUBY_B#credits}Alfalfa credits{RUBY_E#}, and the phone will automatically search your contacts for a sleeping friend and allow you to listen to their dreams...

C: 晚上好，尊贵的客人！您今天是否有兴趣打一通神奇的「窥梦电话」？
E: Good evening, esteemed guest! Would you be interested in making a Dreampeek Call today?

C: 窥梦电话突然爆发出一阵脆生的「叮铃」声——你听不出那是嘲弄还是爽朗的笑。
E: The phone suddenly emits a crisp ring, leaving you uncertain whether it is a taunt or a hearty laugh.

C: 一台设计十分荒诞的电话机被固定在这里，等待路过的好奇宾客拿起它的听筒。
E: A peculiarly designed telephone is fixed in place, waiting for curious passersby to pick up its receiver.

C: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
E: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

C: …哦，你是指聪明的头脑！
E: ...Oh, you mean your brilliant mind!

C: 我给你……
E: I'll give you...

C: 等等，我还有问题！
E: Hold on. I have some questions!

C: 你为什么不会「啾」？
E: Why don't you "tweet" when you speak?

C: 滴~嗒！灰色的朋友，我们又见面啦！
E: Tick-tock! Here we are again, my gray friend!

C: 加拉赫先生？倒是很少有来找这位先生的客人……
E: Mister Gallagher? Guests asking to see Mister Gallagher are rather rare...
