C: 从理论上讲，你有权向她做出告解，但她冷若冰霜的表情让你打消了这个想法…或许应该等她心情好点再说？
E: In theory, you have the right to give her a confession, but her frosty visage quashes any such notions... Perhaps come back when she's in a better mood?

C: 就这样吧，拜拜。
E: That's it. Bye-bye.

C: 我们是不是见过。
E: Haven't we met before?

C: 不聊了。
E: That's it for today.

C: 那么现在，请离我远点。
E: Now, please stay away from me.

C: 嘿呀，我就喜欢您这样的客人。来，经典苏乐达一瓶，您拿好！
E: Hey! You're the best kind of customer! Here, one Classic SoulGlad.

C: 你曾经听那位仙舟艺人女孩说过，以前他们家里吃饭也用这么大的圆桌。
E: You once heard that young artist on the Xianzhou say that her family used to eat at a giant round table of this size.

C: 嘿，我看你们很有讲脱口秀的天分，跟我去参加「奇异果」电台怎么样？
E: Hm, I think you two would be great at stand-up comedy! Why don't you join me at Kiwis radio station?

C: 为什么不是「司令」在这？
E: Why isn't Mr. Bigwig at the door?

C: 先警告你一句，别对那些可爱的小动物动歪心思。它们都很纯粹，离远点，不准随便靠近，免得沾染上人的臭味。
E: Consider yourself warned — don't get any funny ideas about those cute little animals. They are pure, and it's best to keep your distance, or you will taint them with human stink.

C: 咦？！…对、对不起！我需要暂时离开，来好好平复我的情绪！
E: Huh!?... I... I'm sorry! I need to take some time away to calm down my emotions!

C: 我先走了。
E: I'm heading off, then.

C: 虽然我也想继续与你在棋盘上角逐厮杀，但非常可惜，下班时间已经到了。
E: I would like to continue our intense clashes on the board, but alas, it is time for me to punch the clock.

C: 瞧瞧这娃娃房、瞧瞧这大剧院，被人搞得破破烂烂——就像是有人在此同星神打了一场！
E: Just look at this child's room, and this giant theater — it's been ruined. It's as if someone had an epic battle with an Aeon in here!

C: 而我为此付出了什么呢？不过是些微不足道的代价：他们谓我恶魔，将我流放，咒我颠沛流离，令我不得归乡。
E: And what have I paid for with this? A meager price not worth mentioning: They labeled me a devil, exiled me, cursed me with vagrancy, and forced me to never return to my hometown.

C: 这位高贵的指挥家似乎正在自言自语…看起来可真古怪。
E: This haughty conductor seems to be talking to himself... What a weirdo.

C: 我爱朋克洛德，同时我也无法抑制住心中快要喷涌而出的叛逆精神，所以才受家族邀请来到这里，帮助建设匹诺康尼。
E: I love Punklorde, but I can't contain the rebellious spirit that's always bursting up out of me — so I took up an invitation from The Family to come here and help build Penacony.

C: 我还有粉丝？
E: I have fans now!?

C: 我承认那很有趣，但远不如一些专业艺人那般打动人心。说实话，当时我并不觉得你们能够通过。
E: I admit, it was lots of fun — but it was nowhere near as impressive as some of the other pros. Honestly, I didn't even think you were going to pass.

C: 红哨小姐平静了下来。对于熟悉她的人来说，这称得上是个奇迹。
E: Miss Red Whistle calms down, which is a miracle if you ask anyone who knows her.

C: …算了，无伤大雅。只要能把活干好，你想怎么称呼我都行。
E: ...Whatever, no harm no foul. Call me whatever you like, as long as you get the job done.

C: 要说这份工作最让人神清气爽的地方，大概就是很能满足人的掌控欲了吧——只要我想，我可以依照个人心情随意调度现场的每一个人、每一件道具！
E: If you ask me, the best thing about this job is how it satisfies a person's inner control freak: I can rearrange any actor or any prop on set however I want just based on how I'm feeling!

C: 忘了自我介绍。我叫柯洛达，是个…嘿，星际牛仔！
E: I never introduced myself. My name is Cloda, and I'm a... heh, interstellar cowgirl!

C: 洁白的花瓣飘飞远逝~
E: Blown away, the white petals~

C: 我和钟表小子是老朋友了。
E: I'm Clockie's old friend.

C: 我和钟表小子不熟。
E: I don't know who Clockie is.

C: 「钟表匠」也是太天真了…即使是动画这种晦涩的形式，即使被记住的不是他自身，也仍希望能够把过去的故事传递到后人手上。
E: The Watchmaker was too naive... Even though it was through the vague form of animation, and he might not be remembered by anyone, he still passionately desired to pass on the tales of yore to future generations.

C: 一枚硬币换一条线索——不许讨价还价。
E: A coin for a clue, and no haggling.

C: 啾！已经找到了这么多小鸟，你难道有台能看到未来的钟表啾？
E: Tweet! You've found so many birds already! Do you have a clock that can see the future or something, tweet?

C: 哪些石头适合用来搭房子，哪种树枝可以和花一起装饰巢穴，猫头鹰老师的作品，永远都能抓住最关键的部分，让小石子变得闪闪发光啾。
E: Which stones are good for building houses, and which branches can be used to adorn nests with flowers... Professor Owl's designs perennially capture the essence of beauty, allowing every little pebble to shimmer and shine, tweet.

C: 呜，抱歉啾，没能帮上客官的忙啾……
E: Waaa, I'm sorry that I couldn't help you out, tweet...

C: 岁月转瞬而过，我也从一个什么都不懂的毛头小子变成了垂垂老矣的商人。当时，谁又能想到，一个毛头小子竟然会制造出风靡整个梦境的商品呢？
E: As time flowed, I went from being an ignorant fledgling to a wizened merchant. Back then, who would even think that a brat would create goods that would take the entire Dreamscape by storm?

C: 而在将士的战壕中、在家族宴会的桌上、在匹诺康尼的史书里，苏乐达从未缺席……
E: And in the trenches of soldiers, at the tables of The Family's banquets, in the history books of Penacony, SoulGlad was ever-present...

C: 我的家族世代都是猎犬，我以猎犬为荣，绝不能接受猎犬的创立者是一个罪人……
E: My family has been Hounds for generations. I take pride in being a Hound, and I would never accept that the Hounds' founder was a sinner...

C: …您想与我聊聊吗？
E: Care to chat with me?

C: ——他们穿过自己所恐惧的末日般伟大的海洋，但最终所看到的既不是恶魔，也并非深渊。
E: They roamed the boundless ocean — a vast expanse that is as terrifying to behold as the end times — yet the sight that they ultimately laid eyes upon was not those of devils, nor was it the abyss.

C: 但难不成…我只是…我只是借此来掩饰……
E: However, could it be that... I'm just... I'm just using this excuse to conceal the fact that...

C: 不是，你这些食材……
E: No, your ingredients...

C: ——那种力量连它们自己的身体都无法承受。
E: Their bodies just don't have the capacity to contain so much energy.

C: ——这也能称得上理由吗？还是说，他们真的目光短浅到完全看不出相应的价值？
E: What kind of excuse is that? Are they really so short-sighted they can't see the value of my research?

C: 不过，它究竟是在哪里遇到这种病毒的？
E: I wonder where he found this virus.

C: 虽说我也常常这么觉得啦，以前在学校食堂的时候……
E: I feel the same way. One day during recess in school...

C: 「传统项目部」甚至给我发了短信，问我的卡是不是被盗刷了——现在我还哪敢乱跑呀……
E: The Traditional Project Department even sent me a message to check if that was a fraudulent transaction. That's why I'm not going anywhere else now...

C: 不过呢，他们都将拜倒在我的美貌与名气下。真是拿他们没办法…谁让我生来就是该活在镁光灯下的呢～
E: But they all fawn over my beauty or fame. What can I say? I am simply destined to live under the spotlight!

C: 干我们这行，如果你不能保持冷静，那你就已经输了。
E: In our line of work, you lose the moment you fail to keep your cool.

C: 船长，我不是笨蛋！不要这样欺负我啦！请您好好看看我身上的画像——欺负我就约等于欺负您自己啊！
E: Captain, I'm not a fool! Don't bully me like this! Look at the portrait on me. If you bully me, it'll be just like bullying yourself!

C: 谢谢船长！您这么说我就放心了！我会努力工作的，船长你真是个好人…呜呜……
E: Thank you, captain! It's a relief to hear that! I'll continue to work hard. Captain, you're such a nice person... *sob*

C: 对下属还是别太严苛了。
E: You don't have to be so harsh on your subordinates.

C: 等等，这都是你的孩子？
E: Wait, they're all your children?

C: 再见。愿美好的记忆能填满您的梦境。
E: Goodbye. May your Dreamscape be filled with sweet memories.

C: 而主唱，你懂的，总是乐队里最帅的那一个。
E: As you know, the lead singer is always the most good-looking member of the band.

C: 唔，你不好糊弄…那就忘掉我一开始说的，快点快点，忘好了吗？
E: Argh, you're not an easy one to fool... Just forget about what I said at the start, alright? Quickly, forget everything.

C: 所以，我们一把火烧了货仓，烧了即将发往货架的上万张专辑，烧了我们四年的梦……
E: Therefore, we lit the entire warehouse on fire, burning the tens of thousands of albums and setting ablaze our dreams that we had worked the past four years for...

C: 更可恶的是…天呐，她还那么漂亮！！！
E: And to top it all off, she's just breathtakingly beautiful!

C: 相对地，不要在无价值的人身上浪费太多时间，公司的优秀实习生都深谙此道。
E: The same goes for the converse group. You don't want to waste too much of your time on people who are of no value. Every well performing IPC intern lives by this guideline.

C: 计划永远赶不上变化，想要真正看清未来趋势、掌控市场变量，你至少得有个天才那样的头脑——可我要真是天才，还用得着上课吗？
E: Nothing ever goes entirely as forecasted, so you'll need to have the mental capacity of a genius to astutely pick up on emerging trends and navigate market variables. Then we're back to the question again: Is there a point to sitting in class if you're already a genius?

C: 皮皮西的体能很弱无法支撑球笼赛强度…皮皮西能成首席是赞助商看中了球笼赛运动在皮皮西市场的发展潜力……
E: Pepeshi are too physically weak to handle the intensity of a Spheroid Race... A Pepeshi was only able to become the lead driver because sponsors took an interest in the potential development of Spheroid sports in the Pepeshi market...

C: 可你是谐乐学院的啊…
E: But, you're from Charmony Academy...

C: 你为什么想要当志愿者呢？
E: Why have you chosen to volunteer?

C: 路过都不忘吃口瓜是吧。不过…要真这么好奇的话，和你说说也不是不行。
E: Just making sure to get the gossip as you wander by, huh? Although... I guess I could tell you more if you're really curious.

C: …这个送给你。以后你可不能成为这样面目可憎的人啊。
E: ...I want you to have this. I hope that you will never become such a loathsome person.

C: 你还挺敏锐的。
E: You have keen senses.

C: 别、别晃！你到底有多少眼睛啊？再晃我就要吐啦…停一停…停一停……
E: Stop, stop shaking! How many eyes do you have!? Stop shaking, or I'm going to hurl... Stop... Please stop...

C: 痛苦挣扎的丽姬娅一头撞上了墙壁，只听「铛——」的一声脆响，少女霎时眼圈通红，眼神却恢复了清明。
E: Writhing in pain, Ligeia hit her head against the wall as you heard a crisp "thud." The young girl's eyes redden with unshed tears, but she seems to have finally regained her senses.

C: 你还会和乐队成员联系吗？
E: Will you still keep in contact with the other band members?

C: （写下严肃的寄语）
E: (Write a serious message)

C: 筑梦学院的事处理好了吗？
E: Has the Dreamweaver Academy matter been settled?

C: 我…我想拜托你给我写一段赠言，毕竟…乐队的共同回忆，是任何同学都无法替代的，所以想麻烦你。不知道你现在方便吗？
E: I... I'd like to ask you to write a message, since... those shared memories with the band are irreplaceable, so I hope it's not too much trouble. I wonder if you're free?

C: 咳咳，你说得对……
E: *cough* You're right...

C: 什么啊，你可是盛会巨星啊，就别跟我开这种玩笑了，大明星！
E: What? You're the Festive Superstar! Stop pulling my leg!

C: 不对，没有「蕉」了，这口癖真是不好改…{NICKNAME}同学，你可是巨星，你的支持肯定能为我引流不少粉丝过来的！记得关注噢，拜托了！
E: Wait, there's no "bana" anymore. It's really hard to kick bad habits... {NICKNAME}, you're a superstar, and your support will surely bring me lots of fans! Don't forget to follow me, please!

C: 恰丽卡的脸红到了耳根，似乎不愿再与你讨论这个话题了。
E: Chaletka's face is red from cheek to ear, like she doesn't want to discuss this anymore with you.

C: 从我的名字便能看出姬子女士的愤怒——真希望她当时说的是其他的话！「再见」、「永别」、「永不复还」、「祝你平安」之类的。
E: One can easily visualize Lady Himeko's wrath from my name — I really wish she had said something else that day! "Farewell," "Goodbye forever," "Nevermore," "Peace be with you," something like that.

C: 您理解了吗？「软没」与「阮•梅」谐音，令人忍俊不禁。
E: Do you get it? It's a funny pun.

C: 比起未来，我更关心你的过去呢。
E: Compared to the future, I find your past more intriguing.

C: 窗帘保护了贵宾的隐私，也为他们献上了窥视他人的权柄。
E: The curtain protects the privacy of elite guests and also provides them with the authority to spy on others.

C: 「音响给我使劲儿造！能做多大做多大，咱们苏乐达不差钱。」
E: "Put your back into making this sound system. The bigger, the better. SoulGlad isn't hurting for money."

C: 包装完好的折纸书，在匹诺康尼的某些商店上可以卖出高价——可惜你凝神望去，它们都不是限量与联名款。
E: An origami book is still in its package. It can be sold for a high price in certain Penacony shops — It's a pity that, when you scrutinize them, none are limited or collaboration editions.

C: 我今天不去梦里了。
E: I'm not going into the dream tonight.

C: 到底来没来……
E: So are they here or not...

C: 是不是该少喝点……
E: I should drink less...

C: 你才是儿童！
E: Kid!? You're the kid!

C: 这里最容易出乱子。
E: It's easy to mess up here.

C: 感觉味道怪怪的…
E: This tastes weird...

C: 那…一个弹簧玩偶？
E: How about... a spring-loaded puppet?

C: 你冷静点…
E: Just calm down...

C: 嘘！小点声！你这样把人吓跑了怎么办？
E: Shush! Keep your voice down! What if you scare her away?

C: 谐乐大典在即，现在又出了这种事，您看……
E: The Charmony Festival is just round the corner and now something like this happens. Look...

C: 再入梦一次就回来了。
E: It'll be back the next time I enter.

C: 我在上个琥珀纪手搓出的一台计算机，在进行第六次四则运算后就卡死、崩溃了。
E: It's a computer that I built by hand in the last Amber Era. It crashed and fell apart after completing its sixth formula.

C: 盛会巨星的出场费，恐怕…
E: I'm afraid the appearance fees for Festive Superstars are...

C: 为什么突然要我来这里加班啊？
E: Why did they make me work overtime here on such short notice?

C: 你这什么记者？专不专业啊？
E: What kind of reporter are you? The moonlighting kind?

C: 想和对手们说些什么？
E: What would you like to say to your opponents?

C: 咳咳！
E: Ahem!

C: 一会儿我就把合同送过来。
E: I'll bring over the contract in a bit.

C: 我帮你联系工作人员。
E: I'll help you contact the staff.

C: 可真美啊！
E: It's so beautiful!

C: 客房里真的有虫子！
E: There's really a bug in the hotel room!

C: 公司会不会把我们裁了？
E: Will the IPC fire us?

C: 这是知更鸟小姐的嘱咐。
E: These were Miss Robin's instructions.

C: 呃…我有？
E: Er... I do?

C: 别嚎了，仔细想想你放哪了？
E: Stop wailing and carefully recall where you put it!

C: 格拉克斯教授，伟大的教育家，筑梦师的先驱，他的功绩使匹诺康尼永世不衰。你问他的功绩是什么？当然是——全部东西，你在梦中能看到的全部东西。
E: Professor Glaux, great educator, pioneer of the Dreamweavers. His merits have made Penacony eternal. You ask what his achievements are? They are, of course, everything. All that you can see in the dream is his.

C: 格拉克斯教授的雕像，据筑梦学院传言，考前在这座雕像下放钞票可以不挂科。谐乐学院曝出：该传言是财富学院传出来的，他们的学生每个学期会把大家放的钞票拿走。
E: Professor Glaux's statue. According to Dreamweaver Academy's rumors, it will ensure that you pass your exams if you leave money by it. Charmony Academy revealed that this rumor was spread by Fortune Academy — their students would take away everyone's money each semester.

C: 只要还在开拓，车厢就会无限延伸……
E: As long as the Trailblazing continues, the express cars will extend endlessly...

C: ——折纸大学竟然已经存在「吹奏乐部」了！！！
E: ...Paperfold University already has a Concert Band club!!!

C: 不要问为何如此重量级的角色没有在《钟表小子》系列动画中出现过，不断推出新角色才是长篇故事能保持生命力的诀窍。
E: Don't ask why such a crucial character didn't appear in the Clockie cartoon series — the introduction of new characters is the secret formula to staying relevant in long-formula storytelling.

C: 拨通「窥梦电话」。
E: Dial the Dreampeek Call.

C: 嗯，此案还真是棘手，多亏司中有你在，否则还不知要拖到何时……
E: Mm, this case is quite tricky. Good thing you were at the commission, or who knows how long this would have taken...

C: 窥梦电话已拨通——您将会听到：拉帝奥教授的梦境。
E: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Professor Ratio's dream.

C: 这是一款角色扮演类游戏，你将扮演一位「三劫时代」的曜青袍哥，刑满释放后，混迹在日新月异的曜青街头，活络筋骨、整顿帮派，并逐步揭晓昔日大哥遇害的真相。
E: This is a role-playing game where you play as a Robe Brethren from the Three Sufferings Era. After serving your sentence, you navigate the ever-changing streets of the Yaoqing, stretching your limbs, reorganizing your gang, and gradually uncovering the truth behind your former leader's murder.

C: 翁法罗斯能撑到那天吗？
E: Will Amphoreus exist until then?

C: 我当然还是希望翁法罗斯存续，这就要拜托各位黄金裔大人了。
E: But then again, I do hope Amphoreus endures — a responsibility that rests on all esteemed Chrysos Heirs.

C: 你！就当我刚是在胡言乱语，别和任何人提起，万一传到我哥耳朵里…我就完蛋了。
E: Hey, you! Forget what I just said and don't mention it to anyone. If my brother finds out... I'm toast.
Tsk...

C: 哈哈，没关系，欢迎下次光临。
E: No worries! Looking forward to your next visit.

C: 如果说一口法吉娜盲盒能让人类变成猴子，你有没有想过猴子再尝一口盲盒会怎么样？
E: If drinking the Phagousa Blind Box could turn humans into monkeys, have you ever thought about what would happen if a monkey drinks it?

C: …难不成会变成人类吗？
E: ...Could I end up turning back into a human?

C: 当然了，超级加倍！
E: Of course. I'll double the fun!

C: 诶呀，看起来你应该会和那位万敌阁下非常有共同语言呢。承蒙惠顾，<unbreak>100</unbreak>利衡币。
E: Oh, it looks like you and Lord Mydeimos share a similar taste. That'll be <unbreak>100</unbreak> Balance Coins. Thank you for your patronage!

C: 这好像确实是个问题。
E: Sounds like a problem indeed.

C: 大部分人其实不能因为参与仪式获得什么泰坦的恩惠，但他们就是觉得不这么做心里就不平衡、生活就没法宁静——你说可笑不可笑？
E: Most people don't really get any Titan blessings from participating in these ceremonies, but they won't find inner peace and won't feel right without worshipping. Isn't that ironic?

C: …嗯？是我没说清楚吗——这只箩筐是我的家，没有我的许可，你不能乱翻它。这下明白了吗？
E: ...Hmm, did I not make it clear enough? This basket is my home, and you keep your hands off and don't dig through it unless I say otherwise. Got it now?

C: ——啊。该不会，这也是他不受其他人欢迎的一个方面？
E: ...Hmmm, could that style have contributed to his lack of popularity?

C: 我这就将您的慷慨付出发布在云石天宫的辩论场里。
E: I will spread word of your generosity across Marmoreal Palace's debate forum.

C: 至少我还活着，对吧？希望雅努斯能给我指条明路。虽然有时候我也在想，活着到底是幸运还是不幸…如果我是幸运儿，那为什么只有我一个人侥幸存活呢？
E: At least I'm still alive, right? I hope that Janus will guide me through this misery. Although, sometimes I wonder if I'm actually fortunate to be alive or not... Is it really fortunate to be the sole survivor?

C: 你好像很讨厌马尔库斯？
E: You seem to really hate Marcus?

C: 风俗？正好最近我朋友在筹备献给法吉娜的仪式，我给你科普一下好了。
E: Customs? It just so happens that my friend has been preparing offerings to Phagousa recently. Allow me to explain them to you.

C: 年轻人啊，我看你在旁边也听了好半天了，怎么，是也对泰坦相关的艺术品感兴趣吗？
E: I see you've been listening in on our conversation for a while, youngster. Well, are you interested in Titan-related artworks, too?

C: 嚯…虽然别人的信仰我不好多嘴，但不够虔诚的话，可是没法的得到神明的青睐啊。
E: Haa... Though I don't like to criticize the faith of others, such a lack of devotion will never win you the favor of the gods.

C: 好嘞，能被您记得是咱的荣幸！
E: Okay. It's an honor to be remembered by you!

C: 「躁动的创生季」，有趣…
E: "Restless Creation Season"? Interesting...

C: 哎呀，说起大地泰坦的故事，可有意思了。你听说过大地兽是怎么来的吗？据说啊，它们是从吉奥里亚的背上长出来的！就像是...嗯...就像是我们头上长头发一样自然。
E: Oh, the story of the Earth Titan is an interesting one. You ever heard about how the dromases came about? They say that they grew out of Georios' back! Just like... Um... Just like how the hair grows out of our heads.

C: …呵，客人，你的敏锐令人惊异，但也很容易招来危险……
E: ...Hah. Dear customer, you are most perceptive... But this can get you into trouble, you know...

C: 想必尼卡多利也会唾弃我的怯懦吧。我失去了荣耀，却并不后悔——总得有人活着把经验传递下去。
E: I am certain that Nikador would despise me for my cowardice, too. I lost my honor, but I have no regrets... There has to be someone who lives to pass on their experience.

C: 我放在家里了…盾牌可是荣耀的象征，万一留下了划痕，不就有损荣耀了吗？
E: I left it at home... That shield is a symbol of glory. If I accidentally scratched it, that would be a taint on glory itself!

C: 那些兄弟，虽说肚子里有三两学识，但就是不愿找个营生。偏偏又想赚利衡币，就只好去打劫，不是，去路上跟人交流。但这抢…这聊天可是门学问。
E: Those brethren, though possessed of smarts, were reluctant to engage in honest work. They wanted to earn Balance Coins, so they had to resort to robbery, er, I mean chatting with people on the streets. But rob... chatting was an art form by themselves.

C: 迷醉最接近法吉娜大人存在的体验。作为法吉娜的信徒，无法感受迷醉是一种失格。我一定是过去无意间冒犯了它，它才对我闭门不见……
E: Intoxication is the closest one can get to experiencing the great Phagousa. As one of Phagousa's disciples, being unable to experience such intoxication is a failure. I must have offended them in the past, and that's why they turn a blind eye...

C: …一突然窜出的男子打破了你的美梦。他介绍此处为奥赫玛国家一级景区，自己是背你爬上来的导游，需要你交付<unbreak>5000</unbreak>利衡币的门票钱和<unbreak>20000</unbreak>利衡币的辛苦费。
E: ...A man suddenly pops up, disrupting your reverie. He introduces this place as Okhema's top national tourist attraction, and that he was the guide who carried you up the mountain. He also requests that you pay <unbreak>5,000</unbreak> Balance Coins in admission fee and <unbreak>20,000</unbreak> Balance Coins for the "service rendered."

C: 你好，帕西提亚！
E: Hi there, Pasithea!

C: 奥赫玛会沿用传统的历法，将每天划分为五个时段，是因为人们错误地认为「黎明机器」的光芒不会改变，无法依据光照确定时间。
E: Okhema adheres to a traditional calendar, dividing each day into five distinct periods based on the mistaken belief that the light from the Dawn Device remains constant and cannot be used to determine time.

C: 空间之外，同样有物存在。我们衡量空间，必然是测算物体间的距离，比较物体间的位置。我们只能说某物离某物近，某物在某物的旁边。
E: There are also objects that exist outside of space. When we measure space, we have to measure the distance between objects and compare their locations in space. We can only say that something is close to something else, or that something is beside something else.

C: 当然方便！你想聊点什么？在艺术方面，我知无不言，希望你到时候别嫌弃我话太多了！
E: Absolutely, now's perfect! What's on your mind? I can talk about art all day. Hope you're up for it!

C: 在我眼里，奥赫玛的每块石头，每缕微风，都诉说着故事。有时是个古老传说，有时是街头的只言片语，它们都能成为我的创作主题。
E: In my eyes, every rock and every breeze in Okhema tells its own story. Sometimes they recount ancient legends, while other times they echo snippets of street conversations — all serving as inspiration for my art.

C: 不过，就因为这事，那个什么树庭的学者们，甚至连元老院都曾经来找过我，问我有没有兴趣加入奥赫玛的探险队。说我的才干当个饲养员有点浪费了…
E: Those Grove scholars and even the Council of Elders has approached me because of my work. They've invited me to join Okhema's exploration teams, saying that my talents go far beyond just tending to the creatures.

C: 讲讲墓地的那个。
E: Tell me about the graveyard one.

C: 偷东西的人练习的是潜行与保密的能力，找回东西的人则是练习侦察和寻物的本事。万敌哥哥说无影寻宝风靡之后，悬锋城就再也没有小偷了…至少没有活着的。
E: Those who steal practice their stealth and secrecy, while those retrieving the items hone their scouting and tracking skills. Mydei said that ever since shadowless treasure hunting became popular, there haven't been any thieves in Castrum Kremnos... or at least, none alive.

C: 我才不要，健身鼓捣出来的死肌肉才没用呢。
E: I don't want to. Those muscles from fitness training are useless.

C: 你也做了个模拟宇宙？
E: You also made a simulated universe?

C: 要不先转给我<unbreak>50</unbreak>信用点？
E: How about sending me <unbreak>50</unbreak> credits first?

C: 我不喜欢宠物…
E: I don't like pets...

C: 关于园丁对奇美拉的态度…
E: About the Gardeners' attitudes towards chimeras...

C: 哎呀，这可就多了去了。最近挺火的是有个能让植物在有风来时发出笑声的「种子」，是植物学家盖亚的贡献，条件并不苛刻，实践起来也挺有趣的。
E: Oh, we've got so many. Something's that quite popular recently is a "seed" that can make plants laughs in the wind. It's a contribution from the botanist Gaia. Doesn't require a lot of conditions and quite a fun experience in application.

C: 毫无疑问，你曾在故事里见过这个庞大的木制道具，瞧它那高高昂起的头颅，以及宽广到足以装进好几个人的空洞腹部——所有特征都与你的认知相符。
E: There is no doubt about it. The giant wooden prop before you is one you recognize from an old story. Its head raised high in the sky and room in its stomach for several people — it has all the familiar characteristics you expect.

C: 你的科学期刊办的怎么样了？
E: How's your science journal doing?

C: 小女子每天都会给她发消息，不过塔米拉小姐比较忙，她最近好像都待在录音室里，有时候回消息会比较慢。
E: I message her every day to keep in touch, but Miss Tamila has been swamped lately, spending most of her time in the recording studio. Sometimes it takes her a while to reply.

C: 啊，好的…也祝您在此得偿所愿！
E: Ah, alright... Then may you find what it is you are wishing for!

C: 你似乎能听懂，但是你不想听懂，你眯起眼睛看着这位道貌岸然的祭司。祭司笑了笑，向你伸出手来。
E: Though you understand what he is getting at, you decide that you'd rather play dumb. You squint your eyes at the sanctimonious priest. The priest smiles and reaches out a hand.

C: 这、这是何物？来命运三相殿奉上贡品、求取神谕的人潮比{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的海浪还要汹涌，可是我至今未曾见到与这相似的东西……
E: Wh—What is this object? The waves of people that come and make offerings to the Temple of the Three Fates dwarf even the waves of {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} in their volume. Yet, I have never seen an item like this before...

C: 感谢您，祭司阁下！阁下的话语令我蒙受神恩，我可真是太幸运了！
E: Thank you, Honorable Priest! Your words are a blessing to me. I truly am fortunate.

C: 那时候可天真了，还以为半神就能用纺锤能纺出命运的丝线，将朋友们联系在一起……
E: Back then, *we* were so naive — thinking that as demigods, *we* could use the spindle to spin threads of destiny and tie our friends together.

C: 她一开始遇见了一群好心的吟游诗人，在他们的保护下行走诸邦。
E: At first, she encountered a group of kind-hearted bards who protected her as they traveled across many lands.

C: 缇宝老师，我想学「百界门」！
E: Master Tribbie, I want to learn how to use the "Century Gate"!

C: 「拥有三重生命之人」…岁月的磨蚀下，*我们*都快忘记这原本的名字。
E: "The one with three lives"... Time's erosion meant we have almost forgotten this original name.

C: 只是…在许多年后，听闻雅努萨波利斯最终陷落、沦为如今仄暗的重渊，*我们*还是会忍不住数次故地重游。
E: But... many years later, when we heard of Janusopolis' final downfall and how it twisted into the dim abyss it is today, we couldn't help but revisit the place several times.

C: 嗷呜！你好，我是属于你的奇美拉，请问有什么需要我做的吗？嗷呜——
E: Awooo! Hello, I'm your chimera. Is there anything you need me to do? Awooo—

C: 赛法利娅…她曾是黄金裔们亲密的伙伴，也曾与我们朝夕相处、嬉笑怒骂。
E: Cifera... She was once a close companion of the Chrysos Heirs, someone we spent our days laughing, arguing, and sharing joys and sorrows with.

C: 所以，我也不能妄自菲薄。救世主的名号…坦然相受，又有何妨？
E: So, I've come to terms with it. If they call me the Deliverer... why not gracefully accept the title?

C: 虽不见其人，但每次前往创世涡心、聆听泰坦之声时，总能感觉到前辈们的英灵仍与我们相伴而行。
E: Though we can't see them, every time we head to the Vortex of Genesis or listen to the voices of the Titans, I can feel the spirits of our predecessors alongside us.

C: 或许你会认为，如今我有了「公报私仇」的机会。
E: You might think I've now gained the chance for personal revenge.

C: 可惜，我也对他们有所求，我也会借给他们。他们瞧不起我，我也瞧不起他们，事实如此，不影响我们之间的利益关系。
E: Sure, I lend it to them — because I also need something from them. They despise me, and I despise them. It doesn't change the fact that we're tied together by mutual interests.

C: 好——作为一出悲剧的舞台，那座城市大致来说就是这样。
E: Well... That's what the city looks like as a stage for my tragic play.

C: 「睡了，睡得比较死。」
E: "I'm going to do a deep eepy."

C: 很遗憾，并非所有贵族都有如我一般的责任心。况且，每个家族的荣耀各不相同，所以我们的做法一定也格位有差。以我家乡举例——
E: Regrettably, not all nobles share my sense of responsibility. Besides, each family honors different qualities, thus our actions naturally vary. Take my homeland, for example —

C: 呵呵，只要你心够诚，为人机警点，保证祭仪不出错，我会为你求来刻法勒的赐福。
E: Ho-ho, as long as your heart is sincere and your actions careful, perform the ritual flawlessly, and I shall request Kephale's blessing on your behalf.

C: 黑潮肆虐，祭仪真的有用吗？
E: The black tide has been wreaking havoc. Do rituals really work?

C: 很遗憾，黑潮的洪流过于喧嚣，无论是天外之声还是命运的呢喃，我都已经无法听清了。
E: Unfortunately, the black tide's flood is too clamorous. I can no longer hear clearly either the voices beyond the sky or the whispers of fate.

C: 现在的我，不过是一个普通的盲女罢了。
E: Now, I am simply an ordinary blind woman, nothing more.

C: 一切都已经结束，一切都行将逝去。
E: Everything has ended, everything is fading away.

C: 坚持一下，「再创世」就快了。
E: Hang on, the Era Nova is almost here.

C: 所以每次他讲故事，我都会去反驳他。塞纳托斯在上，它平等地眷顾每一个逝者…但现在，我不确定了…也许马尔库斯真能听到某些神秘的呼唤吧。
E: So every time he told his stories, I'd argue with him. Thanatos up above watches over every soul equally... but now, I'm not so sure... Maybe Marcus really can hear some mysterious calls after all.

C: 这么说吧，关于「再创世」究竟意味着什么，恐怕就连一直信奉鼓吹它的黄金裔们，也都无法给出一个令人满意的答案哦。
E: The Era Nova? Let's say even the Chrysos Heirs who preach about it can't properly explain what it truly means.

C: 所以，别为我担心！说不定第二天睁开眼，我们就看到重新亮起来的天空了呢。
E: So don't worry! Maybe tomorrow we'll wake to see the sky relit.

C: 阁下，这里是抵抗黑潮的前线，万勿再继续向前了。
E: My lord, this is the frontline against the black tide. Advance no further.

C: 那意味着，它既谎话连篇，又充满真实。
E: Which means it's both full of lies and full of truth.

C: 你的收藏们怎么样了？
E: How's your collection coming along?

C: 女孩的眼睛一闪一闪，似乎欢迎着你的到来。
E: The girl's eyes sparkle, as if welcoming your presence.

C: 看来，你并不属于这里。你注定要奔赴更伟大的使命，我的朋友。
E: Looks like you don't belong here. You're destined for a greater mission, my friend.

C: 那就痛饮吧！现在我感觉好多了，身上暖暖的，那种惴惴不安也消失了。
E: Then drink up! I feel much better now. I feel warm, and that nervousness has disappeared.

C: 曾有信使连续奔跑三天三夜，最终累毙，只为将胜利的消息传回圣城。
E: Once, a messenger ran for three days and three nights without rest, only to collapse and die, all to deliver news of victory to the holy city.

C: 这片麦田可是我们的宝贝，不能随便踩进去哦。会把希望踩坏的。
E: This wheat field is our baby! You can't just stomp on it willy-nilly. You'll stomp all over our hopes.

C: 别、别在意那种细节啦！我这次又不是为了出去玩才旷课……
E: D—Don't sweat the details! It's not like I skipped class just to goof off this time...

C: 先不争这个，老爸。我只是想说……
E: Let's not argue over that now, Dad. What I wanted to say is...

C: 你来自新世界？
E: Are you from the new world?

C: 为了长久地保存信息，人们会把字刻在石头上——「颂言石板」便是凭此将预言传递至千年之后。
E: To preserve knowledge for generations, people carved words into stone — the Hymn Tablet carried prophecies across a thousand years this way.

C: 呀，倒影全都消失了。不过托你的福，水面波光粼粼的，变得更漂亮啦。
E: Oh no, the reflections are all gone! But thanks to you, the water's all shimmery now, which makes it even prettier.

C: 想四处看看，多了解这里。
E: We could hang around here and get to know this place better.

C: 好呀！那我们就放轻松，随便逛逛。我来当{NICKNAME}的导游吧？
E: Great idea! Let's take it easy and go for a walk. I'll be your personal guide, {NICKNAME}, how's that sound?

C: 在餐馆庆祝真开心。只要口袋里有钱，每天都能过生日迷！
E: Dining out to celebrate is just wonderful! With money in my pocket, I can have a birthday every single day!

C: 给我增设个入梦池吧。
E: How about you put in a Dreampool for me.

C: 游戏…厅？没听说过呢。不过在斯缇科西亚，到处都可以游玩嬉戏，阁下对此有所不满，难道是宴会策划得还不够有趣……
E: Ar... cade? I never heard of such a thing. However, at Styxia there are places to frolic and play everywhere. Is the banquet unsatisfactory? Are the items planned not interesting enough...

C: 好别致的名字。
E: What a unique name.

C: 合理的决定，毕竟——有两类生物最好别去招惹：狮子、以及醉汉。
E: A reasonable decision. After all, there are two beings that you should never provoke: a lion, and a drunk.

C: 但我…不能…在水里…呼吸…嘤！
E: But I can't... breathe... underwater... eep!

C: 斯缇科西亚的蜜酿果真醇厚无比——可惜我只是一台衣匠，并没有能用来进食的嘴。
E: The honey brew of Styxia is as rich as they say. What a shame, I'm just a Garmentmaker and wasn't built with a mouth to taste it.

C: 「而哀丽秘榭，就是你下一段旅程的起点。等准备好了，再从这里出发吧。」
E: "Aedes Elysiae is where your next journey begins. When you're ready, set out from here."

C: 是高贵的会员！
E: A VIP member!

C: 呵呵，下次有缘相会，再向你揭示美食的奥秘吧。
E: Hehe, next time fate brings us together, I'll reveal more culinary secrets to you.

C: 当然，「不能靠祈祷，而是需要用脏话辱骂泰坦，然后躲掉凭空出现的攻击」…真是莫名其妙。
E: Of course, "One can't rely on prayers alone, but needs to spit foul words to curse the Titans, then avoid attacks that appear out of thin air" ...This is absurd.

C: 嗐，这也就是你家那个儿子出息…瞧瞧我家那几个，找不到工作不说，花钱还大手大脚！唉……
E: Ack, that's only possible with a good son like yours... Just look at our lot. None of them can find a job, but they spend money like it's going out of fashion! *sigh*...

C: …唉呀，你这丫头说话还真有意思。按你的意思，孩子们吃不完的糖，也只能靠我们这些年纪大的努力吃完了吧？
E: ...Oh dear, you really have a way with words. But if I follow your advice, guess there will be plenty of leftovers, and the elders would have to finish them all.

C: 略略略，我才不听你的，你说了不算！
E: Blah-blah-blah. Can't hear you! Blah-blah-blah!

C: 当然不一样！您所身负的，是向凡人传达神谕的伟业——如此高贵的您怎能以「占卜师」这样…这样不体面的身份自贬……
E: Of course it's different! You carry the sacred duty of passing prophecies to mortals — how can someone as noble as you be a "soothsayer"... How can you demean yourself like this...

C: …你有考虑过你的姐姐吗？她已经在战争中失去了父母，失去了兄长。如果你也将自己的性命置于危险中，你至少应当先与她道别，再采取行动。
E: ...Have you thought about your sister? She has already lost her father and mother to battle. She lost her older brother too. If you are going to put your life in danger, you should at least bid her farewell before you act.

C: 嗷呜嗷呜~嗷呜！
E: Awoo awoo, awoooo!

C: 咕咕…噢！有个孩子对财富管理十分有心得，或许它就在<color=#dbc291ff>摆放着金币的摊位</color>挑选自己下一款理财产品呢。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who's very knowledgeable about wealth management. Maybe they're at a <color=#dbc291ff>stall with gold coins</color>, choosing their next financial product.

C: 咕咕…噢！有个很受欢迎的孩子，这会儿或许在<color=#dbc291ff>舞台</color>进行音乐表演呢，不知道它演奏的曲子是否合你的口味咕？
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a very popular child who might be performing on <color=#dbc291ff>stage</color> right now. I wonder if the piece they're playing will suit your taste, hoot?

C: 你平日里也会给大家做心理疏导么？
E: Do you usually do psychological counseling for everyone?

C: 你来这里多久了？
E: How long have you been here?

C: 如果我回答不上来，还是请你去询问别的科员吧。
E: If I can't answer your questions, please ask the other researchers.

C: 小友，一日不见如隔三秋。
E: Buddy, it's been awhile.

C: 关于莱斯莉。
E: About Lesley.

C: 你也给我整一个奇物呗。
E: Give me a Curio, too.

C: 想聊课题，你随便抓个科员就行了。这种小事就不用来打扰我的休憩快乐了。
E: If all you want is to talk about research, just grab any researcher. Don't ruin my joy of slacking off.

C: 在大地的裂缝中，我滚落到了一个什么也看不清的洞穴里…四周都是坚硬的墙壁，前后则是万丈深渊，我只能杵在原地，一动不动……
E: I tumbled through a fissure in the earth into a pitch-black cave... Solid walls surrounded me on both sides, with bottomless abysses ahead and behind. I could only stand there, frozen in place...

C: 为了她，我已经抵达了旅途的尽头。只需要爬上这棵树，我就能见到她了！
E: For her, I've reached the end of my journey. Once I climb this tree, I'll finally be able to see them!

C: 车票在震动，附近一定有若虫。
E: The boarding pass is vibrating, there must be a nymph nearby.

C: 能再见到你们真好…
E: It's so good to see you all again...

C: 绝赞筹划中——换句话说，目前什么都还没开始。
E: In the amazing planning phase — in other words, absolutely nothing has started yet.

C: 你…你这家伙……
E: Y-You... unbelievable...

C: 唉…
E: *sigh* ...

C: 老样子？
E: The usual?

C: 其他秘酿主理人也都忙前忙后，酣饮处热闹得像是曾经的斯缇科西亚城一样。
E: While other Ambrosia Managers are bustling about, the drinking spot is as lively as what Styxia used to be.

C: 太好了，我的钱包已经准备就位了迷！
E: Awesome, my wallet is ready and raring to go!

C: o((•ω‡= )o「啧，好唐突！你…你竟然是直球派？」)∋
E: o((•ω‡= )o "Tch, that's so sudden! You... you're the straightforward type?" )∋

C: 呃…天气还挺好的？
E: Uh... nice weather, right?

C: 咦，有这样的设定吗？我们怎么不知道迷？
E: Huh? Is that actually part of the setting? How come we never heard about it, mem?

C: 嗯？那便有劳「摇光爵」替我取下来吧。
E: Oh? Then be a dear, Dux Lucens, and take it off for me.

C: 别走了，留在这儿吧。
E: Don't go, stay here.

C: …那刻夏老师，我可以接着说吗？
E: ...Professor Anaxa, may I continue?

C: 而浪漫之处在于…无论是对比显著的色彩、光泽，抑或布料上最细微的纤绒，都可以靠着人类的双眼看清。
E: And what makes it romantic is... whether it's the stark contrast of colors and luster, or the finest fibers on the fabric, they can all be seen clearly with the human eye.

C: 但现在，我已不再身负「死亡」，这双手恐怕也无法赢过万敌阁下了。
E: But now, I no longer bear the authority of Death. These hands of mine probably can't defeat Lord Mydei anymore.

C: 嗯…但眼下，还是容许我带回去再好好修饰一下吧。
E: Hmm... But now, please allow me to take them back and refine them a little.

C: 翁法罗斯的万物生灵现如今都有了自己的归宿，我也终于能够放下重担，安心地享受美食时刻了。
E: All living beings in Amphoreus have found their place now, and I can finally put down my burdens and enjoy my meal in peace.

C: 想来对你没什么难度。现在，我也该完成自己的工作了……
E: Seems like it wasn't too hard for you. Now, it's time I fulfill my part of the deal.

C: 在我有限的认知中，它是一艘「记忆」的航船。微小，却足以装载一些东西游到天幕之外去。
E: In my limited knowledge, it's an ark of the Remembrance. Small, yet capable of carrying certain things beyond the heavens.

C: 星穹列车是「开拓」阿基维利制造的工具，用于承载祂与无名客进行星际旅行。据传这样的载具不止一台，但列车里没有其它的纪录。
E: The Astral Express was a tool created by Akivili the Trailblaze, who used it to transport THEMSELF and the Nameless across the galaxy. It is rumored that there are other vehicles like it, but the Express has no such records.

C: 关于「了解」…
E: About Understanding...

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 关于三月七…
E: About March 7th...

C: 小三月的事情你听姬子说过了吗？她被封在一块宇宙浮冰里，我们无意中发现，才把她救了出来。
E: Did Himeko tell you about March 7th? She was trapped in ice, floating through space. We happened upon her and rescued her.

C: 最古老的星神克里珀催生了「星际和平公司」，从公司诞生起，我们才有了现代意义上的银河史，在那之前的记录完全不成系统。
E: The most ancient Aeon, Qlipoth, gave birth to the Interastral Peace Corporation. From then on, we have the modern history of the galaxy — but before then, the records are incomplete.

C: 它是虚数的一部分，是形而上的精神聚合体。当满足某个条件之后，这部分虚数能就会被某个智慧生物完全占据。
E: It is a part of the Imaginary element, the metaphysical aggregation of the spirit. When specific conditions are met, an intelligent being will completely take over this part of the Imaginary.

C: 这个问题可把我难倒了……
E: Now that's got me stumped...

C: 等回过神来的时候，我已经充满干劲地把列车修好，和它一起踏上旅程了。
E: By the time I came to my senses, I had already passionately finished fixing the Express and was already embarking on a journey aboard it.

C: 哦？{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}也喜欢看《冒险鼹鼠队》吗？
E: Oh? Do you like reading The Adventurous Moles too?

C: 我就知道，你一定要去看《冒险鼹鼠队》，书里全是有趣的大冒险。
E: I knew it, you have to read The Adventurous Moles. It is full of fun adventures.

C: 你肯定以为儿童书里写的都是假的吧，哼，明明就是大人什么都不懂。
E: You probably think the things written in children's books are made up. Humph, you grownups just don't know better.

C: 他们分别是独立自主比男孩子更厉害的贝琪，擅长发明创造的卡宾，还有身强体壮的帕瓦！
E: There's Becky, who is so independent and much cooler than boys; Carbine, who is good at invention and crafting; and Pava, who is strong!

C: （四个位置已全部标记，那么交汇点是在…）
E: (All four positions have been marked, so the intersection is...)

C: 求求你了。
E: Please.

C: （能藏住一个人的身影…难道说那一处椅子所在位置比较高？）
E: (It can hide a person... Is it talking about the height of the chair?)

C: 不是，我也不懂矿车啊。
E: Uh, no. I know nothing of mining carts.

C: 这话听着怎么不太对呢…
E: Hey, whom are you calling half a brain...

C: 没什么事了。
E: It's nothing.

C: {M#小伙子}{F#小姑娘}，这几天给你添麻烦了。以后，咱们有缘再见。
E: {M#Lad}{F#Young miss}, you've been a lot of help these days. I guess we'll meet again in the future, whenever fate wills it so.

C: 稍等，我还有点事。
E: Just a moment. I have something else to do.

C: 滴、答…怎么办呀…怎么办呀！我快要报废了！
E: Tick, tock... What to do... What do I do! I'm going to be scrapped soon!

C: 滴、答…我太喜欢你了，请给我签个名吧…不，请跟我握握手吧…不，和我在一起吧！
E: Tick, tock... I love you so much, please give me your autograph... No, please let me shake your hand... No, please be with me!

C: 「我准备了一个游戏，只要你能通关，我们就可以聊聊——假如你是个高手，咱们还能交个朋友。」
E: "I built a game. If you can clear it, then we can chat. If you're a gaming master, we might even be able to become friends."

C: 像是在玩游戏。
E: It's like playing a game.

C: 「因为这不是留言，是我本人在和你对话。」
E: "Because this isn't pre-recorded. It's me, talking right now with you."

C: 既然这样，我们一手交钱、一手交货好了。他应该没忘记稿费的事吧？
E: In that case, I will keep things transactional. He didn't forget the fee, did he?

C: （这位大师还挺豪爽……）
E: (The master paint is pretty generous...)

C: 错了，错了！我想你可能不太懂艺术……
E: No no, that's not right! I surmise that you're not an aficionado of art...

C: 回见，好心人！如果你还对这幅作品感兴趣，那就前往博物馆吧！
E: Until next time, kind one! If you're still interested in the painting, go check it out in the museum!

C: 你找到了一组锈迹斑斑的机柜，能看出来它被废弃在这里有一段时间了。
E: You find a stack of rusty cabinets that have obviously been abandoned here for quite some time.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来的正是时候。鲍里斯正在找你呢。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're right on time. Boris is looking for you.

C: {NICKNAME}，你觉得…这样描述是否合适？
E: Do you think this description is appropriate, {NICKNAME}?

C: 嗯，拜托你了。
E: Sure, take as much time as you want.

C: 一枚古董标本瓶，瓶中花束意外地生机盎然。
E: An antique herbarium bottle with an unexpectedly vibrant bouquet.

C: 长得很像电影里的道具，但它确实是用来放电影的。
E: Looks like a prop in a film, but it really is to show movies.

C: 「阿丽萨•兰德的养女，后进者的领袖，银鬃铁卫的统领者与贝洛伯格的戍卫者与重振者；」
E: "Alisa Rand's adopted daughter, the leader of the greener Architects, the commander of the Silvermane Guards, and Belobog's protector and rebuilder."

C: 「后来，来自星空的旅行者找到了线索——原来希莉儿的回响始终游荡在支离破碎的裂界空间中，从未消散。」
E: "Later, travelers from space found the clue. It turned out that the echo of Cyrille's voice had always been resounding in the broken Fragmentum space. It never dissipated."

C: 反物质兵团的虚卒冰雕，被八百年前的寒潮冻结至今。
E: An ice sculpture of a Voidranger from the Antimatter Legion. It was frozen some eight hundred years ago when the Eternal Freeze arrived.

C: 呜呜，我的照片…这下全完了……
E: Boohoo, my photos... They're done for...

C: 因为这些照片都是和你一起拍的呀，也算是你自己的旅途的珍贵记录嘛~
E: Because all of these photos were taken with you, so it's kind of a precious memory of your own journey too~

C: 诶？{NICKNAME}乘客是在认真记录列车长工作的样子吗？帕姆好开心～
E: Huh? Is {NICKNAME} diligently recording the conductor's every move? Pom-Pom is happy~

C: 我看看…很厉害嘛，{NICKNAME}！你的技术不比我的私家摄影师差呀~
E: Let me see... Brilliant, {NICKNAME}! You're right up there with my own regular personal photographer~

C: 这次就算了，下次拍照要给小费哦。
E: Don't worry about it this time, but the next photo will cost.

C: 我是你的粉丝。
E: I'm one of your fans.

C: 呼…呼……好累，这次就先算了，下次一定会按鼹鼠党的规矩惩罚你！
E: Whew... huff... I'm pooped. You win this one, but next time we'll punish you for breaking the rules of The Moles!

C: 你可以试试「貘馍卷」，看上去就像是蛋糕卷一样。小吃摊老板说这是用「梦貘」做的，那到底是什么生物呀？
E: I recommend the tuskpir wraps — they're very similar to cake rolls, but the hawker said they're made from something called... well, "tuskpir..." What do you suppose that is?

C: 你还可以试着大口猛灌…任由这饮料在肚子里翻江倒海。那滋味，妙极了。
E: It's best to drink it in big gulps, and let it fizzle in your stomach. That's a great feeling.

C: 可惜离家百年归来，只觉得这金人巷越发萧瑟陌生。只有「苏打豆汁儿」还算是一如既往。
E: I spent <unbreak>100</unbreak> years away from home, and I have to say... Aurum Alley has seen better days. It's looking kind of run-down. The only thing that hasn't changed is the mung bean soda.

C: （取出小吃）
E: (Take out the snack)

C: 太好了…但你好像只买了一份，怎么办？
E: Great... but it looks like you only brought enough for one person... what am I supposed to do?

C: 这份是我的，你的要自己去买。
E: This one's mine. Now you can go buy your own.

C: 哎哟，这不是龙女大人嘛…来来来，我再给你们拿一些，千万不要客气。
E: Ah! It's the Dragon Lady... Here, I'll get you another serving — no need to be shy.

C: 就像喝药一样，眼睛一闭心一横就喝完啦。
E: It's just like drinking medicine — close your eyes and cross your heart.

C: 再说这样的话可就疏远了。
E: I think it's a little late for that.

C: 「平缓的下坡路」突然断裂坍塌，没有人能够再装作视而不见。商会与金人巷本身都已经岌岌可危。
E: When the "gentle downhill slope" suddenly became the edge of a cliff, no one could pretend to ignore it anymore. Both the Merchant Guild and Aurum Alley itself were in jeopardy.

C: 我就知道你肯定会答应。你真是本小姐最值得信赖的好朋友！
E: I knew you'd help us! A truly reliable friend!

C: 我作为公司的商业代表，出席这场谈判合法、合情、合理！你们金人巷商会打算派谁上阵呀？路过的云骑军？躲的不见踪影的懦夫会长？……
E: As the representative of the IPC, my presence in this negotiation is legal, reasonable and sensible! Who do you plan on sending to the battlefield? A random Cloud Knight? That cowardly president who's afraid to even show their face?

C: 大事不好了，我刚才收到信息，会长让我立刻停止码头升级。
E: There's been an unexpected change in plans — I've received word that the president has ordered me to stop all upgrades to the dock immediately.

C: 什么，这倒是我没有想到。
E: What? I hadn't even considered something like that.

C: 我明白了。我可以接受明曦暂代我的职责。
E: I understand. I can accept Mingxi temporarily taking over my duties.

C: 看来我们已经出名了呀。
E: Our fame precedes us...

C: 请问为什么会突然找上家父呢？
E: May I ask why you wanted to speak with my father?

C: 手挺巧…咳。
E: Hmm... not bad.

C: 金人巷的未来可不是二选一。
E: You don't have to choose between the president and the IPC.

C: 金人巷里有金人，很奇怪吗？
E: Surprised that there's an aurumaton in Aurum Alley?

C: 对吧，明明是金人巷的金字招牌。
E: Unbelievable, right? The food is so good.

C: …当然是拍我了。
E: ...Me, of course.

C: 金人巷！好！
E: Aurum Alley — Cool! Cooler! Coolest!

C: 万一我们不好呢？
E: And if we're not?

C: 最近闲了下来，有很多事情才来得及思考。
E: Now that I've finally got some free time, I'm starting to reflect on the choices I made and the reasons behind them.

C: 朋友放心吧，「法无禁止即可为」…咱们这儿卖的东西，就刚刚好卡在那个「法无禁止」的范围内。
E: My friend, don't worry. "Anything not explicitly prohibited is technically legal"... All this good stuff lies right in that "not explicitly prohibited" area.

C: 什么？！你竟然骗了我！
E: What!? You dare try and cheat me?

C: 没错，我想要是做外卖还没有口碑，我多亏呀。
E: Exactly. I can't simply jump in only to find people are not even interested.

C: 虽然是不情之请…{NICKNAME}你能再帮我一个忙吗？麻烦你在店里跑跑堂，问问客人的点餐需求，告诉后厨就成。
E: If I may be so bold as to ask... {NICKNAME}, can you please do me one more favor? Please run around the store and take all the customers' orders, then pass those on to the kitchen.

C: （好像看到了小天老板的求助眼神，她需要我的帮助……）
E: (Little Tian seems to be asking for help with her eyes...)

C: 如果我的理由完美无缺，你就不要继续拦着我了；如果我的理由站不住脚……
E: If my excuse is watertight, then you've no right to stop me. But if my reason is deemed groundless...

C: 等等，我记得你在码头上怼过公司代表，你不会也想对我也来上这么一套吧？
E: Wait, I remember you turning that IPC representative inside out on the docks with your words. You're not going to do that to me, are you?

C: 这是金人巷商会的租金。商会已经扭亏为盈，能够赔付欠款了。
E: These are the funds from Aurum Alley Merchant Guild. The Guild has turned a profit and is able to pay back what it owes.

C: 有没有一种可能，你真的买通了码头工人呢？
E: Is it possible that you paid off a dock worker to do your bidding?

C: 会长，在我看来，金人巷不是用来缅怀过去的幻影。
E: Mr. President, the way I see it, you shouldn't regard the Alley as a souvenir from the past.

C: 这是从金人巷各商户处收集来的意向调查，其中大部分人与商会建立了合作，并且希望能够保留现在的经营模式——其中包括同功坊。
E: According to the poll we conducted earlier with business owners, most of them have already partnered with the Merchant Guild and wish to preserve their current business model. Artistry Hardware is among the shops that registered this answer.

C: 金人巷需要在历史的演进中抓住机遇，转变自己的职责。「金人巷」在公司选择的未来里，会成为最有分量的名字。
E: Aurum Alley needs to adapt and reimagine itself. The future that the IPC offers will ensure its name is known in the most remote corners of the galaxy.

C: 自由讨论的时间结束。请双方回去之后静候评审团消息，辛苦了。
E: That concludes our discussion. We will inform all participants of the result when a decision has been made. Thank you all for coming.

C: 我在空中连续追尾了多位无辜的机巧鸟然后不幸坠机，是事故中的事故。
E: I rear-ended several innocent cycranes midair and unfortunately ended up crashing. A series of accidents.

C: 人们害怕金人智慧程度过高。但我毫无威胁。
E: People are afraid that aurumatons are too smart, but I pose no threat to anyone.

C: 他长得啊不丑也不帅，不高却不矮，普普通通大众脸。
E: He's not too ugly, not too handsome. Not very tall, nor very short. An average everyman face.

C: …等等，你搞错方向了，我方才明明说的是「先往前走，然后左拐」。
E: ...Hang on, you're going the wrong way. I just said, "Go straight ahead, then turn left."

C: 想来这点小事也难不倒你，那就麻烦你帮我把这只不成器的机巧鸟给抓回来吧，拜托了。
E: I'm sure this won't be much of a challenge for you. So, can you help me catch that pesky cycrane? Thank you in advance.

C: …你懂的真多。
E: ...You really know a lot.

C: 这怎么可能呢，我都是仔细打包好放在保温食盒里的，再说机巧鸟送货的速度可不慢。
E: But that's impossible. I packed all my dishes carefully and put them in thermal lunch boxes. And as you know, cycranes fly fast.

C: 实验助手的工作…
E: Lab assistant work...

C: （摸一下）
E: (Touch it)

C: 只要骗过那两个笨蛋，做完这单生意，拿走他们的基础资金……
E: As long as I fleece those two fools into completing the deal, and then take their base capital...

C: 我稍微花点时间给你科普一下：你知道光是一种粒子吗？
E: I'll show you some basics: Do you know that light is a particle?

C: 他是谁？
E: Who is he?

C: 为了纪念「钟表匠」的伟大功业，我们将这份食谱连同它的口味再度还原——成为了今天的「仰望星空」蛋糕！
E: To commemorate the great achievements of Watchmaker, we've recreated this recipe along with its flavor — giving birth to today's Stargazer cake!

C: 不让喝苏乐达的都是坏人！
E: Whoever prohibited SoulGlad must be the bad guy!

C: 苏乐达走私运动持续了六个月，囚犯和狱卒们的拉锯战每天都在上演——刚拿到的苏乐达还没来得及喝就被抢走，咒骂与哀求声充斥着牢房内外。
E: The SoulGlad smuggling operation lasted for six months, with a daily tug-of-war between the prisoners and the guards. Newly acquired SoulGlad was snatched away before consumed, filling the cell with the sounds of cursing and pleading.

C: 这些关卡比较有挑战性。如果被某一关难住了，不妨先去其他的章节换换思维哟。
E: These stages are more challenging. If you're stuck somewhere, you can visit another chapter for a change.

C: 啊，是你啊。能再次看见一张熟悉的脸可真好。
E: Oh, it's you. It's great to see a familiar face again.

C: 回收「怪梦积木」。
E: Retrieve the Eerie Building Blocks.

C: 您说的对，中间缺少的环节现在都是靠我的想象填上的。
E: You're right. I've had to use my imagination to fill in the blanks within this occurrence.

C: 你找我是有什么事吗？
E: Did you want something?

C: 不，我很抱歉，我们不是这个意思。
E: No, I'm sorry, but that's not the kind of help we need.

C: 你试图换台，播放乌玛和她的同事们录制好的节目。屏幕闪烁了片刻，却没等来你想要的频道与画面。
E: You try switching the channel to play the pre-recorded show done by Uma and her colleagues. The screen flickers for a while, but the channel you want still doesn't come on.

C: 什么…「不会吧，不会真的有人以为收到纸条是要向你表白吧？」
E: Like... "Come on! You actually thought receiving a note meant someone was confessing their love to you!?"

C: 呜呜…哇！！！
E: W—Waaaah!!!

C: 亲、亲爱的别怕…人…人家会保护你……
E: C—Calm down, darling... I... I'll protect you...

C: 人家不会有天也变成那样吧，好可怕呀。
E: Will I end up like that someday? That's scary.

C: 我想在哪逛，你管得着嘛？再说，现在梦里乱成这样，好多烂摊子等着我收拾呢。
E: I'm going wherever I want! Plus, the Dreamscape is a mess, and I've got mountains of clean-up tasks to do.

C: 你还好吗？
E: Are you okay?

C: 别心急嘛，我们这就打开帕。
E: Cool your jets. We're opening it now.

C: 「银河强手棋」便是我对「遥祝启程」的想象——每一位无名客都需要这样的「好运」，所以我将这个形式从过去带到了未来。
E: Cosmodyssey is how I imagine the Graced Voyager to be — each Nameless needs such luck, and so I have brought this form from the past to the future.

C: 其实包裹是从一位无名客手中寄出的，而那位无名客手里的包裹是由更早的无名客寄出的…无数的「无名客前辈」、以及无数次传递，它才来到了你的手里。
E: The package was sent by a Nameless, and that Nameless received it from another one from long before... Countless generations of Nameless have passed this package down, and now it has reached you.

C: 我就在这，哪也不去。要是我说的是假话，您尽可以来找我！
E: I'm not going anywhere. If you find that I'm lying to you, you come back and find me anytime!

C: 行吧，你早晚会想通的。容我多嘴一句——等到贵影业向苜蓿草家系申请破产的时候，你就再也见不到这么丰厚的诚意了。
E: Alright, I'm sure you'll come to your senses sooner or later. However, there might no longer be such a generous offer on the table by the time Clock Studios files for bankruptcy with the Alfalfa Family.

C: 游客，你说一个充满危机、死气沉沉、破破烂烂的影视乐园，真的适合作为消费娱乐的景点吗？
E: Hey, guest, let's hear your take. Do you think this dangerous, lifeless, and ill-maintained theme park can be a good recreational spot?

C: 这是…「钟表匠」先生的帽子！
E: This is... Mr. Watchmaker's hat!

C: 没错，绝不会认错的，他与我见面时就是戴着这顶礼帽。听说这是对他非常重要的东西，如今却在您的手中……
E: Yes, I'm pretty sure this is it. He was wearing this hat when I met him. I heard it's something very important to him, but now it's in your hands...

C: 原来您是「钟表匠」先生的客人，失礼了…但这只能证明董事长邀请您来到了这里，没办法证明您了解他啊。
E: I see you're Mr. Watchmaker's guest. Please forgive my rudeness... Still, it only proves that Mr. Watchmaker invited you here. It doesn't mean you know him well.

C: 对了，刚刚的剪辑工作中，你应该得到了一份<color=#dbc291ff>「外传胶卷」</color>吧？
E: By the way, during the editing work just now, you should have received an <color=#dbc291ff>"Extra Story reel"</color>, no?

C: 钟表小子来到美梦小镇、与镇民们共甘共苦、帮助美梦小镇发展壮大…这一系列故事都会被涵盖在这套影片之中，可以说是《钟表小子》至今以来的故事总集。
E: The series will delve into Clockie's arrival in Dreamville, his experiences of sharing life's ups and downs with the townspeople, and his contributions to the town's growth and development... It can be seen as a comprehensive collection of Clockie's story from the very beginning.

C: 一波三折的剧情，新意迭出的桥段，生动活泼的人物…我还是第一次从那些挑剔的影评家口中听到一致的好评，是您的才华让克劳克影业起死回生！
E: The story is full of twists and turns, has a creative plot, and features lively characters... This has been my first time hearing nothing but good reviews from those fussy movie critics. It's your talent that brought Clock Studios back to life!

C: 正好屏幕快修好了，可以在影视乐园重新举办这部影片的展映会，但是……
E: The screen should be fixed soon, just in time for the film premiere to be held at the theme park, but...

C: 跟我来吧，他还给你留了些东西……
E: Come with me. He left you something...

C: 「你或许不能接受我的说法，但这是我的真心话：我希望保护你，保护你的理想。」
E: "Perhaps you'll find it hard to accept my reason, but I truly mean it — I wish to protect you and your aspiration."

C: {NICKNAME}，这真是一部很不错的影片，我很喜欢。
E: {NICKNAME}, this is a great movie. I like it very much.

C: {NICKNAME}，记忆是留存往日的刻录，也是启示来日的谶语——祝你与「钟表匠」的作品能撬动这场美梦的未来。
E: {NICKNAME}, memories are records of the past and prophecies of the future. I hope your and the Watchmaker's work can shift the future of this dream.

C: 发出一个肯定的*哼*。
E: Let out a decisive *hmph*.

C: 小心瞄准，别误伤负责掩护的广告牌哦？
E: Aim true, and avoid friendly fire on the billboards that are covering you!

C: 一直在被当跑腿使唤……
E: I've just been running errands at everyone's whims...

C: 感觉中间有些模糊的镜头…
E: Feels like there are some fuzzy scenes in the middle...

C: 这个钟表小子只能重复固定的台词，应该是鸢尾花制造的*道具*。
E: This Clockie can only repeat fixed lines. It might be a *prop* made by the Iris Family.

C: 我还没有准备好。
E: I'm not ready yet.

C: 这是用来拍摄<color=#dbc291ff>「外传故事」</color>的素材，您可以去找我们的动画师一同完成这部外传——这些痴迷于动画的艺术家都戴着角色的头套，您应该一眼就能认得出来。
E: This is the material used to shoot <color=#dbc291ff>Extra Stories</color>. You can find animators to complete this extra story. Those animation-obsessed artists are all wearing various characters as headwear. You should be able to identify them immediately.

C: 非常兴奋。
E: Pretty rad.

C: 他是个贪财又搞笑的家伙，总是为了卖汽水搞出很多乌龙，是美梦小镇中的开心果。
E: He's this greedy but funny guy who's always getting up to all kinds of hijinks just to sell his soda. He's the life of the party in Dreamville.

C: 哼，我明白了，那哈努兄弟的背后肯定也有不少黑暗的罪行吧。
E: Hmph, got it. There must be a string of dark crimes lurking in Brother Hanu's past.

C: 钱！
E: Money!

C: 搞定！我真快！
E: Donezo! Dang, I'm fast!

C: 聊！都可以聊！快点聊！
E: Chat! Everyone can chat! Chat now!

C: 哈努兄弟简直太酷了…
E: Brother Hanu is so cool...

C: 如果「银河球棒侠」本人愿意来参与测试的话，鄙人自然会准备一份大礼。
E: If the famed Galactic Baseballer is willing to personally participate in the test, I would be delighted to prepare a gift for you.

C: 嗯…原来是这样。
E: Oh... is that so?

C: 哈哈，很好！非常「欢愉」！结局就选它了！
E: Haha, fantastic! How "Elating"! That's my ending!

C: 这件事…温世齐大哥说，整个空间站里的科员跟你没法比，无论是人脉、身手还是人品，你都是最佳人选，所以他让我把你喊过来……
E: So, with this business... Wen Shiqi said that none of the researchers aboard the space station can hold a candle to you, be it your connections, your skills, or your character — you're the top candidate for all of them. So he asked me to call you over...

C: 礼品在哪里？
E: Where is the gift?

C: 两位的台词功底真是无比深厚！预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
E: The depth of your dialogue delivery is remarkable! Best of luck with your results!

C: （拍案而起）
E: (Stand up and smack the table)

C: 还好你没事！可你怎么会钻进那家伙的尾巴里？
E: Thank goodness you're ok! But why did you burrow yourself into that fella's tail?

C: 这到底是怎么一回事？
E: What on earth is going on?

C: 说来惭愧，之前由于技术故障未能为你们举办颁奖仪式。于是我特地请来了一位宇宙顶尖的艺术家，为你们制作了这盘「记忆胶片」。
E: I'm ashamed to admit that we couldn't hold the award ceremony for you due to the technical issues. As such, I invited a cosmically-renewed artist to make a "Memory Film" just for you.

C: 饰
E: as

C: 你怎么知道我喜欢吃这些…谢谢！
E: How did you know that I had a taste for this... Thanks!

C: {NICKNAME}，你是否已经做好准备凝视「终末」的投影了？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you ready to gaze at the projection of Finality?

C: …你所经历的绝境，虽然未能让「终末」降临，却令祂的话语不再是呢喃，愈发清晰。
E: ...Although the desperate crises you have experienced did not bring about the Finality, it has made THEIR mumbling much clearer.

C: 你们这么一说，有道理欸！
E: Hey, now that you mention it, that actually makes sense!

C: 她是星穹列车剑首三月七！
E: She's March 7th, the Sword Champion of the Astral Express!

C: 斯科特先生，我是云骑骁卫彦卿，之前见过面的。希望您能注意言行，别在街头惹事生非。
E: Mr. Skott, I'm Yanqing, a Cloud Knight Lieutenant. We've met before, and I suggest you stop causing trouble.

C: 二位师父，{NICKNAME}，走吧走吧，我们现在就回去学剑。
E: Masters, {NICKNAME}, let's go back and start the training now.

C: 你去把现有的机甲加厚加固，我不相信那小铁片子真的能碰瓷我们的尖端科技！
E: Go and strengthen our mechs even further! I refuse to believe that little sliver of metal can actually challenge our cutting-edge technology!

C: （去找藿藿）
E: (Ask Huohuo for help)

C: （适当地沉默，暗示他）
E: (Stay silent, hinting at him)

C: {F#小姑娘}{M#你小子}，别动不动耍帅。这样的机会要好好留给本大爷。
E: Hey, cut it out kid, just leave the cool catchphrases to me!

C: 啧啧啧，看来你想帮朋友的心意也不过如此嘛？
E: Tsk tsk, I guess your desire to help your friend is only worth this much, eh?

C: 斯科特，我最好的朋友，我要被调职到塔塔里昂了，下班后一起喝杯酒吧。
E: Hey, Skott, my best buddy, I'm getting transferred to the Tartarion. Let's grab a drink after work.

C: 没错，这是曜青「染指派」医食同源之术的秘中之秘！若不是为三月小姐出战，我是绝不外传的。
E: Exactly! This is the closely guarded secret of the Yaoqing's Ranzhi School. If it weren't for Miss March's upcoming battle, I would never divulge it.

C: 没错，他就是想扬眉吐气才把比斗的地点选在金人巷。
E: Exactly! He just wants to show off, which is why he picked Aurum Alley as the venue.

C: 你连喝个茶都要找茬，我觉得你根本没有生活，就更别提生活质量了！
E: Seriously, you even picked a fight while drinking tea. I honestly doubt you have a life at all, let alone a fulfilling one!

C: 能不能给我也来一个呢？
E: Can I have one too?

C: …老夫确实提起了一台金人，不过这类机械有灵的谣言经不起推敲，断不可信，你来这里也只是白费力气。
E: ...I did mention an aurumaton, but these rumors of Mechanical Souls simply don't hold up under scrutiny — they're utterly unbelievable. You're simply wasting your effort here.

C: 这群人有一整套与机械通灵的神秘仪式——不过大家都觉得，他们疯了。
E: They even came out with a whole mystical ritual to communicate psychically with the machinery — but everyone thought that they were crazy.

C: 哦——！还有这招！三月七，你做得好啊！
E: Oh—! That's it! March 7th, thank you!

C: 别看我，老夫是绝对不相信「机械灵魂」的。
E: Don't regard me with that expression. I remain steadfast in my disbelief in the existence of Mechanical Souls.

C: 嗯嗯…至少我现在明白了，一味追求实力，也不一定符合本姑娘的人设。
E: Hmm... At least now I understand that blindly pursuing power doesn't necessarily work for my character...

C: 而我想做的就是研究仙舟人弥散的忆质。你可以理解为，我想研究「精神垃圾」。
E: What I want to do is research the memoria that the Xianzhou people emit. I guess you could say that I want to research "psychological trash."

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: （进入战斗）
E: (Enter Battle)

C: 你努力回忆往日与桑博相处的经历…如此说来，他好像的确从银鬃铁卫手中救过你、丹恒和三月七一回。
E: You begin thinking back really hard on your past experiences with Sampo... As you do, you realize that there actually was that time when he saved you, Dan Heng, and March 7th from the Silvermane Guards.

C: 为什么大家都不收冬城盾呢？用个宝石挂饰刷一下，就把钱付掉了？
E: Why don't people accept shields? You can pay for things just by swiping a gemstone trinket?

C: 这可是几个琥珀纪才举办一次的盛事。公司作为仙舟联盟的友邦，当然要出席咯。
E: This is a momentous event that only happens once every few Amber Eras. The IPC regards the Xianzhou Alliance as a close friend. Of course we have to attend.

C: 我知道是谁了…
E: I know who you're talking about...

C: 她说的没错。谢谢你，玲可。
E: She's right. Thank you, Lynx.

C: 唉…毕竟往后我也要像伊戈尔一样，为了贝洛伯格在银河各处打比赛。
E: ...After all, in the future... I'll have to be like Igor, competing all over the cosmos for Belobog.

C: 是被淘汰了啊，但是现在又复活了。
E: We were, but we've been revived.

C: 大姐头，你就等着瞧吧，我一定会战胜杰帕德先生，成为咱们贝洛伯格七百年来第一个有资格去星空中打比赛的格斗家！
E: Just wait and see. I'll defeat Mr. Gepard and be the first Belobog fighter in seven hundred years to qualify for a competition in space!

C: 我明白了，杰帕德先生。
E: Understood, Mr. Gepard.

C: 「杰帕德那家伙在搞什么鬼？卢卡你给我好好打，要是输了，我就狠狠揍你！」
E: "What's that dolt Gepard up to now? Luka, you'd better fight like your life is on the line! If you lose, I'll make sure you wish you were really dead!"

C: 在匹诺康尼接触过，人还不错。
E: I met him on Penacony. He's a pretty decent guy.

C: 该去会会公司通缉重犯了！
E: It's time to go see what the IPC's wanted criminal is made of!

C: 你吓到他了！
E: You're scaring him!

C: 卢卡选手……
E: Luka...
*Sigh*

C: 那是当然了！咱们出发吧，「铁臂之王」！
E: You sure are! Let's hit the road, King of the Iron Arms!

C: 你不一样。你永远有离开的选择。全银河已经认识了你和你的贝洛伯格，你的目的已经达到了。
E: You're different. You always have the choice to leave. The whole cosmos knows about you and Belobog now, so you've already achieved your goal.

C: 在挥拳的那一刻，我是全银河最快乐的人，仅此而已。
E: Whenever I throw my punches, I feel like I'm the happiest man in the cosmos — that's the only reason I'm doing this.

C: 好啦，时间也不早了，该准备登上最后的擂台了。
E: Well, it's time for you to get ready for the final battle.

C: 呜呜，在我看来，这是一场没有胜利，也没有失败的比赛！这一刻，对战双方彼此的认同，全场观众的全情投入足以说明一切！一场前所未有、超脱了胜负的比赛！呜呜……
E: In my view, there is no winner or loser in this match! At this moment, the admiration both sides have for each other and the audience's enthusiasm speaks for itself! This is an unprecedented match that goes beyond winning and losing!

C: 真是前所未有的轻松。
E: I've never felt so at ease.

C: 那是七百多年前的事情了。那时我还很年轻，也曾是演武仪典上一名守擂剑士。
E: That was over seven hundred years ago. At that time, I was young and also serving as a Wardance's ringmaster.

C: 这一届演武仪典，向那个叫雅利洛-Ⅵ的世界发送一封邀请函吧。希望他的后代能有回应。
E: Let's send an invitation to that world called Jarilo-VI for the Wardance this year. Hopefully, his descendants will respond.

C: 原来这就是我们收到的那封通讯邀请函的来历吗？
E: So this is why we received that invitation?

C: 我曾听说贝洛伯格的故事，此处的人们在最绝望的时刻仍然坚守着「存护」的意志，不屈地反抗着命运，直至黎明降临。
E: I've heard stories about Belobog where the residents, in their most desperate times, steadfastly maintained the spirit of the Preservation, resisting fate until the break of dawn.

C: 他不仅是一个孩子，他也和你们的文明一样古老，他是雅利洛-Ⅵ的化身。
E: He isn't just a boy. Instead, he's as ancient as your civilization, and he's the embodiment of Jarilo-VI.

C: 好小子！
E: Good on ya, kid!

C: 丹轮高悬，照彻尘心，贫僧不能祝你得胜，但愿你万事安泰。
E: The claret wheel hangs overhead, illuminating mortal hearts. I cannot wish you victory, but may you find peace and health in all.

C: 智械先生，如果你和奢摩小姐因为遵守戒律而被判有罪，丹轮寺也会受到牵累。你们的戒律是为了丹轮寺而守，不应该为了摧毁它而坚持。
E: Mr. Intellitron, if you and Miss Samatha are convicted because of obeying your commandments, Claretwheel Temple will also be implicated. You should be adhering to the commandments for the sake of Claretwheel Temple, instead of helping to destroy the temple.

C: 丹轮高悬，照彻尘心。要理解这份力量，需要花上数不尽的修行时间。
E: The claret wheel hangs overhead, illuminating mortal hearts. To understand this power, countless years of cultivation is required.

C: 结论：我接受了这群丹轮寺僧侣的邀请，与之同路。智众经师驮那封锁了我的武器系统，避免我在旅途中滥用暴力。
E: Conclusion: I have accepted the invitation from these Claretwheel Temple monks to share this journey. The Revered Master Dhyana has locked my weapons system to prevent me from unleashing violence during the trip.

C: 这是第一次，反有机方程的歼灭指令未能给予我正反馈的回应。
E: This is the first time that the Anti-Organic Equation's annihilation command has not provided a positive response to me.

C: 这股力量，足以污染、操控此地的一切机械，命它们将有机生命尽数碾为齑粉。
E: This power is sufficient to corrupt and control all machines in this area, commanding them to grind all organic life to fine dust.

C: 自性竟如何？缘起皆是我。本来虚妄尽无着，休道谁人性秽浊。
E: What is the nature of oneself? All karma traces back to one's decision and will. For all things are born with emptiness and neutral void. Do not call any being born filthy or tainted.

C: 接下来可以稍微休整一下。然后咱们就回休息室，在战术板那里讨论一下，接下来该打哪位对手吧～
E: We have time to take a short break. Let's return to the lounge and decide which opponent to fight next at the Tactics Board!

C: 前排左手边第一位。

E: The surprise is understandable. But to Luka, who is constantly growing as a fighter, the ring is the perfect stage for him to surpass his own limits. He spontaneously evolved right in the middle of his intense clash!

E: Let me put it in "more crass" terms: just based on looks and physique, Luka is undeniably handsome and already very "Beautiful."

E: Chaaaarge!

E: ...The entire security team, follow me. We're getting those students off the stage with force!

C: 时间差不多咯…哈哈，等着上开除名单吧！你们乐队里的谁都逃不掉！

C: 你沉浸在现场的喧闹气氛中，度过了一段难忘的时光。
E: You immerse yourself in the lively atmosphere of the event, spending an unforgettable time.

C: 好啊！既然是喜欢音乐的朋友，欢迎随时来贝洛伯格交流，音乐无边界！

C: 你不用在铁卫禁区执勤么？

E: Check the duty schedule

C: 「豹豹碰碰好玩到不行的水上小海豹冲撞对战」的冠军奖杯——<color=#dbc291ff>「金海豹杯」</color>！
E: Champion trophy for the So Dang Fun Seal Bumping Duel Challenge Seal Slammers — <color=#dbc291ff>Gold Seal Cup</color>!
o((╬◣'ω´◢ )o "Time to face the dromas!")

E: Don't insult my character. I have nothing to do with this! I'm only interested in shiny things that make jingly noises. Any mischief that doesn't pay well is beneath me.

C: 在被揭穿之前，「诡计」有着接近「神谕」的效力——换句话说，从一开始她就盯上了「金海豹杯」，随后她用谎言给你展示了一个「预言梦」。
E: Until it's exposed, "Trickery" is almost like a prophecy in effect — that is, she targeted the Gold Seal Cup from the start, then used falsehoods to show you a prophetic dream.

C: 我听说过帕拉黛星。那里原本是一个信奉「纯美」的星球，后来与星际和平娱乐签订契约，成了公司旗下的文化产业基地。
E: I've heard of Paradoxe. It was a planet that followed the Beauty before signing a contract with the Interastral Peace Entertainment, turning it into a cultural industry base under the IPC.

C: 后来，星际和平公司的作品涌入星球，摧垮了老爹的心态。他不再嚷嚷着积累和艺术家的坚持，直接封笔隐退了，我也有了创作的自由。
E: Later, when IPC's works flooded our planet, it broke the old man. He quit talking about dedication and artistic integrity, and just retired completely. That's when I could finally create my own works.

C: 在测试版的基础上，我们对项目整体进行了调优与迭代，并丰富和扩充了玩法功能。

C: 请允许我先进行一次自我介绍——鄙人名为乔瓦尼•迪•乔尔吉奥•达•艾普瑟隆，一介来自艾普瑟隆的小小私商。
E: Please allow me to introduce myself first: My humble name is Giovanni di Giorgio da Epsilon, and I'm a tiny private trader from Epsilon.

C: 对此我深表赞同。所以除了随游玩进度解锁的奖励外，玩家还可以通过获得某些成就，来换取限定款浣熊头像周边。
E: I couldn't agree more. So, in addition to rewards unlocked as you progress, players can also earn exclusive raccoon-themed avatar merchandise by unlocking certain achievements.

E: How about it? Why not act on that impulse and give it a shot?

C: 你战战兢兢地把手放到绒球上，过于紧张的情绪甚至让你遗忘了它的手感。

E: Can you be added to the character pool?

C: 真开心，和您共度的时光总是这么美妙。要记得我哦。
E: I'm elated. Time spent with you is always so magical. Do remember me, okay?

C: 我小时候特别爱玩一款游戏，来空间站之后我还想复刻出来…可惜那家游戏公司早就倒闭了，我想买版权都不知道找谁买……
E: When I was a kid, I was crazy about this game, and I thought about recreating it when I came to the space station... But unfortunately, the game company went bankrupt ages ago, and I had no clue whom to contact for the rights...

C: 汪  汪  汪  汪
E: Woof  Woof  Woof  Woof

C: 大<rhythm>家<rhythm>都<rhythm>要<rhythm>爱它
E: Everyone <rhythm>must <rhythm>absolutely <rhythm>cherish <rhythm>it

C: 控制<color=#f29e38ff>红色苏乐达瓶</color>，尽情<color=#f29e38ff>喷射</color>汽水吧！
E: Control the <color=#f29e38ff>red SoulGlad bottle</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>spray</color> soda to your heart's content!

C: 当垃圾桶下方的电视屏幕全部亮起后，<color=#f29e38ff>按下按键</color>开始表演。
E: When all the TV screens under the trashcan light up, <color=#f29e38ff>press the button</color> to begin the performance.

C: 都是些无聊的事，回想起来还挺有意思的。
E: It's all kinda mundane, but looking back on it is fun.

C: 你会这么好心？
E: You'd do that for me?

C: 知更小鸟
E: Robird

C: 我这次来呢，目的很简单，就是为了你在测试的这款「折纸小鸟对对碰」。
E: I'm here for a very simple reason: The Origami Bird Clash game you're testing.

C: 虽说按流程，我现在该给你出「谜题」了啾，不过嘛……
E: According to the procedures, I should be giving you a puzzle to solve, but...

C: 没问题，不过在那之前…
E: Sure thing. But before that...

C: 那勇者最后打败魔王了吗？
E: Did he vanquish the demon lord in the end?

C: 运气好罢了。
E: I was just lucky.

C: 我了解了。不过，不管是什么样的对手，我都不会掉以轻心的。
E: Understood. Still, I never underestimate any opponent.

C: 哈哈哈，教练你还真是什么人都认识！
E: Hahaha, you sure know a variety of people, coach!

C: 真的诶…你听说那件事了吗？
E: Really? Did you hear about that incident?

C: 真相是不辩自明的。
E: The truth will always reveal itself.

C: 那个叽米就是公司的员工！他如此逆风局还向着卢卡说话，可见卢卡真的是公司走狗！
E: Owlbert is paid by the IPC! The fact that he still speaks well of Luka despite the controversy proves that Luka is just an IPC puppet!

C: 哈哈哈哈！公司走狗，我不会屈服于你的淫威！今日对决之后，你卢卡定会身败名裂。
E: Hahaha! IPC puppet, I won't bend to your intimidation! After today, you, Luka, will be utterly disgraced.

C: 在贝城的时候，我从没意识到「打赢比赛」这件事会伤害这么多人……
E: Back in Belobog, I never realized that winning a match could hurt so many people...

C: 赛场上大家聚在一起的时候，确实都会为胜利者欢呼的。
E: When we are all together at the arena, everyone indeed cheers for the winner.

C: 卡美丽小姐，教练，我要接着开始今天的训练了。
E: Miss Carmella, Coach, I'm going to start training for today.

C: 发布会马上要开始了。
E: The launch event is about to start.

C: 没想到啊没想到，公司的动力甲竟然与仙舟有如此深厚的关系——
E: Who would have thought the IPC's powered armor has such a deep connection with the Xianzhou...

C: 包裹？你最近也没乱买东西啊…看着眼前硕大的游戏机，你的大脑开始飞速运转。
E: Package? You didn't buy anything recently... Your brain starts to whirl in overdrive as you look at the big arcade machine in front of you.

C: 你可以在那之后回到这里，届时，你将见证完整的故事。
E: You can return here after you've done all that. By then, you will bear witness to the whole story.

C: 出现的到底是真的波尔卡…？
E: Was it really Polka who appeared...?

C: 这次的实验非同以往，{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，还请注意安全。
E: This experiment is different from those prior, {F#ma'am}{M#sir} {NICKNAME}. Please stay safe.

C: 「派对时刻」！
E: Party Time!

C: 咳咳！让{NICKNAME}乘客在列车上如此居无定所，实在是本列车长的失职帕……
E: Ahem. It was terribly remiss of the conductor to have left {NICKNAME} without a room of {M#his}{F#her} own on the Express...

C: 不过「{NICKNAME}的房间」未必要在客房车厢。
E: {NICKNAME}'s room doesn't have to be in the Passenger Cabin, actually.

C: 当然了！不然要怎么打枕头大战呢？
E: Of course I do! How else would I have pillow fights?

C: 那可不行！只要拖到明天，就又会无限期拖延下去的！你们稍等我一下～
E: No can do! If we drag this out till tomorrow, it'll never be done! Wait here. I'll be right back!

C: 唔…真拿你没办法！休息好了就快来哦，不许拖延和偷懒！帕姆会监督你的帕！
E: Alright, fine! Rest up and come quickly... No delaying or slacking off! Pom-Pom will be keeping an eye on you!

C: 你的客厅可真宽敞，正适合开茶会。
E: Your living room is so spacious — perfect for hosting a tea party.

C: 感谢三月七小姐的测评！
E: Thank you, Miss March 7th, for the review!

C: 这里有这么多金币，想必是关于「偷窃」的考验。我猜只要偷走足够数量的金币，封印就能解开了…我没有驱动那玩意的天赋，你试试看？
E: There are so many gold coins here. This must be related to the "stealing" test. I guess we just need to steal enough coins for the seal to unlock... I don't have the kind of talent to activate that thing. You wanna give it a try?

C: 黑潮的威胁愈发强烈。我们不得不带走一切能带走的东西，融入圣城的怀抱。我们将不再以萨白尼人自居。
E: The threat of the black tide grows ever stronger. We are forced to take as many of our belongings as possible and seek the holy city's embrace. No longer shall we live independently as Sabanians.

C: 据说，很久很久以前，奥赫玛城门口有八座山。
E: Once upon a time, so the story goes, eight mighty mountains blocked the entrance to Okhema.

C: 这野史也太野了。
E: That's quite the tall tale!

C: 想想其他的…
E: Let me try another name.

C: 听到了吗！我们真棒！
E: Did you hear that! We're awesome!

C: 呜嗡！（光明的未来在等着我们！）
E: Grumph! (A bright future awaits us!)

C: 两位可能有所耳闻，圣城郊外驻扎着一支大地兽旅团，在下正是旅团的对接人！
E: You two might have heard there's a dromas troupe stationed in the suburbs of the holy city, and I happen to be their liaison!

C: 好了，闲话少叙。成大事者不应畏惧被审视。驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大，我们开始吧。
E: Alright, enough chatter. Those destined for greatness should not fear scrutiny. Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas, let's begin.

C: 人们都说，它的兽生已经抵达了巅峰，但它仍没有停止前进。或许只有它自己知道，大地兽的终点在何方……
E: People say it has attained life's zenith, yet the dromas never stopped. Perhaps only the dromas itself knows where its final destination lies...
Grumph... (I...)

C: 还好吗？
E: Are you okay?
...Grumph. (Hmm... yeah.)

C: 呜嗡，呜嗡。（不是啦，我是想说——气死，下次能不能免试啊。）
E: Grumph, grumph. (No, what I meant was— Ugh, so annoying! Can't we skip the test next time?)

C: 「呜嗡~（没事的，{F#妈妈}{M#爸爸}，你知道我的，只有我欺负别人的份。）」
E: "Grumph~ (Don't worry, {F#Mama}{M#Papa}. You know me. I'm the one who does the bullying.)"

C: 鉴宝大师来了！
E: The master appraiser is here!

C: 承蒙大家厚爱，推举我为本次赛跑大会的主持者，也欢迎各位嘉宾前来观赛咪。
E: Thank you to everyone who chose me as the host of this racing event, I am humbled by your support. Welcome, honored guests, to the spectacle, meow!

C: 先给我看看！
E: Let me see it first!

C: 你想听听吗？不收费的。
E: Wanna hear about it? No charge.

C: 世界万物皆有反相，正如磁体有两极、电荷有正负、动物有生死……
E: Everything in the world has its opposite, just like magnets have poles, charges have positive and negative, and living beings have life and death...

C: 无名之人、无命之人，终有一日，你会意识到自己的本质。届时，你将面临真正的取舍……
E: Nameless one, fateless one, one day you shall realize your true nature. And when that time comes, you'll be faced with a real choice...

C: 拉蒂卡兰原本是一颗冻土星球。一只离群的因菲诺巨龙来到此处，决心将其改造成宜居的熔岩地貌。
E: Ladiklan was once a frozen planet. Then one day, a lone Infernalian Dragon arrived here, determined to transform it into a habitable lava landscape.

C: 我——奥赫玛同盟的领袖，圣城的凯撒——将为你执掌{RUBY_B#店长助理}「餐馆主管」{RUBY_E#}一职。若对经营有所疑问，尽可来此问询！
E: I, leader of the Okhema Alliance, Imperator of the holy city, shall serve as your {RUBY_B#Manager's Assistant}"Restaurant Supervisor"{RUBY_E#}. Should you have any questions about management, feel free to come and ask!

C: 那就立马开始第一次营业吧。看你了，店长。
E: Alright, let's start the first day of operations. It's all up to you now, Manager.

C: 我还很好奇，自己的菜品会得到什么样的评价呢。
E: I'm actually curious... What kind of feedback will my dishes get?

C: 连口像样的锅都没有，还怎么做菜？难怪卖的都是草。
E: Not even a decent pot in sight. How do you expect to cook properly? No wonder the menu's just grass and leaves.

C: 专业的厨师，没几样趁手的厨具怎么行。
E: A pro chef without proper tools just won't cut it.

C: 至于实际解决方案，就交由店长决定了。
E: As for how to tackle the actual issues, that's for you to decide, manager.

C: （不举手）
E: (Don't raise your hand)

C: 当然。这些货都是我拿宝贝换来的，质量绝对上乘，喜欢请再来！
E: Of course, these goods cost me a fortune in treasures. All of top-notch quality, I swear! Come back anytime, my friend~

C: 凯撒言重了。我算不得什么伙伴，至多是尾被欢宴吸引的小鱼罢了。
E: You're too kind, Imperator. I'm hardly a partner, just a small fish drawn to the scent of celebration.

C: 是很能吃的大胃王客人呀。{NICKNAME}，好好招待它们，说不定能带来许多收益。
E: Big appetites, huh? {NICKNAME}, treat them well. If we win them over, it could mean big business.

C: 噢？你的厨艺进步不小啊，再来一场如何？
E: Oh? Looks like you've leveled up your skills. How about another round?

C: 好。我当然乐意奉陪。
E: Sounds good to me. I'm in.

C: 白厄阁下制作的菜品，初看或许觉得简陋，但入口便能感受到极为饱满的谷物与油炸焦香，外酥里嫩，是别处难品尝到的美味。
E: Lord Phainon's dish may look plain at first glance, but one bite reveals its true depth: rich grain and oil-fried aromas, a crisp crust, and tender center. It's indeed a rare and delightful treat.

C: 有了炼金术，亩产一万八！
E: Alchemy's yield, fills every field!

C: 金织女士愿意用自身的名誉为神奇果实担保，绝对天然无污染，各位大可放心购买！
E: Lady Goldweaver personally vouches for these wondrous fruits! <unbreak>100%</unbreak> natural and pollution-free! So go ahead and buy as many as you want!

C: 店长，你信她说的么？
E: Do you actually believe her, manager?

C: 要给我们发奖金？
E: Are we getting bonuses?

C: 没事，我帮你挡着。
E: Go ahead, I'll cover you.

C: 但既然你都这么说了，人家就恭敬不如从命咯？
E: But since you offered... I'd be rude not to accept, wouldn't I?

C: 留下的究竟是快乐的回忆，还是说仍有烦恼，和没能实现的愿望呢？身为店长，了解员工也是你的职责哦。
E: Are they full of smiles and fond memories? Or left with concerns and unfulfilled wishes? As the manager, it's your responsibility to understand your employees.

C: 还有，和小妖精一起玩。
E: Also playing with the little fairies.

C: …还好阿格莱雅大人只当是玩笑，换作在奥赫玛，恐怕得攥紧金线了。
E: ...Thankfully, Lady Aglaea treated it as good fun. If we were in Okhema, we'd be clutching the golden threads for dear life.

C: 贵为掌管宴会的「海洋」半神，剑旗爵的开场白未免过分沉重。
E: As the Ocean demigod who presides over feasts, Dux Gladiorum, opening with such weighty words does seem a touch too serious.

C: 想了解迷其林美食评审…
E: I want to know about the Memchelin Food Review...

C: *我们*很期待，下个主题活动会是什么呢？
E: We can't wait to see what the next theme event will be!

C: 纠正下，我没有说过这句话。原话应该是：深海能包容所有事物。
E: Correction, I never said that. What I actually said was: "The deep sea accepts all goods."

C: 下次再聊吧！
E: Let's catch up another time!

C: 我与金织爵都曾随凯撒作战，彼此早已熟识。初到妖精居所时，她还戏称要为我缝制适合此次盛宴的华服…不，或许她是真有打算吧。
E: Dux Goldweaver and I fought alongside the Imperator. We go way back. When I first arrived in the fairies' domain, she even joked about making me a fancy outfit suitable for this feast... Actually, she might not have been joking.

C: 看一看吧，我们的物资也不是很充裕…
E: Take a look. We don't have everything in stock.

E: Elderly Appraiser

E: Soldier's Echo

E: Seliose

E: Robert's Best Friend

E: Derisive Resident

E: Troublemaking Thug

E: Mada

E: Major

E: Old Garmentmaker

E: Performance Department Director

E: Slightly Embarrassed Researcher

E: Wubbaboo

E: Confused Citizen

E: Alley

E: Brona

E: Emmrich

E: Big-Head Bird

C: 眩晕小鸟
E: Stunned Bird

C: 胶片小鸟
E: Film Bird

C: 激愤的筑梦师
E: Furious Dreamweaver

E: Passionate Banana Fan

E: Patrolling Robot

E: Pedro

C: 棋鬼
E: Chess Ghost

E: Bookshop Customer

C: 自称「老朽」的科员
E: Researcher who refers to himself as "this old one"

C: 焱攸
E: Immola

C: 如我所书
E: As I've Written

C: 泽诺托斯
E: Zenotus

C: 尤里萨
E: Ulysse

E: White-haired Youth

C: 罐中仙
E: Immortal in a Vase

E: Deranged Disciple

E: Solemn Heliobus

E: Dr. Primitive

C: 孩子家长
E: Child's parent

C: 胆战心惊的员工
E: Terrified Employee

C: 烦躁不堪的员工
E: Irritated Employee

C: 可怜的「阮•梅」造物
E: Ruan Mei's Pitiable Creation

C: 列车组成功在一回合内击溃假想敌。
E: The Express Crew successfully 0-cycled the imagined enemy.

C: 列车在航途中发现了一批帝皇战争时期的智械残骸，部件的独特结构让姬子眼前一亮。她小心翼翼地搜集尚且完好的零件，通通搬回了自己的房间。
E: The Express discovers on its journey a batch of Intellitron ruins from the time of the Emperor's War, and Himeko's eyes light up when she sees the unique structure of these parts. She carefully collects the intact parts and moves them all into her room.

C: 帕姆巡夜时哼歌跑调，被讹传成名为「夜半歌声」的列车怪谈。它的心情十分低落，一整天默不作声。
E: Pom-Pom was humming songs off-tune while they conducted night patrols, leading to the birth of a ghost story rumor about midnight songs on the Express. Pom-Pom proceeds to feel very down and doesn't speak for the whole day.

C: 「律法」
E: "Law"

C: 改衣师
E: Dressmaster

C: 于那登神的试炼中，悬锋王储揭晓了往日。\n自旅途间收获的往事，前往书中将其写下。
E: The crown prince of Kremnos revealed the past in that trial of apotheosis.\nThe past gained through your travels. Head to the book and write it down.

C: 海洋的剑骑 海瑟音
E: Knight of the Ocean, Hysilens

C: 并非由于他那桀骜心性——\n而是英雄们的每一餐，\n均由他亲手烹煮，技艺超凡。
E: Not because of his unrestrained manners —\nBut because every meal the heroes partook,\nWere all cooked by his peerless skill.

C:
<color=#9e5738>由他据守的悬锋</color>，
再一次被雾霭笼罩，
铁锈、鲜血与火，
是歌颂半神的典仪。
E:
<color=#9e5738>The Kremnos he guards</color>
Is once again shrouded by mist.
Rust, blood, and fire
Are the ceremonial ode to the demigod.

C: 孩童们飞到我的面前，\n她们很少如此静穆。
E: The children flew before me,\nIt was rare to see them so quiet.

C: 剑染着了不知何人的鲜血，业已断裂。\n锁链牵着白皙的手腕，锈斑点点。
E: The sword stained with unknown blood, lying shattered and snapped.\nThe shackle chained pale wrists, dotted in thickening rust.

C: 「活下去。」
E: "Stay alive."

C: 「黎明不会止歇，贼星遥落异乡。」\n「你又怎知，我现在没在说谎？」
E: "The dawn will never cease, and the Thief Star wanders in foreign lands."\n"How would you know that I am not lying right now?"

C:
而在幕匿时分，
寻金撷银的脚印隐没于月色。
当那身影再度现身，
已是诡计硕果的累累。
E:
And at Curtain-Fall Hour,
Those treasure-seeking steps fade into the moonlight.
When she appears again,
Her arms are laden with money's weight.

C:
少女轻描淡写、
自我看低，
唯独忘记，
<color=#9e5738>诡计</color>，也曾是支撑世界的神明。
E:
The girl dismissed
And made light of herself,
Only forgetting,
<color=#9e5738>Trickery</color> was once a god that supported the world.

C: 「没理由，只是不想再见你。」
E: "There's no reason. I just don't want to see you again."

E: "Don't forget. That healer of twilight,"\n"Has a head of pink hair,"\n"But she is a descendant of the Sky."

E: "I can testify. March really did defeat countless training dummies." — {NICKNAME} "Those wooden dummies aren't exactly easy to break... It takes real skill!" — March 7th

The swordmaster would sink into hesitation,
And even that messenger of fate
Could not get her to laugh.

E: "Heirs of the Sky who once reveled in martial might," "Why do you now soothe the world's blistering blight?" The doctor responds with a smile, As he cures the injury's agony.

C: 「姑娘，只需做你医者的本分。」\n「族怨如烈日与阴云之别，无可消融。」
E: "Just do your duty as a healer, girl."\n"The family feuds are like sunlight and storm clouds. They cannot mend."

C: 据说它们的原型，\n来自创世之初，天父手中的泥像。

C: 那是他的第一柄<color=#9e5738>「剑」</color>，\n黑潮袭来的那日，\n<color=#9e5738>他手握它，斩断了命运的锁链。</color>
E: For that was his first <color=#9e5738>"sword."</color>\nAnd on the day that the black tide came,\n<color=#9e5738>He broke the shackles of fate with that weapon true.</color>

C: 遮目的金丝断尽，\n被遮掩的道理得以显现——\n「从风而靡的高贵，脆而不坚。」
E: The golden threads covering her eyes snapped,\nAnd the concealed truth finally appeared firsthand —\n"Before a strong wind, a weak nobility cannot stand."

C: 「吾师，我做了一个梦。」\n她如少女般娓娓倾诉。
E: "Teacher, I had a dream."\nShe recounts, like a young girl on a whim.

E: A golden laurel leaf appeared in the bath above the water outlet, spinning with the flow, as if still hesitating.

C: 漆黑的浮云遮住了月亮，那座浮空堡垒忽地便消失，似乎也对那幽暗之物感到恐惧。旋即，浮云撤去，堡垒已不见踪迹，而月亮依旧如故，并在少女的瞳中愈发明亮。
E: Dark clouds obscured the moon, and the floating fortress suddenly vanished, as if it too were terrified of that shadowy presence. Then, as the clouds retreated, the fortress was nowhere to be found, while the moon remained unchanged, shining ever brighter in the girl's eyes.

C: 半晌，白厄率先打破了沉默。

E: One day, the starving Hyacine saw Little Ica gobbling up rocks that had rolled down from the mountaintop. "No... Little Ica... you can't... eat those!"

C: 在少女触碰金线的刹那，一幅景象忽然出现在她的脑海。黄金裔们齐聚在云石天宫，站在最前面的白发少年清清嗓子，「多亏那刻夏老师和阿格莱雅女士的联合研究，这次的『信』不仅能让遐蝶女士听见我们的声音，还能看见我们的样貌。各位，想好要和她说什么了吗？」
E: The moment she touched the golden thread, a vision suddenly stirred within her mind. The Chrysos Heirs had gathered in the Marmoreal Palace, and the white-haired youth at the front cleared his throat. "Thanks to Professor Anaxa and Lady Aglaea's joint research, the 'letter' this time not only lets Lady Castorice hear our voices, but also see our faces. Everyone, have you decided what you want to tell her?"

E: "March... why is your juice salty?"

E: Aglaea stepped forward. "Professor Anaxagoras has suddenly fallen ill. I will announce the final theme in his stead — 'Trailblaze!'"

星穹列车的无名客，误入死循环的外部变量。
同为「毁灭」行者，与十二因子产生共鸣。在第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次死循环中，接替了空缺的「岁月」路径，并成功引导NeiKos<unbreak>496</unbreak>跨越智能奇点。

在第<unbreak>33550337</unbreak>次死循环中，接替了空缺的「负世」路径。一度遭到长夜月囚禁，但在死循环末尾成功解除威胁，防止实验数据遭到灾难性清除。

In the <unbreak>33,550,337</unbreak>th recursive cycle, this entity assumed the vacant Worldbearing track. At one point, this entity was imprisoned by Evernight, but successfully neutralized the threat at the end of the recursive cycle, preventing the catastrophic purging of experimental data.
