C:
「负世」的火种已被归还。

刻法勒是全知、全能之泰坦，最初的创生之神，背负天空者。据说，它过去是一名端坐在王座上的君王，而如今是身负黎明机器的巨神——奥赫玛人皆可窥见那宏伟的身影。

刻法勒自天空的雷霆与大地的脊髓的结合中诞生，被众神赋予了创造生命的责任。翁法罗斯最初的人类，便是刻法勒依照自己的形象，在赋予生命后抟造而成。刻法勒深爱这些渺小的存在，因此，它伟岸的身影永远停留在凡界，与人类相伴。黄金裔们认为，刻法勒亦是救世主和英雄的象征，它是翁法罗斯所有英雄的父亲，也是所有救世主最终会成为的样子。

据说，刻法勒舍弃了统御全世的王座，只为令奥赫玛留下一丝光明。圣城中流传着一种浪漫的传说：在危难之际，刻法勒会重新睁开双眼，带领人们战胜黑潮，再度开创天地。
E:
The Coreflame of Worldbearing has been returned.

Kephale is all-knowing, all-powerful, the first god to create life, and they who bear the weight of the heavens. It is said that they once were a king upon a throne, and now they stand as a great divine who bear the Dawn Device, their imposing figure beheld by all Okhemans.

Kephale was born from a union between the lightning of the sky and the spine of the land, and they were bestowed the power to create new life by the divine above. The first humans created by Kephale were based on their own image. They granted the humans life and molded them thereafter. Kephale adored these little beings, and so, their grand shadow forever lingered in the mortal realm alongside the humans. The Chrysos Heirs believe that Kephale is the icon of all heroes, the father of all heroes in Amphoreus, and serves as a representation of the Deliverer's final visage.

It is said that Kephale abandoned the throne that rules over the entire world, leaving only a thread of light in Okhema. There exists a romantic legend in the holy city: In a time of grave desperation, Kephale will open their eyes anew, lead mankind to overcome the black tide, and rebuild the world once more.

C: 来吧，让我们书写的「爱」，覆盖「恨」的墨迹♪
E: Come on, let's write down our love to cover up the ink stains of hate ♪

C: 本场战斗中，我们获得了<color=#f29e38ff>驱邪术</color>的力量。
E: In this battle, we receive the power of <color=#f29e38ff>exorcismics</color>.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>任意回合结束</color>时，都会使<color=#f29e38ff>妖火</color>向行动序列顶部移动。
E: When <color=#f29e38ff>a turn ends</color>, it will cause the <color=#f29e38ff>Fiendfire</color> to shift towards the top of the Action Order.

C: 十王司授意下，我们可以在这里自由开展捕捉岁阳的行动…
E: By order of the Ten-Lords Commission, we are free to capture the heliobi here...

C: 现在打开「罗浮杂俎」，看看网友们又发了什么吧。
E: Now, open Ghostly Grove and check out what people have been posting about.

C: 好像这里就是「黄金的时刻」，逐梦客在这里赚了不少，我们走帕！
E: This seems to be the Golden Hour. Dreamchasers have made a fortune here. Let's go!

C: 在挑战彦卿前，必须先战胜所有擂台的擂主。
E: Before you challenge Yanqing, you must defeat ringmasters across each arena.

C: 开始挑战第一场<color=#f29e38ff>擂台赛</color>吧。
E: Begin the first <color=#f29e38ff>Faceoff Match</color> challenge.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>飓霆拷链</color>可以增强<color=#f29e38ff>风属性与雷属性</color>的武器和角色。
E: The <color=#f29e38ff>Lightning Storm Shackles</color> can enhance <color=#f29e38ff>Wind and Lightning-Type</color> weapons and characters.

C: 看看我给你准备的启程礼物吧！
E: Let's see the departure gift I prepared for you!

C: 向着<color=#f29e38ff>传说武器</color>，前进！
E: Onward, to the <color=#f29e38ff>Legendary Weapon</color>!

C: 我不抱希望，但冒险还是要继续！
E: I don't have much hope, but the adventure must go on!

C: 呼，事情就是这样。即使是全银河冒险的球棒侠，也要遵守星球当地的法规哦。
E: Well, that's how things go. Even the universe-adventuring baseballer needs to follow the local planetary rules.

C: 事不宜迟，主公这就动身吧！
E: We can't delay any longer. Sound Master, let's get moving!

C: 检查设备的时候，我发现了一首未完成的乐曲，来看看吧！
E: While I was checking the equipment, I found an unfinished song. Come take a look!

C: 飞船的燃料很充足，我的状态也正好。出发前，先来回顾下我们在这个星球的活跃表现吧——
E: Fuel, check. My status, great. Before we proceed, let's recap our performance on this planet.

C: 随着你对冒险越发熟悉，新功能也会逐渐开放。
E: As you get more familiar with the adventures, new functions will also become gradually unlocked.

C: 这个星球中，会帮你配备一把<color=#f29e38ff>初始携带武器</color>。
E: On this planet, I will equip you with an <color=#f29e38ff>initial weapon</color>.

C: 在精英波次的战斗中，存在着<color=#f29e38ff>通关目标</color>要求。
E: When facing waves of enemy elites, there are <color=#f29e38ff>clearance objectives</color> to complete.

C: ——接下来就要直面魔王了！
E: Now, we're about to face off with the Demon King!

C: 收获后，农作物的库存就会增加。
E: After harvesting, your crop stock will increase.

C: 营业过程中，会有些突发事件需要小灰来做决定！
E: During business hours, some emergencies will require Little Gray to make decisions!

C: 购买小费桌后，顾客在用餐结束后有概率会支付小费
E: After purchasing a tip table, customers have a chance to leave a tip when they finish their meal

C: 选择该水果，使用道具
E: Select this fruit and use the item

E: The multiplayer mode is now available. You can fight other trailblazers~

C: {NICKNAME}，请帮我提交这组报告吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, please help me submit this bundle of reports.

C: 对手的名次比我们要高，得好好加油才行！
E: Our opponent ranks higher than us, so we need to work hard!

C: 和小奇美拉们继续加油吧！
E: Let's keep up the good work with our chimeras!

C: 不过嘛，这次测试我先罩着你。看，我直接用权限把你的祝福强化了。
E: I'll cover you for this test. See, I used my clearance to enhance your Blessings.

C: 哈，你得到了一个<color=#f29e38ff>奇物</color>！我从收藏里挑了点有趣的东西放进<color=#f29e38ff>模拟宇宙</color>里了。
E: Aha, you obtained a <color=#f29e38ff>Curio</color>! An interesting item from my collection that I put in the <color=#f29e38ff>Simulated Universe</color>.

C: 随便走走，找点感觉。
E: Just go walk around. Figure out how it feels.

C: 都说了别进，没有收益。
E: I told you not to go in. There're no buffs there.

C: 这里记录了造物的<color=#dbc291ff>不同部位特征</color>，它们也很有研究价值！
E: This is a record of the creations' <color=#dbc291ff>various body part traits</color>. There's great research value in this too!

C: 触发<color=#f29e38ff>特殊突变</color>了！投入材料以迎接「垃圾糕」的诞生吧。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Special mutation</color> triggered! Put forth the materials and prepare for Trash Cake's birth.

C: 每条航线都有对应的物流评分，<color=#f29e38ff>每走1格会减少1评分</color>
E: Every route has its corresponding Logistic Score. <color=#f29e38ff>Every grid used will reduce the score by 1</color>

C: 不愧是你啊，接下来请完成运单目标里剩余的货物需求吧！金人巷就靠你了
E: I expected no less from you. Now, please complete the rest of the requests to reach the shipping target! Aurum Alley is counting on you!

E: Come on, then.

C:
我谨代表金人巷商会再一次向您表达最诚挚的感激之情。
由于您的苦心经营，我们成功在竞标招募日前赚取<color=#f29e38ff>#1</color>商会储值金，完成了营收目标。
金人巷商会承诺营收将用于支付招标的保证金，完善金人巷建设。
我们会确保来之不易的成果发挥最大的效益。
E:
On behalf of the Aurum Alley Merchant Guild, I want to once again express our deepest gratitude to you.
Thanks to your diligent efforts, we have successfully earned a total of <color=#f29e38ff>#1</color> in Guild Funds before the bidding recruitment deadline, reaching the revenue target.
The Merchant Guild pledges to use the funding as the security deposit for the bid and also for improving Aurum Alley's infrastructure.
We promise to use these hard-earned gains to achieve the maximum effect.

C:
岁月流转，王朝更替。苍生呼唤君主，渴求指引。
在君主眼里，臣民皆为刍狗，天地亦是秤上砝码。
若可将死敌役，代价不足为惜，万物皆可为棋。
在与神明的战场上，胜利高于正义。
E:
Time flows. Dynasties rise and fall. The people cry out for a ruler, desperate for guidance.
To the sovereign, their subjects are pawns. Even heaven and earth are just weights on a scale.
If the death of a sovereign can bring victory, then no price is too steep and everything is just a chess piece.
On the battlefield against the gods, victory always outweighs justice.

C: 「记忆」和「照片」很相似。它看似记录了「真实」，但却在侵入「真实」、异化「真实」、篡改「真实」。也许清除其中的「失真」会使它变得可靠，也许不会。
E: "Memory" is similar to "photographs." Even though it appears to record "reality," it actually invades, alienates, and alters "reality." Perhaps removing the "distortion" will make it reliable, or perhaps not.

C: 美丽的姬子姐姐，成熟，可靠，又优雅，还是列车的领航员…以后，我也可以成为那样的大人吧！不过咱现在这样也很好~
E: Ahh, beautiful Himeko. She's sensible, reliable, and elegant. It's great to have her as the navigator... When I'm grown up, I'm gonna be just like her! I like the now me too though~

C: 听赛飞儿小姐说话可有意思啦！关于喵喵教和汪汪教的故事，她与我讲了不下八十个版本，简直比我为自己编的身世故事还要多！
E: It's super fun to listen to Miss Cipher! She's told me at least eighty versions of the story of the Meow-Meow faith and the Woof-Woof faith. That's almost more than the number of backstories I've made up for myself!

C: 不许跑！
E: You can't run!

C: 这、这么多？！
E: Wow, there's so much!

C: 别小瞧本姑娘！
E: Better not underestimate me!

C: 不好。
E: Bad news.

C: 您是…？抱歉，我不会拖您后腿的！
E: You are...? My apologies! I won't slow you down!

C: 嗯？别怕呀。
E: Hm. Scared yet?

C: 啊？行吧。
E: Meh, acceptable quality.

C: 我们这些异界英灵，都是自名唤「英灵座」的存在中拷贝出的副本。但匹诺康尼的英灵又是从何而来呢？莫非在这个世界，也有什么东西一刻不停记录着历史？
E: We, the Heroic Spirits, are copies drawn from the Throne of Heroes. But the Heroic Spirits of Penacony... where do they come from? Does this world have its own version of the Throne, ceaselessly recording every detail of history?

C: 有目标，镰刀才够快。
E: A sharp scythe needs targets.

C: 捧场的人还不少。
E: Pretty good crowd today.

C: 想不到还藏了这个！
E: Never expected to find this here!

C: 哈！虎克来捣蛋！
E: Ha! Time to make some mischief!

C: 老爹…都没打过我……
E: Wait til I tell my daddy on you...

C: 很多事情，只有佩拉才懂…
E: There are many things that only Pela can understand... Hehe.

C: 蔬菜…蘑菇…可恶，凭什么灭绝的不是这些玩意啊？
E: Vegetables... mushrooms... disgusting. Why is it whenever there's an extinction, it's never these things?

C: 无论停云姑娘说什么，都没法让听者置之脑后。狐人能言的特点，就该巧加利用，不是么？
E: It's hard to forget anything Tingyun says. The foxians' talent with words should be utilized to its maximum potential, no?

C: 人人都当驭空司舵是退休了…殊不知她在放下最热爱的飞行后，选择了另一条更艰难的道路。
E: Everyone believes Helm Master Yukong had retired... They don't know that she chose an even harder path after she left her beloved skies behind.

C: 闭目养神。随着时间流逝，这越发不是件易事。
E: Meditating with my eyes closed. That gets more difficult as time goes on.

C: 你来了，别让我抓到你任何破绽。
E: Need me to watch your back?

C: 结束了。
E: Done.

C: 你专心治疗就好，不用管其他的…有麻烦，只管喊我~
E: Just focus on healing, and if you get into trouble, give me a shout!

C: 看好了。
E: This is it.

C: 对待劲敌，不可掉以轻心。
E: Never let your guard down in front of your enemy.

C: 虽说联盟奉帝弓诰谕巡猎寿瘟祸祖…但每艘仙舟上至今都留有被称为「丰饶仙迹」的星神造物。在罗浮众多洞天的中心，便封存着赐予吾等长生的「建木」。
E: Although the Alliance followed the Reignbow Arbiter's order to hunt down the Plagues Author... every Xianzhou ship still has Aeonspawn known as "Traces of the Abundance." At the heart of the many delves of the Luofu, there is the Ambrosial Arbor that gives us longevity.

C: 刺出的每一剑都会被他识破…仅凭剑术上的造诣，能够战胜他么？
E: He can detect any swing of the sword before it lands... Would I be able to defeat him with my swordplay alone?

C: 停云小姐可以承受比一般人更激烈的按摩治疗手法，所以我从来不会对她「手」下留情~
E: Tingyun can endure more intense massages than other people, so I never show her mercy~

C: 将军，幸会。
E: Good to see you, General.

C: 我与这柄枪的铸造者之间，尚未了结。
E: There is unfinished business between me and the maker of this weapon.

C: 是龙女啊…若有提神醒脑的药剂，替我备着些，多谢多谢……
E: Ah, Dragon Lady... If you have any energizing potions at hand, could you set aside some for me? Thank you...

C: 我没兴趣。
E: This doesn't intrigue me.

C: 尾巴：有种打我！
E: Tail: Pick on someone your own size!

C: 什么？能不能吃鸳鸯锅？哈哈，别担心，我保证下次一定是「微微辣」！
E: What? Not even a farewell dinner? Haha, don't worry. I promise next time the hot pot won't be too spicy!

C: 点燃我吧！看看能否将我灼烧殆尽！
E: Set me aflame! Let's find out if you can reduce me to cinders!

C: 与他以剑交心之后，发现他确实是个古道热肠的好人，就是有点不太好懂…而且他的「剑」，也不太好懂……
E: After we got to know each other by sparring, I realized that he was indeed a kind gentleman, but it was a little hard to understand him... And his "sword" was hard to understand, too...

C: 我，即是阴影……
E: I am the shadow...

C: 一步一行，便无惧陷入泥沼。
E: One solid stride at a time. Fear not the peril of descent.

C: 管好你自己，赌徒，我用不着你操心。
E: Keep to yourself, gambler, and spare me the false display of concern.

C: 敬请欣赏，庸人的剧场。
E: For the theater of the mediocre.

C: 我这人没什么长性，也很难有持之以恒的梦想…最近的梦想是…加入天才俱乐部！对，扮演一个天才！哈，好想试试这个有难度的挑战…有没有人支持我？
E: I'm not one with many talents, and having a dream isn't really my thing. But my latest goal is... getting into the Genius Society! Yes, I wanna impersonate a genius! Ha, I'm itching to try. Think anyone will fall for it?

C: 我们现在可是一伙的~
E: There's no power like team power~

C: 今夜，灵魂彼此相拥。
E: Tonight, souls shall embrace.

C: 前方危险，务必小心。
E: Danger ahead, ready yourself.

C: 博学的教授，祝愿我们都能求得真理。
E: Learned Doctor, I hope that both of us find the truth.

C: 她还走在「进行时」的路上。总有一天她会停下脚步，然后明白…「乘胜追击」才是洽谈交易的第一要义。
E: She is still a work in progress. But one day she'll stop and realize... the first principle of negotiating a deal is to keep pressing after a victory.

C: 不错。我想学这个。
E: Impressive. This is worth learning.

C: 在奥赫玛的这段时光，过得可还愉快？如有吩咐，尽可向「衣匠」传达，圣城定会为它的盟友献上最盛情的招待。
E: Has your time in Okhema been enjoyable? If you have any wishes, please let this "Garmentmaker" know. The holy city will certainly offer the most splendid hospitality for its allies.

C: 穿上浪漫的华服，奔赴重要的时刻吧。
E: Don the raiment of romance and move toward that defining moment.

C: 明天…见……
E: See you... tomorrow...

C: 在哀地里亚的日子，我和人们一起将幽蓝的「安提灵花」编成美丽的花环，为牺牲的战士戴上，然后目送他们顺着冥河而下…就这样，日复一日……
E: During my days in Aidonia, I wove dark blue Antila flowers into beautiful wreaths with everyone else. We then placed them onto the dead soldiers' heads, and watched as the bodies floated down the River of Souls... And so it went, day after day...

C: 沉眠吧。
E: Sleep now.

C: 不能让大家…失望……
E: I can't... let them down...

C: 代表正义的红，象征英勇的橙，寓意和平的黄…先祖们曾为世界留下不同的色彩，就像阳光透过雨滴，便会折射成七种光芒。
E: Red for justice, orange for courage, yellow for peace... My ancestors left different colors for this world just like how the sunlight turns into seven different shades when it passes through raindrops.

C: 那刻夏老师，请开始您的理论实践吧。
E: Professor Anaxa, it's time to put your theory into practice.

C: 张牙舞爪的虾蟹，还不足为惧。
E: Thrashing claws and snapping shells... hardly worth fearing.

C: 终究落幕了……
E: Finally, the curtain fell...

C: 进军。
E: Forward.

C: 为我厮杀吧！
E: Fight for me!

C: 别想逃走哦。
E: Not thinking of running, are you?

C: 哎，真羡慕你们能经常和她聊天。
E: I'm so jealous that you get to chat with her all the time.

C: 这儿的事，回去别忘了告诉三月七。
E: When we get back, let's not leave March 7th out of the loop, alright?

C: 锵锵——有什么宝贝，也和我分享吧？
E: Ta-da! If you find any treasures, please share them with me~

C: 中场休息结束。
E: Intermission's over.

C: 我会…记住的……
E: I'll... remember this...

C: 这次也拜托姬子小姐收尾了。
E: I'm counting on you to wrap this up, Himeko.

C: 前方必是辉煌，迈德漠斯。
E: Glory surely lies ahead, Mydeimos.

C: 以自己的意志，抵达结局吧。
E: Reach the end of the story in your own way.

C: 焚烧众生者是时间，时间又使其熄灭
E: Time is what ignites all living things, yet time, too, extinguishes them

C: 《蝗灾中的世界：重建秩序》丛书宣传单
E: Flyer for The World in Swarm Disaster: Rebuilding Order Book Series

C: 堤溃蚁穴其七
E: Breached Nest (VII)

C: 得再改进下菜谱…
E: Time to refine the recipe...

C: 商店中会出现阿格莱雅精心设计的<color=#f29e38ff>特殊装备</color>！
E: The store will feature <color=#f29e38ff>special equipment</color> meticulously designed by Aglaea!

C: 大地与奇美拉的守护者
E: Guardian of Earth and Chimeras

E: After this unit attacks: If <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color> is lower than <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>, launches a Follow-Up ATK, dealing <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> DMG to all opponents.

C: 穿戴者被击倒时：将2个拥有<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>初始攻击力</color>，<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>初始生命值</color>的自己放入召唤队列，每场对战生效1次
E: When the wearer is knocked down: Places 2 copies of yourself with <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> initial ATK</color> and <color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=1 width=1 height=1><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> initial HP</color> into the summon queue, effective 1 time per battle.

C: 对战开始时：对所有对手造成<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>攻击力<unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>的伤害，至少造成1点伤害，随后离场
E: When the battle begins: Deals DMG equal to <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK</color> to all opponents (minimum 1 DMG), and then departs from the field.

C: 对战开始时：队伍中最强的蝶糕糕为攻击最高的我方奇美拉施加【祝福】。拥有【祝福】的奇美拉被击倒时会以<color=#dc6f33><icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>重新对战，最多生效2次
E: At the start of battle: The strongest Butterfly Cake in the team grants "Blessing" to the ally chimera with the highest attack. When a chimera with "Blessing" is defeated, it will rejoin the battle with <color=#dc6f33><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>HP</color>. This effect can trigger up to 2 times.

E: Increases a random stat of 1 chimera by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>

C: 使穿戴者受到的伤害降低<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>点，对战中首次受到的伤害额外降低<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>点.至少受到1点伤害
E: Reduces the wearer's DMG taken by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. The first DMG taken in battle is additionally reduced by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>. The minimum DMG taken is 1.

C: 对战开始时：召唤<unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>只<unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>级受气包

C: 敌方目标初始拥有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color>层【韧甲+】，每层使敌方目标受到的伤害降低<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>；敌方目标每次韧性被削减为0时降低1层【韧甲+】。该效果的层数在敌方目标的每个阶段重置。
E: Enemy target initially has <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak></color> stacks of "Resilient Armor+," and each stack reduces DMG taken by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>. Enemy targets lose 1 stack of "Resilient Armor+" each time their Toughness is reduced to 0. Stacks of this effect will reset at each of the enemy target's phase.

C: 行动序列上出现【巨龟吐息】：行动时使敌方全体受到的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color>，持续<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color>回合，并扫射敌方全体3次，累计造成等同于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color><u>基础伤害</u>的冰、火属性伤害，使其行动延后<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>，并无视弱点属性削减敌方全体目标<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>点韧性值，击破敌方弱点时触发冰、火属性弱点的击破效果。我方目标使用【<u>罐中脑</u>】激活终结技后，使【巨龟吐息】的行动提前<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: "Giant Turtle's Breath" appears in Action Order: When taking action, increases DMG taken by all enemies by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]</unbreak></color> turns, performs 3 Barrages on all enemies, dealing Ice and Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of <u>base DMG</u>, delays their actions by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color>, and reduces <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> Toughness from all enemy targets ignoring Weakness Type. When Weakness Break occurs on an enemy, triggers both Ice and Fire Weakness Break effects. When ally target activates Ultimate with "<u>Brain in a Vat</u>," "Giant Turtle's Breath" action advances by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 盛大的宴会就要结束，你将前往最后舞台的起点，也曾是匹诺康尼所有故事的起点。黄泉请你闭上眼睛，正因生命敢于沉睡，他们才能醒来。
E: This grand festival was drawing to its close. You went to the starting point for the ultimate stage of your journey, where all stories of Penacony had once begun. Acheron asked you to close your eyes. It was precisely because life dared to slumber that they could awaken.

E: Supreme Glue

C: 时间会令它散发光泽。
E: Time brings out its glow.

C:
我不是英雄，
我是万千凡人中的一员。
有人说，我是史诗幕后的主角；
有人说，我是托举英雄的台阶。
我不知道，我只是在努力活着，正如遍布大地的同胞。
我出生，我成长，我繁衍，我死去。
我是上述流程的无尽循环。
祖辈的故事因我而传承，文明的画卷因我而延续。
偶尔、经常或每时每刻，我也会怀疑人生有何意义。
但我依旧努力活着，
结成家庭、繁衍后代，
仿佛生长在石头缝里的青苔。
活着本身就是答案。
E:
I am no hero,
I am one among countless ordinary souls.
Some say I'm the protagonist behind epic tales,
while some say I'm the steps that lift heroes high.
I don't know, I'm just trying to survive, like my kindred across the lands.
I am born, I grow, I procreate, I die.
I am the endless cycle of all the above.
Through me, ancestral stories live on. Through me, civilization's tapestry unfolds.
Sometimes, often, or every moment, I too question life's meaning.
Yet I keep on living,
building a family, bearing children,
like moss growing in the cracks of stone.
Living itself is the answer.

C: 周期演算：迷宫委托
E: Cyclical Extrapolation: Labyrinth Assignment

C: 点燃活火
E: Ignited Flame

C: 疾如旋踵
E: Whirlwind Turn

C: 大丽花在开始恢复你的记忆时，曾声称自己是一名星核猎手——既然并非如此，那么艾利欧为何会出现在这里？又或者，那只黑猫根本与艾利欧无关？
E: When The Dahlia started restoring your memories, she claimed to be a Stellaron Hunter. If that wasn't true, then why is Elio here? Or perhaps that black cat has nothing to do with Elio at all?

C: 查看「奇美拉世界锦标赛」的新内容
E: Check out the new content in the Chimera World Tournament

C: 命运有时也和记忆类似。正因它如迷宫一般曲折，对于有缘人，银河的尺度也称不上多么广大。
E: Destiny is much like memory. Since it twists and turns like a maze, even the vastness of the cosmos isn't too great for those fated to meet.

C: 这究竟是哪？
E: Just where is this place?

C: 你怎么知道「剧本」？
E: How do you know about the "script"?

C: 是谁干的？
E: Who did it?

C: 或许，我也能借机走进你的过去——在我看来，这会十分有趣。
E: Perhaps I can also take this chance to peek into your past... which, if you ask me, should be quite interesting.

C: 没必要，我太了解它们了。
E: No need. I know them too well.

C: （话虽如此……）
E: (Even so...)

C: 可是哥哥，这……
E: But brother, this...

C: 别想跑！你这个偷渡犯！
E: Don't even think about running away, you stowaway!

C: 小意思。
E: Just part of the job.

C: 哦，这个……
E: Oh, well...

C: 人们都说，「知更鸟」维护领地时，总是连命都不在乎。没想到，这个名字还挺适合你。
E: You know what they say. Robins will fight tooth and nail to protect their territory, even at the cost of their own lives. Looks like that name suits you pretty well.

C: 不过，真的是他？我记得，很久之前的一场暴乱中，梦主的身躯已被焚毁，如今只能在美梦中延续生命。
E: But was it really him? If I remember correctly, the Dreammaster's body was burned to ashes in a riot long ago, and he can now only sustain his life within the sweet dream.

C: 极端情况下，他恐怕能将整个匹诺康尼付之一炬——但愿他不会舍得。
E: In extreme cases, he could probably burn all of Penacony to the ground... Though hopefully he wouldn't have the heart to do it.

C: 两位来得正巧，这片梦境危机四伏。既然我们目的一致，不如结伴同行吧。
E: Your arrival is timely. This Dreamscape is fraught with danger. Since our destination is the same, how about we join forces?

C: 你知道艾利欧。
E: You know Elio.

C: 之后的记忆…是一片空白？怎么可能…这只八音盒落入黄泉之手，被她带来匹诺康尼是事实，本该这样的…可中间的过程……
E: The memory after that... is blank? How is that possible... This music box fell into Acheron's hands, and she brought it to Penacony. That's a fact, and that's how it should have gone... but along the way...

C: 你们不是也一样吗？为了将我抹去，流光忆庭进行过十四次追缉，而最后那一次，我明明死在了你的面前，对吧？
E: Aren't you the same? The Garden of Recollection launched fourteen pursuits trying to erase me, and in that final one, I died right in front of you, didn't I?

C: 那位知更鸟小姐，先你一步抵达了流梦礁。面对她的却非豪赌时的未知……
E: Miss Robin arrived at Dreamflux Reef ahead of you. But what awaited her wasn't the uncertainty of a gamble...

C: 不过…我决定了。
E: But... I've made up my mind.

C: 抱歉，我说到哪里了？
E: Sorry, where was I?

C: 贵为五大家系的领导者，这未免太寒酸了吧？
E: For a leader of the Five Lineages, that's pretty cheap, isn't it?

C: 我是来带你回到橡木家系的——星期日先生很担心你的安危，他委托我在梦境中找到你。
E: I'm here to bring you back to the Oak Family. Mr. Sunday is worried about your safety. He tasked me with finding you in the dreamscape.

C: 我相信…你一定是个知恩图报的人，对吧？
E: I trust... you're someone who knows how to return a favor, right?

C: <color=#dbc291ff>只要我「底牌未出」，没有一个人敢跟注到底。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>So long as my "trump card" remains unplayed, none will dare see the hand through to the end.</color>

C: 「梦主」从不害怕流萤深入调查「繁育」，那正是「梦主」希望她看到的{RUBY_B#假象}真相{RUBY_E#}。
E: The Dreammaster was never afraid of Firefly investigating the Propagation. That was exactly the {RUBY_B#façade}truth{RUBY_E#} he wanted her to see.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「<unbreak>11</unbreak>：<unbreak>15</unbreak>█神明赐予我们天火，也赐予我们神圣的磨难。便令它们存在吧，你我皆属凡人，生来便要去爱，去受痛苦。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"<unbreak>11</unbreak>:<unbreak>15</unbreak>█The gods bestowed upon us heavenly fire, and with it divine tribulations. Let them be, for we are all mortals, born to love and to suffer."</color>

C: 暗号，暗号，立刻回答——<color=#dbc291ff>生命因何而沉睡？</color>
E: Passphrase, passphrase, respond at once: <color=#dbc291ff>Why does life slumber?</color>

C: 不过…谢谢。至少你带来了好消息。
E: But... thanks. At least you brought good news.

C: 拿到了。
E: Got it.

C: 而后，在匹诺康尼大剧院，你们与星期日展开了决战——在篡夺了「齐响诗班」之后，他已是毋庸置疑的令使。
E: You engaged in a decisive battle with Sunday at the Penacony Grand Theater afterward. He had, without question, become an Emanator at that time after usurping the Harmonious Choir.

C: 想要将其摧毁，我们就必须让匹诺康尼的所有人，「想要从梦中醒来」。
E: To destroy it, we must make everyone in Penacony "want to wake up from their dreams."

C: 是啊，<color=#dbc291ff>前往下一重梦境后，我们就要直面星神的力量。但在那之前，我们已经出完了全部底牌。</color>
E: Exactly. <color=#dbc291ff>Once we enter the next layer of the Dreamscape, we'll be facing an Aeon's strength head-on. But by then, we'll have played all our cards.</color>

C: 至于美梦之外，只能指望其他星神进行干涉——而那无异于掀起一场寰宇神战。
E: As for beyond the sweet dream, our only hope lies in intervention from other Aeons... But that would be tantamount to igniting a cosmic war among gods.

C: 别叫，想想你自己才多大。
E: Quiet down. You're just a kid yourself.

C: 你不妨有话直说。
E: Why don't you just cut to the chase?

C: 可是，你在唱的，是妈妈唱过的歌……
E: But you're singing the song Mom used to sing...

C: 是啊，生命因何而沉睡…我们仍未知晓这一问的答案，却已然要从这场梦中清醒。
E: Why does life slumber...? We don't know the answer yet, but we're about to awaken from this dream.

C: 临行前，你愿意告诉我…你的愿望吗？
E: Before you go... Would you tell me your wish?

C: 即使拥抱曾经的力量，会让我更快死去。
E: ...Even if embracing my former strength means speeding towards my death.

C: 愿此行，终抵群星
E: May This Journey Lead Us Starward

C: …所以呢？
<color=#dbc291ff>真正的三次死亡，第一次…我早就知道真相。我没有做梦的机能，醒来后，就再也无法入梦。也就是说，梦中的我将会彻底不复存在。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>As for the true three deaths, the first one... I've known its true form for a long time. I can't dream. After I woke up, I would never dream again. In other words, the me that exists in this dream would completely cease to exist.</color>

C: 我们打不过的，还是一起跑吧。
E: We can't beat them. Let's run away together.

C: 受、受您照顾了，这份恩情，阿钟会永远记得。
E: Th-Thank you for taking care of me. I, Ticky, will never forget your kindness.

C: 好讨厌的感觉…
E: Ugh... what an awful feeling...

C: 这一切确实值得记录。
E: All of this is definitely worth recording.

C: 小灰可以在这里，和其余对手进行<color=#f29e38ff>快速对战</color>！
E: Little Gray can engage in <color=#f29e38ff>quick battles</color> with other opponents here!

C: 狮震八方
E: Earthshaker Leo
